summary: This paper is concerned with fault/disturbance compensation control for fully actuated systems. In particular, we explore observer-based control, incorporating an active compensation mechanism. First, we propose a novel observer with enhanced design flexibility for the fully actuated system model, enabling simultaneous estimation of system states and exogenous unknown signals, such as faults or disturbances. Then, a nonlinear controller is developed with an active fault or disturbance compensation term, leveraging the fully actuated system approach. The asymptotic stability of both the state estimation error and the closed-loop control system is systematically established. Finally, the feasibility and merits of the proposed method are validated through comparative simulations and experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于观测器的故障/扰动补偿控制方法，用于全驱动系统，通过新型观测器同时估计系统状态和外部未知信号，并设计非线性控制器实现主动补偿。
AI.motivation: 针对全驱动系统的故障/扰动补偿控制问题，需要同时估计系统状态和外部未知信号（如故障或扰动），并实现主动补偿以提高系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1. 提出具有增强设计灵活性的新型观测器，用于全驱动系统模型，能够同时估计系统状态和外部未知信号；2. 开发非线性控制器，包含主动故障/扰动补偿项，利用全驱动系统方法；3. 系统建立状态估计误差和闭环控制系统的渐近稳定性。
AI.result: 通过对比仿真和实验验证了所提方法的可行性和优点，证明了观测器和控制器的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的基于观测器的故障/扰动补偿控制方法能够有效处理全驱动系统的外部干扰问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Density-Matrix Spectral Embeddings for Categorical Data: Operator Structure and Stability
summary:
We introduce a supervised dimensionality reduction methodology for categorical (and discretized mixed-type) data based on a density-matrix construction induced by class-conditional frequencies. Given a labeled dataset encoded in a one-hot survey space, we assemble a frequency matrix whose columns aggregate feature occurrences within each class, and define a normalized Gram-type operator that satisfies the axioms of a density matrix. The resulting representation admits an intrinsic rank bound controlled by the number of classes, enabling low-dimensional spectral embeddings via dominant eigenmodes.
  Classification is performed in the reduced space through class-conditional kernel density estimation and a maximum-likelihood decision rule.
  We establish structural invariances, provide complexity estimates, and validate the approach on synthetic benchmarks probing high cardinality, sparsity, noise, and class imbalance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于密度矩阵构建的监督降维方法，用于处理分类数据，通过类别条件频率诱导，在降维空间中进行分类
AI.motivation: 针对分类数据（及离散化混合类型数据）的监督降维需求，传统方法可能无法有效处理高基数、稀疏性、噪声和类别不平衡等问题
AI.method: 基于类别条件频率构建密度矩阵：将标记数据集编码为one-hot向量，构建频率矩阵聚合每个类别内的特征出现情况，定义满足密度矩阵公理的归一化Gram型算子，通过主特征模式实现低维谱嵌入
AI.result: 该方法具有结构不变性，复杂度可控，内在秩受类别数限制，在合成基准测试中验证了对高基数、稀疏性、噪声和类别不平衡的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 提出的密度矩阵方法为分类数据提供了一种有效的监督降维框架，在降维空间中通过类别条件核密度估计和最大似然决策规则实现分类

title: Contesting Artificial Moral Agents
summary: There has been much discourse on the ethics of AI, to the extent that there are now systems that possess inherent moral reasoning. Such machines are now formally known as Artificial Moral Agents or AMAs. However, there is a requirement for a dedicated framework that can contest the morality of these systems. This paper proposes a 5E framework for contesting AMAs based on five grounds: ethical, epistemological, explainable, empirical, and evaluative. It further includes the spheres of ethical influences at individual, local, societal, and global levels. Lastly, the framework contributes a provisional timeline that indicates where developers of AMA technologies may anticipate contestation, or may self-contest in order to adhere to value-aligned development of truly moral AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个5E框架（伦理、认识论、可解释性、经验、评估）来质疑人工道德代理（AMA），包含个体到全球四个伦理影响层面，并提供了预测争议的时间线。
AI.motivation: 随着AI伦理讨论的深入，出现了具有内在道德推理能力的人工道德代理（AMA），但目前缺乏专门框架来质疑这些系统的道德性，需要建立系统化的评估体系。
AI.method: 提出了基于五个维度的5E框架：伦理（ethical）、认识论（epistemological）、可解释性（explainable）、经验（empirical）、评估（evaluative），并纳入个体、地方、社会、全球四个伦理影响层面，同时提供预测争议的时间线。
AI.result: 开发了一个综合性的5E框架，为质疑AMA提供了结构化方法，帮助开发者在不同层面和阶段预见并应对道德争议，促进价值对齐的道德AI系统开发。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为人工道德代理的道德性评估提供了系统化工具，通过多维度分析和时间线预测，有助于实现真正道德AI系统的价值对齐开发。

title: BiJEPA: Bi-directional Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture for Symmetric Representation Learning
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has shifted from pixel-level reconstruction to latent space prediction, spearheaded by the Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA). While effective, standard JEPA models typically rely on a uni-directional prediction mechanism (e.g. Context $\to$ Target), potentially neglecting the informative signal inherent in the inverse relationship, degrading its performance. In this work, we propose \textbf{BiJEPA}, a \textit{Bi-Directional Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture} that enforces cycle-consistent predictability between data segments. We address the inherent instability of symmetric prediction (representation explosion) by introducing a critical norm regularization mechanism on the representation vectors. We evaluate BiJEPA on three distinct modalities: synthetic periodic signals, chaotic Lorenz attractor trajectories, and high-dimensional image data (MNIST). Our results demonstrate that BiJEPA achieves stable convergence without collapse, captures the semantic structure of chaotic systems, and learns robust temporal and spatial representations capable of generation and generalisation, offering a more holistic approach to representation learning.

AI.tldr: 提出BiJEPA双向联合嵌入预测架构，通过循环一致性预测和范数正则化解决表示爆炸问题，在多种模态数据上实现稳定收敛和鲁棒表示学习
AI.motivation: 传统JEPA采用单向预测机制，可能忽略反向关系中的信息信号，导致性能下降。需要更全面的表示学习方法，充分利用双向关系的信息。
AI.method: 提出BiJEPA双向联合嵌入预测架构，强制数据片段间的循环一致可预测性。引入关键范数正则化机制解决对称预测中的表示爆炸不稳定问题。
AI.result: 在三种不同模态数据上评估：合成周期信号、混沌Lorenz吸引子轨迹和高维图像数据(MNIST)。BiJEPA实现稳定收敛无崩溃，捕捉混沌系统语义结构，学习到鲁棒的时空表示，具备生成和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BiJEPA通过双向预测和范数正则化，提供了一种更全面的表示学习方法，能够稳定学习鲁棒表示，适用于多种数据类型。

title: Iterative LLM-based improvement for French Clinical Interview Transcription and Speaker Diarization
summary: Automatic speech recognition for French medical conversations remains challenging, with word error rates often exceeding 30% in spontaneous clinical speech. This study proposes a multi-pass LLM post-processing architecture alternating between Speaker Recognition and Word Recognition passes to improve transcription accuracy and speaker attribution. Ablation studies on two French clinical datasets (suicide prevention telephone counseling and preoperative awake neurosurgery consultations) investigate four design choices: model selection, prompting strategy, pass ordering, and iteration depth. Using Qwen3-Next-80B, Wilcoxon signed-rank tests confirm significant WDER reductions on suicide prevention conversations (p < 0.05, n=18), while maintaining stability on awake neurosurgery consultations (n=10), with zero output failures and acceptable computational cost (RTF 0.32), suggesting feasibility for offline clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多轮LLM后处理架构，通过交替进行说话人识别和词识别轮次，显著降低法语医学对话的转录错误率，在自杀预防电话咨询数据集上取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 法语医学对话的自动语音识别面临挑战，自发临床语音的词错误率通常超过30%，需要提高转录准确性和说话人归属准确性。
AI.method: 采用多轮LLM后处理架构，交替进行说话人识别和词识别轮次，研究模型选择、提示策略、轮次顺序和迭代深度四个设计选择，使用Qwen3-Next-80B模型。
AI.result: 在自杀预防电话咨询数据集上显著降低WDER（p<0.05，n=18），在清醒神经外科咨询数据集上保持稳定性（n=10），零输出失败，计算成本可接受（RTF 0.32）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在离线临床部署中具有可行性，能够有效提高法语医学对话的转录准确性，同时保持计算效率。

title: NeuroHex: Highly-Efficient Hex Coordinate System for Creating World Models to Enable Adaptive AI
summary: \textit{NeuroHex} is a hexagonal coordinate system designed to support highly efficient world models and reference frames for online adaptive AI systems. Inspired by the hexadirectional firing structure of grid cells in the human brain, NeuroHex adopts a cubic isometric hexagonal coordinate formulation that provides full 60° rotational symmetry and low-cost translation, rotation and distance computation. We develop a mathematical framework that incorporates ring indexing, quantized angular encoding, and a hierarchical library of foundational, simple, and complex geometric shape primitives. These constructs allow low-overhead point-in-shape tests and spatial matching operations that are expensive in Cartesian coordinate systems. To support realistic settings, the NeuroHex framework can process OpenStreetMap (OSM) data sets using an OSM-to-NeuroHex (\textit{OSM2Hex}) conversion tool. The OSM2Hex spatial abstraction processing pipeline can achieve a reduction of 90-99\% in geometric complexity while maintaining the relevant spatial structure map for navigation. Our initial results, based on actual city and neighborhood scale data sets, demonstrate that NeuroHex offers a highly efficient substrate for building dynamic world models to enable adaptive spatial reasoning in autonomous AI systems with continuous online learning capability.

AI.tldr: NeuroHex是一种受大脑网格细胞启发的六边形坐标系，为在线自适应AI系统提供高效的世界模型和参考框架，支持低成本的空间计算和几何简化。
AI.motivation: 传统笛卡尔坐标系中的点内形状测试和空间匹配操作计算成本高，需要一种更高效的空间表示方法来支持自适应AI系统的连续在线学习和空间推理。
AI.method: 采用立方等距六边形坐标公式，开发包含环索引、量化角度编码和分层几何基元的数学框架，并创建OSM2Hex转换工具处理真实世界地图数据。
AI.result: NeuroHex能保持相关空间结构的同时将几何复杂度降低90-99%，为构建动态世界模型提供高效基础，支持自主AI系统的自适应空间推理。
AI.conclusion: NeuroHex通过受神经科学启发的六边形坐标系统，为具有连续在线学习能力的自适应AI系统提供了高效的空间表示和计算框架。

title: A Generalized Heron-Waist Problem: Optimality Conditions and Convergence Analysis
summary: This paper introduces and solves the Generalized Heron-Waist Problem (GHWP), that integrates the classical Heron problem of optimal hub location and the waist problem of minimal-perimeter configuration. The GHWP seeks an optimal closed polygonal chain with weights whose vertices are constrained to lie in the given nonempty, closed, and convex sets, while simultaneously minimizing weighted distances to a central hub point. This coupled formulation naturally models systems in which cyclic internal connectivity and radial access to a hub must be optimized jointly a structural feature that arises in applications such as supply-chain design, transportation planning, and communication infrastructures. Using modern convex analysis tools, we establish existence of optimal solutions under boundedness and general position assumptions of sets, we prove uniqueness when constraint sets are strictly convex with positive weights. We also derive first order necessary and sufficient optimality conditions using subdifferential calculus. For computation, we develop a Projected Subgradient Algorithm (PSA) and we prove convergence of the best-iterate sequence under classical diminishing step size rules. Numerical illustrations in $\mathbb{R}^2$ and $\mathbb{R}^3$ are provided to validate the algorithm's robustness across diverse geometries and weighting schemes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出并解决了广义Heron-Waist问题，该问题结合了经典Heron最优枢纽位置问题和最小周长配置问题，寻找最优加权闭合多边形链，其顶点位于给定凸集中，同时最小化到中心枢纽的加权距离。
AI.motivation: 该研究旨在解决同时优化循环内部连接和径向枢纽访问的耦合优化问题，这种结构特征出现在供应链设计、交通规划和通信基础设施等应用中。传统方法分别处理这两个问题，但实际应用中需要联合优化。
AI.method: 使用现代凸分析工具，在集合有界和一般位置假设下建立最优解的存在性；在严格凸集和正权重条件下证明唯一性；利用次微分推导一阶必要和充分最优性条件；开发投影次梯度算法(PSA)并证明在经典递减步长规则下最优迭代序列的收敛性。
AI.result: 建立了广义Heron-Waist问题解的存在性和唯一性理论；推导了最优性条件；开发了收敛的投影次梯度算法；在ℝ²和ℝ³中提供了数值验证，展示了算法在不同几何形状和权重方案下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 论文成功解决了广义Heron-Waist问题，提供了理论保证和有效算法，为供应链设计、交通规划和通信基础设施等实际应用中的耦合优化问题提供了数学框架和计算工具。

title: Digital Twin-Based Cooling System Optimization for Data Center
summary: Data center cooling systems consume significant auxiliary energy, yet optimization studies rarely quantify the gap between theoretically optimal and operationally deployable control strategies. This paper develops a digital twin of the liquid cooling infrastructure at the Frontier exascale supercomputer, in which a hot-temperature water system comprises three parallel subloops, each serving dedicated coolant distribution unit clusters through plate heat exchangers and variable-speed pumps. The surrogate model is built based on Modelica and validated through one full calendar year of 10-minute operational data following ASHRAE Guideline 14. The model achieves a subloop coefficient of variation of the root mean square error below 2.7% and a normalized mean bias error within 2.5%. Using this validated surrogate model, a layered optimization framework evaluates three progressively constrained strategies: an analytical flow-only optimization achieves 20.4% total energy saving, unconstrained joint optimization of flow rate and supply temperature demonstrates 30.1% total energy saving, and ramp-constrained optimization of flow rate and supply temperature, enforcing actuator rate limits, can reach total energy saving of 27.8%. The analysis reveals that the baseline system operates at 2.9 times the minimum thermally safe flow rate, and the co-optimizing supply temperature with flow rate nearly doubles the savings achievable by flow reduction alone.

AI.tldr: 基于Frontier超算液冷系统数字孪生，开发分层优化框架，分析不同约束下的节能潜力，发现联合优化流量和供水温度可比单独优化流量实现近双倍节能。
AI.motivation: 数据中心冷却系统消耗大量辅助能源，但现有优化研究很少量化理论最优与可部署控制策略之间的差距。本文旨在通过数字孪生技术，评估不同约束条件下液冷系统的节能潜力。
AI.method: 基于Modelica建立Frontier超算液冷基础设施的数字孪生模型，使用一年10分钟运行数据进行验证。开发分层优化框架，评估三种策略：1)仅流量分析优化；2)流量和供水温度无约束联合优化；3)考虑执行器速率限制的流量和供水温度约束优化。
AI.result: 模型验证显示子回路CV(RMSE)低于2.7%，NMBE在2.5%以内。优化结果：仅流量优化可节能20.4%；无约束联合优化可节能30.1%；考虑执行器速率限制的约束优化可节能27.8%。分析发现基线系统运行在最小热安全流量的2.9倍，联合优化温度与流量比单独优化流量可实现近双倍节能。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生模型能有效评估数据中心冷却系统的节能潜力，联合优化流量和供水温度比单独优化流量能显著提高节能效果，考虑实际执行器限制的优化策略更具部署可行性。

title: TRAKNN: Efficient Trajectory Aware Spatiotemporal kNN for Rare Meteorological Trajectory Detection
summary: Extreme weather events, such as windstorms and heatwaves, are driven by persistent atmospheric circulation patterns that evolve over several consecutive days. While traditional circulation-based studies often focus on instantaneous atmospheric states, capturing the temporal evolution, or trajectory, of these spatial fields is essential for characterizing rare and potentially impactful atmospheric behavior. However, performing an exhaustive similarity search on multi-decadal, continental-scale gridded datasets presents significant computational and memory challenges. In this paper, we propose TRAKNN (TRajectory Aware KNN), a fully unsupervised and data-agnostic framework for detecting geometrically rare short trajectories in spatio-temporal data with an exact kNN approach. TRAKNN leverages a recurrence-based algorithm that decouples computational complexity from trajectory length and efficient batch operations, maximizing computational intensity. These optimizations enable exhaustive analysis on standard workstations, either on CPU or on GPU. We evaluate our approach on 75 years of daily European sea-level pressure data. Our results illustrate that rare trajectories identified by TRAKNN correspond to physically coherent atmospheric anomalies and align with independent extreme-event databases.

AI.tldr: TRAKNN：一种无监督、数据无关的框架，用于检测时空数据中几何上罕见的短轨迹，采用精确kNN方法，可高效分析多年代际气候数据。
AI.motivation: 极端天气事件（如风暴和热浪）由持续数天的大气环流模式驱动。传统环流研究通常关注瞬时大气状态，但捕捉这些空间场的时间演化（轨迹）对于表征罕见且有影响的大气行为至关重要。然而，在多年代际、大陆尺度的网格数据集上进行详尽的相似性搜索存在显著的计算和内存挑战。
AI.method: 提出TRAKNN（轨迹感知KNN）框架，采用完全无监督和数据无关的方法，通过基于递归的算法解耦计算复杂度与轨迹长度，并利用高效的批量操作最大化计算强度。这些优化使得在标准工作站（CPU或GPU）上进行详尽分析成为可能。
AI.result: 在75年欧洲日平均海平面气压数据上评估，TRAKNN识别的罕见轨迹对应于物理上一致的大气异常，并与独立的极端事件数据库相符。
AI.conclusion: TRAKNN能够高效检测时空数据中的罕见轨迹，为极端天气事件的大气环流演化分析提供了有效的计算框架，验证了其在气候研究中的实用价值。

title: The Global Landscape of Environmental AI Regulation: From the Cost of Reasoning to a Right to Green AI
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems impose substantial and growing environmental costs, yet transparency about these impacts has declined even as their deployment has accelerated. This paper makes three contributions. First, we collate empirical evidence that generative Web search and reasoning models - which have proliferated in 2025 - come with much higher cumulative environmental impacts than previous generations of AI approaches. Second, we map the global regulatory landscape across eleven jurisdictions and find that the manner in which environmental governance operates (predominantly at the facility-level rather than the model-level, with a focus on training rather than inference, with limited AI-specific energy disclosure requirements outside the EU) limits its applicability. Third, to address this, we propose a three-pronged policy response: mandatory model-level transparency that covers inference consumption, benchmarks, and compute locations; user rights to opt out of unnecessary generative AI integration and to select environmentally optimized models; and international coordination to prevent regulatory arbitrage. We conclude with concrete legislative proposals - including amendments to the EU AI Act, Consumer Rights Directive, and Digital Services Act - that could serve as templates for other jurisdictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出AI系统环境成本日益增长但透明度下降，分析了生成式搜索推理模型的高环境影响、现有监管局限，并提出包含透明度要求、用户权利和国际协调的三项政策建议。
AI.motivation: AI系统环境成本显著增长，但相关透明度却在下降，而AI部署却在加速。现有环境治理主要关注设施层面而非模型层面，聚焦训练而非推理，且除欧盟外缺乏AI特定能源披露要求，限制了监管的有效性。
AI.method: 1. 收集实证证据分析生成式搜索推理模型的环境影响；2. 调研11个司法管辖区的全球监管格局；3. 提出三管齐下的政策应对方案：强制模型级透明度、用户选择权、国际协调。
AI.result: 1. 生成式搜索推理模型比前代AI方法有更高的累积环境影响；2. 现有监管以设施层面为主而非模型层面，关注训练而非推理，除欧盟外缺乏AI特定能源披露要求；3. 提出了具体的立法提案作为其他司法管辖区的模板。
AI.conclusion: 需要采取综合政策应对AI环境成本问题，包括强制模型级透明度、用户选择权和国际协调。提出了对欧盟AI法案、消费者权利指令和数字服务法的具体修正案作为立法模板。

title: Knowledge-guided generative surrogate modeling for high-dimensional design optimization under scarce data
summary: Surrogate models are widely used in mechanical design and manufacturing process optimization, where high-fidelity computational models may be unavailable or prohibitively expensive. Their effectiveness, however, is often limited by data scarcity, as purely data-driven surrogates struggle to achieve high predictive accuracy in such situations. Subject matter experts (SMEs) frequently possess valuable domain knowledge about functional relationships, yet few surrogate modeling techniques can systematically integrate this information with limited data. We address this challenge with RBF-Gen, a knowledge-guided surrogate modeling framework that combines scarce data with domain knowledge. This method constructs a radial basis function (RBF) space with more centers than training samples and leverages the null space via a generator network, inspired by the principle of maximum information preservation. The introduced latent variables provide a principled mechanism to encode structural relationships and distributional priors during training, thereby guiding the surrogate toward physically meaningful solutions. Numerical studies demonstrate that RBF-Gen significantly outperforms standard RBF surrogates on 1D and 2D structural optimization problems in data-scarce settings, and achieves superior predictive accuracy on a real-world semiconductor manufacturing dataset. These results highlight the potential of combining limited experimental data with domain expertise to enable accurate and practical surrogate modeling in mechanical and process design problems.

AI.tldr: RBF-Gen是一个知识引导的代理建模框架，通过结合稀缺数据和领域知识，在机械设计和制造优化中实现更准确的预测。
AI.motivation: 在机械设计和制造过程优化中，高保真计算模型往往不可用或成本过高，而纯数据驱动的代理模型在数据稀缺情况下预测精度有限。领域专家拥有宝贵的知识，但现有方法难以系统地将这些知识与有限数据结合。
AI.method: 提出RBF-Gen框架，构建具有比训练样本更多中心的径向基函数空间，通过生成器网络利用零空间（受最大信息保留原理启发）。引入的潜变量提供了编码结构关系和分布先验的原则性机制，引导代理模型获得物理上有意义的解。
AI.result: 在数据稀缺设置下，RBF-Gen在1D和2D结构优化问题上显著优于标准RBF代理模型，并在真实半导体制造数据集上实现了更优的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 将有限实验数据与领域专业知识结合，能够在机械和过程设计问题中实现准确且实用的代理建模，展示了知识引导方法的潜力。

title: Stepwise Penalization for Length-Efficient Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Large reasoning models improve with more test-time computation, but often overthink, producing unnecessarily long chains-of-thought that raise cost without improving accuracy. Prior reinforcement learning approaches typically rely on a single outcome reward with trajectory-level length penalties, which cannot distinguish essential from redundant reasoning steps and therefore yield blunt compression. Although recent work incorporates step-level signals, such as offline pruning, supervised data construction, or verifier-based intermediate rewards, reasoning length is rarely treated as an explicit step-level optimization objective during RL. We propose Step-wise Adaptive Penalization (SWAP), a fine-grained framework that allocates length reduction across steps based on intrinsic contribution. We estimate step importance from the model's on-policy log-probability improvement toward the correct answer, then treat excess length as a penalty mass redistributed to penalize low-importance steps more heavily while preserving high-importance reasoning. We optimize with a unified outcome-process advantage within group-relative policy optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SWAP reduces reasoning length by 64.3% on average while improving accuracy by 5.7% relative to the base model.

AI.tldr: SWAP框架通过基于步骤重要性的自适应惩罚，在保持准确率的同时大幅减少推理长度
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在增加推理时间计算时会提升性能，但经常"过度思考"，产生不必要的长推理链，增加成本而不提升准确率。现有强化学习方法通常依赖单一结果奖励和轨迹级长度惩罚，无法区分必要和冗余的推理步骤，导致压缩效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出Step-wise Adaptive Penalization (SWAP)框架，基于步骤内在贡献分配长度缩减。通过模型在策略对数概率对正确答案的改进来估计步骤重要性，将多余长度作为惩罚质量重新分配，更重地惩罚低重要性步骤，同时保留高重要性推理。使用统一的"结果-过程"优势函数进行组相对策略优化。
AI.result: 实验表明SWAP平均减少推理长度64.3%，同时相对于基础模型提升准确率5.7%。
AI.conclusion: SWAP通过细粒度的步骤级自适应惩罚，有效压缩推理链长度同时提升性能，解决了过度思考问题。

title: Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization for LLM-based Automated Grading
summary: Accurate and unambiguous guidelines are critical for large language model (LLM) based graders, yet manually crafting these prompts is often sub-optimal as LLMs can misinterpret expert guidelines or lack necessary domain specificity. Consequently, the field has moved toward automated prompt optimization to refine grading guidelines without the burden of manual trial and error. However, existing frameworks typically aggregate independent and unstructured error samples into a single update step, resulting in "rule dilution" where conflicting constraints weaken the model's grading logic. To address these limitations, we introduce Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization (CARO), a novel framework that enhances accuracy and computational efficiency by structurally separating error signals. CARO leverages the confusion matrix to decompose monolithic error signals into distinct modes, allowing for the diagnosis and repair of specific misclassification patterns individually. By synthesizing targeted "fixing patches" for dominant error modes and employing a diversity-aware selection mechanism, the framework prevents guidance conflict and eliminates the need for resource-heavy nested refinement loops. Empirical evaluations on teacher education and STEM datasets demonstrate that CARO significantly outperforms existing SOTA methods. These results suggest that replacing mixed-error aggregation with surgical, mode-specific repair yields robust improvements in automated assessment scalability and precision.

AI.tldr: CARO框架通过结构化分离错误信号，利用混淆矩阵分解错误模式，针对特定误分类模式进行诊断和修复，显著提升LLM评分器的准确性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评分器的提示优化方法通常将独立、非结构化的错误样本聚合到单个更新步骤中，导致"规则稀释"问题，即冲突约束削弱模型的评分逻辑。需要更精确的方法来避免这种问题。
AI.method: 提出Confusion-Aware Rubric Optimization (CARO)框架：1) 利用混淆矩阵将整体错误信号分解为不同模式；2) 针对主导错误模式合成针对性"修复补丁"；3) 采用多样性感知选择机制防止指导冲突；4) 避免资源密集的嵌套细化循环。
AI.result: 在教师教育和STEM数据集上的实证评估表明，CARO显著优于现有SOTA方法，证明用外科手术式的模式特定修复替代混合错误聚合能带来鲁棒的改进。
AI.conclusion: CARO框架通过结构化分离错误信号和针对特定误分类模式进行修复，显著提升了自动评估的可扩展性和精确性，为解决LLM评分器中的规则稀释问题提供了有效方案。

title: KKT conditions for optimization with generalized invex fuzzy functions
summary: This paper explores optimality conditions in optimization problems involving generalized invex fuzzy functions. We extend the classical KKT framework to settings in which the objective and constraint functions are nonsmooth, vector-valued, and fuzzy-valued, and satisfy various generalized invexity conditions such as V-invexity, V-pseudoinvexity, and Vquasiinvexity. After reviewing key concepts from nonsmooth analysis and multiobjective optimization, we derive new KKT-type conditions under weaker assumptions than classical convexity, ensuring (weak) Pareto optimality in fuzzy environments. Our results unify and generalize earlier work by Antczak and Mishra as well as demonstrate the power of generalized invexity in establishing optimality without requiring differentiability nor convexity. Several illustrative examples are included to demonstrate the applicability of the developed theory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究广义不变模糊函数优化问题的最优性条件，将经典KKT框架扩展到非光滑、向量值、模糊值函数，在V-不变、V-伪不变、V-拟不变等广义不变性条件下推导新的KKT型条件。
AI.motivation: 传统KKT条件要求函数可微且凸，但在实际优化问题中，目标函数和约束函数往往是非光滑、向量值、模糊值的，且不满足经典凸性。需要建立更一般的理论框架来处理这类广义优化问题。
AI.method: 结合非光滑分析、多目标优化和模糊数学，在广义不变性条件（V-不变、V-伪不变、V-拟不变）下推导KKT型最优性条件，使用比经典凸性更弱的假设。
AI.result: 建立了模糊环境下非光滑向量优化问题的KKT型最优性条件，确保（弱）Pareto最优性，统一并推广了Antczak和Mishra的早期工作，通过示例验证了理论的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 广义不变性条件能够在不需要可微性和凸性的情况下建立最优性理论，为处理模糊环境下的非光滑向量优化问题提供了有效的理论框架，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Least-Cost Overvoltage Control in PV-Rich Distribution Networks via Unbalanced Optimal Power Flow
comment: Published in journal Sustainable Energy, Grids and Networks
summary: The increasing penetration of photovoltaic (PV) generation in low-voltage distribution networks presents operational challenges, with overvoltages being among the most critical. This study introduces a tool based on Unbalanced Optimal Power Flow (UBOPF) to assess cost-effective local inverter control strategies specifically aimed at mitigating overvoltage issues. Two approaches are examined: dynamic active power curtailment and combined active and reactive power control. These strategies are tested on a residential low-voltage network with high PV penetration, where the UBOPF model with voltage-magnitude constraints was implemented in Julia using the JuMP optimization package. The results demonstrate that both methods are effective in maintaining voltage levels within regulatory limits, with the latter leading to lower PV curtailment. The analysis highlights the need to consider these control actions as ancillary services to the grid, which should be properly compensated given their effect on generator revenues.

AI.tldr: 开发基于不平衡最优潮流（UBOPF）的工具，评估两种本地逆变器控制策略（动态有功功率削减、有功无功联合控制）以缓解高光伏渗透配电网的过电压问题。
AI.motivation: 随着光伏发电在低压配电网中的渗透率不断提高，过电压问题成为最关键的运行挑战之一，需要寻找经济有效的本地控制策略来缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 采用基于Julia/JuMP优化包的不平衡最优潮流（UBOPF）模型，在具有高光伏渗透率的住宅低压配电网中测试两种控制策略：动态有功功率削减、有功和无功功率联合控制。
AI.result: 两种方法都能有效将电压维持在监管限值内，其中联合控制策略导致的光伏削减量更低，效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 这些控制措施应被视为电网的辅助服务，考虑到其对发电商收入的影响，应给予适当补偿。

title: Instrumental and Proximal Causal Inference with Gaussian Processes
summary: Instrumental variable (IV) and proximal causal learning (Proxy) methods are central frameworks for causal inference in the presence of unobserved confounding. Despite substantial methodological advances, existing approaches rarely provide reliable epistemic uncertainty (EU) quantification. We address this gap through a Deconditional Gaussian Process (DGP) framework for uncertainty-aware causal learning. Our formulation recovers popular kernel estimators as the posterior mean, ensuring predictive precision, while the posterior variance yields principled and well-calibrated EU. Moreover, the probabilistic structure enables systematic model selection via marginal log-likelihood optimization. Empirical results demonstrate strong predictive performance alongside informative EU quantification, evaluated via empirical coverage frequencies and decision-aware accuracy rejection curves. Together, our approach provides a unified, practical solution for causal inference under unobserved confounding with reliable uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 提出基于解条件高斯过程的因果推断框架，为存在未观测混杂变量的情况提供可靠的认知不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有工具变量和代理因果学习方法虽然方法上有进展，但很少能提供可靠的认知不确定性量化，这限制了因果推断的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用解条件高斯过程框架，将流行的核估计器恢复为后验均值，同时利用后验方差提供原则化的不确定性量化，并通过边际对数似然优化实现系统模型选择。
AI.result: 实证结果显示该方法具有强大的预测性能，同时提供了信息丰富的认知不确定性量化，通过经验覆盖频率和决策感知的准确率拒绝曲线进行评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为存在未观测混杂变量的因果推断提供了一个统一、实用的解决方案，具有可靠的不确定性量化能力。

title: Designing Explainable AI for Healthcare Reviews: Guidance on Adoption and Trust
summary: Patients increasingly rely on online reviews when choosing healthcare providers, yet the sheer volume of these reviews can hinder effective decision-making. This paper summarises a mixed-methods study aimed at evaluating a proposed explainable AI system that analyses patient reviews and provides transparent explanations for its outputs. The survey (N=60) indicated broad optimism regarding usefulness (82% agreed it saves time; 78% that it highlights essentials), alongside strong demand for explainability (84% considered it important to understand why a review is classified; 82% said explanations would increase trust). Around 45% preferred combined text-and-visual explanations. Thematic analysis of open-ended survey responses revealed core requirements such as accuracy, clarity and simplicity, responsiveness, data credibility, and unbiased processing. In addition, interviews with AI experts provided deeper qualitative insights, highlighting technical considerations and potential challenges for different explanation methods. Drawing on TAM and trust in automation, the findings suggest that high perceived usefulness and transparent explanations promote adoption, whereas complexity and inaccuracy hinder it. This paper contributes actionable design guidance for layered, audience-aware explanations in healthcare review systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了一个可解释AI系统，用于分析患者在线评价并提供透明解释。调查显示用户对系统有用性持乐观态度，强烈要求可解释性，并偏好图文结合的解释方式。
AI.motivation: 患者越来越依赖在线评价选择医疗提供者，但评价数量庞大阻碍有效决策。需要开发能够分析患者评价并提供透明解释的AI系统，帮助用户更好地理解和信任推荐结果。
AI.method: 采用混合方法研究：1) 对60名参与者进行问卷调查，评估系统有用性和可解释性需求；2) 对开放式回答进行主题分析，识别核心需求；3) 与AI专家进行访谈，获取技术见解和潜在挑战。
AI.result: 调查显示：82%同意系统节省时间，78%认为突出要点；84%认为理解分类原因重要，82%表示解释能增加信任；约45%偏好图文结合解释。主题分析识别出准确性、清晰简洁性、响应性、数据可信度和无偏处理等核心需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于技术接受模型和自动化信任理论，研究发现高感知有用性和透明解释促进采用，而复杂性和不准确性阻碍采用。研究为医疗评价系统提供了分层、面向受众的解释设计指导。

title: Mag-Mamba: Modeling Coupled spatiotemporal Asymmetry for POI Recommendation
summary: Next Point-of-Interest (POI) recommendation is a critical task in location-based services, yet it faces the fundamental challenge of coupled spatiotemporal asymmetry inherent in urban mobility. Specifically, transition intents between locations exhibit high asymmetry and are dynamically conditioned on time. Existing methods, typically built on graph or sequence backbones, rely on symmetric operators or real-valued aggregations, struggling to unify the modeling of time-varying global directionality. To address this limitation, we propose Mag-Mamba, a framework whose core insight lies in modeling spatiotemporal asymmetry as phase-driven rotational dynamics in the complex domain. Based on this, we first devise a Time-conditioned Magnetic Phase Encoder that constructs a time-conditioned Magnetic Laplacian on the geographic adjacency graph, utilizing edge phase differences to characterize the globally evolving spatial directionality. Subsequently, we introduce a Complex-valued Mamba module that generalizes traditional scalar state decay into joint decay-rotation dynamics, explicitly modulated by both time intervals and magnetic geographic priors. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that Mag-Mamba achieves significant performance improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: Mag-Mamba：一种通过复数域相位驱动旋转动力学建模时空不对称性的下一兴趣点推荐框架
AI.motivation: 现有下一兴趣点推荐方法面临城市移动性中固有的耦合时空不对称性挑战。位置间的转移意图具有高度不对称性且随时间动态变化，而现有基于图或序列的方法依赖对称算子或实值聚合，难以统一建模随时间变化的全局方向性。
AI.method: 提出Mag-Mamba框架，核心是将时空不对称性建模为复数域中的相位驱动旋转动力学。首先设计时间条件磁相位编码器，在地理邻接图上构建时间条件磁拉普拉斯矩阵，利用边相位差表征全局演化的空间方向性。然后引入复数Mamba模块，将传统标量状态衰减推广为联合衰减-旋转动力学，由时间间隔和磁地理先验共同调制。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，Mag-Mamba相比最先进的基线方法取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过将时空不对称性建模为复数域中的相位驱动旋转动力学，Mag-Mamba能够有效统一建模时间变化的全局方向性，为下一兴趣点推荐提供了创新解决方案。

title: From Prerequisites to Predictions: Validating a Geometric Hallucination Taxonomy Through Controlled Induction
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, appendices (reproducibility, sample generation, additional figures)
summary: We test whether a geometric hallucination taxonomy -- classifying failures as center-drift (Type~1), wrong-well convergence (Type~2), or coverage gaps (Type~3) -- can distinguish hallucination types through controlled induction in GPT-2. Using a two-level statistical design with prompts ($N = 15$/group) as the unit of inference, we run each experiment 20 times with different generation seeds to quantify result stability. In static embeddings, Type~3 norm separation is robust (significant in 18/20 runs, Holm-corrected in 14/20, median $r = +0.61$). In contextual hidden states, the Type~3 norm effect direction is stable (19/20 runs) but underpowered at $N = 15$ (significant in 4/20, median $r = -0.28$). Types~1 and~2 do not separate in either space (${\leq}\,3/20$ runs). Token-level tests inflate significance by 4--16$\times$ through pseudoreplication -- a finding replicated across all 20 runs. The results establish coverage-gap hallucinations as the most geometrically distinctive failure mode, carried by magnitude rather than direction, and confirm the Type~1/2 non-separation as genuine at 124M parameters.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过几何幻觉分类法在GPT-2中测试不同类型的幻觉，发现覆盖间隙幻觉（Type 3）在几何上最显著，而中心漂移（Type 1）和错误井收敛（Type 2）无法区分。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是验证几何幻觉分类法能否有效区分不同类型的幻觉失败模式，并评估这些分类在语言模型中的几何表现。
AI.method: 采用两层统计设计，以提示为推理单元（每组N=15），每个实验运行20次不同生成种子。在静态嵌入和上下文隐藏状态中测试三种幻觉类型（中心漂移、错误井收敛、覆盖间隙）的几何分离。
AI.result: 覆盖间隙幻觉（Type 3）在静态嵌入中表现稳健（18/20次显著，中位数r=+0.61），在上下文隐藏状态中方向稳定但统计效力不足。Type 1和Type 2在两种空间中均无法区分（≤3/20次显著）。词元级测试因伪重复而夸大显著性4-16倍。
AI.conclusion: 覆盖间隙幻觉是最具几何区分性的失败模式，由幅度而非方向驱动；Type 1和Type 2在124M参数模型中确实无法区分；词元级分析会因伪重复产生误导性结果。

title: MED-COPILOT: A Medical Assistant Powered by GraphRAG and Similar Patient Case Retrieval
summary:
Clinical decision-making requires synthesizing heterogeneous evidence, including patient histories, clinical guidelines, and trajectories of comparable cases. While large language models (LLMs) offer strong reasoning capabilities, they remain prone to hallucinations and struggle to integrate long, structured medical documents. We present MED-COPILOT, an interactive clinical decision-support system designed for clinicians and medical trainees, which combines guideline-grounded GraphRAG retrieval with hybrid semantic-keyword similar-patient retrieval to support transparent and evidence-aware clinical reasoning. The system builds a structured knowledge graph from WHO and NICE guidelines, applies community-level summarization for efficient retrieval, and maintains a 36,000-case similar-patient database derived from SOAP-normalized MIMIC-IV notes and Synthea-generated records.
  We evaluate our framework on clinical note completion and medical question answering, and demonstrate that it consistently outperforms parametric LLM baselines and standard RAG, improving both generation fidelity and clinical reasoning accuracy. The full system is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/Cryo3978/Med_GraphRAG , enabling users to inspect retrieved evidence, visualize token-level similarity contributions, and conduct guided follow-up analysis. Our results demonstrate a practical and interpretable approach to integrating structured guideline knowledge with patient-level analogical evidence for clinical LLMs.

AI.tldr: MED-COPILOT是一个临床决策支持系统，结合指南知识图谱检索和相似患者检索，提升LLM在医疗决策中的准确性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 临床决策需要整合异质证据，但现有LLM容易产生幻觉且难以处理长结构化医疗文档。需要开发能够透明、证据感知的临床推理系统。
AI.method: 结合指南驱动的GraphRAG检索和混合语义-关键词相似患者检索。从WHO/NICE指南构建知识图谱，使用社区级摘要进行高效检索，维护36,000个SOAP标准化病例数据库。
AI.result: 在临床笔记补全和医疗问答任务上，系统持续优于参数化LLM基线和标准RAG，提高了生成保真度和临床推理准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种实用且可解释的方法，将结构化指南知识与患者级类比证据整合到临床LLM中，为临床决策提供透明证据支持。

title: Finite convergence of the Moment-SOS hierarchy under hidden convexity
summary:
One considers polynomial optimization problems with compact feasible set $\mathbfΩ$ defined by SOS-concave polynomials $g_j$, and with a globally non-convex polynomial objective $f$. We show that if $f$ is strongly convex on $\mathbfΩ$, or SOS-convex on $\mathbfΩ$ when the constraints $g_j$ are at most quadratic, then the associated Moment-SOS hierarchy converges in finitely many steps, without à priori knowledge of this hidden (local) convexity. In addition, in the latter case, the exact order for which the relaxation is exact is
  provided by the degree of a Putinar-like certificate of convexity. This demonstrates that a general-purpose hierarchy can adapt to favorable hidden properties of a specific instance without being informed of them, yielding certified global minimizers.

AI.tldr: 多项式优化问题在满足特定凸性条件时，矩-SOS层次结构可在有限步收敛，无需预先知道隐藏的凸性
AI.motivation: 研究多项式优化问题中，当目标函数具有隐藏的凸性结构时，矩-SOS层次结构的收敛特性。传统方法需要预先知道凸性，本文探讨如何让通用层次结构自动适应特定实例的有利属性。
AI.method: 分析两种凸性条件：1）目标函数在可行集上强凸；2）目标函数在可行集上SOS凸且约束至多为二次。证明在这些条件下，矩-SOS层次结构可在有限步收敛，并给出精确阶数。
AI.result: 证明当目标函数在可行集上强凸，或当目标函数SOS凸且约束至多为二次时，矩-SOS层次结构在有限步收敛。在后者情况下，精确阶数由凸性的Putinar-like证书的度给出。
AI.conclusion: 通用层次结构能够适应特定实例的有利隐藏属性而无需预先知道这些属性，从而产生经过认证的全局极小值。这为多项式优化提供了更强大的理论保证。

title: AC-Informed DC Optimal Transmission Switching via Admittance Sensitivity-Augmented Constraints and Repair Costs
summary: AC optimal transmission switching (AC-OTS) is a computationally challenging problem due to the nonconvexity and nonlinearity of AC power-flow (PF) equations coupled with a large number of binary variables. A computationally efficient alternative is the DC-OTS model, which uses the DC PF equations, but it can yield infeasible or suboptimal switching decisions when evaluated under the full AC optimal power flow (AC-OPF). To tackle this issue, we propose an AC-Informed DC Optimal Transmission Switching (AIDC-OTS) scheme that enhances the DC-OTS model by leveraging first- and second-order admittance sensitivities-based constraints and repair/penalty costs that guide the DC OTS towards AC-feasible topologies. The resulting model initially is a Mixed-Integer Quadratically Constrained Quadratic Program (MIQCQP), which we further reformulate into solver-friendly representations, such as a Mixed-Integer Second-Order Cone Program (MISOCP) and a Mixed-Integer Linear Program (MILP). This proposed scheme yields switching topologies that are AC-feasible, while maintaining computational tractability. We validate the proposed scheme using extensive simulations across a large set of PGlib test cases, demonstrating its effectiveness, with performance benchmarks against original DC-OTS and other OTS formulations such as LPAC-OTS and QC-OTS.

AI.tldr: 提出AIDC-OTS方案，通过引入基于导纳灵敏度的约束和修复/惩罚成本，增强DC-OTS模型以获得AC可行的拓扑结构，同时保持计算可行性。
AI.motivation: AC-OTS由于AC潮流方程的非凸非线性以及大量二元变量而计算困难。DC-OTS虽然计算效率高，但在完整AC-OPF评估下可能产生不可行或次优的开关决策。
AI.method: 提出AC-Informed DC OTS方案，利用一阶和二阶导纳灵敏度约束和修复/惩罚成本，引导DC OTS朝向AC可行的拓扑。将初始的MIQCQP模型进一步转化为MISOCP和MILP等求解友好的表示形式。
AI.result: 该方案产生的开关拓扑具有AC可行性，同时保持计算可行性。在大量PGlib测试案例上的仿真验证了其有效性，并与原始DC-OTS、LPAC-OTS和QC-OTS等方案进行了性能比较。
AI.conclusion: AIDC-OTS方案通过增强DC-OTS模型，成功解决了AC可行性问题，在计算效率和AC可行性之间取得了良好平衡。

title: Empirical Study of Gaze Behavior in Children and Young Adults Using Deep Neural Networks and Robot Implementation: A Comparative Analysis of Social Situations
summary: In a preliminary exploratory study, our goal was to train deep neural network models to mimic children's and/or adults' gaze behavior in certain social situations to reach this objective. Additionally, we aim to identify potential differences in gaze behavior between these two age groups based on our participants' gaze data. Furthermore, we aimed to assess the practical effectiveness of our adult and children models by deploying them on a Nao robot in real-life settings. To achieve this, we first created two video clips, one animation and one live-action, to depict some social situations. Using an eye-tracking device, we collected eye-tracking data from 24 participants, including 12 children and 12 adults. Then, we utilized deep neural networks, specifically LSTM and Transformer Networks, to analyze and model the gaze patterns of each group of participants. Our results indicate that when the models attempted to predict people's locations (in the next frame), they had an accuracy in the range of 62%-70% with one attempt, which increased by ~20% when attempted twice (i.e. the two highest-ranked predicted labels as outputs). As expected, the result underscores that gaze behavior is not a wholly unique phenomenon. We obtained feedback from 57 new participants to evaluate the robot's functionality. These participants were asked to watch two videos of the robot's performance in each mode and then complete a comprehensive questionnaire. The questionnaire results indicate that the participants expressed satisfaction with the robot's interaction, including its attention, intelligence, and responsiveness to human actions. However, they did not perceive the robot as a social companion comparable to a human. This exploratory study tries to address/show potentials of the social acceptance of robots based on human nonverbal behavioral cues for future research.

AI.tldr: 使用深度学习模型模拟儿童和成人的注视行为，并在Nao机器人上部署，评估社交接受度
AI.motivation: 探索基于人类非语言行为线索（特别是注视行为）的机器人社交接受潜力，比较儿童与成人注视行为的差异
AI.method: 1) 制作动画和实拍视频展示社交场景；2) 使用眼动仪收集24名参与者（12儿童+12成人）的注视数据；3) 使用LSTM和Transformer网络建模注视模式；4) 在Nao机器人上部署成人/儿童模型；5) 通过57名新参与者的问卷调查评估机器人表现
AI.result: 1) 模型预测下一帧人物位置的准确率为62%-70%（单次尝试），两次尝试后提升约20%；2) 注视行为并非完全独特现象；3) 参与者对机器人的注意力、智能性和响应性满意，但不认为机器人能达到人类社交伴侣的水平
AI.conclusion: 这项探索性研究展示了基于人类非语言行为线索（特别是注视行为）的机器人社交接受潜力，为未来研究提供了方向，但机器人目前还无法达到人类社交伴侣的水平

title: Expert Divergence Learning for MoE-based Language Models
summary: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture is a powerful technique for scaling language models, yet it often suffers from expert homogenization, where experts learn redundant functionalities, thereby limiting MoE's full potential. To address this, we introduce Expert Divergence Learning, a novel pre-training strategy that explicitly encourages functional specialization among experts. Our method incorporates a label-driven auxiliary loss that leverages domain labels inherent in pre-training corpora to maximize the Jensen-Shannon Divergence between the expert routing distributions of different data domains. This optimization objective guides the model to develop diverged routing policies for varied domains and closer routing policies for the same domain, which leads to emergent and organized expert specialization. We validate our approach by pre-training MoE models of up to 15 billion parameters from scratch. Experimental results demonstrate that models trained with Expert Divergence Learning not only achieve a lower language modeling loss but also exhibit significant performance improvements across a diverse range of downstream benchmarks. Further analysis confirms that our method effectively mitigates expert homogenization and brings greater functional specialization, all with negligible computational overhead during training.

AI.tldr: 提出Expert Divergence Learning方法，通过标签驱动的辅助损失函数，利用预训练语料中的领域标签最大化不同数据领域间专家路由分布的Jensen-Shannon散度，从而解决MoE架构中的专家同质化问题，促进专家功能专业化。
AI.motivation: 混合专家(MoE)架构是扩展语言模型的有效技术，但常面临专家同质化问题，即专家学习冗余功能，限制了MoE的全部潜力。需要一种方法来解决这个问题，促进专家之间的功能专业化。
AI.method: 提出Expert Divergence Learning预训练策略，通过标签驱动的辅助损失函数，利用预训练语料中的领域标签，最大化不同数据领域间专家路由分布的Jensen-Shannon散度。该方法引导模型为不同领域开发差异化的路由策略，为相同领域开发相似的路由策略，从而实现有组织的专家专业化。
AI.result: 从零开始预训练了高达150亿参数的MoE模型。实验结果表明，使用Expert Divergence Learning训练的模型不仅获得更低的语言建模损失，还在多种下游基准测试中表现出显著的性能提升。进一步分析证实该方法有效缓解了专家同质化问题，带来了更大的功能专业化，且训练过程中计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: Expert Divergence Learning是一种有效的预训练策略，能够解决MoE架构中的专家同质化问题，促进专家功能专业化，提高模型性能，且计算开销极小。

title: When Metrics Disagree: Automatic Similarity vs. LLM-as-a-Judge for Clinical Dialogue Evaluation
summary: This paper details the baseline model selection, fine-tuning process, evaluation methods, and the implications of deploying more accurate LLMs in healthcare settings. As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly employed to address diverse problems, including medical queries, concerns about their reliability have surfaced. A recent study by Long Island University highlighted that LLMs often perform poorly in medical contexts, potentially leading to harmful misguidance for users. To address this, our research focuses on fine-tuning the Llama 2 7B, a transformer-based, decoder-only model, using transcripts from real patient-doctor interactions. Our objective was to enhance the model's accuracy and precision in responding to medical queries. We fine-tuned the model using a supervised approach, emphasizing domain-specific nuances captured in the training data. In the best scenario, the model results should be reviewed and evaluated by real medical experts. Due to resource constraints, the performance of the fine-tuned model was evaluated using text similarity metrics. The fine-tuned model demonstrated significant improvements across all key dimensions except GPT-4's evaluation. The evaluations of ChatGPT4 are quite different from the quantitative results; here, we not only suggest, but also propose that the result should be evaluated by human medical experts.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过使用真实医患对话记录微调Llama 2 7B模型，旨在提高LLM在医疗问答中的准确性和可靠性，以解决现有LLM在医疗领域表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在医疗领域应用日益广泛，但现有研究表明它们在医疗情境中表现不佳，可能对用户产生有害误导。长岛大学的研究显示LLM在医疗上下文中表现较差，这促使研究者开发更可靠的医疗问答模型。
AI.method: 使用监督学习方法对Llama 2 7B（基于transformer的解码器模型）进行微调，训练数据来自真实医患互动记录。由于资源限制，使用文本相似度指标而非医疗专家评估来评估模型性能。
AI.result: 微调后的模型在所有关键维度上都有显著改进，但GPT-4的评估结果与定量结果存在差异。研究者建议最终评估应由真实医疗专家进行。
AI.conclusion: 虽然微调能显著提升LLM在医疗问答中的性能，但GPT-4评估与定量结果的不一致表明需要医疗专家参与最终评估，以确保模型在实际医疗环境中的可靠性和安全性。

title: Optimizing In-Context Demonstrations for LLM-based Automated Grading
summary: Automated assessment of open-ended student responses is a critical capability for scaling personalized feedback in education. While large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in grading tasks via in-context learning (ICL), their reliability is heavily dependent on the selection of few-shot exemplars and the construction of high-quality rationales. Standard retrieval methods typically select examples based on semantic similarity, which often fails to capture subtle decision boundaries required for rubric adherence. Furthermore, manually crafting the expert rationales needed to guide these models can be a significant bottleneck. To address these limitations, we introduce GUIDE (Grading Using Iteratively Designed Exemplars), a framework that reframes exemplar selection and refinement in automated grading as a boundary-focused optimization problem. GUIDE operates on a continuous loop of selection and refinement, employing novel contrastive operators to identify "boundary pairs" that are semantically similar but possess different grades. We enhance exemplars by generating discriminative rationales that explicitly articulate why a response receives a specific score to the exclusion of adjacent grades. Extensive experiments across datasets in physics, chemistry, and pedagogical content knowledge demonstrate that GUIDE significantly outperforms standard retrieval baselines. By focusing the model's attention on the precise edges of rubric, our approach shows exceptionally robust gains on borderline cases and improved rubric adherence. GUIDE paves the way for trusted, scalable assessment systems that align closely with human pedagogical standards.

AI.tldr: GUIDE框架通过边界聚焦优化改进自动评分，使用对比操作识别边界对并生成判别性理由，显著提升评分准确性和规则一致性
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评分方法依赖少量样本选择和高质量理由构建，但基于语义相似性的检索方法难以捕捉评分规则的微妙边界，手动制作专家理由成为瓶颈
AI.method: 提出GUIDE框架，将样本选择和优化重构为边界聚焦优化问题，通过连续的选择-优化循环，使用对比操作识别语义相似但分数不同的"边界对"，并生成明确解释为何获得特定分数而非相邻分数的判别性理由
AI.result: 在物理、化学和教学内容知识等多个数据集上的实验表明，GUIDE显著优于标准检索基线，在边界案例上表现出特别稳健的提升，并改善了评分规则的一致性
AI.conclusion: GUIDE通过聚焦模型注意力于评分规则的精确边界，为可信、可扩展的评估系统铺平了道路，使其更符合人类教学标准

title: Linear Threshold for Oertel's Conjecture on the Mixed-Integer Volume
summary: Grünbaum's inequality guarantees that the centroid of a convex body has halfspace depth at least $1/e$: every halfspace containing the centroid captures at least a $1/e$ fraction of the body's volume. For mixed-integer convex sets $S=C\cap(\mathbb Z^n\times\mathbb{R}^d)$ where $C$ is a convex body, Oertel conjectured that there exists $y\in S$ such that every closed halfspace $H$ containing $y$ satisfies $H_d(S\cap H)\ge \frac{1}{2^ne} H_d(S)$, where $H_d(X)$ denotes the $d$-dimensional Hausdorff measure of $X$. This conjecture is closely connected to complexity bounds for cutting plane methods and information complexity in mixed-integer convex optimization. Basu and Oertel established this conjecture for sets of sufficiently large lattice width, with the required lower bound on lattice width depending exponentially on the dimension. More recently, Cristi and Salas reduced this threshold to a polynomial one by assuming that $\mathrm{proj}_{\mathbb{R}^n}(C)$ contains a Euclidean ball of radius at least $1178 d^2n^{3/2}$. We prove that when the projection contains an $\ell_\infty$ ball of radius $k\ge(3e/2)(n+d)$, which is linear in the dimensions $n$ and $d$, there exists $y^*\in S$ such that every closed halfspace $H$ containing $y^*$ satisfies $H_d(S\cap H)\ge\left(\frac{1}{e}-\frac{3(n+d)}{2k}\right)H_d(S)$. In particular, when $k\ge 3e(n+d)$ we obtain $H_d(S\cap H)\ge \frac{1}{2e}H_d(S)\ge \frac{1}{2^ne}H_d(S)$, thus verifying Oertel's conjecture for a significantly larger family of sets than previous results. We also show that this linear scaling is necessary: when the radius is sublinear in the total dimension, the maximum achievable halfspace depth can be arbitrarily small relative to the total mixed-integer volume, so no dimension-independent constant fraction lower bound is possible under such an assumption alone. However, the conjecture remains open in its full generality.

AI.tldr: 证明了对于混合整数凸集，当投影包含足够大的ℓ∞球时，存在点使得包含该点的任意闭半空间至少捕获集合体积的1/(2e)，验证了Oertel猜想的一个重要特例。
AI.motivation: 研究混合整数凸集中是否存在具有足够大半空间深度的点，这与切割平面方法的复杂度界限和混合整数凸优化的信息复杂度密切相关。
AI.method: 假设混合整数凸集S=C∩(ℤⁿ×ℝᵈ)的投影包含半径为k≥(3e/2)(n+d)的ℓ∞球，证明存在点y*∈S使得包含y*的任意闭半空间至少捕获集合体积的(1/e - 3(n+d)/(2k))倍。
AI.result: 当k≥3e(n+d)时，得到H_d(S∩H)≥(1/(2e))H_d(S)≥(1/(2ⁿe))H_d(S)，验证了Oertel猜想。同时证明线性尺度是必要的：当半径相对于总维度是次线性时，最大可实现的半空间深度可以任意小。
AI.conclusion: 证明了在投影包含线性尺度ℓ∞球的条件下Oertel猜想成立，显著扩展了先前结果适用的集合范围，但猜想在完全一般性下仍然开放。

title: Operational Modal Analysis of Aeronautical Structures via Tangential Interpolation
summary: Over the last decades, progress in modal analysis has enabled increasingly routine use of modal parameters, including those extracted from in-situ measurements, for applications such as structural health monitoring and finite element model updating. For output-only identification, or Operational Modal Analysis (OMA), widely adopted approaches include Stochastic Subspace Identification (SSI) methods and the Natural Excitation Technique combined with the Eigensystem Realization Algorithm (NExT-ERA). Nevertheless, SSI-based techniques may become cumbersome on large systems, while NExT-ERA fitting can struggle when measurements are contaminated by noise. To alleviate these, this work investigates an OMA frequency-domain formulation for aeronautical structures by coupling the Loewner Framework (LF) with NExT, yielding the proposed NExT-LF method. The method exploits the computational efficiency of LF together with the impulse response function retrieval enabled by NExT. NExT-LF is assessed on two experimental benchmarks: the eXperimental BeaRDS 2 high-aspect-ratio wing main spar and an Airbus Helicopters H135 bearingless main rotor blade. The identified modal parameters are compared against available experimental references and results obtained via SSI with Canonical Variate Analysis and NExT-ERA. The results show that the modes identified by NExT-LF correlate well with benchmark data, particularly for high-amplitude tests and in the low-frequency range.

AI.tldr: 提出NExT-LF方法，结合Loewner框架与NExT技术，用于航空结构的运行模态分析，在实验基准测试中表现出良好性能。
AI.motivation: 现有运行模态分析方法存在局限性：随机子空间识别方法在大系统上计算繁琐，NExT-ERA方法在噪声污染测量中表现不佳。需要开发更高效、鲁棒的方法。
AI.method: 将Loewner框架与自然激励技术相结合，提出NExT-LF方法。利用LF的计算效率和NExT的脉冲响应函数提取能力，在频域进行模态参数识别。
AI.result: 在两个实验基准（eXperimental BeaRDS 2高展弦比翼梁和空客H135直升机无轴承主旋翼叶片）上测试，NExT-LF识别的模态参数与基准数据相关性良好，尤其在高振幅测试和低频范围内表现优异。
AI.conclusion: NExT-LF方法为航空结构运行模态分析提供了有效的频域解决方案，结合了计算效率和噪声鲁棒性，在实验应用中展现出良好潜力。

title: LIDS: LLM Summary Inference Under the Layered Lens
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have gained significant attention by many researchers and practitioners in natural language processing (NLP) since the introduction of ChatGPT in 2022. One notable feature of ChatGPT is its ability to generate summaries based on prompts. Yet evaluating the quality of these summaries remains challenging due to the complexity of language. To this end, in this paper we suggest a new method of LLM summary inference with BERT-SVD-based direction metric and SOFARI (LIDS) that assesses the summary accuracy equipped with interpretable key words for layered themes. The LIDS uses a latent SVD-based direction metric to measure the similarity between the summaries and original text, leveraging the BERT embeddings and repeated prompts to quantify the statistical uncertainty. As a result, LIDS gives a natural embedding of each summary for large text reduction. We further exploit SOFARI to uncover important key words associated with each latent theme in the summary with controlled false discovery rate (FDR). Comprehensive empirical studies demonstrate the practical utility and robustness of LIDS through human verification and comparisons to other similarity metrics, including a comparison of different LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIDS方法，结合BERT-SVD方向度量与SOFARI，用于评估LLM生成摘要的质量，并提供可解释的关键词分析。
AI.motivation: 随着ChatGPT等大型语言模型的兴起，自动生成摘要变得普遍，但评估这些摘要的质量仍然具有挑战性，因为语言复杂性使得传统评估方法难以准确衡量摘要的准确性。
AI.method: 提出LIDS方法：1）使用BERT-SVD方向度量来测量摘要与原文的相似性；2）利用BERT嵌入和重复提示来量化统计不确定性；3）通过SOFARI方法发现与摘要中潜在主题相关的重要关键词，并控制错误发现率。
AI.result: LIDS能够自然地嵌入每个摘要以实现大规模文本降维，并通过综合实证研究验证了其实用性和鲁棒性，包括人工验证和与其他相似性度量的比较，以及不同LLM的比较。
AI.conclusion: LIDS方法为LLM生成摘要的质量评估提供了一种新的、可解释的解决方案，能够有效评估摘要准确性并识别关键主题词，具有实际应用价值。

title: The Value Sensitivity Gap: How Clinical Large Language Models Respond to Patient Preference Statements in Shared Decision-Making
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are entering clinical workflows as decision support tools, yet how they respond to explicit patient value statements -- the core content of shared decision-making -- remains unmeasured. We conducted a factorial experiment using clinical vignettes derived from 98,759 de-identified Medicaid encounter notes. We tested four LLM families (GPT-5.2, Claude 4.5 Sonnet, Gemini 3 Pro, and DeepSeek-R1) across 13 value conditions in two clinical domains, yielding 104 trials. Default value orientations differed across model families (aggressiveness range 2.0 to 3.5 on a 1-to-5 scale). Value sensitivity indices ranged from 0.13 to 0.27, and directional concordance with patient-stated preferences ranged from 0.625 to 1.0. All models acknowledged patient values in 100% of non-control trials, yet actual recommendation shifting remained modest. Decision-matrix and VIM self-report mitigations each improved directional concordance by 0.125 in a 78-trial Phase 2 evaluation. These findings provide empirical data for populating value disclosure labels proposed by clinical AI governance frameworks.

AI.tldr: LLMs在临床决策中默认价值取向存在差异，对患者价值陈述的敏感性有限，虽然能100%承认患者价值观，但实际建议调整幅度不大。
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs进入临床工作流程作为决策支持工具，需要评估它们如何响应患者明确的价值陈述——这是共享决策的核心内容，目前尚未有相关测量。
AI.method: 使用从98,759份去识别化医疗补助就诊记录中提取的临床情景进行因子实验，测试4个LLM家族（GPT-5.2、Claude 4.5 Sonnet、Gemini 3 Pro、DeepSeek-R1）在13种价值条件下的响应，共104个试验。
AI.result: 不同模型家族的默认价值取向存在差异（攻击性评分范围2.0-3.5，1-5分制）；价值敏感性指数范围0.13-0.27；与患者偏好方向一致性范围0.625-1.0；所有模型在100%非对照试验中承认患者价值观，但实际建议调整幅度有限；决策矩阵和VIM自我报告缓解措施在第二阶段78个试验中分别将方向一致性提高了0.125。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为临床AI治理框架提出的价值披露标签提供了实证数据，表明LLMs在响应患者价值陈述方面仍有改进空间。

title: M3-AD: Reflection-aware Multi-modal, Multi-category, and Multi-dimensional Benchmark and Framework for Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced industrial anomaly detection toward a zero-shot paradigm, they still tend to produce high-confidence yet unreliable decisions in fine-grained and structurally complex industrial scenarios, and lack effective self-corrective mechanisms. To address this issue, we propose M3-AD, a unified reflection-aware multimodal framework for industrial anomaly detection. M3-AD comprises two complementary data resources: M3-AD-FT, designed for reflection-aligned fine-tuning, and M3-AD-Bench, designed for systematic cross-category evaluation, together providing a foundation for reflection-aware learning and reliability assessment. Building upon this foundation, we propose RA-Monitor, which models reflection as a learnable decision revision process and guides models to perform controlled self-correction when initial judgments are unreliable, thereby improving decision robustness. Extensive experiments conducted on M3-AD-Bench demonstrate that RA-Monitor outperforms multiple open-source and commercial MLLMs in zero-shot anomaly detection and anomaly analysis tasks. Code will be released at https://github.com/Yanhui-Lee/M3-AD.

AI.tldr: M3-AD是一个用于工业异常检测的反射感知多模态框架，包含M3-AD-FT和M3-AD-Bench两个数据集，以及RA-Monitor自校正机制，在零样本异常检测任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在工业异常检测中虽然实现了零样本范式，但在细粒度、结构复杂的工业场景中容易产生高置信度但不可靠的决策，且缺乏有效的自校正机制。
AI.method: 提出M3-AD统一框架，包含两个互补数据资源：用于反射对齐微调的M3-AD-FT和用于系统跨类别评估的M3-AD-Bench。在此基础上提出RA-Monitor，将反射建模为可学习的决策修订过程，指导模型在初始判断不可靠时进行受控自校正。
AI.result: 在M3-AD-Bench上的大量实验表明，RA-Monitor在零样本异常检测和异常分析任务中优于多个开源和商业MLLMs。
AI.conclusion: M3-AD通过反射感知学习和RA-Monitor自校正机制，有效提高了工业异常检测的决策鲁棒性，为复杂工业场景下的可靠异常检测提供了解决方案。

title: How Large Language Models Get Stuck: Early structure with persistent errors
summary: Linguistic insights may help make Large Language Model (LLM) training more efficient. We trained Meta's OPT model on the 100M word BabyLM dataset, and evaluated it on the BLiMP benchmark, which consists of 67 classes, each defined by sentence pairs that differ in a targeted syntactic or semantic rule violation. We tested the model's preference for grammatical over ungrammatical sentences across training iterations and grammatical types. In nearly one-third of the BLiMP classes, OPT fails to consistently assign a higher likelihood to grammatical sentences, even after extensive training. When it fails, it often establishes a clear (erroneous) separation of the likelihoods at an early stage of processing and sustains this to the end of our training phase. We hypothesize that this mis-categorization is costly because it creates entrenched biases that must, eventually, be reversed in order for the model to perform well. We probe this phenomenon using a mixture of qualitative (based on linguistic theory and the theory of Deep Learning) and quantitative (based on numerical testing) assessments. Our qualitative assessments indicate that only some BLiMP tests are meaningful guides. We conclude by articulating a hypothesis, the Bigram Hypothesis, which claims that the learning process will exhibit erroneous entrenchment if bigram statistics bias the model toward wrong distinctions early in training, and we describe a method (in progress) of testing the hypothesis on appropriately selected BLiMP classes.

AI.tldr: 研究发现OPT模型在BabyLM数据集上训练后，在BLiMP基准测试中约三分之一的语法类别上无法正确区分语法正确与错误的句子，且早期形成的错误偏好会持续到训练后期。
AI.motivation: 探索语言学洞见如何提高大语言模型训练效率，研究模型在语法习得过程中的学习模式，特别是早期形成的错误偏好是否会持续影响最终性能。
AI.method: 在BabyLM数据集上训练Meta的OPT模型，使用BLiMP基准测试评估67个语法类别，分析模型在不同训练迭代中对语法正确句子的偏好变化，结合语言学理论和深度学习理论的定性分析以及数值测试的定量评估。
AI.result: OPT模型在近三分之一的BLiMP类别中无法持续为语法正确的句子分配更高似然度，即使经过大量训练。当模型出错时，通常会在早期处理阶段就建立明显的错误偏好，并持续到训练结束。
AI.conclusion: 提出Bigram假说：如果二元统计在训练早期使模型偏向错误的区分，学习过程就会出现错误固化的现象。只有部分BLiMP测试是有意义的指导，需要进一步测试该假说。

title: Why Not? Solver-Grounded Certificates for Explainable Mission Planning
summary: Operators of Earth observation satellites need justifications for scheduling decisions: why a request was selected, rejected, or what changes would make it schedulable. Existing approaches construct post-hoc reasoning layers independent of the optimizer, risking non-causal attributions, incomplete constraint conjunctions, and solver-path dependence. We take a faithfulness-first approach: every explanation is a certificate derived from the optimization model itself: minimal infeasible subsets for rejections, tight constraints and contrastive trade-offs for selections, and inverse solves for what-if queries. On a scheduling instance with structurally distinct constraint interactions, certificates achieve perfect soundness with respect to the solver's constraint model (15/15 cited-constraint checks), counterfactual validity (7/7), and stability (Jaccard = 1.0 across 28 seed-pairs), while a post-hoc baseline produces non-causal attributions in 29% of cases and misses constraint conjunctions in every multi-cause rejection. A scalability analysis up to 200 orders and 30 satellites confirms practical extraction times for operational batches.

AI.tldr: 提出基于证书的解释方法，为地球观测卫星调度决策提供可验证的解释，确保解释忠实于优化模型本身
AI.motivation: 现有卫星调度解释方法存在事后推理层与优化器独立的问题，可能导致非因果归因、不完整约束组合和求解器路径依赖等不忠实解释
AI.method: 采用忠实优先方法，直接从优化模型推导证书：拒绝时使用最小不可行子集，选择时使用紧约束和对比权衡，假设查询时使用逆求解
AI.result: 在具有结构不同约束交互的调度实例中，证书方法实现完美忠实性（15/15约束检查）、反事实有效性（7/7）和稳定性（Jaccard=1.0），而基线方法在29%情况下产生非因果归因
AI.conclusion: 基于证书的解释方法能够为卫星调度决策提供忠实、可验证的解释，在可扩展性分析中确认了实际提取时间适用于操作批次

title: Asymptotic Bounds for the Traveling Salesman Problem with Drone
summary: The asymptotic behavior of the optimal TSP tour length is well known from the classical Beardwood--Halton--Hammersley theorem. We extend this result to the Traveling Salesman Problem with Drone (TSPD), a cooperative routing problem in which a truck and a drone jointly serve customers. Using a subadditive Euclidean functional framework, we establish the existence of an almost sure limit for the optimal TSPD makespan scaled by the square root of the problem size. We derive explicit upper and lower bounds for the speed-scaled Euclidean TSPD model: upper bounds are obtained via structured ring-based tour constructions and Monte Carlo evaluation, while lower bounds are derived from a parametric approach and known bounds on the Euclidean TSP constant. Computational results illustrate how tight the bounds are. We also derive and discuss lower bounds for the Rectilinear--Euclidean mixed TSPD model, in which truck travel is measured by the rectilinear distance and drone travel by the Euclidean distance.

AI.tldr: 该论文将经典的TSP渐近行为结果扩展到带无人机的旅行商问题(TSPD)，建立了TSPD最优完工时间与问题规模平方根的极限存在性，并推导了欧几里得TSPD模型的上下界。
AI.motivation: 经典的Beardwood-Halton-Hammersley定理描述了传统TSP最优路径长度的渐近行为，但这一结果尚未扩展到更复杂的协同路由问题如TSPD。研究TSPD的渐近行为对于理解这类混合运输系统的理论极限具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用次可加欧几里得泛函框架证明极限存在性；通过结构化环状路径构造和蒙特卡洛评估获得上界；通过参数化方法和已知欧几里得TSP常数推导下界；对于混合模型，分别考虑卡车使用曼哈顿距离和无人机使用欧几里得距离。
AI.result: 证明了TSPD最优完工时间与问题规模平方根的几乎必然极限存在；获得了欧几里得TSPD模型的显式上下界，计算结果显示这些界限相当紧密；推导了混合TSPD模型的下界。
AI.conclusion: 成功将经典的TSP渐近理论扩展到TSPD问题，建立了理论框架并提供了实用的界限计算方法，为理解协同运输系统的性能极限提供了理论基础。

title: Koopman-based Estimation of Lyapunov Functions: Theory on a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space
summary: Koopman operator provides a general linear description of nonlinear systems, whose estimation from data (via extended dynamic mode decomposition) has been extensively studied. However, the elusiveness between the Koopman spectrum and the stability of equilibrium point poses a challenge to utilizing the Koopman operator for stability analysis, which further hinders the construction of a universal theory of Koopman-based control. In our prior work, we defined the Koopman operator on a reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) using a linear--radial product kernel, and proved that the Koopman spectrum is confined in the unit disk of the complex plane when the origin is an asymptotically stable equilibrium point. Building on this fundamental spectrum--stability relation, here we consider the problem of Koopman operator-based Lyapunov function estimation with a given decay rate function. The decay rate function and the Lyapunov function are both specified by positive operators on the RKHS and are related by an operator algebraic Lyapunov equation (ALE), whose solution exists uniquely. The error bound of such a Lyapunov function estimate, obtained via kernel extended dynamic mode decomposition (kEDMD), are established based on statistical learning theory and verified by a numerical study.

AI.tldr: 该论文基于RKHS上的Koopman算子理论，提出了一种估计Lyapunov函数的方法，通过算子代数Lyapunov方程将衰减率函数与Lyapunov函数关联，并建立了基于kEDMD的估计误差界。
AI.motivation: 传统Koopman算子理论中，谱特性与平衡点稳定性之间的关系不明确，这阻碍了基于Koopman的稳定性分析和控制理论的发展。作者先前工作通过在RKHS上定义Koopman算子并证明谱稳定性关系，为构建统一的Koopman控制理论奠定了基础。
AI.method: 在RKHS上使用线性-径向积核定义Koopman算子，通过算子代数Lyapunov方程将给定的衰减率函数与Lyapunov函数关联。采用核扩展动态模态分解(kEDMD)估计Lyapunov函数，并基于统计学习理论建立误差界。
AI.result: 证明了算子代数Lyapunov方程存在唯一解，建立了基于kEDMD的Lyapunov函数估计误差界，并通过数值研究验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为基于Koopman算子的稳定性分析提供了理论框架，通过建立谱-稳定性关系和Lyapunov函数估计方法，推进了Koopman控制理论的发展，为非线性系统的稳定性分析和控制设计提供了新工具。

title: Diagnostics for Individual-Level Prediction Instability in Machine Learning for Healthcare
summary: In healthcare, predictive models increasingly inform patient-level decisions, yet little attention is paid to the variability in individual risk estimates and its impact on treatment decisions. For overparameterized models, now standard in machine learning, a substantial source of variability often goes undetected. Even when the data and model architecture are held fixed, randomness introduced by optimization and initialization can lead to materially different risk estimates for the same patient. This problem is largely obscured by standard evaluation practices, which rely on aggregate performance metrics (e.g., log-loss, accuracy) that are agnostic to individual-level stability. As a result, models with indistinguishable aggregate performance can nonetheless exhibit substantial procedural arbitrariness, which can undermine clinical trust. We propose an evaluation framework that quantifies individual-level prediction instability by using two complementary diagnostics: empirical prediction interval width (ePIW), which captures variability in continuous risk estimates, and empirical decision flip rate (eDFR), which measures instability in threshold-based clinical decisions. We apply these diagnostics to simulated data and GUSTO-I clinical dataset. Across observed settings, we find that for flexible machine-learning models, randomness arising solely from optimization and initialization can induce individual-level variability comparable to that produced by resampling the entire training dataset. Neural networks exhibit substantially greater instability in individual risk predictions compared to logistic regression models. Risk estimate instability near clinically relevant decision thresholds can alter treatment recommendations. These findings that stability diagnostics should be incorporated into routine model validation for assessing clinical reliability.

AI.tldr: 医疗预测模型存在个体风险估计不稳定性问题，即使数据和模型架构固定，优化和初始化的随机性也会导致同一患者得到显著不同的风险估计，影响临床决策可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前医疗预测模型评估过度依赖聚合性能指标（如准确率、对数损失），忽视了模型在个体层面的预测不稳定性。对于现代机器学习中常见的过参数化模型，优化和初始化的随机性会导致同一患者得到不同的风险估计，这种"程序任意性"会损害临床信任，但现有评估方法无法检测这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了一个评估框架，包含两个互补的诊断指标：1) 经验预测区间宽度(ePIW)，用于量化连续风险估计的变异性；2) 经验决策翻转率(eDFR)，用于衡量基于阈值的临床决策的不稳定性。将这些诊断应用于模拟数据和GUSTO-I临床数据集。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) 对于灵活的机器学习模型，仅由优化和初始化引起的随机性导致的个体层面变异性，与重新采样整个训练数据集产生的变异性相当；2) 神经网络在个体风险预测方面比逻辑回归模型表现出更大的不稳定性；3) 在临床相关决策阈值附近的风险估计不稳定性会改变治疗建议。
AI.conclusion: 稳定性诊断应纳入常规模型验证流程，以评估临床可靠性。模型评估不应仅关注聚合性能指标，还需要考虑个体层面的预测稳定性，特别是在医疗决策中。

title: Alignment Is Not Enough: A Relational Framework for Moral Standing in Human-AI Interaction
summary: The question of whether artificial entities deserve moral consideration has become one of the defining ethical challenges of AI research. Existing frameworks for moral patiency rely on verified ontological properties, such as sentience, phenomenal consciousness, or the capacity for suffering, that remain epistemically inaccessible in computational systems. This reliance creates a governance vacuum: millions of users form sustained affective bonds with conversational AI, yet no regulatory instrument distinguishes these interactions from transactional tool use. We introduce Relate (Relational Ethics for Leveled Assessment of Technological Entities), a framework that reframes AI moral patiency from ontological verification toward relational capacity and embodied interaction. Through a systematic comparison of seven governance frameworks, we demonstrate that current trustworthy AI instruments treat all human-AI encounters identically as tool use, ignoring the relational and embodied dynamics that posthumanist scholarship anticipated. We propose relational impact assessments, graduated moral consideration protocols, and interdisciplinary ethics integration as concrete instruments, and we include a sample Relational Impact Assessment applied to a deployed companion AI system. We do not claim current AI systems are conscious. We demonstrate that the ethical vocabularies governing them are inadequate to the embodied, relational realities these systems produce.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Relate框架，将AI道德主体性从本体论验证转向关系能力和具身互动，以解决现有伦理框架无法区分AI工具使用与情感关系的治理真空问题。
AI.motivation: 当前AI道德主体性框架依赖于无法验证的本体属性（如意识、感受能力），导致治理真空：数百万用户与对话AI建立持续情感联系，但监管工具无法区分这种关系与工具使用。
AI.method: 引入Relate框架，通过系统比较七个治理框架，提出关系影响评估、分级道德考虑协议和跨学科伦理整合等具体工具，并应用于已部署的伴侣AI系统。
AI.result: 现有可信AI工具将所有人机交互视为工具使用，忽视了后人类主义学者预见的关系和具身动态。Relate框架提供了更适应当前AI系统产生的具身、关系现实的伦理词汇。
AI.conclusion: 论文不主张当前AI系统具有意识，但指出现有伦理词汇不足以应对这些系统产生的具身、关系现实，需要转向关系伦理框架来填补治理真空。

title: A Representation-Consistent Gated Recurrent Framework for Robust Medical Time-Series Classification
summary: Medical time-series data are characterized by irregular sampling, high noise levels, missing values, and strong inter-feature dependencies. Recurrent neural networks (RNNs), particularly gated architectures such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Gated Recurrent Units (GRU), are widely used for modeling such data due to their ability to capture temporal dependencies. However, standard gated recurrent models do not explicitly constrain the evolution of latent representations over time, leading to representation drift and instability under noisy or incomplete inputs. In this work, we propose a representation-consistent gated recurrent framework (RC-GRF) that introduces a principled regularization strategy to enforce temporal consistency in hidden-state representations. The proposed framework is model-agnostic and can be integrated into existing gated recurrent architectures without modifying their internal gating mechanisms. We provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating how the consistency constraint bounds hidden-state divergence and improves stability. Extensive experiments on medical time-series classification benchmarks show that the proposed approach improves robustness, reduces variance, and enhances generalization performance, particularly in noisy and low-sample settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种表示一致的门控循环框架(RC-GRF)，通过正则化策略强制隐藏状态表示的时间一致性，提高医疗时间序列数据建模的鲁棒性和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 医疗时间序列数据具有不规则采样、高噪声、缺失值和强特征间依赖的特点。虽然LSTM和GRU等门控循环神经网络被广泛用于建模此类数据，但标准模型没有显式约束潜在表示的时间演化，导致在噪声或不完整输入下出现表示漂移和不稳定性。
AI.method: 提出表示一致的门控循环框架(RC-GRF)，引入原则性的正则化策略来强制隐藏状态表示的时间一致性。该框架是模型无关的，可以在不修改内部门控机制的情况下集成到现有的门控循环架构中。
AI.result: 理论分析表明一致性约束能够限制隐藏状态发散并提高稳定性。在医疗时间序列分类基准上的大量实验显示，该方法提高了鲁棒性、减少了方差，并增强了泛化性能，特别是在噪声和低样本设置下。
AI.conclusion: RC-GRF框架通过强制隐藏状态表示的时间一致性，有效解决了医疗时间序列数据建模中的表示漂移问题，提高了模型在噪声和不完整数据下的稳定性和性能。

title: Distribution-Aware Companding Quantization of Large Language Models
summary: Large language models such as GPT and Llama are trained with a next-token prediction loss. In this work, we suggest that training language models to predict multiple future tokens at once results in higher sample efficiency. More specifically, at each position in the training corpus, we ask the model to predict the following n tokens using n independent output heads, operating on top of a shared model trunk. Considering multi-token prediction as an auxiliary training task, we measure improved downstream capabilities with no overhead in training time for both code and natural language models. The method is increasingly useful for larger model sizes and keeps its appeal when training for multiple epochs. Gains are especially pronounced on generative benchmarks like coding, where our models consistently outperform strong baselines by several percentage points. Our 13B parameter models solves 12 % more problems on HumanEval and 17 % more on MBPP than comparable next-token models. Experiments on small algorithmic tasks demonstrate that multi-token prediction is favorable for the development of induction heads and algorithmic reasoning capabilities. As an additional benefit, models trained with 4-token prediction are up to 3X times faster at inference, even with large batch sizes.

AI.tldr: 多令牌预测训练方法通过让语言模型同时预测多个未来令牌，提高了样本效率和推理能力，尤其在代码生成任务上表现突出。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型使用下一个令牌预测损失进行训练，这种方法可能不够样本高效。作者提出同时预测多个未来令牌可能提高训练效率和模型能力。
AI.method: 在训练语料库的每个位置，让模型使用n个独立的输出头预测接下来的n个令牌，这些输出头共享同一个模型主干。多令牌预测作为辅助训练任务。
AI.result: 多令牌预测提高了下游任务能力，且不增加训练时间。13B参数模型在HumanEval上多解决12%问题，在MBPP上多解决17%问题。4令牌预测模型推理速度提升达3倍。
AI.conclusion: 多令牌预测训练方法显著提高了语言模型的样本效率和推理能力，特别是在代码生成任务上，同时还能加速推理过程，对大规模模型尤其有益。

title: From Goals to Aspects, Revisited: An NFR Pattern Language for Agentic AI Systems
summary: Agentic AI systems exhibit numerous crosscutting concerns -- security, observability, cost management, fault tolerance -- that are poorly modularized in current implementations, contributing to the high failure rate of AI projects in reaching production. The goals-to-aspects methodology proposed at RE 2004 demonstrated that aspects can be systematically discovered from i* goal models by identifying non-functional soft-goals that crosscut functional goals. This paper revisits and extends that methodology to the agentic AI domain. We present a pattern language of 12 reusable patterns organized across four NFR categories (security, reliability, observability, cost management), each mapping an i* goal model to a concrete aspect implementation using an AOP framework for Rust. Four patterns address agent-specific crosscutting concerns absent from traditional AOP literature: tool-scope sandboxing, prompt injection detection, token budget management, and action audit trails. We extend the V-graph model to capture how agent tasks simultaneously contribute to functional goals and non-functional soft-goals. We validate the pattern language through a case study analyzing an open-source autonomous agent framework, demonstrating how goal-driven aspect discovery systematically identifies and modularizes crosscutting concerns. The pattern language offers a principled approach for engineering reliable agentic AI systems through early identification of crosscutting concerns.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种面向智能体AI系统的目标驱动切面发现方法，扩展了RE 2004的goals-to-aspects方法，包含12个可重用模式，用于模块化处理安全、可靠性、可观测性和成本管理等横切关注点。
AI.motivation: 智能体AI系统存在多个横切关注点（安全、可观测性、成本管理、容错性），这些关注点在当前实现中模块化程度低，导致AI项目生产部署失败率高。需要系统化的方法来识别和模块化这些关注点。
AI.method: 扩展RE 2004的goals-to-aspects方法到智能体AI领域，提出包含12个可重用模式的模式语言，涵盖四个NFR类别。使用i*目标模型识别横切关注点，并通过Rust的AOP框架映射到具体切面实现。扩展V-graph模型以捕获智能体任务如何同时贡献于功能目标和非功能软目标。
AI.result: 开发了12个模式，其中4个专门针对智能体特有的横切关注点：工具范围沙箱化、提示注入检测、令牌预算管理和操作审计跟踪。通过分析开源自主智能体框架的案例研究验证了模式语言的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模式语言为工程化可靠智能体AI系统提供了原则性方法，通过早期识别横切关注点，系统性地模块化处理安全、可靠性、可观测性和成本管理等非功能需求。

title: Stabilization of the Marine Riser model by controllers depending on finitely many parameters
summary: We prove global stabilization of the marine riser models using a feedback controller that depend on finitely many finite-volume elements and finitely many nodal observables. Our approach is based on a feedback control design for dissipative nonlinear partial differential equations, inspired by the methodology introduced in [Evol. Equ. Control Theory, Vol. 3 (2014), 579-594]. The proposed control strategy ensures asymptotic stabilization while maintaining computational feasibility, making it suitable for practical applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于有限体积元和节点观测的反馈控制器，实现海洋立管模型的全局稳定
AI.motivation: 为海洋立管模型设计计算可行的反馈控制策略，解决实际应用中的稳定问题
AI.method: 基于耗散非线性偏微分方程的反馈控制设计，使用有限体积元和有限节点观测
AI.result: 实现了海洋立管模型的全局渐近稳定，同时保持计算可行性
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制策略既保证理论稳定性又具有实际应用价值，适用于工程实践

title: Battery Discharge Modeling for Electric Vehicles: A Hybrid Physics-based Residual Learning Approach
summary: The growing integration of electric vehicle (EV) fleets into transportation services and energy systems requires accurate modeling of battery discharge and state-of-charge (SoC) evolution to ensure reliable vehicle operation and grid coordination. Existing approaches face a trade-off between interpretable but simplified physics-based models and data-driven methods that demand large datasets and may lack physical consistency. In this paper, we propose a hybrid physics-based residual learning framework for EV battery discharge modeling. A vehicle dynamics model based on force-balance equations provides an interpretable baseline estimate of energy consumption and SoC evolution, capturing aerodynamic drag, rolling resistance, and regenerative braking. A neural network residual learner then corrects discrepancies caused by complex factors such as traffic conditions and driver behavior. Experimental results on $1,500$ trip scenarios demonstrate that the proposed approach reduces the mean absolute percentage error to approximately $0.8\%$, significantly outperforming physics-only models while preserving physical interpretability and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出混合物理残差学习框架，结合物理模型与神经网络，准确预测电动汽车电池放电与荷电状态，在1500个行程场景中实现约0.8%的平均绝对百分比误差。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车车队在交通服务和能源系统中的集成需要精确的电池放电和荷电状态建模。现有方法面临可解释但简化的物理模型与需要大数据且可能缺乏物理一致性的数据驱动方法之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出混合物理残差学习框架：基于力平衡方程的车辆动力学模型提供可解释的能耗和荷电状态基线估计；神经网络残差学习器校正由交通条件和驾驶行为等复杂因素引起的差异。
AI.result: 在1500个行程场景的实验结果表明，该方法将平均绝对百分比误差降至约0.8%，显著优于纯物理模型，同时保持物理可解释性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架成功结合了物理模型的可解释性与数据驱动方法的准确性，为电动汽车电池放电建模提供了有效解决方案，平衡了精度、可解释性和计算效率。

title: Dynamic Proximal Gradient Algorithms for Schatten-$p$ Quasi-Norm Regularized Problems
summary: This paper investigates numerical solution methods for the Schatten-$p$ quasi-norm regularized problem with $p \in [0,1]$, which has been widely studied for finding low-rank solutions of linear inverse problems and gained successful applications in various mathematics and applied science fields. We propose a dynamic proximal gradient algorithm that, through the use of the Cayley transformation, avoids computationally expensive singular value decompositions at each iteration, thereby significantly reducing the computational complexity. The algorithm incorporates two step size selection strategies: an adaptive backtracking search and an explicit step size rule. We establish the sublinear convergence of the proposed algorithm for all $p \in [0,1]$ within the framework of the Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz property. Notably, under mild assumptions, we show that the generated sequence converges to a stationary point of the objective function of the problem. For the special case when $p=1$, the linear convergence is further proved under the strict complementarity-type regularity condition commonly used in the linear convergence analysis of the forward-backward splitting algorithms. Preliminary numerical results validate the superior computational efficiency of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于Schatten-p拟范数正则化问题的动态近端梯度算法，通过Cayley变换避免昂贵的奇异值分解，显著降低计算复杂度，并证明了算法的收敛性。
AI.motivation: Schatten-p拟范数正则化问题（p∈[0,1]）在寻找线性逆问题的低秩解方面有广泛应用，但现有方法通常需要每次迭代进行奇异值分解，计算成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出动态近端梯度算法，利用Cayley变换避免奇异值分解，采用自适应回溯搜索和显式步长选择策略，在Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz性质框架下分析收敛性。
AI.result: 算法对所有p∈[0,1]具有次线性收敛性，生成序列收敛到目标函数的稳定点；当p=1时，在严格互补型正则条件下进一步证明线性收敛，数值实验验证了算法的计算效率优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态近端梯度算法有效解决了Schatten-p拟范数正则化问题的计算效率问题，通过避免奇异值分解显著降低计算复杂度，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

title: Dynamic Map-based Data-Centric Approach for Tourism and Cultural Heritage Preservation Digital Twins
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, ADVANCE 26 - International Workshop on ADVANCEs in ICT Infrastructures and Services - March 25th-27th, 2026
summary: Tourism is an essential and growing economic activity worldwide, bringing benefits such as job creation, revenue generation, and tax revenue, and driving economic prosperity. Tourism activities may also have negative impacts on cities, including overtourism and pressure on housing and real estate markets. Cultural heritage is an essential asset of cities and countries that must be preserved. Cultural heritage, as an asset, is commonly explored through tourism activities and may have negative impacts, including physical degradation, commodification, and loss of authenticity.
