A digital twin is a data-driven virtual representation of a physical object, system, or environment. However, although digital twin technology has been widely adopted in manufacturing, Industry 4.0, and urban planning for smart cities, there remains a gap in specialized digital twins for tourism and cultural heritage management. This paper proposes a QGIS-based, data-centric approach to digital twin frameworks that supports the management, development, and deployment of tourism and cultural heritage services and applications in smart cities. The data-centric approach is embedded in a specialized digital twin focusing on the Salvador Historic Center - Pelourinho, a highly important cultural asset and tourism spot for the city of Salvador. Currently, Pelourinho faces a persistent challenge in sustaining tourism flux while safeguarding its cultural and heritage assets. Preliminary results indicate that the data-centric approach adopted by Pelourinho's DT facilitates data visualization, integrates data silos, and adequately supports management, enabling managers to address heritage preservation and conservation issues, control over-tourism, and implement urban resilience and climate adaptation measures.

AI.tldr: 提出基于QGIS的数据中心化数字孪生框架，用于旅游和文化遗产管理，以萨尔瓦多历史中心Pelourinho为例
AI.motivation: 旅游业带来经济效益但也导致过度旅游、文化遗产退化等问题。数字孪生技术在制造业和城市规划中广泛应用，但在旅游和文化遗产管理领域存在空白，需要专门解决方案
AI.method: 采用基于QGIS的数据中心化方法构建数字孪生框架，专门针对萨尔瓦多历史中心Pelourinho，整合数据孤岛，支持旅游服务和文化遗产应用开发
AI.result: 初步结果表明，Pelourinho的数字孪生框架能有效实现数据可视化、整合数据孤岛，支持管理者解决遗产保护、控制过度旅游、实施城市韧性和气候适应措施
AI.conclusion: 数据中心化的数字孪生框架为旅游和文化遗产管理提供了有效工具，有助于在维持旅游流量的同时保护文化遗产，具有实际应用价值

title: Certainty-Validity: A Diagnostic Framework for Discrete Commitment Systems
comment: 18 pages, 1 figure, full experiment data can be found: https://zenodo.org/records/18530003
summary: Standard evaluation metrics for machine learning -- accuracy, precision, recall, and AUROC -- assume that all errors are equivalent: a confident incorrect prediction is penalized identically to an uncertain one. For discrete commitment systems (architectures that select committed states {-W, 0, +W}), this assumption is epistemologically flawed. We introduce the Certainty-Validity (CVS) Framework, a diagnostic method that decomposes model performance into a 2x2 matrix distinguishing high/low certainty from valid/invalid predictions. This framework reveals a critical failure mode hidden by standard accuracy: Confident-Incorrect (CI) behavior, where models hallucinate structure in ambiguous data. Through ablation experiments on Fashion-MNIST, EMNIST, and IMDB, we analyze the "83% Ambiguity Ceiling" -- a stopping point where this specific discrete architecture consistently plateaus on noisy benchmarks. Unlike continuous models that can surpass this ceiling by memorizing texture or statistical noise, the discrete model refuses to commit to ambiguous samples. We show that this refusal is not a failure but a feature: the model stops where structural evidence ends. However, standard training on ambiguous data eventually forces Benign Overfitting, causing a pathological migration from Uncertain-Incorrect (appropriate doubt) to Confident-Incorrect (hallucination). We propose that "good training" for reasoning systems must be defined not by accuracy, but by maximizing the Certainty-Validity Score (CVS) -- ensuring the model knows where to stop.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了确定性-有效性框架，用于诊断机器学习模型在模糊数据上的表现，揭示了标准准确率指标隐藏的"自信错误"问题，并分析了离散承诺系统的83%模糊性天花板现象。
AI.motivation: 标准机器学习评估指标（准确率、精确率、召回率、AUROC）假设所有错误是等价的，无法区分自信的错误预测和不确定的错误预测。对于离散承诺系统，这种假设在认识论上存在缺陷，需要新的评估框架来揭示模型在模糊数据上的真实行为。
AI.method: 提出了确定性-有效性框架，将模型性能分解为2x2矩阵，区分高/低确定性和有效/无效预测。通过Fashion-MNIST、EMNIST和IMDB数据集上的消融实验，分析离散架构在噪声基准测试中的83%模糊性天花板现象。
AI.result: 框架揭示了标准准确率隐藏的关键失败模式：自信错误行为，即模型在模糊数据中幻觉出结构。离散模型在模糊样本上拒绝承诺，形成83%模糊性天花板，而连续模型可以通过记忆纹理或统计噪声突破此天花板。标准训练在模糊数据上最终导致良性过拟合，使模型从适当怀疑的不确定错误转变为幻觉的自信错误。
AI.conclusion: 对于推理系统，"良好训练"不应由准确率定义，而应通过最大化确定性-有效性分数来确保模型知道何时停止。离散模型在结构证据结束处停止不是失败而是特征，需要重新定义评估标准以反映模型的认知能力。

title: Policy Compliance of User Requests in Natural Language for AI Systems
summary: Consider an organization whose users send requests in natural language to an AI system that fulfills them by carrying out specific tasks. In this paper, we consider the problem of ensuring such user requests comply with a list of diverse policies determined by the organization with the purpose of guaranteeing the safe and reliable use of the AI system. We propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first benchmark consisting of annotated user requests of diverse compliance with respect to a list of policies. Our benchmark is related to industrial applications in the technology sector. We then use our benchmark to evaluate the performance of various LLM models on policy compliance assessment under different solution methods. We analyze the differences on performance metrics across the models and solution methods, showcasing the challenging nature of our problem.

AI.tldr: 提出首个用于评估AI系统用户请求是否符合组织政策合规性的基准，并测试不同LLM模型在政策合规评估中的表现
AI.motivation: 组织需要确保用户向AI系统发送的自然语言请求符合多样化的政策要求，以保证AI系统的安全可靠使用，但目前缺乏相关的评估基准
AI.method: 创建包含多样化政策合规性标注的用户请求基准，该基准与科技行业工业应用相关，然后使用该基准评估不同LLM模型在各种解决方案方法下的政策合规评估性能
AI.result: 展示了不同模型和解决方案方法在性能指标上的差异，揭示了该问题的挑战性
AI.conclusion: 提出了首个政策合规评估基准，证明了政策合规评估是一个具有挑战性的问题，为未来研究和工业应用提供了重要基础

title: LifeEval: A Multimodal Benchmark for Assistive AI in Egocentric Daily Life Tasks
summary: The rapid progress of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) marks a significant step toward artificial general intelligence, offering great potential for augmenting human capabilities. However, their ability to provide effective assistance in dynamic, real-world environments remains largely underexplored. Existing video benchmarks predominantly assess passive understanding through retrospective analysis or isolated perception tasks, failing to capture the interactive and adaptive nature of real-time user assistance. To bridge this gap, we introduce LifeEval, a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate real-time, task-oriented human-AI collaboration in daily life from an egocentric perspective. LifeEval emphasizes three key aspects: task-oriented holistic evaluation, egocentric real-time perception from continuous first-person streams, and human-assistant collaborative interaction through natural dialogues. Constructed via a rigorous annotation pipeline, the benchmark comprises 4,075 high-quality question-answer pairs across 6 core capability dimensions. Extensive evaluations of 26 state-of-the-art MLLMs on LifeEval reveal substantial challenges in achieving timely, effective and adaptive interaction, highlighting essential directions for advancing human-centered interactive intelligence.

AI.tldr: LifeEval是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型在实时、任务导向的人机协作中表现的新基准，重点关注第一人称视角的日常生活场景。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基准主要评估被动理解和回顾性分析，无法捕捉实时用户协助的交互性和适应性。需要评估MLLM在动态现实环境中的有效协助能力。
AI.method: 通过严格的标注流程构建LifeEval基准，包含4,075个高质量问答对，涵盖6个核心能力维度，强调任务导向整体评估、第一人称实时感知和自然对话协作。
AI.result: 对26个最先进MLLM的评估显示，在实现及时、有效和适应性交互方面存在重大挑战，揭示了推进以人为中心的交互智能的重要方向。
AI.conclusion: LifeEval填补了评估MLLM在实时人机协作中能力的空白，为推进人类为中心的交互智能提供了重要基准和方向。

title: Predictive Lane-Change and Routing Coordination in Bus-Priority Mixed Traffic Corridors
summary: In this paper, we investigate the coordination of vehicle maneuvers in mixed-traffic corridors where connected and automated vehicles, human-driven vehicles, and buses interact under dedicated bus lane operations. We develop a segment-based network coordination framework that jointly optimizes lane-change and routing decisions of connected and automated vehicles to improve dedicated lane utilization while preserving bus priority. The proposed framework incorporates a predictive bus-protection mechanism that restricts vehicle access to protected lane segments within a monitoring horizon, together with a utility-driven lane-change strategy that accounts for anticipated travel time gains, downstream routing feasibility, and lane-change stability. By explicitly coupling network-level routing decisions with lane-level interaction control, the method proactively mitigates conflicts on dedicated lanes before congestion effects materialize. The proposed approach is evaluated through microscopic traffic simulations in SUMO using a realistic urban corridor. Simulation results demonstrate that the framework enhances bus schedule adherence and reduces average travel times for both automated and human-driven vehicles, while maintaining stable lane-change behavior without increasing maneuver frequency.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合交通走廊中车辆协调框架，通过联合优化网联自动驾驶车辆的换道和路径决策，提高专用车道利用率同时保障公交优先。
AI.motivation: 在混合交通走廊中，网联自动驾驶车辆、人工驾驶车辆和公交车在专用公交车道下交互，需要协调车辆操纵以提高专用车道利用率，同时保持公交优先权。
AI.method: 开发基于路段的网络协调框架，联合优化网联自动驾驶车辆的换道和路径决策。包含预测性公交保护机制（限制车辆在监控时段内进入受保护路段）和效用驱动的换道策略（考虑预期行程时间收益、下游路径可行性和换道稳定性）。
AI.result: 通过SUMO微观交通仿真评估，结果表明该框架提高了公交准点率，减少了自动和人工驾驶车辆的平均行程时间，同时保持稳定的换道行为而不增加操纵频率。
AI.conclusion: 通过将网络级路径决策与车道级交互控制显式耦合，该方法能在拥堵效应出现前主动缓解专用车道上的冲突，有效协调混合交通走廊中的车辆操纵。

title: Spectral Condition for $μ$P under Width-Depth Scaling
summary: Generative foundation models are increasingly scaled in both width and depth, posing significant challenges for stable feature learning and reliable hyperparameter (HP) transfer across model sizes. While maximal update parameterization ($μ$P) has provided a principled solution to both problems for width scaling, existing extensions to the joint width-depth scaling regime remain fragmented, architecture- and optimizer-specific, and often rely on technically involved theories. In this work, we develop a simple and unified spectral framework for $μ$P under joint width-depth scaling. Considering residual networks of varying block depths, we first introduce a spectral $μ$P condition that precisely characterizes how the norms of weights and their per-step updates should scale with width and depth, unifying previously disparate $μ$P formulations as special cases. Building on this condition, we then derive a general recipe for implementing $μ$P across a broad class of optimizers by mapping the spectral constraints to concrete HP parameterizations. This approach not only recovers existing $μ$P formulations (e.g., for SGD and AdamW) but also naturally extends to a wider range of optimizers. Finally, experiments on GPT-2 style language models demonstrate that the proposed spectral $μ$P condition preserves stable feature learning and enables robust HP transfer under width-depth scaling.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的谱框架，用于在宽度-深度联合缩放下实现μP（最大更新参数化），通过谱条件统一现有μP公式，并推导出适用于多种优化器的实现方法。
AI.motivation: 生成式基础模型在宽度和深度上的规模不断扩大，给稳定的特征学习和跨模型尺寸的超参数迁移带来了挑战。虽然μP为宽度缩放提供了理论解决方案，但现有的宽度-深度联合缩放扩展仍然零散、依赖于特定架构和优化器，且理论复杂。
AI.method: 针对不同块深度的残差网络，首先引入谱μP条件，精确描述权重及其每步更新的范数应如何随宽度和深度缩放。基于此条件，推导出将谱约束映射到具体超参数参数化的通用方法，适用于广泛的优化器类别。
AI.result: 在GPT-2风格的语言模型上进行实验，证明所提出的谱μP条件在宽度-深度缩放下能够保持稳定的特征学习，并实现鲁棒的超参数迁移。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个简单统一的谱框架，解决了宽度-深度联合缩放下的μP问题，统一了现有方法，并扩展到更广泛的优化器，为大规模模型训练提供了理论指导。

title: From Framework to Practice: Youth Negotiations of Privacy with Smart Voice Assistants Through the PEA-AI Lens
comment: submitted to the ACM journal; "in review"
summary: Smart voice assistants (SVAs) have become embedded in the daily lives of youth, introducing complex privacy challenges due to always-on listening, shared device usage, and opaque data practices. This study applies the Privacy-Ethics Alignment in AI (PEA-AI) framework to examine how youth perceive and negotiate privacy within SVAs. Through a survey of 469 Canadian youth (aged 16-24), we measured five privacy constructs: Perceived Privacy Risk (PPR), Perceived Privacy Benefits (PPBf), Algorithmic Transparency and Trust (ATT), Privacy Self-Efficacy (PSE), and Privacy-Protective Behavior (PPB). Results reveal a persistent privacy paradox. While youth express moderate to high privacy concerns (PPR M = 3.61), perceived benefits (PPBf M = 3.00) and protective actions (PPB M = 3.03) remain moderate, with transparency and trust scoring lowest (ATT M = 2.52). Heavy SVA users report higher benefits and lower risk perception than light users. High protective behavior is strongly associated with both high risk perception and high self-efficacy. Qualitative insights from prior focus groups contextualize these patterns, illustrating how youth navigate tensions between convenience, control, and trust. The findings provide actionable design principles for SVA along with implications for multi-stakeholder governance and youth-centered digital literacy.

AI.tldr: 研究应用PEA-AI框架分析青少年对智能语音助手的隐私感知，发现隐私悖论：青少年虽有关注但保护行为有限，使用频率影响风险感知，自我效能与保护行为正相关。
AI.motivation: 智能语音助手在青少年中普及，但带来复杂的隐私挑战，包括始终监听、共享设备使用和不透明的数据实践。需要了解青少年如何感知和协商这些隐私问题。
AI.method: 采用PEA-AI框架，对469名加拿大青少年（16-24岁）进行问卷调查，测量五个隐私构念：感知隐私风险、感知隐私益处、算法透明度和信任、隐私自我效能、隐私保护行为。结合先前焦点小组的定性洞察。
AI.result: 发现持续的隐私悖论：青少年隐私关注中等偏高（3.61），但益处感知（3.00）和保护行为（3.03）中等，透明度和信任最低（2.52）。重度用户比轻度用户感知更高益处和更低风险。高保护行为与高风险感知和高自我效能强相关。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为智能语音助手设计提供可操作原则，并对多方利益相关者治理和以青少年为中心的数字素养教育具有启示意义。

title: SEval-NAS: A Search-Agnostic Evaluation for Neural Architecture Search
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of The 41st ACM/SIGAPP Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC26)
summary: Neural architecture search (NAS) automates the discovery of neural networks that meet specified criteria, yet its evaluation procedures are often hardcoded, limiting the ability to introduce new metrics. This issue is especially pronounced in hardware-aware NAS, where objectives depend on target devices such as edge hardware. To address this limitation, we propose SEval-NAS, a metric-evaluation mechanism that converts architectures to strings, embeds them as vectors, and predicts performance metrics. Using NATS-Bench and HW-NAS-Bench, we evaluated accuracy, latency, and memory. Kendall's $τ$ correlations showed stronger latency and memory predictions than accuracy, indicating the suitability of SEval-NAS as a hardware cost predictor. We further integrated SEval-NAS into FreeREA to evaluate metrics not originally included. The method successfully ranked FreeREA-generated architectures, maintained search time, and required minimal algorithmic changes. Our implementation is available at: https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/neural-architecture-search

AI.tldr: SEval-NAS：一种将神经网络架构转换为字符串并嵌入为向量以预测性能指标的评估机制，特别适用于硬件感知NAS中的延迟和内存预测
AI.motivation: 传统神经架构搜索（NAS）的评估过程通常是硬编码的，限制了引入新指标的能力，特别是在硬件感知NAS中，目标设备（如边缘硬件）相关的目标难以灵活评估
AI.method: 提出SEval-NAS评估机制：1）将神经网络架构转换为字符串表示；2）将字符串嵌入为向量；3）基于嵌入向量预测性能指标（如准确率、延迟、内存使用）
AI.result: 在NATS-Bench和HW-NAS-Bench上评估显示：SEval-NAS在延迟和内存预测方面的Kendall τ相关性比准确率预测更强，表明其特别适合作为硬件成本预测器；成功集成到FreeREA中，能够评估原始未包含的指标，保持搜索时间不变且只需最小算法修改
AI.conclusion: SEval-NAS提供了一种灵活、高效的神经网络架构性能预测方法，特别适用于硬件感知NAS，能够支持新指标的引入而不需要硬编码评估过程，为NAS系统提供了更好的扩展性

title: LLM-Bootstrapped Targeted Finding Guidance for Factual MLLM-based Medical Report Generation
summary: The automatic generation of medical reports utilizing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) frequently encounters challenges related to factual instability, which may manifest as the omission of findings or the incorporation of inaccurate information, thereby constraining their applicability in clinical settings. Current methodologies typically produce reports based directly on image features, which inherently lack a definitive factual basis. In response to this limitation, we introduce Fact-Flow, an innovative framework that separates the process of visual fact identification from the generation of reports. This is achieved by initially predicting clinical findings from the image, which subsequently directs the MLLM to produce a report that is factually precise. A pivotal advancement of our approach is a pipeline that leverages a Large Language Model (LLM) to autonomously create a dataset of labeled medical findings, effectively eliminating the need for expensive manual annotation. Extensive experimental evaluations conducted on two disease-focused medical datasets validate the efficacy of our method, demonstrating a significant enhancement in factual accuracy compared to state-of-the-art models, while concurrently preserving high standards of text quality.

AI.tldr: Fact-Flow框架通过将视觉事实识别与报告生成分离，先预测临床发现再指导MLLM生成报告，显著提升医学报告生成的事实准确性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的医学报告生成方法存在事实不稳定性问题，如遗漏发现或包含不准确信息，限制了其在临床环境中的应用。现有方法通常直接基于图像特征生成报告，缺乏明确的事实基础。
AI.method: 提出Fact-Flow框架：1）将视觉事实识别与报告生成分离；2）首先从图像预测临床发现；3）用这些发现指导MLLM生成事实准确的报告；4）利用LLM自动创建标记医学发现数据集，避免昂贵的人工标注。
AI.result: 在两个疾病相关的医学数据集上进行广泛实验评估，证明该方法在事实准确性方面显著优于最先进模型，同时保持高文本质量标准。
AI.conclusion: Fact-Flow通过分离事实识别和报告生成，并利用LLM自动创建标注数据，有效解决了医学报告生成中的事实不稳定性问题，为临床环境提供了更可靠的自动化报告生成方案。

title: AI Runtime Infrastructure
summary: We introduce AI Runtime Infrastructure, a distinct execution-time layer that operates above the model and below the application, actively observing, reasoning over, and intervening in agent behavior to optimize task success, latency, token efficiency, reliability, and safety while the agent is running. Unlike model-level optimizations or passive logging systems, runtime infrastructure treats execution itself as an optimization surface, enabling adaptive memory management, failure detection, recovery, and policy enforcement over long-horizon agent workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出AI运行时基础设施层，在模型之上、应用之下，实时观察、推理和干预智能体行为，优化任务成功率、延迟、token效率、可靠性和安全性。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统主要依赖模型级优化或被动日志系统，缺乏在运行时主动优化执行过程的能力。需要在智能体运行时动态管理内存、检测故障、恢复执行并实施策略，以提升长期工作流的性能。
AI.method: 构建一个独立的运行时基础设施层，位于模型和应用之间。该层主动观察智能体行为，进行推理分析，并在运行时进行干预。支持自适应内存管理、故障检测与恢复、策略执行等功能。
AI.result: 创建了一个新的执行时优化层面，能够实时优化智能体工作流。相比传统方法，能够更有效地管理长期任务，提高系统整体性能指标。
AI.conclusion: AI运行时基础设施为智能体系统提供了关键的运行时优化能力，将执行过程本身作为优化对象，能够显著提升AI系统的实际部署效果和可靠性。

title: Sparse optimal control in the Wasserstein space
summary: We study sparse optimal control of a non-local continuity equation, where the goal is to steer a distribution via finitely many controllable agents or actuators. This model arises naturally in mean-field multi-agent systems and takes the form of a coupled PDE-ODE system where the PDE describes the evolution of the distribution and the controlled ODE captures the dynamics of the controllable agents. A natural objective is distribution steering via terminal costs based on optimal transport, such as the squared Wasserstein distance. These costs are problematic for finite-agent formulations due to non-smoothness at empirical measures and they fall outside common expected-value-type cost classes. We address these challenges by studying the resulting optimal control problem in the Wasserstein space. Under suitable assumptions on the system dynamics and Wasserstein differentiability of the terminal cost (with no smoothness requirement on the associated Wasserstein gradient), we prove first-order sensitivity of the control-to-state map, derive an adjoint system and an explicit formula for the gradient of the cost functional, and obtain Pontryagin-type necessary conditions. To illustrate the resulting adjoint-based method, we present numerical experiments on a representative distribution-splitting task.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部连续性方程的稀疏最优控制问题，通过有限可控智能体或执行器引导分布演化，建立PDE-ODE耦合系统，在Wasserstein空间中分析最优控制问题
AI.motivation: 研究多智能体系统的分布引导问题，传统基于最优运输的终端成本（如平方Wasserstein距离）在有限智能体公式中存在非光滑性问题，且不属于常见的期望值型成本类别
AI.method: 在Wasserstein空间中研究最优控制问题，在系统动力学和终端成本的Wasserstein可微性假设下，证明控制到状态映射的一阶敏感性，推导伴随系统和成本泛函梯度的显式公式，获得Pontryagin型必要条件
AI.result: 建立了理论框架，证明了控制到状态映射的一阶敏感性，推导了伴随系统和梯度公式，获得了Pontryagin型必要条件，并通过数值实验验证了伴随方法在分布分裂任务中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了基于最优运输终端成本的稀疏最优控制问题，建立了Wasserstein空间中的理论分析框架，为多智能体系统的分布引导提供了有效的伴随方法

title: Critical Clearing Time Enhancement of Droop-Controlled Grid-Forming Inverters with Adaptive Function-Based Parameters
summary: With the increasing penetration of renewable energy sources, grid-forming (GFM) inverters are becoming essential for voltage and frequency regulation. However, the transient stability of GFM inverter is critically affected by the current limiters that are embedded with the standard control schemes. This paper proposes a novel adaptive function to enhance the transient stability of droop-controlled GFM inverters. The proposed method autonomously adjusts the active power reference and the droop gain based on the terminal voltage of the inverter. Also, the acceleration of the phase angle is prevented, leading to the maximization of critical clearing time (CCT). The proposed method is benchmarked against two state-of-the-art GFM inverter CCT enhancement methods. Effectiveness of the proposed method is validated through electromagnetic transient (EMT) simulations in MATLAB/Simulink\textsuperscript{\textregistered}.

AI.tldr: 提出一种自适应函数来增强下垂控制电网形成逆变器的暂态稳定性，通过自动调整有功功率参考值和下垂增益，防止相角加速，最大化临界清除时间
AI.motivation: 随着可再生能源渗透率增加，电网形成逆变器对电压和频率调节变得至关重要，但标准控制方案中的电流限制器严重影响逆变器的暂态稳定性
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的自适应函数，基于逆变器端电压自主调整有功功率参考值和下垂增益，防止相角加速，从而最大化临界清除时间
AI.result: 通过MATLAB/Simulink电磁暂态仿真验证了该方法的有效性，并与两种最先进的电网形成逆变器临界清除时间增强方法进行了基准测试
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应方法能有效增强下垂控制电网形成逆变器的暂态稳定性，通过防止相角加速来最大化临界清除时间

title: Retrodictive Forecasting: A Proof-of-Concept for Exploiting Temporal Asymmetry in Time Series Prediction
comment: 27 pages, 13 figures, 5 tables, Code available at https://github.com/cdamour/retrodictive-forecasting (Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18803446)
summary: We propose a retrodictive forecasting paradigm for time series: instead of predicting the future from the past, we identify the future that best explains the observed present via inverse MAP optimization over a Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE). This conditioning is a statistical modeling choice for Bayesian inversion; it does not assert that future events cause past observations. The approach is theoretically grounded in an information-theoretic arrow-of-time measure: the symmetrized Kullback-Leibler divergence between forward and time-reversed trajectory ensembles provides both the conceptual rationale and an operational GO/NO-GO diagnostic for applicability. We implement the paradigm as MAP inference over an inverse CVAE with a learned RealNVP normalizing-flow prior and evaluate it on six time series cases: four synthetic processes with controlled temporal asymmetry and two ERA5 reanalysis datasets (wind speed and solar irradiance). The work makes four contributions: (i) a formal retrodictive inference formulation; (ii) an inverse CVAE architecture; (iii) a model-free irreversibility diagnostic; and (iv) a falsifiable validation protocol with four pre-specified predictions. All pre-specified predictions are empirically supported: the diagnostic correctly classifies all six cases; the learned flow prior improves over an isotropic Gaussian baseline on GO cases; the inverse MAP yields no spurious advantage on time-reversible dynamics; and on irreversible GO cases, it achieves competitive or superior RMSE relative to forward baselines, with a statistically significant 17.7% reduction over a forward MLP on ERA5 solar irradiance. These results provide a structured proof-of-concept that retrodictive forecasting can constitute a viable alternative to conventional forward prediction when statistical time-irreversibility is present and exploitable.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于逆向最大后验优化的时间序列回溯预测范式，通过条件变分自编码器识别最能解释当前观测的未来状态，而非传统的前向预测。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测是从过去预测未来，本文探索逆向思路：给定当前观测，寻找最能解释当前状态的未来。这种回溯预测范式在统计时间不可逆性存在时可能提供可行的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用逆向条件变分自编码器（CVAE）框架，通过最大后验（MAP）优化进行回溯推断。使用学习的RealNVP归一化流先验，并基于对称KL散度开发模型无关的时间不可逆性诊断指标。
AI.result: 在6个时间序列案例（4个合成过程+2个ERA5再分析数据集）上验证：诊断正确分类所有案例；学习流先验优于各向同性高斯基线；在不可逆案例中，逆向MAP相比前向基线取得竞争性或更优的RMSE，在ERA5太阳辐照度上显著降低17.7%。
AI.conclusion: 当统计时间不可逆性存在且可利用时，回溯预测可以构成传统前向预测的可行替代方案。研究提供了结构化概念验证，并建立了可证伪的验证协议。

title: Linguistic Uncertainty and Engagement in Arabic-Language X (formerly Twitter) Discourse
summary: Linguistic uncertainty is a common feature of social media discourse, yet its relationship with user engagement remains underexplored, particularly in non-English contexts. Using a dataset of 16,695 Arabic-language tweets about Lebanon posted over a 35-day period, we examine whether tweets expressing linguistic uncertainty receive different levels and forms of engagement compared to certainty-marked tweets. We develop a lexicon-based, context-sensitive classifier to identify uncertainty markers and classify 29.9% of tweets as uncertain. Descriptive analyses indicate that uncertain tweets exhibit 51.5% higher mean total engagement (likes, retweets, and replies). Regression models controlling for tweet length, URL presence, and account verification status confirm a positive association between uncertainty and engagement (\b{eta} = 0.221, SE = 0.044, p < 0.001), corresponding to approximately 25% higher expected engagement. The association is strongest for replies, followed by retweets and likes, suggesting a shift toward more conversational forms of engagement. Results are robust to alternative model specifications and adjustments for within-account correlation. These findings suggest that linguistic uncertainty may function as an interactional cue that encourages participatory engagement in Arabic-language social media discourse. The study contributes computational approaches for modeling linguistic features in large-scale, non-English digital communication.

AI.tldr: 阿拉伯语推文中的语言不确定性（29.9%的推文）与更高的用户参与度相关（平均高出51.5%），尤其是回复形式的参与，表明不确定性可能作为互动线索促进对话性参与。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中的语言不确定性很常见，但其与用户参与度的关系在非英语语境中研究不足。本研究旨在探索阿拉伯语推文中不确定性表达是否影响参与度水平和形式。
AI.method: 使用16,695条关于黎巴嫩的阿拉伯语推文数据集（35天期间），开发基于词典的上下文敏感分类器识别不确定性标记，通过回归模型分析不确定性对参与度（点赞、转发、回复）的影响，控制推文长度、URL存在和账户验证状态等因素。
AI.result: 29.9%的推文被分类为不确定；不确定推文的平均总参与度高51.5%；回归模型显示不确定性与参与度正相关（β=0.221，p<0.001），对应约25%的预期参与度提升；关联最强的是回复，其次是转发和点赞；结果对替代模型规范和账户内相关性调整稳健。
AI.conclusion: 语言不确定性可能作为互动线索，在阿拉伯语社交媒体话语中鼓励参与性互动；研究为非英语大规模数字通信中的语言特征建模提供了计算方法贡献。

title: Wideband Power Amplifier Behavioral Modeling Using an Amplitude Conditioned LSTM
summary: Wideband power amplifiers exhibit complex nonlinear and memory effects that challenge traditional behavioral modeling approaches. This paper proposes a novel amplitude conditioned long short-term memory (AC-LSTM) network that introduces explicit amplitude-dependent gating to enhance the modeling of wideband PA dynamics. The architecture incorporates a Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) layer that conditions the LSTM's forget gate on the instantaneous input amplitude, providing a physics-aware inductive bias for capturing amplitude-dependent memory effects. Experimental validation using a 100 MHz 5G NR signal and a GaN PA demonstrates that the proposed AC-LSTM achieves a normalized mean square error (NMSE) of -41.25 dB, representing a 1.15 dB improvement over standard LSTM and 7.45 dB improvement over augmented real-valued time-delay neural network (ARVTDNN) baselines. The model also closely matches the measured PA's spectral characteristics with an adjacent channel power ratio (ACPR) of -28.58 dB. These results shows the effectiveness of amplitude conditioning for improving both time-domain accuracy and spectral fidelity in wide-band PA behavioral modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出AC-LSTM网络，通过振幅相关门控增强宽带功率放大器行为建模，相比传统方法在NMSE和ACPR指标上均有显著提升。
AI.motivation: 宽带功率放大器表现出复杂的非线性和记忆效应，传统行为建模方法难以准确捕捉这些动态特性，需要更有效的建模方法。
AI.method: 提出振幅条件长短期记忆网络（AC-LSTM），引入FiLM层使遗忘门依赖于瞬时输入振幅，为捕捉振幅相关记忆效应提供物理感知的归纳偏置。
AI.result: 使用100MHz 5G NR信号和GaN PA验证，AC-LSTM达到-41.25dB NMSE，比标准LSTM提升1.15dB，比ARVTDNN提升7.45dB，ACPR为-28.58dB，频谱特性与实测PA高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: 振幅条件化能有效提高宽带PA行为建模的时域精度和频谱保真度，AC-LSTM架构为复杂非线性系统建模提供了新思路。

title: A Typologically Grounded Evaluation Framework for Word Order and Morphology Sensitivity in Multilingual Masked LMs
summary: We introduce a typology-aware diagnostic for multilingual masked language models that tests reliance on word order versus inflectional form. Using Universal Dependencies, we apply inference-time perturbations: full token scrambling, content-word scrambling with function words fixed, dependency-based head--dependent swaps, and sentence-level lemma substitution (+L), which lemmatizes both the context and the masked target label. We evaluate mBERT and XLM-R on English, Chinese, German, Spanish, and Russian. Full scrambling drives word-level reconstruction accuracy near zero in all languages; partial and head--dependent perturbations cause smaller but still large drops. +L has little effect in Chinese but substantially lowers accuracy in German/Spanish/Russian, and it does not mitigate the impact of scrambling. Top-5 word accuracy shows the same pattern: under full scrambling, the gold word rarely appears among the five highest-ranked reconstructions. We release code, sampling scripts, and balanced evaluation subsets; Turkish results under strict reconstruction are reported in the appendix.

AI.tldr: 提出一种类型感知诊断方法，测试多语言掩码语言模型对词序与屈折形式的依赖，通过扰动实验发现模型主要依赖词序信息
AI.motivation: 研究多语言掩码语言模型（如mBERT和XLM-R）在处理不同语言时，是更依赖词序信息还是屈折形式信息，以理解其跨语言表示能力
AI.method: 使用Universal Dependencies进行推理时扰动：完全词序打乱、内容词打乱（功能词固定）、基于依存关系的头-依存词交换、句子级词元替换（+L）。在英语、中文、德语、西班牙语和俄语上评估mBERT和XLM-R
AI.result: 完全打乱使所有语言的词级重建准确率接近零；部分扰动和头-依存交换导致显著下降；+L对中文影响小但对德语/西班牙语/俄语影响大，且不能缓解打乱的影响；前5词准确率显示相同模式
AI.conclusion: 多语言掩码语言模型主要依赖词序信息而非屈折形式，词序打乱严重破坏模型性能，揭示了模型跨语言表示的重要局限性

title: DenoiseFlow: Uncertainty-Aware Denoising for Reliable LLM Agentic Workflows
summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly entrusted with complex, long-horizon tasks, ranging from mathematical reasoning to software generation. While agentic workflows facilitate these tasks by decomposing them into multi-step reasoning chains, reliability degrades significantly as the sequence lengthens. Specifically, minor interpretation errors in natural-language instructions tend to compound silently across steps. We term this failure mode accumulated semantic ambiguity. Existing approaches to mitigate this often lack runtime adaptivity, relying instead on static exploration budgets, reactive error recovery, or single-path execution that ignores uncertainty entirely. We formalize the multi-step reasoning process as a Noisy MDP and propose DenoiseFlow, a closed-loop framework that performs progressive denoising through three coordinated stages: (1)Sensing estimates per-step semantic uncertainty; (2)Regulating adaptively allocates computation by routing between fast single-path execution and parallel exploration based on estimated risk; and (3)Correcting performs targeted recovery via influence-based root-cause localization. Online self-calibration continuously aligns decision boundaries with verifier feedback, requiring no ground-truth labels. Experiments on six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multi-hop QA show that DenoiseFlow achieves the highest accuracy on every benchmark (83.3% average, +1.3% over the strongest baseline) while reducing cost by 40--56% through adaptive branching. Detailed ablation studies further confirm framework-level's robustness and generality. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DenoiseFlow-21D3/.

AI.tldr: DenoiseFlow是一个用于多步推理任务的闭环框架，通过感知、调节和纠正三个阶段进行渐进式去噪，在提高准确率的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 自主代理在处理复杂长时程任务时，自然语言指令中的微小解释错误会在多步推理链中累积，导致可靠性显著下降。现有方法缺乏运行时自适应性，要么依赖静态探索预算，要么采用单路径执行而忽略不确定性。
AI.method: 将多步推理过程形式化为噪声MDP，提出DenoiseFlow框架，包含三个阶段：1)感知阶段估计每步语义不确定性；2)调节阶段根据风险估计自适应分配计算资源，在快速单路径执行和并行探索之间路由；3)纠正阶段通过基于影响度的根因定位进行针对性恢复。在线自校准持续对齐决策边界与验证器反馈。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和多跳问答等六个基准测试中，DenoiseFlow在所有基准上都取得了最高准确率（平均83.3%，比最强基线提升1.3%），同时通过自适应分支将成本降低了40-56%。消融研究证实了框架层面的鲁棒性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: DenoiseFlow通过渐进式去噪有效解决了多步推理中的累积语义模糊问题，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低了计算成本，为自主代理的可靠长时程任务执行提供了有效解决方案。

title: Enhanced Hydrogen Electrolyzer with Integrated Energy Storage to Provide Grid-Forming Services for Off-Grid ReP2H Application
summary: This article proposes an energy storage-enhanced hydrogen electrolyzer (ESEHE) to provide grid-forming (GFM) services for off-grid renewable power to hydrogen (ReP2H) systems. Unlike conventional ReP2H systems that use a centralized energy storage (ES) plant, the proposed topology directly connects batteries to the DC buses of electrolysis rectifiers. A tailored virtual synchronous machine (VSM) control framework enables the electrolyzer to autonomously provide real and reactive power support. A coordinated frequency-splitting energy extraction strategy is designed to exploit both the battery and the electrolysis stack's electrical double-layer (EDL) effect on different timescales, maximizing active power support while mitigating battery and stack degradation. An adaptive equalization control strategy is further developed to balance the battery state of charge (SOC) among multiple ESEHEs operating in parallel, which optimizes energy distribution and extends battery life. Real-time simulations on StarSim validate the proposed topology and control strategies. Techno-economic analysis shows that, compared with conventional off-grid ReP2H systems based on a centralized ES plant, the ESEHE improves overall energy efficiency by 0.23% and reduces the initial total converter investment cost by roughly 6%, mainly due to the elimination of bidirectional AC/DC conversion and its associated losses in the centralized ES plant.

AI.tldr: 提出储能增强型氢电解槽(ESEHE)，为离网可再生能源制氢系统提供构网型服务，通过电池直接连接电解整流器直流母线，采用虚拟同步机控制和频率分离能量提取策略，提高效率并降低成本。
AI.motivation: 传统离网可再生能源制氢系统采用集中式储能，存在双向AC/DC转换损耗和成本问题。需要一种更高效、经济的方案来提供电网形成服务，同时缓解电池和电解槽堆退化。
AI.method: 1) 提出ESEHE拓扑结构，将电池直接连接到电解整流器直流母线；2) 设计定制虚拟同步机控制框架，使电解槽自主提供有功和无功功率支持；3) 开发协调频率分离能量提取策略，利用电池和电解堆电双层效应在不同时间尺度工作；4) 提出自适应均衡控制策略，平衡并联运行ESEHE的电池SOC。
AI.result: 实时仿真验证了拓扑和控制策略的有效性。技术经济分析表明，与传统基于集中式储能的离网ReP2H系统相比，ESEHE将整体能效提高0.23%，初始总变流器投资成本降低约6%，主要消除了集中式储能中的双向AC/DC转换及相关损耗。
AI.conclusion: ESEHE为离网可再生能源制氢系统提供了一种高效、经济的构网型服务解决方案，通过创新的拓扑和控制策略，在提高系统性能的同时降低了成本，具有实际应用价值。

title: Dynamic Connectivity and Local Frequency Strength under Stochastic Variations
summary: This paper introduces a novel metric, termed the Generalized Fiedler Vector (GFV), to evaluate the \textit{dynamic connectivity} in power systems. The proposed metric leverages the network connectivity, represented by the system Laplacian matrix, together with the nodal inertia distribution, following a formulation previously developed by the first author. By capturing the interplay between system topology and dynamic properties, the GFV provides valuable insights for the optimal siting of stochastic generation to mitigate its impact on local and system-wide frequency variability. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through Monte Carlo simulations performed on the IEEE 68-bus test system.

AI.tldr: 提出广义Fiedler向量(GFV)作为评估电力系统动态连接性的新指标，结合网络拓扑和节点惯量分布，用于优化随机发电选址以减少频率波动。
AI.motivation: 现有方法可能未能充分捕捉电力系统中网络拓扑与动态特性之间的相互作用，特别是在随机发电接入背景下，需要一种能同时考虑系统连接性和惯量分布的新指标来评估动态连接性，以优化发电选址并减少频率波动。
AI.method: 提出广义Fiedler向量(GFV)作为新指标，基于系统拉普拉斯矩阵表示的网络连接性和节点惯量分布，采用第一作者先前开发的公式。该指标通过蒙特卡洛模拟在IEEE 68节点测试系统上进行验证。
AI.result: GFV能够有效评估电力系统的动态连接性，为随机发电的最优选址提供有价值见解，从而减轻其对局部和系统范围频率变异性的影响。在IEEE 68节点测试系统上的蒙特卡洛模拟证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 广义Fiedler向量(GFV)是一种有效的动态连接性评估指标，能够结合网络拓扑和动态特性，为电力系统中随机发电的优化选址提供指导，有助于减少频率波动并提高系统稳定性。

title: Frozen Policy Iteration: Computationally Efficient RL under Linear $Q^π$ Realizability for Deterministic Dynamics
summary:
We study computationally and statistically efficient reinforcement learning under the linear $Q^π$ realizability assumption, where any policy's $Q$-function is linear in a given state-action feature representation. Prior methods in this setting are either computationally intractable, or require (local) access to a simulator. In this paper, we propose a computationally efficient online RL algorithm, named Frozen Policy Iteration, under the linear $Q^π$ realizability setting that works for Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with stochastic initial states, stochastic rewards and deterministic transitions. Our algorithm achieves a regret bound of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{d^2H^6T})$, where $d$ is the dimensionality of the feature space, $H$ is the horizon length, and $T$ is the total number of episodes. Our regret bound is optimal for linear (contextual) bandits which is a special case of our setting with $H = 1$.
  Existing policy iteration algorithms under the same setting heavily rely on repeatedly sampling the same state by access to the simulator, which is not implementable in the online setting with stochastic initial states studied in this paper. In contrast, our new algorithm circumvents this limitation by strategically using only high-confidence part of the trajectory data and freezing the policy for well-explored states, which ensures that all data used by our algorithm remains effectively on-policy during the whole course of learning. We further demonstrate the versatility of our approach by extending it to the Uniform-PAC setting and to function classes with bounded eluder dimension.

AI.tldr: 提出Frozen Policy Iteration算法，在具有线性Q函数可表示性的MDP中实现计算高效且统计高效的在线强化学习，无需模拟器访问，适用于随机初始状态和奖励、确定性转移的MDP。
AI.motivation: 现有在线RL方法在线性Q函数可表示性假设下要么计算不可行，要么需要模拟器访问。本文旨在开发一种计算高效的在线算法，适用于具有随机初始状态、随机奖励和确定性转移的MDP，无需模拟器支持。
AI.method: 提出Frozen Policy Iteration算法，通过策略性地使用高置信度轨迹数据，对充分探索的状态冻结策略，确保所有数据在整个学习过程中保持有效同策略性。算法避免了传统策略迭代需要重复采样同一状态的问题。
AI.result: 算法实现了$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{d^2H^6T})$的遗憾界，其中d是特征空间维度，H是时间步长，T是总回合数。该遗憾界在线性上下文赌博机（H=1）这一特例下是最优的。
AI.conclusion: Frozen Policy Iteration是在线性Q函数可表示性假设下首个计算高效且无需模拟器的在线RL算法。该方法还可扩展到Uniform-PAC设置和有界eluder维度的函数类，展示了其通用性。

title: AI Safety Evaluations Need To Consider Cascading Effects
comment: As accepted in the IASEAI 2026 Proceedings, Track 11: Epistemological challenges of AI
summary:
AI systems comprise a range of interactions across the technical and organisational components of a range of actors. These components work together to provide the systems' functionality. This socio-technical assemblage is increasingly described as an algorithmic supply chain.
  Given their role in supporting a wide range of systems, foundation models (FMs) are increasingly a key part of many algorithmic supply chains. In practice, various technical and non-technical components work to mediate, adapt, and augment the behaviour of models, such as FMs, both in general, and for their use in specific application contexts. However, many AI safety evaluations tend to focus on capabilities of FMs themselves and/or assess these components independently, at certain levels of abstraction, with less consideration on how these components could interact, influence, reinforce or counteract each other.
  In this paper, we introduce the cascade as a concept for supporting more holistic AI evaluations. The cascade captures how the interactions between socio-technical components along the AI supply chain can compound and produce cumulative effects with downstream consequences. Specifically, we (i) identify gaps in current AI auditing approaches, using LLMs as our case study; (ii) demonstrate how cascade problems manifest in deployed AI systems through a characterisation of cascades through different viewpoints (component and stakeholder), and (iii) propose research directions for assessing the cascade specifically as an object of analysis. As these cascades can significantly impact transparency, accountability, security, and safety, we advocate for a paradigm shift in AI system auditing towards systems-oriented audits that incorporate cascading effects, to complement model centric evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"级联"概念，用于更全面地评估AI系统，强调AI供应链中各组件相互作用产生的累积效应，主张从模型中心评估转向系统导向审计。
AI.motivation: 当前AI安全评估主要关注基础模型本身能力或独立评估各组件，缺乏对AI供应链中社会技术组件如何相互作用、影响、强化或抵消的考虑。这些级联效应会显著影响透明度、问责制、安全性和安全性。
AI.method: 1) 识别当前AI审计方法中的差距（以LLM为案例研究）；2) 通过不同视角（组件和利益相关者）描述级联问题在已部署AI系统中的表现；3) 提出将级联作为分析对象进行评估的研究方向。
AI.result: 提出了"级联"概念框架，展示了级联问题在AI系统中的具体表现，并提出了相应的研究方向。强调需要更全面的系统导向审计方法。
AI.conclusion: 需要AI系统审计范式转变，从模型中心评估转向包含级联效应的系统导向审计，以补充模型中心评估，更好地应对AI供应链中组件相互作用的复杂影响。

title: CIRCUS: Circuit Consensus under Uncertainty via Stability Ensembles
summary: Mechanistic circuit discovery is notoriously sensitive to arbitrary analyst choices, especially pruning thresholds and feature dictionaries, often yielding brittle "one-shot" explanations with no principled notion of uncertainty. We reframe circuit discovery as an uncertainty-quantification problem over these analytic degrees of freedom. Our method, CIRCUS, constructs an ensemble of attribution graphs by pruning a single raw attribution run under multiple configurations, assigns each edge a stability score (the fraction of configurations that retain it), and extracts a strict-consensus circuit consisting only of edges that appear in all views. This produces a threshold-robust "core" circuit while explicitly surfacing contingent alternatives and enabling rejection of low-agreement structure. CIRCUS requires no retraining and adds negligible overhead, since it aggregates structure across already-computed pruned graphs. On Gemma-2-2B and Llama-3.2-1B, strict consensus circuits are ~40x smaller than the union of all configurations while retaining comparable influence-flow explanatory power, and they outperform a same-edge-budget baseline (union pruned to match the consensus size). We further validate causal relevance with activation patching, where consensus-identified nodes consistently beat matched non-consensus controls (p=0.0004). Overall, CIRCUS provides a practical, uncertainty-aware framework for reporting trustworthy, auditable mechanistic circuits with an explicit core/contingent/noise decomposition.

AI.tldr: CIRCUS：一种通过聚合多个剪枝配置下的归因图来构建稳定核心电路的电路发现方法，提供不确定性量化
AI.motivation: 传统机制电路发现对分析师的选择（如剪枝阈值和特征字典）过于敏感，导致脆弱的"一次性"解释，缺乏原则性的不确定性概念
AI.method: 通过多种配置剪枝单个原始归因运行来构建归因图集合，为每条边分配稳定性分数（保留该边的配置比例），提取严格共识电路（在所有视图中都出现的边）
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-2B和Llama-3.2-1B上，严格共识电路比所有配置的并集小约40倍，同时保持可比的解释力；通过激活修补验证，共识识别节点显著优于非共识控制（p=0.0004）
AI.conclusion: CIRCUS提供了一个实用的、不确定性感知的框架，用于报告可信、可审计的机制电路，具有明确的核心/偶然/噪声分解

title: LOGIGEN: Logic-Driven Generation of Verifiable Agentic Tasks
summary: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) from static instruction-followers to autonomous agents necessitates operating within complex, stateful environments to achieve precise state-transition objectives. However, this paradigm is bottlenecked by data scarcity, as existing tool-centric reverse-synthesis pipelines fail to capture the rigorous logic of real-world applications. We introduce \textbf{LOGIGEN}, a logic-driven framework that synthesizes verifiable training data based on three core pillars: \textbf{Hard-Compiled Policy Grounding}, \textbf{Logic-Driven Forward Synthesis}, and \textbf{Deterministic State Verification}. Specifically, a Triple-Agent Orchestration is employed: the \textbf{Architect} compiles natural-language policy into database constraints to enforce hard rules; the \textbf{Set Designer} initializes boundary-adjacent states to trigger critical policy conflicts; and the \textbf{Explorer} searches this environment to discover causal solution paths. This framework yields a dataset of 20,000 complex tasks across 8 domains, where validity is strictly guaranteed by checking exact state equivalence. Furthermore, we propose a verification-based training protocol where Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on verifiable trajectories establishes compliance with hard-compiled policy, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) guided by dense state-rewards refines long-horizon goal achievement. On $τ^2$-Bench, LOGIGEN-32B(RL) achieves a \textbf{79.5\% success rate}, substantially outperforming the base model (40.7\%). These results demonstrate that logic-driven synthesis combined with verification-based training effectively constructs the causally valid trajectories needed for next-generation agents.

AI.tldr: LOGIGEN是一个逻辑驱动的框架，通过硬编译策略基础、逻辑驱动前向合成和确定性状态验证三大支柱，合成可验证的训练数据，解决LLM作为自主代理在复杂状态环境中数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型从静态指令跟随者演变为自主代理，需要在复杂状态环境中操作以实现精确的状态转换目标。然而，现有工具中心的反向合成管道无法捕捉真实应用的严谨逻辑，导致数据稀缺成为瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出LOGIGEN框架，包含三大支柱：硬编译策略基础、逻辑驱动前向合成和确定性状态验证。采用三重代理编排：架构师将自然语言策略编译为数据库约束；集合设计师初始化边界相邻状态以触发关键策略冲突；探索者搜索环境发现因果解决方案路径。还提出基于验证的训练协议，结合监督微调和强化学习。
AI.result: 生成了包含8个领域20,000个复杂任务的数据集，有效性通过检查精确状态等价性严格保证。在τ²-Bench上，LOGIGEN-32B(RL)实现了79.5%的成功率，显著优于基础模型的40.7%。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑驱动合成与基于验证的训练相结合，能够有效构建下一代代理所需的因果有效轨迹，显著提升LLM在复杂状态环境中的表现。

title: Distributed Computing for Huge-Scale Aggregative Convex Programming
summary: Concerning huge-scale aggregative convex programming of a linear objective subject to the affine constraints of equality and inequality and the quadratic constraints of inequality, convex and aggregatively computable, an algorithm is developed for its distributed computing. The consensus with single common variable is used to partition the constraints into multi-consensus blocks, and the subblocks of each consensus block are employed to partition the primal variables into multiple sets of disjoint subvectors. The global consensus constraints of equality and the original constraints are converted into the extended constraints of equality via slack variables to help resolve feasibility and initialization of the algorithm. The augmented Lagrangian, the block-coordinate Gauss-Seidel method, the proximal point method with double proximal terms or single, and ADMM are used to update the primal and slack variables; descent models with built-in bounds are used to update the dual. Convergence of the algorithm to optimal solutions is argued and the rate of convergence, $O(1/k^{1/2})$ is estimated, under the feasibility supposed. Issues requiring further explorations are listed.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于大规模聚合凸规划的分布式算法，该算法处理线性目标函数，受限于仿射等式/不等式约束和凸聚合可计算的二次不等式约束。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模聚合凸规划问题的分布式计算需求，这类问题包含线性目标、仿射约束和二次约束，需要高效的分布式算法来处理。
AI.method: 使用单公共变量共识将约束划分为多共识块，每个共识块的子块用于划分原始变量为多个不相交子向量集。通过松弛变量将全局共识等式约束和原始约束转换为扩展等式约束。采用增广拉格朗日、块坐标Gauss-Seidel方法、带双/单近端项的近端点方法、ADMM更新原始和松弛变量，使用带内置边界的下降模型更新对偶变量。
AI.result: 算法收敛到最优解，在可行性假设下估计收敛速率为$O(1/k^{1/2})$。
AI.conclusion: 开发了一种用于大规模聚合凸规划问题的分布式算法，证明了收敛性并给出了收敛速率估计，同时列出了需要进一步探索的问题。

title: PAC Finite-Time Safety Guarantees for Stochastic Systems with Unknown Disturbance Distributions
summary: We investigate the problem of establishing finite-time probabilistic safety guarantees for discrete-time stochastic dynamical systems subject to unknown disturbance distributions, using barrier certificate methods. Our approach develops a data-driven safety certification framework that relies only on a finite collection of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) disturbance samples. Within this framework, we propose a certification procedure such that, with confidence at least $1-δ$ over the sampled disturbances, if the output of the certification procedure is accepted, the probability that the system remains within a prescribed safe set over a finite horizon is at least $1-ε$. A key challenge lies in formally characterizing the probably approximately correct (PAC) generalization behavior induced by finite samples. To address this, we derive PAC generalization bounds using tools from VC dimension, scenario optimization, and Rademacher complexity. These results illuminate the fundamental trade-offs between sample size, model complexity, and safety tolerance, providing both theoretical insight and practical guidance for designing reliable, data-driven safety certificates in discrete-time stochastic systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数据驱动的随机动力系统安全认证框架，使用有限扰动样本建立有限时间概率安全保证
AI.motivation: 针对具有未知扰动分布的离散时间随机动力系统，需要建立有限时间概率安全保证，但传统方法需要完整的扰动分布信息，而实际中只能获得有限样本
AI.method: 开发数据驱动的安全认证框架，仅依赖有限独立同分布扰动样本；提出认证程序，结合VC维、场景优化和Rademacher复杂度推导PAC泛化边界
AI.result: 当认证程序输出接受时，以至少1-δ的置信度保证系统在有限时间范围内保持在规定安全集中的概率至少为1-ε
AI.conclusion: 揭示了样本大小、模型复杂度和安全容忍度之间的基本权衡，为离散时间随机系统中设计可靠的数据驱动安全证书提供了理论见解和实践指导

title: Probabilistic Learning and Generation in Deep Sequence Models
summary: Despite exceptional predictive performance of Deep sequence models (DSMs), the main concern of their deployment centers around the lack of uncertainty awareness. In contrast, probabilistic models quantify the uncertainty associated with unobserved variables with rules of probability. Notably, Bayesian methods leverage Bayes' rule to express our belief of unobserved variables in a principled way. Since exact Bayesian inference is computationally infeasible at scale, approximate inference is required in practice. Two major bottlenecks of Bayesian methods, especially when applied in deep neural networks, are prior specification and approximation quality. In Chapter 3 & 4, we investigate how the architectures of DSMs themselves can be informative for the design of priors or approximations in probabilistic models. We first develop an approximate Bayesian inference method tailored to the Transformer based on the similarity between attention and sparse Gaussian process. Next, we exploit the long-range memory preservation capability of HiPPOs (High-order Polynomial Projection Operators) to construct an interdomain inducing point for Gaussian process, which successfully memorizes the history in online learning. In addition to the progress of DSMs in predictive tasks, sequential generative models consisting of a sequence of latent variables are popularized in the domain of deep generative models. Inspired by the explicit self-supervised signals for these latent variables in diffusion models, in Chapter 5, we explore the possibility of improving other generative models with self-supervision for their sequential latent states, and investigate desired probabilistic structures over them. Overall, this thesis leverages inductive biases in DSMs to design probabilistic inference or structure, which bridges the gap between DSMs and probabilistic models, leading to mutually reinforced improvement.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用深度序列模型的归纳偏置来设计概率推理或结构，弥合深度序列模型与概率模型之间的差距，实现相互增强的改进。
AI.motivation: 深度序列模型虽然预测性能优异，但缺乏不确定性意识；而概率模型能通过概率规则量化不确定性，但贝叶斯方法在深度神经网络中存在先验指定和近似质量两大瓶颈。论文旨在利用深度序列模型本身的架构信息来改进概率模型的设计。
AI.method: 1. 基于Transformer与稀疏高斯过程的相似性，开发针对Transformer的近似贝叶斯推理方法；2. 利用HiPPO的长程记忆保持能力构建高斯过程的域间诱导点，实现在线学习中的历史记忆；3. 探索通过自监督改进其他生成模型中序列潜在状态的可能性，并研究其概率结构。
AI.result: 成功开发了针对Transformer的贝叶斯推理方法，利用HiPPO构建了能记忆历史的高斯过程诱导点，并探索了通过自监督改进生成模型序列潜在状态的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用深度序列模型的归纳偏置来设计概率推理或结构，成功弥合了深度序列模型与概率模型之间的差距，实现了两者的相互增强改进，为解决深度模型的不确定性量化问题提供了新思路。

title: Who Controls the Conversation? User Perspectives On Generative AI (LLM) System Prompts
summary:
System prompts - instructions that shape the behaviour of generative AI systems - strongly influence system outputs and users' experiences. They define the model's guidelines, `personality', and guardrails, taking precedence over user inputs. Despite their influence, transparency is limited: system prompts are generally not made public and most platforms instruct models to conceal them, leaving users disconnected from and unaware of a key mechanism guiding and governing their AI interactions.
  This paper argues that system prompts warrant explicit, user-centred design attention and, focusing on large language models (LLMs), asks: what do system prompts contain, how do end-users perceive them, and what do these perceptions offer for design and governance practice?
  Our results reveal user perspectives on: the benefits and risks of system prompts; the values they prefer to be associated with prompt-design; their levels of comfort with different types of prompts; and degrees of transparency and user control regarding prompt content. From these findings emerge considerations for how designers can better align system prompt mechanisms with user expectations and preferences over these mechanisms that directly shape how generative AI systems behave.

AI.tldr: 本文研究系统提示（system prompts）对生成式AI系统行为的影响，探讨用户对系统提示的认知、偏好和期望，为设计和治理实践提供建议。
AI.motivation: 系统提示作为塑造生成式AI系统行为的关键机制，对系统输出和用户体验有重大影响，但目前透明度有限，用户通常不了解这一机制。研究旨在理解系统提示的内容、用户感知以及这些感知对设计和治理实践的意义。
AI.method: 研究聚焦大型语言模型（LLMs），通过用户视角探讨系统提示的内容、用户对系统提示的感知，包括用户对系统提示的益处和风险看法、偏好的价值观、对不同类型提示的接受程度，以及对透明度和用户控制的需求。
AI.result: 研究揭示了用户对系统提示的多方面视角：1）系统提示的益处和风险；2）用户偏好的与提示设计相关的价值观；3）用户对不同类型提示的接受程度；4）用户对提示内容透明度和控制权的期望程度。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果提出了设计考虑，帮助设计者更好地将系统提示机制与用户期望和偏好对齐，使直接塑造生成式AI系统行为的机制更符合用户需求，为系统提示的设计和治理提供实践指导。

title: MAML-KT: Addressing Cold Start Problem in Knowledge Tracing for New Students via Few-Shot Model-Agnostic Meta Learning
summary: Knowledge tracing (KT) models are commonly evaluated by training on early interactions from all students and testing on later responses. While effective for measuring average predictive performance, this evaluation design obscures a cold start scenario that arises in deployment, where models must infer the knowledge state of previously unseen students from only a few initial interactions. Prior studies have shown that under this setting, standard empirically risk-minimized KT models such as DKT, DKVMN and SAKT exhibit substantially lower early accuracy than previously reported. We frame new-student performance prediction as a few-shot learning problem and introduce MAML-KT, a model-agnostic meta learning approach that learns an initialization optimized for rapid adaptation to new students using one or two gradient updates. We evaluate MAML-KT on ASSIST2009, ASSIST2015 and ASSIST2017 using a controlled cold start protocol that trains on a subset of students and tests on held-out learners across early interaction windows (questions 3-10 and 11-15), scaling cohort sizes from 10 to 50 students. Across datasets, MAML-KT achieves higher early accuracy than prior KT models in nearly all cold start conditions, with gains persisting as cohort size increases. On ASSIST2017, we observe a transient drop in early performance that coincides with many students encountering previously unseen skills. Further analysis suggests that these drops coincide with skill novelty rather than model instability, consistent with prior work on skill-level cold start. Overall, optimizing KT models for rapid adaptation reduces early prediction error for new students and provides a clearer lens for interpreting early accuracy fluctuations, distinguishing model limitations from genuine learning and knowledge acquisition dynamics.

AI.tldr: 论文提出MAML-KT方法，将新学生知识追踪视为少样本学习问题，通过元学习优化模型初始化，在冷启动场景下显著提升早期预测准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统知识追踪模型评估方法掩盖了实际部署中的冷启动问题：模型需要从少量初始交互中推断新学生的知识状态。现有模型在新学生早期预测中表现不佳，需要针对冷启动场景进行优化。
AI.method: 提出MAML-KT方法，采用模型无关的元学习方法，学习一个优化的初始化参数，通过1-2次梯度更新就能快速适应新学生。在ASSIST2009、2015、2017数据集上使用受控冷启动协议进行评估。
AI.result: MAML-KT在几乎所有冷启动条件下都取得了比现有知识追踪模型更高的早期准确率，且随着学生群体规模增大（10-50人）优势依然保持。在ASSIST2017上观察到的早期性能下降与技能新颖性相关而非模型不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化知识追踪模型实现快速适应，能够减少新学生的早期预测误差，并为解释早期准确率波动提供了更清晰的视角，有助于区分模型限制与真实的学习和知识获取动态。

title: CoMoL: Efficient Mixture of LoRA Experts via Dynamic Core Space Merging
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable performance on diverse downstream and domain-specific tasks via parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT). However, existing PEFT methods, particularly MoE-LoRA architectures, suffer from limited parameter efficiency and coarse-grained adaptation due to the proliferation of LoRA experts and instance-level routing. To address these issues, we propose Core Space Mixture of LoRA (\textbf{CoMoL}), a novel MoE-LoRA framework that incorporates expert diversity, parameter efficiency, and fine-grained adaptation. Specifically, CoMoL introduces two key components: core space experts and core space routing. Core space experts store each expert in a compact core matrix, preserving diversity while controlling parameter growth. Core space routing dynamically selects and activates the appropriate core experts for each token, enabling fine-grained, input-adaptive routing. Activated core experts are then merged via a soft-merging strategy into a single core expert, which is combined with a shared LoRA to form a specialized LoRA module. Besides, the routing network is projected into the same low-rank space as the LoRA matrices, further reducing parameter overhead without compromising expressiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoMoL retains the adaptability of MoE-LoRA architectures while achieving parameter efficiency comparable to standard LoRA, consistently outperforming existing methods across multiple tasks.

AI.tldr: CoMoL是一种新型的MoE-LoRA框架，通过核心空间专家和核心空间路由实现参数高效和细粒度适配，解决了现有MoE-LoRA方法参数效率低和适配粒度粗的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法，特别是MoE-LoRA架构，存在参数效率有限和适配粒度粗的问题，这是由于LoRA专家数量激增和实例级路由导致的。
AI.method: 提出CoMoL框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 核心空间专家：将每个专家存储在紧凑的核心矩阵中；2) 核心空间路由：为每个token动态选择和激活合适的核心专家。激活的核心专家通过软合并策略合并为单个核心专家，然后与共享LoRA结合形成专门的LoRA模块。路由网络也投影到与LoRA矩阵相同的低秩空间。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明，CoMoL在保持MoE-LoRA架构适应性的同时，实现了与标准LoRA相当的参数效率，在多个任务上持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CoMoL通过核心空间专家和路由机制，成功解决了MoE-LoRA架构的参数效率问题，实现了细粒度适配，为大语言模型的高效微调提供了有效解决方案。

title: Advancing Multimodal Judge Models through a Capability-Oriented Benchmark and MCTS-Driven Data Generation
summary: Using Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as judges to achieve precise and consistent evaluations has gradually become an emerging paradigm across various domains. Evaluating the capability and reliability of MLLM-as-a-judge systems is therefore essential for ensuring trustworthy assessment. Existing judge benchmarks categorize samples by task types but fail to capture the fundamental judgment capabilities required for reliable evaluation. In this work, we introduce M-JudgeBench, a ten-dimensional capability-oriented benchmark designed to comprehensively assess the judgment abilities of MLLMs. Our benchmark decomposes evaluation into pairwise Chain-of-Thought (CoT) comparison, length bias avoidance, and process error detection tasks, jointly covering ten fine-grained subtasks. This design enables diagnosis of model reliability across reasoning styles, response lengths, and cross-model variations. Systematic evaluation uncovers the systematic weaknesses in existing MLLM-as-a-judge systems. To address this issue, we further propose Judge-MCTS, a data construction framework generating pairwise reasoning trajectories with various correctness and length. Using Judge-MCTS, we construct an MCTS-augmented dataset and train M-Judger, a series of strong judge models. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of M-Judger on existing judge benchmarks as well as M-JudgeBench. Overall, our work establishes a more principled foundation for evaluating MLLM-as-a-judge through M-JudgeBench and Judge-MCTS framework, paving the way for future research on judge model evaluation and capability-driven judge training.

AI.tldr: 提出了M-JudgeBench基准和Judge-MCTS框架，用于系统评估和提升多模态大语言模型作为评判者的能力
AI.motivation: 现有评判基准按任务类型分类，未能捕捉可靠评估所需的基本判断能力，需要更系统的方法来评估MLLM作为评判者的能力和可靠性
AI.method: 1) 提出M-JudgeBench十维能力导向基准，通过成对思维链比较、长度偏差避免和过程错误检测任务评估判断能力；2) 提出Judge-MCTS数据构建框架，生成具有不同正确性和长度的成对推理轨迹；3) 训练M-Judger系列评判模型
AI.result: 系统评估揭示了现有MLLM-as-a-judge系统的系统性弱点，M-Judger在现有评判基准和M-JudgeBench上都表现出优越性
AI.conclusion: 通过M-JudgeBench和Judge-MCTS框架为评估MLLM-as-a-judge建立了更原则性的基础，为评判模型评估和能力驱动的评判训练铺平了道路

title: On semimonotone matrices of exact order two
summary: In this paper, we introduce the notion of (strictly) semimonotone matrices of exact order $k$, where $0\leq k\leq n$, and explore their properties. We fully characterize the $3 \times 3$ (strictly) semimonotone matrices of exact order $2$, and show that the class of $3 \times 3$ semimonotone matrices of exact order $2$ forms a subclass of inverse $\mathbf{Z}$-matrices. We further investigate $ n\times n$ (strictly) semimonotone matrices of exact order $2$, with emphasis on their identification and construction, and establish that every $n\times n$ semimonotone $\mathbf{Z}$-matrix of exact order $2$ is invertible. Additionally, we show that when $n-k=1$, the class of (strictly) semimonotone matrices of exact order $k$ is a subclass of $\mathbf{Z}$-matrices.

AI.tldr: 本文引入了严格半单调矩阵的精确阶k概念，研究了其性质，特别关注精确阶2的情况，并建立了与Z矩阵和逆Z矩阵的关系。
AI.motivation: 研究半单调矩阵的精确阶概念，探索矩阵结构与单调性之间的关系，特别关注精确阶2的情况及其与Z矩阵类的联系。
AI.method: 引入严格半单调矩阵的精确阶k定义，对3×3精确阶2矩阵进行完全刻画，研究n×n精确阶2矩阵的识别和构造方法，分析其与Z矩阵和逆Z矩阵的关系。
AI.result: 完全刻画了3×3严格半单调精确阶2矩阵，证明3×3半单调精确阶2矩阵是逆Z矩阵的子类；证明了n×n半单调Z矩阵精确阶2是可逆的；当n-k=1时，严格半单调精确阶k矩阵是Z矩阵的子类。
AI.conclusion: 半单调矩阵的精确阶概念提供了研究矩阵单调性的新视角，揭示了精确阶2矩阵与Z矩阵类之间的重要联系，为矩阵理论提供了新的结构洞察。

title: A Hetero-functional Graph State Estimator for Watershed Systems: Application to the Chesapeake Bay
summary: Regional watersheds are complex systems of systems encompassing hydrology, land-use decision-making, estuarine ecological feedbacks, and overlapping governance jurisdictions. Their effective management underlies many modern societal challenges and therefore requires models that capture interdependencies between natural and institutional systems. Regional-specific models such as the Chesapeake Assessment Scenario Tool, used in this paper's case study, provide valuable nutrient estimates but rely on structurally opaque watershed routing that limits integration into broader systems-level analyses. This paper introduces a modeling framework for watershed systems. First, a region-independent reference architecture is developed. Second, the Weighted Least Squares Error Hetero-functional Graph State Estimator, an extension of Hetero-functional Graph Theory (HFGT), is adapted to estimate nutrient flows from uncertain data. The framework is demonstrated through instantiation in the Chesapeake Bay Watershed. By establishing a shared ontology grounded in Systems Modeling Language and HFGT, the approach enables integration of economic and governance systems to support sustainable watershed management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于异质功能图理论的水域系统建模框架，通过建立区域无关的参考架构和加权最小二乘误差异质功能图状态估计器，实现了不确定数据下的营养物流量估计，并在切萨皮克湾水域进行了实例验证。
AI.motivation: 区域水域是复杂的系统之系统，包含水文、土地利用决策、河口生态反馈和重叠的治理管辖区。有效管理这些系统对解决现代社会挑战至关重要，但现有模型（如切萨皮克评估情景工具）虽然能提供有价值的营养物估计，但其结构不透明的流域路由限制了其融入更广泛的系统级分析。
AI.method: 1. 开发区域无关的参考架构；2. 将加权最小二乘误差异质功能图状态估计器（异质功能图理论的扩展）应用于从不确定数据中估计营养物流量；3. 在切萨皮克湾水域实例化该框架，建立基于系统建模语言和异质功能图理论的共享本体。
AI.result: 该框架成功在切萨皮克湾水域实例化，通过建立共享本体，能够整合经济和治理系统，支持可持续的水域管理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的建模框架通过异质功能图理论和系统建模语言，为水域系统提供了可扩展的建模方法，能够整合自然和制度系统，支持更全面的可持续水域管理决策。

title: Non-Rectangular Average-Reward Robust MDPs: Non-Rectangular Average-Reward Robust MDPs:Optimal Policies and Their Transient Values
summary: We study non-rectangular robust Markov decision processes under the average-reward criterion, where the ambiguity set couples transition probabilities across states and the adversary commits to a stationary kernel for the entire horizon. We show that any history-dependent policy achieving sublinear expected regret uniformly over the ambiguity set is robust-optimal, and that the robust value admits a minimax representation as the infimum over the ambiguity set of the classical optimal gains, without requiring any form of rectangularity or robust dynamic programming principle. Under the weak communication assumption, we establish the existence of such policies by converting high-probability regret bounds from the average-reward reinforcement learning literature into the expected-regret criterion. We then introduce a transient-value framework to evaluate finite-time performance of robust optimal policies, proving that average-reward optimality alone can mask arbitrarily poor transients and deriving regret-based lower bounds on transient values. Finally, we construct an epoch-based policy that combines an optimal stationary policy for the worst-case model with an anytime-valid sequential test and an online learning fallback, achieving a constant-order transient value.

AI.tldr: 研究非矩形鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程，提出历史依赖策略在模糊集上实现次线性期望遗憾即为鲁棒最优，建立极小极大表示，引入瞬态值框架分析有限时间性能，构造具有常数阶瞬态值的策略。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒MDP通常假设矩形模糊集（各状态转移概率独立），这在实际中可能不成立。本文研究非矩形模糊集下的鲁棒MDP，其中模糊集耦合了不同状态间的转移概率，对手在整个时域内承诺使用固定核。
AI.method: 1) 证明历史依赖策略在模糊集上实现次线性期望遗憾即为鲁棒最优；2) 建立鲁棒值的极小极大表示；3) 引入瞬态值框架分析有限时间性能；4) 构造基于周期的策略，结合最坏情况模型的平稳最优策略、随时有效序列测试和在线学习备用方案。
AI.result: 1) 在弱通信假设下，存在实现次线性期望遗憾的策略；2) 平均奖励最优性可能掩盖任意差的瞬态性能；3) 推导了瞬态值的遗憾下界；4) 构造的策略实现了常数阶瞬态值。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非矩形鲁棒MDP提供了理论框架，证明了次线性遗憾策略的鲁棒最优性，建立了鲁棒值的极小极大表示，引入了瞬态值分析有限时间性能，并构造了具有良好瞬态性能的实用策略。

title: Distance Learning and Multilingual Education: A Case Study of Challenges and Pedagogical Perspectives in the Greek Border Region
summary: In increasingly multicultural and multilingual societies, foreign language learning has become essential not only for communication but also for social cohesion and professional advancement. Distance education has emerged as a flexible and accessible solution, particularly for adults seeking to enhance their linguistic and intercultural competencies. This study explores the views of foreign language teachers regarding the role of distance education in promoting multilingualism, with a specific focus on culturally diverse border regions. Conducted in the Regional Unit of Evros, Greece, the research adopts a qualitative methodology based on semi-structured interviews with five language educators working in public and private education. Findings reveal that teachers recognize the potential of digital tools such as Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs), machine translation applications (e.g., Google Translate, DeepL), and adaptive learning platforms to support multilingual learning, particularly when used as supplementary resources. However, concerns were raised about the lack of personalized feedback, limited interactivity, and the absence of culturally contextualized content on existing platforms. Teachers emphasized the importance of digital literacy, pedagogical training, and culturally inclusive design to ensure effective implementation. The study highlights the need for targeted support for educators in border regions and calls for more locally adapted digital resources that reflect linguistic diversity. These findings offer insights for policymakers and educational technology developers aiming to improve the quality and reach of multilingual education in remote or underserved areas.

AI.tldr: 希腊边境地区外语教师认为远程教育能促进多语学习，但需改进个性化反馈、互动性和文化适应性
AI.motivation: 在多文化和多语言社会中，外语学习对沟通、社会凝聚力和职业发展至关重要。远程教育为成人提供了灵活的学习途径，特别是在边境地区促进多语学习方面具有潜力。
AI.method: 采用定性研究方法，在希腊埃夫罗斯地区对5名公立和私立教育机构的外语教师进行半结构化访谈。
AI.result: 教师认可MOOCs、机器翻译应用和自适应学习平台等数字工具作为补充资源支持多语学习的潜力，但指出缺乏个性化反馈、互动性有限、缺乏文化情境化内容等问题。强调数字素养、教学培训和文化包容性设计的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 需要为边境地区教师提供针对性支持，开发更多反映语言多样性的本地化数字资源，为政策制定者和教育技术开发者提供改进多语教育质量的见解。

title: Bridging Policy and Real-World Dynamics: LLM-Augmented Rebalancing for Shared Micromobility Systems
summary: Shared micromobility services such as e-scooters and bikes have become an integral part of urban transportation, yet their efficiency critically depends on effective vehicle rebalancing. Existing methods either optimize for average demand patterns or employ robust optimization and reinforcement learning to handle predefined uncertainties. However, these approaches overlook emergent events (e.g., demand surges, vehicle outages, regulatory interventions) or sacrifice performance in normal conditions. We introduce AMPLIFY, an LLM-augmented policy adaptation framework for shared micromobility rebalancing. The framework combines a baseline rebalancing module with an LLM-based adaptation module that adjusts strategies in real time under emergent scenarios. The adaptation module ingests system context, demand predictions, and baseline strategies, and refines adjustments through self-reflection. Evaluations on real-world e-scooter data from Chicago show that our approach improves demand satisfaction and system revenue compared to baseline policies, highlighting the potential of LLM-driven adaptation as a flexible solution for managing uncertainty in micromobility systems.

AI.tldr: AMPLIFY：一个基于LLM的策略适应框架，用于共享微出行车辆再平衡，通过实时调整策略来应对突发事件，相比基线策略提高了需求满足率和系统收入。
AI.motivation: 现有共享微出行车辆再平衡方法要么针对平均需求模式优化，要么使用鲁棒优化和强化学习处理预定义的不确定性，但忽略了突发事件（如需求激增、车辆故障、监管干预）或在正常条件下牺牲性能。
AI.method: AMPLIFY框架结合基线再平衡模块和基于LLM的适应模块。适应模块接收系统上下文、需求预测和基线策略，并通过自我反思机制实时调整策略以适应突发事件场景。
AI.result: 在芝加哥真实电动滑板车数据上的评估显示，该方法相比基线策略提高了需求满足率和系统收入，证明了LLM驱动适应在管理微出行系统不确定性方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的适应为共享微出行再平衡提供了一个灵活的解决方案，能够有效应对突发事件，同时保持正常条件下的性能，展示了AI增强系统在动态城市交通环境中的价值。

title: Super Research: Answering Highly Complex Questions with Large Language Models through Super Deep and Super Wide Research
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated proficiency in Deep Research or Wide Search, their capacity to solve highly complex questions-those requiring long-horizon planning, massive evidence gathering, and synthesis across heterogeneous sources-remains largely unexplored. We introduce Super Research, a task for complex autonomous research tasks that integrates (i) structured decomposition into a research plan, (ii) super wide retrieval for diverse perspectives, and (iii) super deep investigation to resolve uncertainties through iterative queries. To evaluate this capability, we curated a benchmark of 300 expert-written questions across diverse domains, each requiring up to 100+ retrieval steps and 1,000+ web pages to reconcile conflicting evidence. Super Research produces verifiable reports with fine-grained citations and intermediate artifacts (e.g., outlines and tables) to ensure traceable reasoning. Furthermore, we present a graph-anchored auditing protocol that evaluates Super Research along five dimensions: Coverage, Logical Consistency, Report Utility, Objectivity and Citation Health. While super-complex questions may be infrequent in standard applications, Super Research serves as a critical ceiling evaluation and stress test for LLM capabilities. A model's proficiency within Super Research acts as a powerful proxy for its general research competence; success here suggests the robustness necessary to navigate nearly any subordinate research task. Leaderboard is available at: https://cnsdqd-dyb.github.io/Super-Research-Benchmark/

AI.tldr: Super Research是一个评估LLM处理高度复杂研究任务能力的基准，需要长时程规划、大规模证据收集和异构源合成，包含300个专家编写的问题，每个需要100+检索步骤和1000+网页来调和冲突证据。
AI.motivation: 虽然LLM在深度研究或广度搜索方面表现出色，但它们在解决需要长时程规划、大规模证据收集和跨异构源合成的高度复杂问题方面的能力尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: Super Research任务整合了三个核心组件：(1)结构化分解为研究计划，(2)超广度检索获取多样化视角，(3)超深度调查通过迭代查询解决不确定性。同时提出了图锚定审计协议，从五个维度评估：覆盖率、逻辑一致性、报告实用性、客观性和引用健康度。
AI.result: 创建了包含300个专家编写问题的基准，每个问题需要100+检索步骤和1000+网页来调和冲突证据。Super Research生成可验证的报告，包含细粒度引用和中间产物（如大纲和表格），确保推理可追溯。
AI.conclusion: Super Research作为LLM能力的临界评估和压力测试，模型在Super Research中的熟练程度是其一般研究能力的强大代理指标，成功完成这些任务表明具备处理几乎所有从属研究任务所需的鲁棒性。

title: EMPA: Evaluating Persona-Aligned Empathy as a Process
summary: Evaluating persona-aligned empathy in LLM-based dialogue agents remains challenging. User states are latent, feedback is sparse and difficult to verify in situ, and seemingly supportive turns can still accumulate into trajectories that drift from persona-specific needs. We introduce EMPA, a process-oriented framework that evaluates persona-aligned support as sustained intervention rather than isolated replies. EMPA distills real interactions into controllable, psychologically grounded scenarios, couples them with an open-ended multi-agent sandbox that exposes strategic adaptation and failure modes, and scores trajectories in a latent psychological space by directional alignment, cumulative impact, and stability. The resulting signals and metrics support reproducible comparison and optimization of long-horizon empathic behavior, and they extend to other agent settings shaped by latent dynamics and weak, hard-to-verify feedback.

AI.tldr: EMPA是一个评估LLM对话代理中角色对齐共情能力的框架，通过过程导向评估而非孤立回复，在可控心理场景中测试长期支持效果
AI.motivation: 评估LLM对话代理的角色对齐共情能力面临挑战：用户状态是隐性的、反馈稀疏且难以实时验证、看似支持的回复可能累积导致偏离角色特定需求
AI.method: EMPA框架将真实互动提炼为可控的心理场景，结合开放式多代理沙盒暴露策略适应和失败模式，在潜在心理空间中通过方向对齐、累积影响和稳定性对轨迹进行评分
AI.result: 产生的信号和指标支持长期共情行为的可重复比较和优化，并可扩展到其他受隐性动态和难以验证的弱反馈影响的代理设置
AI.conclusion: EMPA提供了一个系统化评估角色对齐共情支持的过程导向框架，解决了传统评估方法的局限性，为优化长期共情行为提供了可操作指标

title: Adaptive primal dual hybrid gradient algorithms based on average spectrum for saddle point problems
summary: The primal dual hybrid gradient algorithm (PDHG), which is also known as the Arrow-Hurwicz method, is a fundamental algorithm for saddle point problems especially in imaging. It also inspires a great number of influential algorithms such as the stochastic PDHG and the Chambolle-Pock's primal dual algorithm. In the literature, convergence theory of the PDHG is established only when some more restrictive conditions are additionally assumed, and it is proved that the PDHG with any constant step sizes could diverge for generic setting of convex saddle point problems. The Chambolle-Pock's primal dual algorithm, as an influential variant of the PDHG, is thus widely used due to its provable convergence theory and competitive numerical performance. However, step sizes of the Chambolle-Pock's primal dual algorithm are inherently bounded by its associated matrix spectrum, and this restriction could limit its computational capacity structurally. To address these limitations both in theory and practice, we propose a class of adaptive primal dual hybrid gradient algorithms for generic convex saddle point problems in this paper. By exploiting the prediction-correction algorithmic framework, the global convergence theory of the proposed schemes can be determined only by the average spectrum of the underlying matrix, and it thus leads to a potential acceleration. The numerical experiment on the assignment problem illustrates the superior numerical performance of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应原始对偶混合梯度算法，解决传统PDHG收敛条件严格和Chambolle-Pock算法步长受限问题，通过预测-校正框架实现仅依赖矩阵平均谱的全局收敛
AI.motivation: 传统PDHG算法在一般凸鞍点问题中需要额外严格条件才能收敛，且常步长可能发散；Chambolle-Pock算法虽可证明收敛但步长受限于关联矩阵谱，限制了计算能力。需要克服理论和实践中的这些限制。
AI.method: 提出一类自适应原始对偶混合梯度算法，利用预测-校正算法框架，使全局收敛理论仅依赖于底层矩阵的平均谱，从而实现潜在加速。
AI.result: 数值实验在分配问题上展示了所提方法的优越性能，证明了自适应算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应PDHG算法解决了传统方法的理论和实践限制，通过预测-校正框架实现了仅依赖矩阵平均谱的全局收敛，在分配问题上表现出优越的数值性能。

title: A System-of-Systems Convergence Paradigm for Societal Challenges of the Anthropocene
summary: Modern societal challenges, such as climate change, urbanization, and water resource management, demand integrated, multi-discipline, multi-problem approaches to frame and address their complexity. Unfortunately, current methodologies often operate within disciplinary silos, leading to fragmented insights and missed opportunities for convergence. A critical barrier to cross-disciplinary integration lies in the disparate ontologies that shape how different fields conceptualize and communicate knowledge. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a system-of-systems (SoS) convergence paradigm grounded in a meta-cognition map, a framework that integrates five complementary domains: real-world observations, systems thinking, visual modeling, mathematics, and computing. The paradigm is based on the Systems Modeling Language (SysML), offering a standardized, domain-neutral approach for representing and analyzing complex systems. The proposed methodology is demonstrated through a case study of the Chesapeake Bay Watershed, a socio-environmental system requiring coordination across land use, hydrology, economic and policy domains. By modeling this system with SysML, the study illustrates practical strategies for navigating interdisciplinary challenges and highlights the potential of agile SoS modeling to support large-scale, multi-dimensional decision-making.

AI.tldr: 提出基于系统建模语言（SysML）的系统之系统（SoS）融合范式，通过元认知地图整合五个互补领域，以解决跨学科复杂问题。
AI.motivation: 当前方法存在学科壁垒，导致见解碎片化，错失融合机会。不同领域的概念化方式和知识沟通存在本体论差异，阻碍跨学科整合。
AI.method: 基于系统建模语言（SysML）的系统之系统（SoS）融合范式，构建包含五个互补领域（现实世界观察、系统思维、可视化建模、数学、计算）的元认知地图框架。
AI.result: 通过切萨皮克湾流域案例研究，展示了SysML建模如何协调土地利用、水文、经济与政策等跨领域问题，验证了敏捷SoS建模支持大规模多维决策的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SoS融合范式为跨学科复杂问题提供了标准化、领域中立的方法，能够促进不同领域间的知识整合与协同决策。

title: Evaluating GFlowNet from partial episodes for stable and flexible policy-based training
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) were developed to learn policies for efficiently sampling combinatorial candidates by interpreting their generative processes as trajectories in directed acyclic graphs. In the value-based training workflow, the objective is to enforce the balance over partial episodes between the flows of the learned policy and the estimated flows of the desired policy, implicitly encouraging policy divergence minimization. The policy-based strategy alternates between estimating the policy divergence and updating the policy, but reliable estimation of the divergence under directed acyclic graphs remains a major challenge. This work bridges the two perspectives by showing that flow balance also yields a principled policy evaluator that measures the divergence, and an evaluation balance objective over partial episodes is proposed for learning the evaluator. As demonstrated on both synthetic and real-world tasks, evaluation balance not only strengthens the reliability of policy-based training but also broadens its flexibility by seamlessly supporting parameterized backward policies and enabling the integration of offline data-collection techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文提出评估平衡方法，将基于流的训练与基于策略的训练视角统一，通过流平衡原理推导出策略评估器来测量策略差异，增强策略训练的可靠性和灵活性。
AI.motivation: 生成流网络（GFlowNets）用于学习高效采样组合候选的策略，但基于值的训练隐式最小化策略差异，而基于策略的训练需要可靠估计策略差异，这在有向无环图中具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出评估平衡方法，证明流平衡也能产生测量策略差异的原则性策略评估器，并提出基于部分情节的评估平衡目标来学习该评估器。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界任务中，评估平衡不仅增强了基于策略训练的可靠性，还通过无缝支持参数化后向策略和集成离线数据收集技术扩展了其灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 评估平衡方法成功连接了基于流和基于策略的训练视角，为GFlowNets提供了更可靠和灵活的培训框架。

title: Dial E for Ethical Enforcement: institutional VETO power as a governance primitive
comment: Accepted at the AI for Peace Workshop at ICLR 2026.32 Pages and 2 Figures
summary: The persistent militarization of large reasoning models stems not from technical necessity but from governance arrangements that strip researchers of meaningful authority to refuse harmful transfers and deployments. Existing accountability mechanisms such as model cards and responsible AI statements operate as reputational signals detached from decision making architecture. We identify institutional veto power as a missing governance primitive: a formal authority to halt subsequent use or distribution of research when credible risks of weaponization emerge. Drawing on precedents in nuclear nonproliferation and biomedical ethics, the paper maps unprotected veto points across the research lifecycle, diagnose why compliance without enforceable constraints fails, and offer concrete institutional designs that embed veto authority while reducing the risk of political capture. The paper argues that communities most vulnerable to military uses must lead governance design, and that institutional veto power is a prerequisite for converting symbolic safeguards into enforceable responsibility and for achieving meaningful model disarmament.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"机构否决权"作为AI治理新机制，旨在防止大型推理模型军事化，通过赋予研究者正式权力来阻止高风险应用
AI.motivation: 当前大型推理模型的军事化趋势并非技术必然，而是治理安排剥夺了研究者拒绝有害转移和部署的实质性权力。现有问责机制如模型卡片和负责任AI声明只是与决策架构脱节的声誉信号
AI.method: 借鉴核不扩散和生物医学伦理的先例，识别研究生命周期中未受保护的否决点，分析为何无强制约束的合规会失败，提出具体的制度设计来嵌入否决权同时降低政治俘获风险
AI.result: 提出机构否决权作为缺失的治理原语——当可信的武器化风险出现时，正式权力可以停止研究的后续使用或分发。强调最易受军事用途影响的社区必须主导治理设计
AI.conclusion: 机构否决权是将象征性保障转化为可执行责任的先决条件，也是实现有意义的模型非军事化的关键。这种治理机制能够将符号性保护转化为实际可执行的责任

title: NNiT: Width-Agnostic Neural Network Generation with Structurally Aligned Weight Spaces
summary: Generative modeling of neural network parameters is often tied to architectures because standard parameter representations rely on known weight-matrix dimensions. Generation is further complicated by permutation symmetries that allow networks to model similar input-output functions while having widely different, unaligned parameterizations. In this work, we introduce Neural Network Diffusion Transformers (NNiTs), which generate weights in a width-agnostic manner by tokenizing weight matrices into patches and modeling them as locally structured fields. We establish that Graph HyperNetworks (GHNs) with a convolutional neural network (CNN) decoder structurally align the weight space, creating the local correlation necessary for patch-based processing. Focusing on MLPs, where permutation symmetry is especially apparent, NNiT generates fully functional networks across a range of architectures. Our approach jointly models discrete architecture tokens and continuous weight patches within a single sequence model. On ManiSkill3 robotics tasks, NNiT achieves >85% success on architecture topologies unseen during training, while baseline approaches fail to generalize.

AI.tldr: NNiT：一种宽度无关的神经网络参数生成方法，通过将权重矩阵分块为局部结构化场，结合架构标记和权重块联合建模，能生成功能完整的网络并在未见架构上泛化良好。
AI.motivation: 神经网络参数生成通常受限于架构，因为标准参数表示依赖于已知的权重矩阵维度。此外，置换对称性使得网络可以有完全不同的参数化但实现相似的输入输出函数，这进一步增加了生成难度。
AI.method: 提出神经网络扩散变换器（NNiT），通过将权重矩阵分块为局部结构化场，以宽度无关的方式生成权重。使用图超网络（GHN）和CNN解码器结构对齐权重空间，为基于块的处理创建局部相关性。针对MLP（置换对称性特别明显），NNiT在单个序列模型中联合建模离散架构标记和连续权重块。
