AI.result: 在ManiSkill3机器人任务上，NNiT在训练期间未见过的架构拓扑上实现了>85%的成功率，而基线方法无法泛化。NNiT能够生成功能完整的网络，覆盖一系列架构。
AI.conclusion: NNiT通过将权重矩阵表示为局部结构化场，实现了宽度无关的神经网络参数生成，解决了置换对称性和架构依赖问题，在未见架构上展现出强大的泛化能力。

title: From Literature to Hypotheses: An AI Co-Scientist System for Biomarker-Guided Drug Combination Hypothesis Generation
summary: The rapid growth of biomedical literature and curated databases has made it increasingly difficult for researchers to systematically connect biomarker mechanisms to actionable drug combination hypotheses. We present AI Co-Scientist (CoDHy), an interactive, human-in-the-loop system for biomarker-guided drug combination hypothesis generation in cancer research. CoDHy integrates structured biomedical databases and unstructured literature evidence into a task-specific knowledge graph, which serves as the basis for graph-based reasoning and hypothesis construction. The system combines knowledge graph embeddings with agent-based reasoning to generate, validate, and rank candidate drug combinations, while explicitly grounding each hypothesis in retrievable evidence. Through a web-based interface, users can configure the scientific context, inspect intermediate results, and iteratively refine hypotheses, enabling transparent and researcher-steerable exploration rather than automated decision-making. We demonstrate CoDHy as a system for exploratory hypothesis generation and decision support in translational oncology, highlighting its design, interaction workflow, and practical use cases.

AI.tldr: CoDHy是一个交互式人工智能系统，用于癌症研究中基于生物标志物的药物组合假设生成，结合知识图谱和基于代理的推理来支持研究者驱动的探索。
AI.motivation: 生物医学文献和数据库的快速增长使得研究人员难以系统地将生物标志物机制与可操作的药物组合假设联系起来，需要一种能够整合结构化数据库和非结构化文献证据的系统化方法。
AI.method: CoDHy整合结构化生物医学数据库和非结构化文献证据构建任务特定的知识图谱，结合知识图谱嵌入和基于代理的推理来生成、验证和排序候选药物组合，并通过基于Web的界面支持用户配置科学背景、检查中间结果和迭代优化假设。
AI.result: 开发了一个用于探索性假设生成和决策支持的系统，展示了其在转化肿瘤学中的设计、交互工作流程和实际用例，支持透明且研究者可引导的探索而非自动化决策。
AI.conclusion: CoDHy作为一个交互式、人在循环的系统，能够有效支持基于生物标志物的药物组合假设生成，为转化肿瘤学研究提供了透明且研究者可引导的探索工具。

title: SWE-Hub: A Unified Production System for Scalable, Executable Software Engineering Tasks
summary: Progress in software-engineering agents is increasingly constrained by the scarcity of executable, scalable, and realistic data for training and evaluation. This scarcity stems from three fundamental challenges in existing pipelines: environments are brittle and difficult to reproduce across languages; synthesizing realistic, system-level bugs at scale is computationally expensive; and existing data predominantly consists of short-horizon repairs, failing to capture long-horizon competencies like architectural consistency. We introduce \textbf{SWE-Hub}, an end-to-end system that operationalizes the data factory abstraction by unifying environment automation, scalable synthesis, and diverse task generation into a coherent production stack. At its foundation, the \textbf{Env Agent} establishes a shared execution substrate by automatically converting raw repository snapshots into reproducible, multi-language container environments with standardized interfaces. Built upon this substrate, \textbf{SWE-Scale} engine addresses the need for high-throughput generation, combining cross-language code analysis with cluster-scale validation to synthesize massive volumes of localized bug-fix instances. \textbf{Bug Agent} generates high-fidelity repair tasks by synthesizing system-level regressions involving cross-module dependencies, paired with user-like issue reports that describe observable symptoms rather than root causes. Finally, \textbf{SWE-Architect} expands the task scope from repair to creation by translating natural-language requirements into repository-scale build-a-repo tasks. By integrating these components, SWE-Hub establishes a unified production pipeline capable of continuously delivering executable tasks across the entire software engineering lifecycle.

AI.tldr: SWE-Hub是一个端到端系统，通过统一环境自动化、可扩展合成和多样化任务生成，解决了软件工程代理训练和评估中可执行、可扩展、现实数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 软件工程代理的进展受到可执行、可扩展、现实数据稀缺的制约。现有数据管道存在三个根本挑战：环境脆弱且难以跨语言复制；大规模合成现实的系统级bug计算成本高；现有数据主要是短期修复，无法捕捉架构一致性等长期能力。
AI.method: SWE-Hub采用数据工厂抽象，包含四个核心组件：1) Env Agent将原始仓库快照转换为可复现的多语言容器环境；2) SWE-Scale引擎通过跨语言代码分析和集群规模验证合成大量本地化bug修复实例；3) Bug Agent合成涉及跨模块依赖的系统级回归bug，并生成描述症状而非根本原因的用户式问题报告；4) SWE-Architect将自然语言需求转换为仓库规模的"构建仓库"任务。
AI.result: SWE-Hub建立了一个统一的生产流水线，能够持续交付跨越整个软件工程生命周期的可执行任务，解决了现有数据稀缺问题。
AI.conclusion: SWE-Hub通过整合环境自动化、可扩展合成和多样化任务生成，为软件工程代理的训练和评估提供了可执行、可扩展、现实的数据生产解决方案，推动了软件工程代理的发展。

title: Trading in residential energy systems with storage: a kinetic mean-field approach
summary: We study a stochastic optimal control problem motivated by the operation of a large ensemble of residential storage devices coordinated by an energy aggregator. The aggregator remunerates prosumers in exchange for direct control of their batteries and seeks to jointly (i) reduce local supply-demand imbalances and (ii) exploit intraday price fluctuations through energy arbitrage. The core modeling feature is a kinetic mean-field formulation: the state of charge is treated as a position, the charging/discharging power as a velocity, and the control as an acceleration, thus encoding ramp-rate limitations and producing smooth power trajectories. This leads to a controlled McKean-Vlasov Langevin-type system in which both the drift and the objective functional depend on the time-marginal law of the state, allowing one to capture endogenous interaction effects and population-level stabilization incentives. The performance criterion combines the cost of grid exchange with convex penalties representing degradation and control effort, and includes mean-field terms that promote alignment with the population average; terminal contributions account for residual energy value and end-of-horizon coordination. The resulting control problem is Markovian and hypoelliptic, and naturally connects mean-field control with ultraparabolic operators of kinetic type. This viewpoint provides a coherent bridge between physically constrained storage actuation and law-dependent incentives in large-scale energy management. Numerical experiments based on deep learning solvers are presented to validate the model. From a computational standpoint, the problem is particularly challenging, as it yields a fully coupled forward-backward stochastic system associated with a five-dimensional Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动力学平均场控制的住宅储能聚合商优化调度方法，将电池荷电状态建模为位置，充放电功率为速度，控制为加速度，通过McKean-Vlasov Langevin系统捕捉群体交互效应，结合深度学习求解器进行数值验证。
AI.motivation: 能源聚合商需要协调大量住宅储能设备，既要减少本地供需不平衡，又要利用日内电价波动进行套利。传统方法难以同时处理物理约束（如爬坡率限制）和群体层面的激励协调，需要一种能够编码平滑功率轨迹并捕捉内生交互效应的建模框架。
AI.method: 采用动力学平均场控制方法：将荷电状态视为位置，充放电功率视为速度，控制视为加速度，建立受控McKean-Vlasov Langevin型系统。目标函数结合电网交换成本、退化惩罚和控制努力，包含促进与群体平均对齐的平均场项。该问题转化为马尔可夫且亚椭圆的控制问题，与动力学型超抛物算子自然连接。
AI.result: 建立了物理约束储能驱动与大规模能源管理中依赖于分布律的激励之间的连贯桥梁。数值实验基于深度学习求解器验证了模型的有效性。计算上特别具有挑战性，因为它产生了与五维Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程相关的完全耦合前向-后向随机系统。
AI.conclusion: 动力学平均场控制为协调大规模住宅储能系统提供了统一的数学框架，能够同时处理物理约束和群体激励，通过深度学习求解器可实现有效计算，为能源聚合商优化调度提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: Error Bounds for Physics-Informed Neural Networks in Fokker-Planck PDEs
comment: Accepted at Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2025
summary: Stochastic differential equations are commonly used to describe the evolution of stochastic processes. The state uncertainty of such processes is best represented by the probability density function (PDF), whose evolution is governed by the Fokker-Planck partial differential equation (FP-PDE). However, it is generally infeasible to solve the FP-PDE in closed form. In this work, we show that physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) can be trained to approximate the solution PDF. Our main contribution is the analysis of PINN approximation error: we develop a theoretical framework to construct tight error bounds using PINNs. In addition, we derive a practical error bound that can be efficiently constructed with standard training methods. We discuss that this error-bound framework generalizes to approximate solutions of other linear PDEs. Empirical results on nonlinear, high-dimensional, and chaotic systems validate the correctness of our error bounds while demonstrating the scalability of PINNs and their significant computational speedup in obtaining accurate PDF solutions compared to the Monte Carlo approach.

AI.tldr: 使用物理信息神经网络(PINNs)近似求解Fokker-Planck方程，并建立了紧致的误差界理论框架
AI.motivation: 随机微分方程描述随机过程演化，其状态不确定性由概率密度函数(PDF)表示，PDF演化受Fokker-Planck偏微分方程(FP-PDE)控制。但FP-PDE通常无法获得闭式解，需要有效的数值求解方法。
AI.method: 使用物理信息神经网络(PINNs)训练近似PDF解，建立理论框架构造紧致的PINN近似误差界，推导可高效构建的实用误差界，该框架可推广到其他线性PDE的近似解。
AI.result: 在非线性、高维和混沌系统上的实证结果验证了误差界的正确性，同时展示了PINNs的可扩展性及其相比蒙特卡洛方法在获得准确PDF解方面的显著计算加速。
AI.conclusion: PINNs能够有效近似Fokker-Planck方程的解，所提出的误差界理论框架为PINN近似提供了理论保证，并展示了在实际应用中的计算优势。

title: The Disintegration of Free Speech
summary: This Article examines the constitutional status of AI-mediated communication under the First Amendment. Social media platforms, increasingly integrated with generative AI systems, now function as core public communication infrastructures. Within this environment, AI-generated pornography and large-scale political misinformation have produced significant dignitary and democratic harms. In response, states have enacted regulations requiring platforms to remove certain content, disclose recommendation practices, or redesign moderation systems. These measures, however, collide with prevailing First Amendment doctrine. The Article argues that under existing jurisprudence, AI-generated content is protected speech, and regulations targeting platform moderation practices are likely unconstitutional. Since the 1970s, the Supreme Court has shifted from a structural concern with the free circulation of information toward a strong protection of editorial autonomy, understood as control over authorship, expressive identity, and freedom from compelled attribution. Once content moderation is characterized as editorial judgment, regulatory mandates that compel or restrict such practices presumptively violate the Free Speech Clause. The Article concludes that this doctrinal trajectory risks severing the First Amendment from its democratic foundations and calls for a reconstruction attentive to automated content production, platform infrastructure, and concentrated communicative power.

AI.tldr: 该文探讨AI生成内容在宪法第一修正案下的地位，认为当前司法判例将AI内容视为受保护言论，而监管平台内容审核的法规可能违宪，但这一趋势可能使第一修正案脱离其民主根基。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体平台日益集成生成式AI系统，AI生成的色情内容和政治虚假信息造成了严重的尊严和民主损害。各州试图通过法规要求平台移除内容、披露推荐做法或重新设计审核系统，但这些措施与第一修正案原则产生冲突，需要分析AI中介通信的宪法地位。
AI.method: 文章采用宪法分析和司法判例研究方法，追溯自1970年代以来最高法院从关注信息自由流通向保护编辑自主权的转变，分析将内容审核定性为编辑判断的法律后果，并探讨监管措施与第一修正案的兼容性。
AI.result: 根据现有司法判例，AI生成内容被视为受保护言论，针对平台内容审核实践的监管措施（如强制移除内容、披露推荐算法或重新设计审核系统）很可能违宪，因为它们侵犯了平台的编辑自主权。
AI.conclusion: 当前司法轨迹可能使第一修正案脱离其民主基础，需要重建法律框架以应对自动化内容生产、平台基础设施和集中化通信权力的挑战，平衡言论自由保护与防止AI中介通信造成的危害。

title: Engineering FAIR Privacy-preserving Applications that Learn Histories of Disease
summary: A recent report on "Learning the natural history of human disease with generative transformers" created an opportunity to assess the engineering challenge of delivering user-facing Generative AI applications in privacy-sensitive domains. The application of these models, particularly for personalized healthcare tasks like predicting individual morbidity risk, is typically constrained by data privacy concerns. This project was accordingly designed as an in-browser model deployment exercise (an "App") testing the architectural boundaries of client-side inference generation (no downloads or installations). We relied exclusively on the documentation provided in the reference report to develop the model, specifically testing the "R" component of the FAIR data principles: Findability, Accessibility, Interoperability, and Reusability. The successful model deployment, leveraging ONNX and a custom JavaScript SDK, establishes a secure, high-performance architectural blueprint for the future of private generative AI in medicine.

AI.tldr: 成功部署基于浏览器的生成式AI医疗应用，通过ONNX和JavaScript SDK实现客户端推理，为隐私敏感领域提供安全架构蓝图
AI.motivation: 评估在隐私敏感领域（如医疗）部署用户端生成式AI应用的工程挑战，解决个性化医疗任务中的数据隐私限制问题
AI.method: 采用浏览器内模型部署架构，无需下载安装，基于参考报告开发模型，使用ONNX和自定义JavaScript SDK实现客户端推理
AI.result: 成功部署了基于生成式变换器的医疗应用，建立了安全、高性能的架构蓝图，特别测试了FAIR数据原则中的"可重用性"组件
AI.conclusion: 该研究为医疗领域的私有生成式AI应用提供了可行的客户端部署方案，平衡了模型性能与数据隐私保护的需求

title: QQ: A Toolkit for Language Identifiers and Metadata
summary: The growing number of languages considered in multilingual NLP, including new datasets and tasks, poses challenges regarding properly and accurately reporting which languages are used and how. For example, datasets often use different language identifiers; some use BCP-47 (e.g. en_Latn), others use ISO 639-1 (en), and more linguistically oriented datasets use Glottocodes (stan1293). Mapping between identifiers is manageable for a few dozen languages, but becomes unscalable when dealing with thousands. We introduce QwanQwa, a light-weight Python toolkit for unified language metadata management. QQ integrates multiple language resources into a single interface, provides convenient normalization and mapping between language identifiers, and affords a graph-based structure that enables traversal across families, regions, writing systems, and other linguistic attributes. QQ serves both as (1) a simple "glue" library in multilingual NLP research to make working with many languages easier, and (2) as an intuitive way for exploring languages, such as finding related ones through shared scripts, regions or other metadata.

AI.tldr: QwanQwa是一个轻量级Python工具包，用于统一管理多语言NLP中的语言元数据，解决不同数据集使用不同语言标识符的问题。
AI.motivation: 多语言NLP中语言数量不断增加，不同数据集使用不同的语言标识符（如BCP-47、ISO 639-1、Glottocodes），导致语言识别和映射变得困难且不可扩展。
AI.method: 开发QwanQwa工具包，集成多种语言资源到单一接口，提供语言标识符的规范化映射，采用基于图的结构支持跨语言族、地区、文字系统等属性的遍历。
AI.result: 创建了一个轻量级Python工具包，能够统一管理语言元数据，方便在多语言NLP研究中处理多种语言，并提供直观的语言探索功能。
AI.conclusion: QwanQwa解决了多语言NLP中语言标识符不统一的问题，既可作为研究中的"粘合"库简化多语言处理，也可作为探索语言关系的工具。

title: Draft-Thinking: Learning Efficient Reasoning in Long Chain-of-Thought LLMs
summary: Long chain-of-thought~(CoT) has become a dominant paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capability of large reasoning models~(LRMs); however, the performance gains often come with a substantial increase in reasoning budget. Recent studies show that existing CoT paradigms tend to induce systematic overthinking, unnecessarily coupling reasoning capability with reasoning cost. Most prior approaches reduce token usage through post hoc techniques such as token compression, truncation, or length penalties, without explicitly addressing the core mechanisms of reasoning. We propose \textbf{Draft-Thinking}, which guides models to first learn a concise \textit{draft-style} reasoning structure that retains only the critical reasoning steps. Through a \textit{progressive curriculum learning}, the model stably internalizes this efficient reasoning pattern as its capability scales. Moreover, Draft-Thinking introduces adaptive prompting, which elevates reasoning depth to a flexible, model-selectable behavior. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Draft-Thinking substantially reduces reasoning budget while largely preserving reasoning performance; for example, on MATH500, it achieves an 82.6\% reduction in reasoning budget at the cost of only a 2.6\% performance drop.

AI.tldr: Draft-Thinking是一种新的推理范式，通过让模型学习简洁的草稿式推理结构来减少推理成本，同时保持推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的CoT（思维链）范式虽然能提升大模型的推理能力，但往往伴随着推理成本的显著增加，存在系统性过度思考的问题。先前的方法主要通过后处理技术减少token使用，而没有解决推理的核心机制。
AI.method: 提出Draft-Thinking方法：1）让模型学习简洁的草稿式推理结构，只保留关键推理步骤；2）通过渐进式课程学习，使模型稳定内化这种高效推理模式；3）引入自适应提示，将推理深度变为灵活可选的模型行为。
AI.result: 在MATH500数据集上，Draft-Thinking实现了82.6%的推理成本降低，而性能仅下降2.6%。实验表明该方法能显著减少推理预算，同时基本保持推理性能。
AI.conclusion: Draft-Thinking提供了一种有效的方法来解耦推理能力与推理成本，通过让模型学习高效的草稿式推理结构，在保持性能的同时大幅降低推理开销。

title: An Inexact Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers for Constrained Parabolic Optimal Distributed Control Problems
summary: Solving parabolic optimal control problems can be inherently challenging in the field of science and engineering, especially with constraints on the nonsmooth distributed control. Motivated by the extensive applicability of the alternating direction method of multipliers, in this paper we develop a novel inexact algorithmic framework for parabolic optimal distributed control problems with control constraints. By decoupling the control constraint and possible nonsmooth objective from the optimal control problem, our aim is to efficiently solve the subproblem constrained by the parabolic state equation, for which computing a sufficiently accurate numerical solution can be prohibitively expensive. Given this high computational cost, we consider that it may not always be justifiable to compute a highly accurate solution of the subproblem at every iteration. Hence, we propose an inexact strategy for solving the parabolic equation constrained subproblem. Under mild and flexible conditions on the parameters, we prove global convergence and a linear convergence rate for the resulting algorithmic framework. In practice, our inexact algorithmic framework is easily implementable with applicable nested iterations. Numerical experiments are performed on different cases, and the results demonstrate the validity and trustworthy performance of the proposed methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种求解带控制约束的抛物型最优控制问题的非精确算法框架，通过解耦控制约束和非光滑目标，采用非精确策略求解抛物方程约束的子问题，证明了全局收敛性和线性收敛率。
AI.motivation: 抛物型最优控制问题在科学工程中具有挑战性，特别是带非光滑分布控制约束的情况。传统方法在求解抛物方程约束的子问题时需要高精度解，计算成本昂贵，因此需要开发更高效的算法框架。
AI.method: 基于交替方向乘子法，提出非精确算法框架：1) 解耦控制约束和非光滑目标；2) 采用非精确策略求解抛物方程约束的子问题；3) 在温和灵活的参数条件下设计算法；4) 实现可应用的嵌套迭代。
AI.result: 证明了算法框架的全局收敛性和线性收敛率。数值实验在不同案例上进行，结果表明所提方法具有有效性和可靠性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非精确算法框架能有效求解带控制约束的抛物型最优控制问题，通过降低子问题求解精度要求显著减少计算成本，同时保证收敛性，具有实际应用价值。

title: Hereditary Geometric Meta-RL: Nonlocal Generalization via Task Symmetries
summary: Meta-Reinforcement Learning (Meta-RL) commonly generalizes via smoothness in the task encoding. While this enables local generalization around each training task, it requires dense coverage of the task space and leaves richer task space structure untapped. In response, we develop a geometric perspective that endows the task space with a "hereditary geometry" induced by the inherent symmetries of the underlying system. Concretely, the agent reuses a policy learned at the train time by transforming states and actions through actions of a Lie group. This converts Meta-RL into symmetry discovery rather than smooth extrapolation, enabling the agent to generalize to wider regions of the task space. We show that when the task space is inherited from the symmetries of the underlying system, the task space embeds into a subgroup of those symmetries whose actions are linearizable, connected, and compact--properties that enable efficient learning and inference at the test time. To learn these structures, we develop a differential symmetry discovery method. This collapses functional invariance constraints and thereby improves numerical stability and sample efficiency over functional approaches. Empirically, on a two-dimensional navigation task, our method efficiently recovers the ground-truth symmetry and generalizes across the entire task space, while a common baseline generalizes only near training tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何视角的元强化学习方法，通过发现系统的对称性而非平滑外推来实现任务空间的泛化
AI.motivation: 传统元强化学习通过任务编码的平滑性进行泛化，这需要密集覆盖任务空间且无法利用任务空间更丰富的结构。作者希望开发一种能发现系统内在对称性的方法，实现更广泛的泛化。
AI.method: 提出几何视角，赋予任务空间"遗传几何"结构，通过李群作用变换状态和动作来重用训练时学到的策略。开发微分对称性发现方法，将函数不变性约束坍缩，提高数值稳定性和样本效率。
AI.result: 在二维导航任务中，该方法能有效恢复真实对称性，并在整个任务空间实现泛化，而基线方法只能在训练任务附近泛化。
AI.conclusion: 当任务空间继承自底层系统的对称性时，任务空间可嵌入到那些作用可线性化、连通且紧致的对称性子群中，这些特性使得学习和推理更高效。基于对称性发现的方法比平滑外推方法具有更好的泛化能力。

title: Demystifying Group Relative Policy Optimization: Its Policy Gradient is a U-Statistic
summary: Group relative policy optimization (GRPO), a core methodological component of DeepSeekMath and DeepSeek-R1, has emerged as a cornerstone for scaling reasoning capabilities of large language models. Despite its widespread adoption and the proliferation of follow-up works, the theoretical properties of GRPO remain less studied. This paper provides a unified framework to understand GRPO through the lens of classical U-statistics. We demonstrate that the GRPO policy gradient is inherently a U-statistic, allowing us to characterize its mean squared error (MSE), derive the finite-sample error bound and asymptotic distribution of the suboptimality gap for its learned policy. Our findings reveal that GRPO is asymptotically equivalent to an oracle policy gradient algorithm -- one with access to a value function that quantifies the goodness of its learning policy at each training iteration -- and achieves asymptotically optimal performance within a broad class of policy gradient algorithms. Furthermore, we establish a universal scaling law that offers principled guidance for selecting the optimal group size. Empirical experiments further validate our theoretical findings, demonstrating that the optimal group size is universal, and verify the oracle property of GRPO.

AI.tldr: 本文通过U统计量框架为GRPO提供了理论分析，证明了GRPO的渐近最优性，并建立了选择最优组大小的通用缩放定律。
AI.motivation: GRPO作为DeepSeekMath和DeepSeek-R1的核心方法组件，在扩展大语言模型推理能力方面发挥了重要作用，但其理论性质尚未得到充分研究。尽管有大量后续工作采用该方法，其理论基础仍需深入探索。
AI.method: 本文采用U统计量理论框架来分析GRPO。首先证明GRPO策略梯度本质上是一个U统计量，然后基于此特征化其均方误差，推导有限样本误差界和学习策略次优差距的渐近分布。
AI.result: 研究发现：1) GRPO渐近等价于具有价值函数访问权限的oracle策略梯度算法；2) 在广泛的策略梯度算法类中达到渐近最优性能；3) 建立了选择最优组大小的通用缩放定律。实验验证了理论发现，证明最优组大小具有普适性，并验证了GRPO的oracle性质。
AI.conclusion: 本文为GRPO提供了统一的理论框架，揭示了其渐近最优性和oracle等价性，为实际应用中组大小的选择提供了理论指导，填补了GRPO理论研究的空白。

title: The Art of Generative Narrativity
summary: Recent advancements in generative artificial intelligence (generative AI) technologies have transformed the computer science discipline of natural language processing. However, generative AI retains the anthropomorphic model of simulating human narrative construction and verbal communication whereas, for artists, the ideational exploration is often more important than human mimicry or even plausibility in storytelling. It sometimes leads to generative experiments with non-verbal forms or events that have the potential to incite narratives through the audience's experience of the works' functionalities, backgrounds, and contexts. In this paper, we focus on such artistic approaches to narrativity. In five central sections, we discuss interrelated exemplars whose conceptual frameworks, methodologies, and other attributes anticipate or underscore the issues of contemporary linguistic automation based on massive datafication and statistical retrospection. In closing sections, we summarize the expressive features of these exemplars and underline their value for critically assessing generative AI's cultural influence and fallouts.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨生成式AI在叙事艺术中的局限性，强调艺术家更重视概念探索而非人类模仿，并分析非语言叙事形式的艺术价值。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在自然语言处理领域取得进展，但其基于人类叙事模拟和语言交流的拟人化模型与艺术家的创作理念存在差异。艺术家更关注概念探索而非人类模仿或故事合理性，有时会采用非语言形式来激发叙事。本文旨在探讨这种艺术叙事方法。
AI.method: 通过五个核心部分分析相互关联的案例，讨论其概念框架、方法论和其他属性，这些案例预见或强调了基于大规模数据化和统计回顾的当代语言自动化问题。
AI.result: 总结了这些案例的表达特征，强调了它们对于批判性评估生成式AI文化影响和后果的价值。
AI.conclusion: 艺术家的非语言叙事方法为批判性评估生成式AI的文化影响提供了重要视角，突出了概念探索相对于人类模仿的价值。

title: OSF: On Pre-training and Scaling of Sleep Foundation Models
summary: Polysomnography (PSG) provides the gold standard for sleep assessment but suffers from substantial heterogeneity across recording devices and cohorts. There have been growing efforts to build general-purpose foundation models (FMs) for sleep physiology, but lack an in-depth understanding of the pre-training process and scaling patterns that lead to more generalizable sleep FMs. To fill this gap, we curate a massive corpus of 166,500 hours of sleep recordings from nine public sources and establish SleepBench, a comprehensive, fully open-source benchmark. Leveraging SleepBench, we systematically evaluate four families of self-supervised pre-training objectives and uncover three critical findings: (1) existing FMs fail to generalize to missing channels at inference; (2) channel-invariant feature learning is essential for pre-training; and (3) scaling sample size, model capacity, and multi-source data mixture consistently improves downstream performance.With an enhanced pre-training and scaling recipe, we introduce OSF, a family of sleep FMs that achieves state-of-the-art performance across nine datasets on diverse sleep and disease prediction tasks. Further analysis of OSF also reveals intriguing properties in sample efficiency, hierarchical aggregation, and cross-dataset scaling.

AI.tldr: SleepBench基准测试揭示睡眠基础模型训练关键发现，提出OSF模型在多项睡眠任务中达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有睡眠生理学基础模型缺乏对预训练过程和扩展模式的深入理解，且多导睡眠图存在设备间异质性
AI.method: 构建包含166,500小时睡眠记录的SleepBench基准，系统评估四种自监督预训练目标，提出增强的预训练和扩展方案
AI.result: 发现三个关键发现：现有模型无法泛化到缺失通道；通道不变特征学习至关重要；扩展样本量、模型容量和多源数据混合持续提升性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的OSF睡眠基础模型在九个数据集上实现最先进性能，并展现出样本效率、层次聚合和跨数据集扩展的有趣特性

title: Piecing Together Cross-Document Coreference Resolution Datasets: Systematic Dataset Analysis and Unification
summary: Research in CDCR remains fragmented due to heterogeneous dataset formats, varying annotation standards, and the predominance of the CDCR definition as the event coreference resolution (ECR). To address these challenges, we introduce uCDCR, a unified dataset that consolidates diverse publicly available English CDCR corpora across various domains into a consistent format, which we analyze with standardized metrics and evaluation protocols. uCDCR incorporates both entity and event coreference, corrects known inconsistencies, and enriches datasets with missing attributes to facilitate reproducible research. We establish a cohesive framework for fair, interpretable, and cross-dataset analysis in CDCR and compare the datasets on their lexical properties, e.g., lexical composition of the annotated mentions, lexical diversity and ambiguity metrics, discuss the annotation rules and principles that lead to high lexical diversity, and examine how these metrics influence performance on the same-head-lemma baseline. Our dataset analysis shows that ECB+, the state-of-the-art benchmark for CDCR, has one of the lowest lexical diversities, and its CDCR complexity, measured by the same-head-lemma baseline, lies in the middle among all uCDCR datasets. Moreover, comparing document and mention distributions between ECB+ and uCDCR shows that using all uCDCR datasets for model training and evaluation will improve the generalizability of CDCR models. Finally, the almost identical performance on the same-head-lemma baseline, separately applied to events and entities, shows that resolving both types is a complex task and should not be steered toward ECR alone. The uCDCR dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnZhu/uCDCR, and the code for parsing, analyzing, and scoring the dataset is available at https://github.com/anastasia-zhukova/uCDCR.

AI.tldr: uCDCR是一个统一的跨文档共指消解数据集，整合了多个公开的英文CDCR语料库，提供标准化格式和评估协议，以解决当前研究中的碎片化问题。
AI.motivation: 当前CDCR研究存在碎片化问题，包括数据集格式不统一、标注标准不一致，以及过度关注事件共指消解而忽视实体共指消解。这阻碍了可重复研究和跨数据集比较。
AI.method: 创建uCDCR统一数据集，整合多个公开的英文CDCR语料库，统一格式，修正已知不一致性，补充缺失属性，建立标准化评估框架，并分析数据集的词汇特性、标注规则和基线性能。
AI.result: 分析显示：1) 当前最先进的ECB+基准测试具有最低的词汇多样性之一；2) ECB+的CDCR复杂度在所有uCDCR数据集中处于中等水平；3) 使用所有uCDCR数据集进行训练和评估能提高模型的泛化能力；4) 事件和实体共指消解在相同词干基线下的表现几乎相同，表明两者都是复杂任务。
AI.conclusion: uCDCR为CDCR研究提供了统一的框架，促进了可重复和跨数据集分析。研究表明CDCR不应仅关注事件共指消解，而应同时考虑实体共指消解，且使用多样化的数据集能提高模型泛化能力。

title: MicroVerse: A Preliminary Exploration Toward a Micro-World Simulation
summary: Recent advances in video generation have opened new avenues for macroscopic simulation of complex dynamic systems, but their application to microscopic phenomena remains largely unexplored. Microscale simulation holds great promise for biomedical applications such as drug discovery, organ-on-chip systems, and disease mechanism studies, while also showing potential in education and interactive visualization. In this work, we introduce MicroWorldBench, a multi-level rubric-based benchmark for microscale simulation tasks. MicroWorldBench enables systematic, rubric-based evaluation through 459 unique expert-annotated criteria spanning multiple microscale simulation task (e.g., organ-level processes, cellular dynamics, and subcellular molecular interactions) and evaluation dimensions (e.g., scientific fidelity, visual quality, instruction following). MicroWorldBench reveals that current SOTA video generation models fail in microscale simulation, showing violations of physical laws, temporal inconsistency, and misalignment with expert criteria. To address these limitations, we construct MicroSim-10K, a high-quality, expert-verified simulation dataset. Leveraging this dataset, we train MicroVerse, a video generation model tailored for microscale simulation. MicroVerse can accurately reproduce complex microscale mechanism. Our work first introduce the concept of Micro-World Simulation and present a proof of concept, paving the way for applications in biology, education, and scientific visualization. Our work demonstrates the potential of educational microscale simulations of biological mechanisms. Our data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/MicroVerse

AI.tldr: 提出了MicroWorldBench基准和MicroVerse模型，用于微观尺度模拟，填补了视频生成在微观生物现象模拟中的空白。
AI.motivation: 视频生成技术在宏观动态系统模拟方面已有进展，但在微观尺度（如生物医学、药物发现、疾病机制研究）的应用尚未探索。微观模拟在生物医学应用、教育和可视化方面具有巨大潜力。
AI.method: 1) 提出MicroWorldBench基准，包含459个专家标注的标准，覆盖多个微观模拟任务和评估维度；2) 构建MicroSim-10K高质量专家验证数据集；3) 基于该数据集训练MicroVerse模型，专门用于微观尺度模拟。
AI.result: 当前SOTA视频生成模型在微观模拟中表现不佳，违反物理定律、时间不一致、与专家标准不符。MicroVerse模型能够准确再现复杂的微观机制，在微观世界模拟方面展示了潜力。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出"微观世界模拟"概念并提供了概念验证，为生物学、教育和科学可视化应用铺平了道路。展示了教育性微观生物机制模拟的潜力。

title: Characterization of measures on the real line that are critically unstable under small shifts
summary: We study the perturbation of a measure $μ\in \mathscr{P}(\mathbb{R})$ consisting in superposing two copies of $μ$, each slightly shifted by a small distance $\pm h$. The difference between $μ$ and its perturbation is measured with a Wasserstein distance. For any $μ$, this distance is bounded from above by $h$. We show that measures for which this critical rate is achieved when $h$ goes to 0 are characterized as the ones giving most of their mass to some particular porous sets. This is used to identify which measures $μ$ on the real line have a 2-Wasserstein tangent cone equal to the set of directions inducing curves with maximal initial speed.

AI.tldr: 研究测度μ的扰动：将μ的两个副本分别平移±h后叠加，用Wasserstein距离衡量与原测度的差异。该距离上界为h，达到临界速率h→0的测度特征为大部分质量集中在特定多孔集上，用于识别哪些实线测度具有2-Wasserstein切锥等于诱导最大初始速度曲线的方向集。
AI.motivation: 研究测度在微小平移扰动下的Wasserstein距离变化行为，特别是达到临界速率（距离上界h）的测度特征，这有助于理解测度在Wasserstein空间中的几何性质，特别是切锥结构。
AI.method: 通过分析测度μ与其扰动（两个分别平移±h的副本叠加）之间的Wasserstein距离，研究当h→0时达到距离上界h的测度特征。使用多孔集理论来描述这些测度的质量分布特性。
AI.result: 证明达到临界速率的测度特征为大部分质量集中在特定多孔集上。应用这一结果识别了实线上哪些测度的2-Wasserstein切锥等于诱导最大初始速度曲线的方向集。
AI.conclusion: 测度在Wasserstein距离下的扰动行为与其质量在多孔集上的集中程度密切相关，这一特征决定了测度在Wasserstein空间中的切锥结构，特别是与最大初始速度曲线相关的方向集。

title: Theoretical Perspectives on Data Quality and Synergistic Effects in Pre- and Post-Training Reasoning Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are pretrained on massive datasets and later instruction-tuned via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) or reinforcement learning (RL). Best practices emphasize large, diverse pretraining data, whereas post-training operates differently: SFT relies on smaller, high-quality datasets, while RL benefits more from scale, with larger amounts of feedback often outweighing label quality. Yet it remains unclear why pretraining and RL require large datasets, why SFT excels on smaller ones, and what defines high-quality SFT data. In this work, we theoretically analyze transformers trained on an in-context weight prediction task for linear regression. Our analysis reveals several key findings: $(i)$ balanced pretraining data can induce latent capabilities later activated during post-training, and $(ii)$ SFT learns best from a small set of examples challenging for the pretrained model, while excessively large SFT datasets may dilute informative pretraining signals. In contrast, RL is most effective on large-scale data that is not overly difficult for the pretrained model. We validate these theoretical insights with experiments on large nonlinear transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析发现：平衡的预训练数据能激发潜在能力，SFT在小规模具有挑战性的数据上效果最佳，而RL则需要大规模但不过于困难的数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM的预训练强调大规模多样化数据，而SFT依赖小规模高质量数据，RL则受益于大规模反馈，但学界仍不清楚为何预训练和RL需要大数据，SFT在小数据上表现优异，以及高质量SFT数据的定义是什么。
AI.method: 通过理论分析在上下文权重预测任务上训练的transformer模型，研究线性回归场景，并在大型非线性transformer架构上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 发现：1）平衡的预训练数据能诱导潜在能力，在后续训练中被激活；2）SFT在少量对预训练模型具有挑战性的样本上学习效果最好，过大SFT数据集会稀释预训练信号；3）RL在规模大但不过于困难的数据上最有效。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了不同训练阶段（预训练、SFT、RL）对数据规模和质量的差异化需求，为优化LLM训练策略提供了理论指导。

title: Insights for an AI Whistleblower Office from 30 Case Studies
summary: Whistleblower programmes are a promising tool for uncovering noncompliance with AI regulations. This paper aims to help policymakers design an AI whistleblower programme by giving them an understanding of whistleblowers' motivations, and of the overall whistleblowing process. We take an empirical approach, assembling a dataset of 30 case studies of whistleblowers. This dataset includes dozens of features of each case, which range from 1978 to 2020 and span 15 industries. Our findings suggest that whistleblower programmes will be more effective if they financially reward whistleblowers, provide protections for whistleblowers, enable whistleblowers to report anonymously, are adequately staffed and funded, and provide advice to potential whistleblowers. We provide ten concrete policy recommendations for an AI whistleblower programme at the end of this paper.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析30个举报案例，为AI监管举报制度设计提供实证依据和政策建议，强调经济奖励、匿名举报、法律保护等关键要素。
AI.motivation: 举报制度是发现AI法规违规行为的有力工具，但缺乏针对AI领域的专门设计指导。本文旨在帮助政策制定者基于实证研究设计有效的AI举报制度。
AI.method: 采用实证研究方法，构建包含30个举报案例的数据集（时间跨度1978-2020年，涵盖15个行业），分析每个案例的数十个特征。
AI.result: 研究发现有效的举报制度应包含：经济奖励、举报人保护、匿名举报机制、充足的人员和资金支持、为潜在举报人提供咨询。基于此提出10项具体政策建议。
AI.conclusion: AI举报制度设计需要系统考虑举报人动机和举报过程，基于实证证据的政策建议能够提高制度有效性，促进AI监管合规。

title: Task-Driven Subspace Decomposition for Knowledge Sharing and Isolation in LoRA-based Continual Learning
summary: Continual Learning (CL) requires models to sequentially adapt to new tasks without forgetting old knowledge. Recently, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), a representative Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) method, has gained increasing attention in CL. Several LoRA-based CL methods reduce interference across tasks by separating their update spaces, typically building the new space from the estimated null space of past tasks. However, they (i) overlook task-shared directions, which suppresses knowledge transfer, and (ii) fail to capture truly effective task-specific directions since these ``null bases" of old tasks can remain nearly inactive for new task under correlated tasks. To address this, we study LoRA learning capability from a projection energy perspective, and propose Low-rank Decomposition and Adaptation (LoDA). It performs a task-driven decomposition to build general and truly task-specific LoRA subspaces by solving two energy-based objectives, decoupling directions for knowledge sharing and isolation. LoDA fixes LoRA down-projections on two subspaces and learns robust up-projections via a Gradient-Aligned Optimization (GAO) approach. After each task, before integrating the LoRA updates into the backbone, LoDA derives a closed-form recalibration for the general update, approximating a feature-level joint optimum along this task-shared direction. Experiments indicate that LoDA outperforms existing CL methods.

AI.tldr: LoDA：一种新的持续学习方法，通过任务驱动分解构建通用和任务特定的LoRA子空间，解决现有LoRA方法忽视任务共享方向和无法捕获真正有效任务特定方向的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LoRA的持续学习方法通过分离任务更新空间来减少任务间干扰，但存在两个问题：(1) 忽视任务共享方向，抑制知识迁移；(2) 无法捕获真正有效的任务特定方向，因为旧任务的"零空间基"在相关任务下可能对新任务几乎无效。
AI.method: 提出LoDA方法：1) 从投影能量角度研究LoRA学习能力；2) 通过解决两个基于能量的目标进行任务驱动分解，构建通用和真正任务特定的LoRA子空间；3) 在两个子空间上固定LoRA下投影，通过梯度对齐优化学习鲁棒的上投影；4) 任务完成后，在将LoRA更新集成到骨干网络前，对通用更新进行闭式重新校准。
AI.result: 实验表明LoDA优于现有的持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: LoDA通过任务驱动分解和梯度对齐优化，有效解决了LoRA在持续学习中的局限性，实现了更好的知识共享和隔离平衡。

title: BLUFF: Benchmarking the Detection of False and Synthetic Content across 58 Low-Resource Languages
summary: Multilingual falsehoods threaten information integrity worldwide, yet detection benchmarks remain confined to English or a few high-resource languages, leaving low-resource linguistic communities without robust defense tools. We introduce BLUFF, a comprehensive benchmark for detecting false and synthetic content, spanning 79 languages with over 202K samples, combining human-written fact-checked content (122K+ samples across 57 languages) and LLM-generated content (79K+ samples across 71 languages). BLUFF uniquely covers both high-resource "big-head" (20) and low-resource "long-tail" (59) languages, addressing critical gaps in multilingual research on detecting false and synthetic content. Our dataset features four content types (human-written, LLM-generated, LLM-translated, and hybrid human-LLM text), bidirectional translation (English$\leftrightarrow$X), 39 textual modification techniques (36 manipulation tactics for fake news, 3 AI-editing strategies for real news), and varying edit intensities generated using 19 diverse LLMs. We present AXL-CoI (Adversarial Cross-Lingual Agentic Chainof-Interactions), a novel multi-agentic framework for controlled fake/real news generation, paired with mPURIFY, a quality filtering pipeline ensuring dataset integrity. Experiments reveal state-of-theart detectors suffer up to 25.3% F1 degradation on low-resource versus high-resource languages. BLUFF provides the research community with a multilingual benchmark, extensive linguistic-oriented benchmark evaluation, comprehensive documentation, and opensource tools to advance equitable falsehood detection. Dataset and code are available at: https://jsl5710.github.io/BLUFF/

AI.tldr: BLUFF是一个多语言虚假内容检测基准，涵盖79种语言、超过20万样本，包含人工撰写的事实核查内容和LLM生成内容，特别关注低资源语言，并提出了AXL-CoI生成框架和mPURIFY质量过滤管道。
AI.motivation: 当前虚假内容检测基准主要局限于英语或少数高资源语言，导致低资源语言社区缺乏有效的防御工具，存在信息完整性威胁。
AI.method: 构建了包含79种语言、202K+样本的数据集，结合人工撰写事实核查内容（57种语言）和LLM生成内容（71种语言）。提出了AXL-CoI多智能体框架用于可控虚假/真实新闻生成，以及mPURIFY质量过滤管道确保数据质量。
AI.result: 实验显示现有最先进的检测器在低资源语言上相比高资源语言性能下降高达25.3% F1分数，凸显了多语言检测的挑战。
AI.conclusion: BLUFF为研究社区提供了多语言基准、全面的语言导向评估、详细文档和开源工具，推动公平的虚假内容检测研究。

title: Fair in Mind, Fair in Action? A Synchronous Benchmark for Understanding and Generation in UMLLMs
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly deployed across domains, ensuring fairness has become a core challenge. However, the field faces a "Tower of Babel'' dilemma: fairness metrics abound, yet their underlying philosophical assumptions often conflict, hindering unified paradigms-particularly in unified Multimodal Large Language Models (UMLLMs), where biases propagate systemically across tasks. To address this, we introduce the IRIS Benchmark, to our knowledge the first benchmark designed to synchronously evaluate the fairness of both understanding and generation tasks in UMLLMs. Enabled by our demographic classifier, ARES, and four supporting large-scale datasets, the benchmark is designed to normalize and aggregate arbitrary metrics into a high-dimensional "fairness space'', integrating 60 granular metrics across three dimensions-Ideal Fairness, Real-world Fidelity, and Bias Inertia & Steerability (IRIS). Through this benchmark, our evaluation of leading UMLLMs uncovers systemic phenomena such as the "generation gap'', individual inconsistencies like "personality splits'', and the "counter-stereotype reward'', while offering diagnostics to guide the optimization of their fairness capabilities. With its novel and extensible framework, the IRIS benchmark is capable of integrating evolving fairness metrics, ultimately helping to resolve the "Tower of Babel'' impasse. Project Page: https://iris-benchmark-web.vercel.app/

AI.tldr: IRIS Benchmark：首个同步评估统一多模态大语言模型（UMLLMs）在理解和生成任务上公平性的基准，通过60个细粒度指标构建三维公平空间，揭示系统性偏见现象并提供诊断指导。
AI.motivation: 当前AI公平性领域存在"巴别塔困境"：公平性指标众多但哲学假设冲突，缺乏统一范式，特别是在统一多模态大语言模型（UMLLMs）中，偏见会系统性传播。需要建立能够同步评估理解和生成任务公平性的基准。
AI.method: 提出IRIS基准，包含三个维度：理想公平性、现实保真度、偏见惯性与可操控性。通过人口统计分类器ARES和四个大规模数据集支持，将任意指标归一化并聚合到高维"公平空间"，集成60个细粒度指标。
AI.result: 评估领先的UMLLMs发现了系统性现象：如"生成差距"、个体不一致性如"人格分裂"和"反刻板印象奖励"。基准提供了诊断工具来指导公平性能力优化。
AI.conclusion: IRIS基准以其新颖且可扩展的框架，能够整合不断演进的公平性指标，有助于解决AI公平性领域的"巴别塔困境"，为UMLLMs的公平性评估和优化提供系统化方法。

title: On a Class of Optimal Reinsurance Problems
summary: De Finetti's optimal reinsurance is a set of contracts, one for each risk in a portfolio, that caps the retained aggregate variance to a pre-specified level while minimizing total expected loss. The premiums are determined using the expected value principle, and the safety loading is allowed to vary with the risks. The original formulation assumed that the risks were independent and restricted contracts to quota shares on individual risks. A recent variation surprisingly yields a closed form for the contracts, while allowing dependence between risks and permitting the contracts to depend on all risks, without restricting their functional form. We extend this to the case of an arbitrary convex functional as the risk measure and use duality tools from convex analysis to show the equivalence between the constrained and the penalized versions of the underlying optimization problem. To explicitly solve the penalized version for the variance and the conditional value at risk (CVaR) as the risk measure, we resort to either variational analysis or a rudimentary approach. We show that a rudimentary approach can also address the choice of VaR, a non-convex functional, as the risk measure.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了De Finetti最优再保险模型，从独立风险、配额分享扩展到依赖风险、任意函数形式，并使用凸分析对偶工具处理任意凸风险度量，特别求解了方差和CVaR情况。
AI.motivation: 原始De Finetti最优再保险模型假设风险独立且仅限于单个风险的配额分享合同，这限制了实际应用。需要扩展到依赖风险和更一般的合同形式，并处理更广泛的风险度量。
AI.method: 使用凸分析的对偶工具，证明约束优化问题与惩罚版本的等价性。对于方差和CVaR风险度量，采用变分分析或基本方法求解惩罚版本。对于非凸的VaR，也展示了基本方法的适用性。
AI.result: 成功将De Finetti模型扩展到依赖风险和任意合同形式，建立了约束与惩罚问题的等价性，并给出了方差和CVaR情况下的显式解，同时处理了非凸VaR情况。
AI.conclusion: 本文显著扩展了De Finetti最优再保险框架，使其适用于更现实的依赖风险场景和更广泛的风险度量，为实际再保险合同设计提供了更灵活的理论工具。

title: Intent-Context Synergy Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous UAV Decision-Making in Air Combat
summary: Autonomous UAV infiltration in dynamic contested environments remains a significant challenge due to the partially observable nature of threats and the conflicting objectives of mission efficiency versus survivability. Traditional Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches often suffer from myopic decision-making and struggle to balance these trade-offs in real-time. To address these limitations, this paper proposes an Intent-Context Synergy Reinforcement Learning (ICS-RL) framework. The framework introduces two core innovations: (1) An LSTM-based Intent Prediction Module that forecasts the future trajectories of hostile units, transforming the decision paradigm from reactive avoidance to proactive planning via state augmentation; (2) A Context-Analysis Synergy Mechanism that decomposes the mission into hierarchical sub-tasks (safe cruise, stealth planning, and hostile breakthrough). We design a heterogeneous ensemble of Dueling DQN agents, each specialized in a specific tactical context. A dynamic switching controller based on Max-Advantage values seamlessly integrates these agents, allowing the UAV to adaptively select the optimal policy without hard-coded rules. Extensive simulations demonstrate that ICS-RL significantly outperforms baselines (Standard DDQN) and traditional methods (PSO, Game Theory). The proposed method achieves a mission success rate of 88\% and reduces the average exposure frequency to 0.24 per episode, validating its superiority in ensuring robust and stealthy penetration in high-dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出ICS-RL框架，通过意图预测和上下文协同机制，解决无人机在动态对抗环境中渗透任务中效率与生存性的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机在动态对抗环境中的自主渗透面临重大挑战，因为威胁具有部分可观测性，且任务效率与生存性之间存在冲突目标。传统强化学习方法存在短视决策问题，难以实时平衡这些权衡。
AI.method: 提出意图-上下文协同强化学习(ICS-RL)框架：1) LSTM意图预测模块预测敌对单位未来轨迹，通过状态增强实现从被动避让到主动规划的决策范式转变；2) 上下文分析协同机制将任务分解为层次化子任务；3) 设计异构Dueling DQN智能体集合，每个专门处理特定战术上下文；4) 基于最大优势值的动态切换控制器无缝集成这些智能体。
AI.result: 在广泛仿真中，ICS-RL显著优于基线方法(标准DDQN)和传统方法(PSO、博弈论)。该方法实现了88%的任务成功率，并将平均暴露频率降低到每轮0.24次，验证了其在高度动态场景中确保稳健和隐蔽渗透的优越性。
AI.conclusion: ICS-RL框架通过意图预测和上下文协同机制，有效解决了无人机在动态对抗环境中渗透任务的效率与生存性权衡问题，实现了从被动反应到主动规划的决策范式转变，在复杂对抗场景中表现出优越性能。

title: Nonconvex Latent Optimally Partitioned Block-Sparse Recovery via Log-Sum and Minimax Concave Penalties
summary: We propose two nonconvex regularization methods, LogLOP-l2/l1 and AdaLOP-l2/l1, for recovering block-sparse signals with unknown block partitions. These methods address the underestimation bias of existing convex approaches by extending log-sum penalty and the Minimax Concave Penalty (MCP) to the block-sparse domain via novel variational formulations. Unlike Generalized Moreau Enhancement (GME) and Bayesian methods dependent on the squared-error data fidelity term, our proposed methods are compatible with a broad range of data fidelity terms. We develop efficient Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)-based algorithms for these formulations that exhibit stable empirical convergence. Numerical experiments on synthetic data, angular power spectrum estimation, and denoising of nanopore currents demonstrate that our methods outperform state-of-the-art baselines in estimation accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出两种非凸正则化方法LogLOP-l2/l1和AdaLOP-l2/l1，用于恢复具有未知块划分的块稀疏信号，通过变分公式将log-sum惩罚和MCP扩展到块稀疏领域，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有凸方法存在低估偏差，且现有方法如GME和贝叶斯方法依赖于平方误差数据保真项，限制了应用范围。需要开发兼容多种数据保真项且能处理未知块划分的块稀疏信号恢复方法。
AI.method: 提出LogLOP-l2/l1和AdaLOP-l2/l1两种非凸正则化方法，通过新颖的变分公式将log-sum惩罚和MCP扩展到块稀疏领域。开发了基于ADMM的高效算法，具有稳定的经验收敛性。
AI.result: 在合成数据、角功率谱估计和纳米孔电流去噪等数值实验中，所提方法在估计精度上优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的非凸正则化方法能有效恢复具有未知块划分的块稀疏信号，克服了现有凸方法的低估偏差，且兼容多种数据保真项，在实际应用中表现出优越性能。

title: Behavioral Outcomes of Human Cognitive Security within an Integrative Modeling Framework
summary: Human decision-making under uncertainty faces growing challenges from information-based threats that pose risks to human cognitive processes and behavior. Although their potential harm is widely acknowledged, there remains no well-defined construct for characterizing the degree to which information-based threats influence changes in human judgments and decision-making, impeding theoretical advancement, measurement, and effective countermeasure development. Here, we introduce a human cognitive security construct focused on linking information-based threats to observable outcomes to bridge field-level definitions with operational measures by drawing from core mechanisms related to information processing and decision-making. To connect the information environment to behavior, we develop an integrative modeling framework that unifies Bayesian inference with affect-modulated decision valuation, capturing how cognitive resource allocation and affective valuation shape three core behavioral outcomes: veracity discernment, task-oriented actions, and information sharing. Through computational simulations, we demonstrate that this framework explains canonical phenomena, including cognitive heuristics, the illusory truth effect (R2=0.86, validated against empirical data), and incongruent veracity discernment and sharing behavior. We propose empirically grounded behavioral outcome measures of cognitive security to guide future empirical examinations. Finally, we outline how environment-specific elements, characterized by data availability and ecological constraints, affect individuals' cognitive security and identify future research directions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个人类认知安全框架，将信息威胁与行为结果联系起来，通过贝叶斯推理与情感调节决策估值模型解释信息处理机制，并开发了可测量的行为结果指标。
AI.motivation: 信息威胁对人类认知过程和行为构成日益增长的挑战，但目前缺乏明确定义的概念来表征信息威胁对人类判断和决策的影响程度，这阻碍了理论发展、测量和有效对策的开发。
AI.method: 提出了人类认知安全概念，将信息威胁与可观察结果联系起来；开发了一个整合贝叶斯推理与情感调节决策估值的建模框架，捕捉认知资源分配和情感估值如何影响三个核心行为结果：真实性辨别、任务导向行动和信息共享；通过计算模拟验证框架。
AI.result: 该框架能够解释经典现象，包括认知启发式、虚幻真相效应（R²=0.86，经验数据验证）以及不一致的真实性辨别和共享行为；提出了基于经验的行为结果测量指标；识别了环境特定因素对个体认知安全的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解信息威胁如何影响人类决策提供了理论框架和测量工具，为未来实证研究和认知安全对策开发奠定了基础，并指出了环境因素影响和未来研究方向。

title: SSKG Hub: An Expert-Guided Platform for LLM-Empowered Sustainability Standards Knowledge Graphs
comment: 10 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, submitted to ACL26 System Demo Track
summary: Sustainability disclosure standards (e.g., GRI, SASB, TCFD, IFRS S2) are comprehensive yet lengthy, terminology-dense, and highly cross-referential, hindering structured analysis and downstream use. We present SSKG Hub (Sustainability Standards Knowledge Graph Hub), a research prototype and interactive web platform that transforms standards into auditable knowledge graphs (KGs) through an LLM-centered, expert-guided pipeline. The system integrates automatic standard identification, configurable chunking, standard-specific prompting, robust triple parsing, and provenance-aware Neo4j storage with fine-grained audit metadata. LLM extraction produces a provenance-linked Draft KG, which is reviewed, curated, and formally promoted to a Certified KG through meta-expert adjudication. A role-based governance framework covering read-only guest access, expert review and CRUD operations, meta-expert certification, and administrative oversight ensures traceability and accountability across draft and certified states. Beyond graph exploration and triple-level evidence tracing, SSKG Hub supports cross-KG fusion, KG-driven tasks, and dedicated modules for insights and curated resources. We validate the platform through a comprehensive expert-led KG review case study that demonstrates end-to-end curation and quality assurance. The web application is publicly available at www.sskg-hub.com.

AI.tldr: SSKG Hub是一个将可持续发展披露标准（GRI、SASB等）转化为可审计知识图谱的平台，通过LLM驱动的专家指导流程实现标准的结构化，支持图谱探索、证据追溯和跨图谱融合。
AI.motivation: 现有可持续发展披露标准（如GRI、SASB、TCFD、IFRS S2）虽然全面，但篇幅冗长、术语密集、交叉引用复杂，这阻碍了结构化分析和下游应用。
AI.method: 采用LLM为中心、专家指导的流水线，包括自动标准识别、可配置分块、标准特定提示、稳健的三元组解析，以及带有细粒度审计元数据的Neo4j存储。系统生成可追溯的草稿KG，经专家评审后提升为认证KG。
AI.result: 开发了SSKG Hub研究原型和交互式网络平台，支持图谱探索、三元组级证据追溯、跨KG融合、KG驱动任务，以及专用洞察模块。通过专家主导的KG审查案例验证了平台效果。
AI.conclusion: SSKG Hub成功将复杂的可持续发展标准转化为结构化知识图谱，通过角色治理框架确保可追溯性和问责制，为可持续发展信息披露分析提供了有效工具。

title: Heterophily-Agnostic Hypergraph Neural Networks with Riemannian Local Exchanger
summary: Hypergraphs are the natural description of higher-order interactions among objects, widely applied in social network analysis, cross-modal retrieval, etc. Hypergraph Neural Networks (HGNNs) have become the dominant solution for learning on hypergraphs. Traditional HGNNs are extended from message passing graph neural networks, following the homophily assumption, and thus struggle with the prevalent heterophilic hypergraphs that call for long-range dependence modeling. In this paper, we achieve heterophily-agnostic message passing through the lens of Riemannian geometry. The key insight lies in the connection between oversquashing and hypergraph bottleneck within the framework of Riemannian manifold heat flow. Building on this, we propose the novel idea of locally adapting the bottlenecks of different subhypergraphs. The core innovation of the proposed mechanism is the design of an adaptive local (heat) exchanger. Specifically, it captures the rich long-range dependencies via the Robin condition, and preserves the representation distinguishability via source terms, thereby enabling heterophily-agnostic message passing with theoretical guarantees. Based on this theoretical foundation, we present a novel Heat-Exchanger with Adaptive Locality for Hypergraph Neural Network (HealHGNN), designed as a node-hyperedge bidirectional systems with linear complexity in the number of nodes and hyperedges. Extensive experiments on both homophilic and heterophilic cases show that HealHGNN achieves the state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 提出HealHGNN模型，通过黎曼几何视角实现异质性无关的消息传递，解决传统超图神经网络在异质性超图中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统超图神经网络基于同质性假设，难以处理普遍存在的异质性超图，这些超图需要建模长程依赖关系。
AI.method: 通过黎曼流形热流框架连接过压缩和超图瓶颈，提出自适应局部热交换器机制，利用Robin条件捕获长程依赖，通过源项保持表示可区分性，设计线性复杂度的HealHGNN模型。
AI.result: 在同质性和异质性超图上均达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过黎曼几何视角实现异质性无关的消息传递，提出的HealHGNN模型在理论和实验上都表现出色。

title: Robust Optimal Portfolio in a Mixture Setting with Partial Ambiguity
summary: Managing insurance and financial risk when data is limited is a key task in the insurance industry. In this paper, we focus on cases where the risk distribution is modeled as a mixture with some components estimable to high precision or known, and others, along with their weights, are not. Our paper addresses two robust portfolio optimization problems with partial ambiguity, where the loss function involves either variance or conditional value-at-risk (CVaR). We use a projected subgradient descent algorithm to solve the optimization problems. The problem reduces to a convex-nonconcave minimax problem. We show that, while the general problem converges at an $O(1/\sqrt{k})$ rate, where $k$ denotes the number of iterations, exponential convergence is possible in some cases. Lastly, we provide numerical examples to show the effectiveness of our approach and the attainment of a geometric convergence rate. This work aims to provide more effective solutions for actuarial decision-making under model uncertainty.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究保险金融风险管理的部分模糊性优化问题，针对风险分布为混合模型的情况，提出基于投影次梯度下降的算法，在方差和CVaR损失函数下实现有效求解，部分情况可获得指数收敛。
AI.motivation: 保险行业在数据有限时需要管理风险和不确定性。当风险分布为混合模型时，某些分量可以精确估计或已知，而其他分量及其权重未知，这种部分模糊性场景需要有效的优化方法。
AI.method: 采用投影次梯度下降算法解决部分模糊性的稳健投资组合优化问题。问题转化为凸-非凹极小极大问题，针对方差和条件风险价值(CVaR)两种损失函数进行优化。
AI.result: 算法在一般情况下以O(1/√k)速率收敛（k为迭代次数），但在某些情况下可以实现指数收敛。数值实验验证了方法的有效性并展示了几何收敛速率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为精算决策中的模型不确定性提供了更有效的解决方案，特别是在风险分布具有部分模糊性的混合模型场景下，提出的优化方法具有实际应用价值。

title: Opponent State Inference Under Partial Observability: An HMM-POMDP Framework for 2026 Formula 1 Energy Strategy
comment: 17 pages. Pre-registered theoretical framework; empirical calibration on 2026 race telemetry begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026. Paper 1 of 3. ResearchGate preprint: DOI 10.13140/RG.2.2.16034.08644
summary: The 2026 Formula 1 technical regulations introduce a fundamental change to energy strategy: under a 50/50 internal combustion engine / battery power split with unlimited regeneration and a driver-controlled Override Mode (abbreviated MOM throughout), the optimal energy deployment policy depends not only on a driver's own state but on the hidden state of rival cars. This creates a Partially Observable Stochastic Game that cannot be solved by single-agent optimisation methods. We present a tractable two-layer inference and decision framework. The first layer is a 30-state Hidden Markov Model (HMM) that infers a probability distribution over each rival's ERS charge level, Override Mode status, and tyre degradation state from five publicly observable telemetry signals. The second layer is a Deep Q-Network (DQN) policy that takes the HMM belief state as input and selects between energy deployment strategies. We formally characterise the counter-harvest trap -- a deceptive strategy in which a car deliberately suppresses observable deployment signals to induce a rival into a failed attack -- and show that detecting it requires belief-state inference rather than reactive threshold rules. On synthetic races generated from the model's own assumptions, the HMM achieves 92.3% ERS inference accuracy (random baseline: 33.3%) and detects counter-harvest trap conditions with 95.7% recall. Pre-registration -- empirical validation begins Australian Grand Prix, 8 March 2026.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一个两层的推理决策框架，用于解决F1 2026新规下的能量策略优化问题，该问题因对手隐藏状态而成为部分可观测随机博弈。
AI.motivation: 2026年F1技术规则引入根本性变革：50/50内燃机/电池功率分配、无限再生能量和车手控制的Override Mode，使得最优能量部署策略不仅取决于自身状态，还取决于对手的隐藏状态，形成无法用单智能体优化方法解决的部分可观测随机博弈。
AI.method: 提出可处理的两层推理决策框架：第一层是30状态的隐马尔可夫模型，从5个公开可观测的遥测信号推断对手的ERS充电水平、Override Mode状态和轮胎退化状态的概率分布；第二层是深度Q网络策略，以HMM信念状态为输入，选择能量部署策略。
AI.result: 在基于模型假设生成的合成比赛中，HMM达到92.3%的ERS推断准确率（随机基线：33.3%），并以95.7%的召回率检测到counter-harvest陷阱条件。正式描述了counter-harvest陷阱——一种欺骗性策略。
AI.conclusion: 检测counter-harvest陷阱需要信念状态推断而非反应性阈值规则。该框架为2026年F1能量策略优化提供了解决方案，实证验证将于2026年3月8日澳大利亚大奖赛开始。

title: PAC Guarantees for Reinforcement Learning: Sample Complexity, Coverage, and Structure
summary: When data is scarce or mistakes are costly, average-case metrics fall short. What a practitioner needs is a guarantee: with probability at least $1-δ$, the learned policy is $\varepsilon$-close to optimal after $N$ episodes. This is the PAC promise, and between 2018 and 2025 the RL theory community made striking progress on when such promises can be kept. We survey that progress. Our organizing tool is the Coverage-Structure-Objective (CSO) framework, proposed here, which decomposes nearly every PAC sample complexity result into three factors: coverage (how data were obtained), structure (intrinsic MDP or function-class complexity), and objective (what the learner must deliver). CSO is not a theorem but an interpretive template that identifies bottlenecks and makes cross-setting comparison immediate. The technical core covers tight tabular baselines and the uniform-PAC bridge to regret; structural complexity measures (Bellman rank, witness rank, Bellman-Eluder dimension) governing learnability with function approximation; results for linear, kernel/NTK, and low-rank models; reward-free exploration as upfront coverage investment; and pessimistic offline RL where inherited coverage is the binding constraint. We provide practitioner tools: rate lookup tables indexed by CSO coordinates, Bellman residual diagnostics, coverage estimation with deployment gates, and per-episode policy certificates. A final section catalogs open problems, separating near-term targets from frontier questions where coverage, structure, and computation tangle in ways current theory cannot resolve.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CSO框架，将PAC样本复杂度结果分解为覆盖、结构和目标三个因素，用于解释2018-2025年强化学习理论进展，并提供实用工具。
AI.motivation: 当数据稀缺或错误代价高昂时，平均性能指标不足以保证安全。实践者需要概率保证：以至少1-δ的概率，学习到的策略在N次尝试后接近最优。这是PAC承诺，2018-2025年间RL理论界在此方面取得显著进展。
AI.method: 提出覆盖-结构-目标（CSO）框架作为解释模板，将PAC样本复杂度结果分解为三个因素：覆盖（数据获取方式）、结构（MDP或函数类的内在复杂性）和目标（学习器需达成的目标）。
AI.result: CSO框架能够识别瓶颈、实现跨设置比较，涵盖表格基准、统一PAC到遗憾的桥梁、函数逼近的结构复杂性度量、线性/核/低秩模型结果、无奖励探索和悲观离线RL等核心内容。
AI.conclusion: CSO框架为实践者提供实用工具：CSO坐标索引的速率查找表、贝尔曼残差诊断、带部署门的覆盖估计和每回合策略证书。最后部分列出开放问题，区分近期目标与覆盖、结构和计算交织的前沿问题。

title: The Sentience Readiness Index: Measuring National Preparedness for the Possibility of Artificial Sentience
summary: The scientific study of consciousness has begun to generate testable predictions about artificial systems. A landmark collaborative assessment evaluated current AI architectures against six leading theories of consciousness and found that none currently qualifies as a strong candidate, but that future systems might. A precautionary approach to AI sentience, which holds that credible possibility of sentience warrants governance action even without proof, has gained philosophical and institutional traction. Yet existing AI readiness indices, including the Oxford Insights Government AI Readiness Index, the IMF AI Preparedness Index, and the Stanford AI Index, measure economic, technological, and governance preparedness without assessing whether societies are prepared for the possibility that AI systems might warrant moral consideration. This paper introduces the Sentience Readiness Index (SRI), a composite index measuring national-level preparedness across six weighted categories for 31 jurisdictions. The SRI was constructed following the OECD/JRC framework for composite indicators and employs LLM-assisted expert scoring with iterative expert review. No jurisdiction exceeds "Partially Prepared" (the United Kingdom leads at 49/100). Research Environment scores are universally the strongest category; Professional Readiness is universally the weakest. These findings suggest that if AI sentience becomes scientifically plausible, no society currently possesses adequate institutional, professional, or cultural infrastructure to respond. The SRI provides a diagnostic baseline and identifies specific capacity deficits that policy can address.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"感知准备指数"(SRI)，用于评估各国对AI可能具有感知能力的准备程度，发现所有国家都准备不足，英国最高仅49/100。
AI.motivation: 现有AI准备度指数（如牛津、IMF、斯坦福的指数）主要关注经济、技术和治理准备，但忽视了AI系统可能具有感知能力并需要道德考量的可能性。随着意识科学研究开始对AI系统产生可测试的预测，以及预防性原则在哲学和制度上的认可，需要评估社会对AI感知能力的准备程度。
AI.method: 采用OECD/JRC复合指标框架，构建了包含六个加权类别的感知准备指数(SRI)，覆盖31个司法管辖区。使用LLM辅助的专家评分方法，并进行迭代专家评审。
AI.result: 没有司法管辖区超过"部分准备"水平（英国最高49/100）。研究环境类别普遍最强，专业准备类别普遍最弱。这表明如果AI感知能力变得科学上可信，目前没有任何社会具备足够的制度、专业或文化基础设施来应对。
AI.conclusion: SRI提供了诊断基线，识别了政策可以解决的具体能力缺陷。当前所有社会对AI可能具有感知能力的情况都准备不足，需要加强制度、专业和文化基础设施建设。

title: A medical coding language model trained on clinical narratives from a population-wide cohort of 1.8 million patients
summary: Medical coding translates clinical documentation into standardized codes for billing, research, and public health, but manual coding is time-consuming and error-prone. Existing automation efforts rely on small datasets that poorly represent real-world patient heterogeneity. We trained a language model on 5.8 million electronic health records from 1.8 million patients across nearly all specialties in Eastern Denmark (2006--2016) to predict ICD-10 codes from clinical notes, medications, and laboratory results. Evaluated on 270,000 held-out patients, the model achieved a micro F1 of 71.8% and a top-10 recall of 95.5%. Performance varied by specialty (F1: 53--91%), with higher scores in specialties with well-defined diagnostic criteria. Codes appearing predominantly as secondary diagnoses had markedly lower F1 scores. For three such codes (suicide-related behaviors, weight disorders, and hypertension), the model identified thousands of uncoded cases, of which 76-86% were confirmed valid upon manual review, suggesting systematic under-coding rather than model error. These findings suggest under-coding of secondary diagnoses in Eastern Denmark during this period, with potential implications for epidemiological research, public health surveillance, and understanding of multimorbidity. Similar time constraints and reimbursement structures in other healthcare systems suggest this may not be isolated to this dataset. The model can automate coding for approximately 50% of cases and provide accurate suggestions for most others, and may offer a practical solution to help capture missed secondary conditions.

AI.tldr: 使用580万份电子健康记录训练语言模型预测ICD-10编码，在27万患者测试集上达到71.8%的微F1分数，发现丹麦医疗系统中存在系统性次要诊断编码不足问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗编码将临床文档转化为标准化编码用于计费、研究和公共卫生，但人工编码耗时且易错。现有自动化方法依赖的小数据集难以反映真实世界患者的异质性。
AI.method: 基于丹麦东部2006-2016年间180万患者的580万份电子健康记录，训练语言模型从临床记录、药物和实验室结果预测ICD-10编码。模型在27万保留患者上进行评估。
AI.result: 模型达到71.8%的微F1分数和95.5%的top-10召回率。性能因专科而异（F1：53-91%），诊断标准明确的专科表现更好。次要诊断编码的F1分数显著较低。对于自杀相关行为、体重障碍和高血压三个编码，模型识别出数千个未编码病例，其中76-86%经人工审核确认为有效，表明存在系统性编码不足而非模型错误。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现丹麦医疗系统存在次要诊断系统性编码不足，可能影响流行病学研究、公共卫生监测和多病共患理解。模型可自动化约50%病例的编码并为大多数其他病例提供准确建议，有助于捕获遗漏的次要病症。

title: Polynomial Mixing for Efficient Self-supervised Speech Encoders
summary: State-of-the-art speech-to-text models typically employ Transformer-based encoders that model token dependencies via self-attention mechanisms. However, the quadratic complexity of self-attention in both memory and computation imposes significant constraints on scalability. In this work, we propose a novel token-mixing mechanism, the Polynomial Mixer (PoM), as a drop-in replacement for multi-head self-attention. PoM computes a polynomial representation of the input with linear complexity with respect to the input sequence length. We integrate PoM into a self-supervised speech representation learning framework based on BEST-RQ and evaluate its performance on downstream speech recognition tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that PoM achieves a competitive word error rate compared to full self-attention and other linear-complexity alternatives, offering an improved trade-off between performance and efficiency in time and memory.

AI.tldr: 提出多项式混合器(PoM)作为自注意力的线性复杂度替代方案，用于语音识别模型，在保持竞争力的词错误率的同时显著提升效率
AI.motivation: 当前基于Transformer的语音转文本模型使用自注意力机制，但其二次复杂度在内存和计算上限制了模型的可扩展性，需要更高效的替代方案
AI.method: 提出多项式混合器(PoM)作为多头自注意力的直接替代方案，通过计算输入的线性复杂度多项式表示，并集成到基于BEST-RQ的自监督语音表示学习框架中
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PoM在词错误率方面与完全自注意力及其他线性复杂度替代方案相当，在性能与时间/内存效率之间提供了更好的权衡
AI.conclusion: PoM是一种有效的线性复杂度token混合机制，可作为自注意力的高效替代方案，在语音识别任务中实现性能与效率的良好平衡

title: Machine Learning Grade Prediction Using Students' Grades and Demographics
summary: Student repetition in secondary education imposes significant resource burdens, particularly in resource-constrained contexts. Addressing this challenge, this study introduces a unified machine learning framework that simultaneously predicts pass/fail outcomes and continuous grades, a departure from prior research that treats classification and regression as separate tasks. Six models were evaluated: Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, and Random Forest for classification, and Linear Regression, Decision Tree Regressor, and Random Forest Regressor for regression, with hyperparameters optimized via exhaustive grid search. Using academic and demographic data from 4424 secondary school students, classification models achieved accuracies of up to 96%, while regression models attained a coefficient of determination of 0.70, surpassing baseline approaches. These results confirm the feasibility of early, data-driven identification of at-risk students and highlight the value of integrating dual-task prediction for more comprehensive insights. By enabling timely, personalized interventions, the framework offers a practical pathway to reducing grade repetition and optimizing resource allocation.

AI.tldr: 提出统一机器学习框架，同时预测学生通过/失败结果和连续成绩，优于传统分离的分类与回归方法，准确率达96%，R²达0.70，有助于早期识别风险学生并优化资源分配。
AI.motivation: 中学教育中的学生留级问题在资源受限环境下造成显著负担，需要早期识别风险学生以进行及时干预，但现有研究通常将分类（通过/失败）和回归（连续成绩）作为独立任务处理，缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 提出统一机器学习框架，同时处理分类和回归任务。评估六种模型：分类使用逻辑回归、决策树、随机森林；回归使用线性回归、决策树回归器、随机森林回归器。通过穷举网格搜索优化超参数，使用4424名中学生的学术和人口统计数据。
AI.result: 分类模型准确率最高达96%，回归模型决定系数达0.70，均优于基线方法。结果表明能够有效预测学生表现，实现早期风险识别。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证实了早期数据驱动识别风险学生的可行性，展示了双任务预测整合的价值，能够支持及时个性化干预，为减少留级和优化资源分配提供实用途径。

title: An Abstract Stochastic Haugazeau Method for Best Approximation
summary: The Haugazeau method was originally designed to compute the best approximation from an intersection of closed convex sets in Hilbert spaces using the projection operators onto the individual sets iteratively. We propose an abstract stochastic version of it to compute the best approximation from a closed convex set by successive projections onto randomly generated stochastic outer approximations of that set. Strong convergence in the mean square and the almost sure modes is derived under general hypotheses on the outer approximations. The results are applied to the development of stochastic algorithms to construct the best approximation from an arbitrary intersection of fixed point sets by random activation of blocks of operators. A numerical application to the computation of Chebyshev centers is provided.

AI.tldr: 提出Haungazeau方法的随机版本，通过随机生成的外近似集进行连续投影，计算闭凸集的最佳逼近，并应用于固定点集交集的随机激活算法
AI.motivation: Haugazeau方法原本用于计算希尔伯特空间中闭凸集交集的最佳逼近，但需要投影到各个集合上。本文旨在开发一个随机版本，通过随机生成的外近似集进行投影，提高计算效率并扩展应用范围。
AI.method: 提出抽象的随机Haugazeau方法，通过连续投影到随机生成的闭凸集外近似集上，计算最佳逼近。在外近似集满足一般假设条件下，推导均方收敛和几乎必然收敛性。
AI.result: 证明了随机Haugazeau方法在均方和几乎必然意义下的强收敛性。应用该方法开发了随机算法，通过随机激活算子块来构造任意固定点集交集的最佳逼近，并提供了计算切比雪夫中心的数值应用。
AI.conclusion: 成功将经典的Haugazeau方法推广到随机框架，建立了收敛理论并开发了实用的随机算法，为解决闭凸集最佳逼近问题提供了新的有效工具。

title: Align and Filter: Improving Performance in Asynchronous On-Policy RL
summary: Distributed training and increasing the gradient update frequency are practical strategies to accelerate learning and improve performance, but both exacerbate a central challenge: \textit{policy lag}, which is the mismatch between the behavior policy generating data and the learning policy being updated. Policy lag can hinder the scaling of on-policy learning algorithms to larger problems. In this paper, we identify the sources of policy lag caused by distributed learning and high update frequency. We use the findings to propose \textit{total Variation-based Advantage aligned Constrained policy Optimization (\methodacronym)} as a practical approach to mitigate policy lag. We empirically validate our method and show that it offers better robustness to policy lag in classic RL tasks and a modern RL for LLM math reasoning task.

AI.tldr: 提出TVACO方法解决分布式训练和高更新频率导致的策略滞后问题，在经典RL任务和LLM数学推理任务中验证有效性
AI.motivation: 分布式训练和提高梯度更新频率是加速学习和提升性能的实用策略，但两者都加剧了策略滞后问题——即生成数据的行为策略与正在更新的学习策略之间的不匹配。策略滞后会阻碍在策略学习算法扩展到更大问题。
AI.method: 提出基于总变差优势对齐约束策略优化（TVACO）方法，通过识别分布式学习和高更新频率引起的策略滞后来源，设计约束策略优化来缓解策略滞后问题。
AI.result: 在经典强化学习任务和现代RL for LLM数学推理任务中进行了实证验证，表明该方法对策略滞后具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TVACO方法能够有效缓解分布式训练和高更新频率导致的策略滞后问题，为在策略学习算法扩展到更大规模问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Relatively Smart: A New Approach for Instance-Optimal Learning
summary:
We revisit the framework of Smart PAC learning, which seeks supervised learners which compete with semi-supervised learners that are provided full knowledge of the marginal distribution on unlabeled data. Prior work has shown that such marginal-by-marginal guarantees are possible for "most" marginals, with respect to an arbitrary fixed and known measure, but not more generally. We discover that this failure can be attributed to an "indistinguishability" phenomenon: There are marginals which cannot be statistically distinguished from other marginals that require different learning approaches. In such settings, semi-supervised learning cannot certify its guarantees from unlabeled data, rendering them arguably non-actionable.
  We propose relatively smart learning, a new framework which demands that a supervised learner compete only with the best "certifiable" semi-supervised guarantee. We show that such modest relaxation suffices to bypass the impossibility results from prior work. In the distribution-free setting, we show that the OIG learner is relatively smart up to squaring the sample complexity, and show that no supervised learning algorithm can do better. For distribution-family settings, we show that relatively smart learning can be impossible or can require idiosyncratic learning approaches, and its difficulty can be non-monotone in the inclusion order on distribution families.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"相对智能学习"新框架，要求监督学习器仅与最佳"可验证"的半监督学习保证竞争，解决了先前智能PAC学习框架中的不可能性结果。
AI.motivation: 传统智能PAC学习框架要求监督学习器与拥有未标记数据边际分布完整知识的半监督学习器竞争，但先前研究表明这种边际对边际保证仅对"大多数"边际分布可行，存在根本限制。作者发现这种失败源于"不可区分性"现象：某些边际分布无法与需要不同学习方法的其他边际分布统计区分，导致半监督学习无法从未标记数据中验证其保证。
AI.method: 提出相对智能学习新框架，放松要求为监督学习器只需与最佳"可验证"的半监督学习保证竞争。在分布无关设置中，分析OIG学习器的相对智能性；在分布族设置中，探讨相对智能学习的可行性、所需学习方法及其与分布族包含顺序的非单调关系。
AI.result: 1) 相对智能学习框架能够绕过先前工作的不可能性结果；2) 在分布无关设置中，OIG学习器相对智能，样本复杂度最多平方增加，且没有监督学习算法能做得更好；3) 在分布族设置中，相对智能学习可能不可行或需要特殊学习方法，其难度在分布族包含顺序上呈现非单调性。
AI.conclusion: 相对智能学习框架通过要求监督学习器仅与可验证的半监督学习保证竞争，成功解决了传统智能PAC学习中的根本限制，为监督学习与半监督学习的竞争提供了更实际可行的理论框架。

title: The Invisibility Hypothesis: Promises of AGI and the Future of the Global South
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. Accepted as a workshop paper at Post-AGI Science and Society Workshop ICLR 2026
summary: Discussions surrounding Artificial General Intelligence have largely focused on technical feasibility, timelines, and existential risk, often treating its social impact as being the same across different populations. Less attention has been paid to how advanced AI systems may interact with existing global inequalities. This paper examines the implications of AGI for people in the Global South, arguing that the availability of highly autonomous, general-purpose cognitive systems does not guarantee equitable outcomes. We establish that, as scientific discovery, economic coordination, and governance become increasingly automated, the relevance of human individuals may become conditional on access to infrastructure, institutional inclusion, and geopolitical circumstances rather than skills or intelligence. Under this setting, the Global South faces different pathways: in the best case, geographic location is no longer relevant as AGI fully democratizes access to knowledge and essential services for everyone in the globe; in the worst case, existing structural constraints are severely amplified, rendering already marginalized populations not merely economically invisible, but functionally irrelevant to global systems. We ground this analysis in empirical signals from contemporary AI deployment and extend to potential trajectories, highlighting both risk and opportunity pathways for Latin America, Africa, and South Asia.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨AGI对全球南方（发展中国家）的潜在影响，指出AGI可能加剧而非缓解现有不平等，使人类价值取决于基础设施和制度包容性而非个人能力。
AI.motivation: 当前关于AGI的讨论主要关注技术可行性、时间表和生存风险，忽视了AGI如何与现有全球不平等相互作用。研究旨在填补这一空白，特别关注AGI对全球南方人口的影响。
AI.method: 基于当代AI部署的实证信号进行分析，并扩展到潜在发展轨迹，重点关注拉丁美洲、非洲和南亚地区，探讨不同情境下的风险和机遇路径。
AI.result: 研究发现AGI的可用性并不能保证公平结果。随着科学发现、经济协调和治理日益自动化，人类个体的相关性可能取决于基础设施获取、制度包容性和地缘政治环境，而非技能或智力。
AI.conclusion: 全球南方面临两种可能路径：最佳情况下，地理位置不再重要，AGI完全民主化全球知识和基本服务获取；最坏情况下，现有结构性约束严重放大，使边缘化人口不仅经济上隐形，而且在功能上与全球系统无关。

title: CoPeP: Benchmarking Continual Pretraining for Protein Language Models
summary: Protein language models (pLMs) have recently gained significant attention for their ability to uncover relationships between sequence, structure, and function from evolutionary statistics, thereby accelerating therapeutic drug discovery. These models learn from large protein databases that are continuously updated by the biology community and whose dynamic nature motivates the application of continual learning, not only to keep up with the ever-growing data, but also as an opportunity to take advantage of the temporal meta-information that is created during this process. As a result, we introduce the Continual Pretraining of Protein Language Models (CoPeP) benchmark, a novel benchmark for evaluating continual learning approaches on pLMs. Specifically, we curate a sequence of protein datasets derived from the UniProt Knowledgebase spanning a decade and define metrics to assess pLM performance across 31 protein understanding tasks. We evaluate several methods from the continual learning literature, including replay, unlearning, and plasticity-based methods, some of which have never been applied to models and data of this scale. Our findings reveal that incorporating temporal meta-information improves perplexity by up to 7% even when compared to training on data from all tasks jointly. Moreover, even at scale, several continual learning methods outperform naive continual pretraining. The CoPeP benchmark offers an exciting opportunity to study these methods at scale in an impactful real-world application.

AI.tldr: 提出CoPeP基准，用于评估蛋白质语言模型的持续学习，利用时间元信息提升性能，多个持续学习方法优于朴素方法。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质数据库持续更新，需要持续学习来跟上数据增长并利用时间元信息，但缺乏相关基准。
AI.method: 创建CoPeP基准，从UniProt知识库整理跨越十年的蛋白质数据集序列，定义31个蛋白质理解任务的评估指标，评估多种持续学习方法。
AI.result: 利用时间元信息可将困惑度提升达7%，多个持续学习方法在规模上优于朴素持续预训练。
AI.conclusion: CoPeP基准为研究大规模持续学习方法提供了重要机会，在蛋白质语言模型应用中具有实际价值。

title: RAVEL: Reasoning Agents for Validating and Evaluating LLM Text Synthesis
summary: Large Language Models have evolved from single-round generators into long-horizon agents, capable of complex text synthesis scenarios. However, current evaluation frameworks lack the ability to assess the actual synthesis operations, such as outlining, drafting, and editing. Consequently, they fail to evaluate the actual and detailed capabilities of LLMs. To bridge this gap, we introduce RAVEL, an agentic framework that enables the LLM testers to autonomously plan and execute typical synthesis operations, including outlining, drafting, reviewing, and refining. Complementing this framework, we present C3EBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 1,258 samples derived from professional human writings. We utilize a "reverse-engineering" pipeline to isolate specific capabilities across four tasks: Cloze, Edit, Expand, and End-to-End. Through our analysis of 14 LLMs, we uncover that most LLMs struggle with tasks that demand contextual understanding under limited or under-specified instructions. By augmenting RAVEL with SOTA LLMs as operators, we find that such agentic text synthesis is dominated by the LLM's reasoning capability rather than raw generative capacity. Furthermore, we find that a strong reasoner can guide a weaker generator to yield higher-quality results, whereas the inverse does not hold. Our code and data are available at this link: https://github.com/ZhuoerFeng/RAVEL-Reasoning-Agents-Text-Eval.

AI.tldr: RAVEL是一个用于评估LLM文本合成能力的智能体框架，配合C3EBench基准测试，发现LLM在上下文理解有限的任务中表现不佳，且推理能力比生成能力更重要。
AI.motivation: 当前评估框架无法评估LLM的实际文本合成操作（如大纲、起草、编辑），因此无法全面评估LLM的详细能力。
AI.method: 提出RAVEL智能体框架，让LLM测试者自主规划和执行典型合成操作；创建C3EBench基准（1,258个专业写作样本），通过"逆向工程"管道分离四种任务能力：完形填空、编辑、扩展和端到端合成。
AI.result: 分析14个LLM发现：大多数LLM在有限或未充分指定指令下需要上下文理解的任务中表现不佳；智能体文本合成主要依赖LLM的推理能力而非原始生成能力；强推理器可以指导弱生成器获得更高质量结果，反之则不成立。
AI.conclusion: RAVEL框架和C3EBench基准填补了LLM文本合成能力评估的空白，揭示了推理能力在智能体文本合成中的主导作用，为未来LLM发展提供了重要见解。

title: TraceSIR: A Multi-Agent Framework for Structured Analysis and Reporting of Agentic Execution Traces
summary: Agentic systems augment large language models with external tools and iterative decision making, enabling complex tasks such as deep research, function calling, and coding. However, their long and intricate execution traces make failure diagnosis and root cause analysis extremely challenging. Manual inspection does not scale, while directly applying LLMs to raw traces is hindered by input length limits and unreliable reasoning. Focusing solely on final task outcomes further discards critical behavioral information required for accurate issue localization. To address these issues, we propose TraceSIR, a multi-agent framework for structured analysis and reporting of agentic execution traces. TraceSIR coordinates three specialized agents: (1) StructureAgent, which introduces a novel abstraction format, TraceFormat, to compress execution traces while preserving essential behavioral information; (2) InsightAgent, which performs fine-grained diagnosis including issue localization, root cause analysis, and optimization suggestions; (3) ReportAgent, which aggregates insights across task instances and generates comprehensive analysis reports. To evaluate TraceSIR, we construct TraceBench, covering three real-world agentic scenarios, and introduce ReportEval, an evaluation protocol for assessing the quality and usability of analysis reports aligned with industry needs. Experiments show that TraceSIR consistently produces coherent, informative, and actionable reports, significantly outperforming existing approaches across all evaluation dimensions. Our project and video are publicly available at https://github.com/SHU-XUN/TraceSIR.

AI.tldr: TraceSIR是一个多智能体框架，用于结构化分析和报告智能体执行轨迹，解决智能体系统故障诊断困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 智能体系统（结合大语言模型与外部工具）在执行复杂任务时会产生冗长复杂的执行轨迹，使得故障诊断和根因分析极其困难。手动检查不可扩展，而直接使用LLM分析原始轨迹受到输入长度限制和不可靠推理的阻碍。
AI.method: 提出TraceSIR多智能体框架，包含三个专门智能体：1) StructureAgent引入TraceFormat抽象格式压缩执行轨迹；2) InsightAgent进行细粒度诊断；3) ReportAgent聚合跨任务实例的洞察并生成综合分析报告。
AI.result: 构建了TraceBench覆盖三个真实世界智能体场景，并引入ReportEval评估协议。实验显示TraceSIR能持续生成连贯、信息丰富且可操作的报告，在所有评估维度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TraceSIR通过结构化分析和报告智能体执行轨迹，有效解决了智能体系统故障诊断的挑战，为行业需求提供了实用的分析解决方案。

title: Equilibrium Invariance, Proximality, and Surrogation: Moreau-Smoothed Best-Response Pathways in Stochastic Nonsmooth Games
summary: Best-response (BR) schemes represent an important avenue for learning equilibria in noncooperative games. However, extant rate guarantees for BR schemes generally necessitate stringent smoothness requirements on player objectives and the availability of suitably defined eigenvalue bounds, significantly limiting the reach of such schemes, and few schemes if any exist for the efficient resolution of a broad class of nonsmooth and nonconvex games with expectation-valued objectives. This motivates our study of Moreau-smoothed BR schemes that allow for nonsmooth objectives. First, we consider a class of nonsmooth and strongly convex games (but potentially non-monotone) under uncertainty.
