By presenting an equilibrium invariance claim, we present synchronous and asynchronous schemes, equipped with linear and sublinear rate guarantees and associated complexity statements. Second, faced by weakly convex player objectives, we incorporate surrogation into the Moreau-smoothed best-response and show that the resulting smoothed quasi-Nash equilibrium (QNE) constitutes an $\mathcal{O}(η)$-QNE of the original weakly convex game, where $η> 0$ denotes the Moreau smoothing parameter. In this setting, we again present synchronous and asynchronous BR schemes, equipped with linear and sublinear rates and analogous complexity bounds. Preliminary numerics on a range of such games appear promising.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Moreau平滑最佳响应方案，用于解决非光滑非凸博弈问题，提供同步和异步算法，并给出线性/次线性收敛率保证和复杂度分析。
AI.motivation: 现有最佳响应方案需要严格的平滑性要求和特征值界限，限制了应用范围，缺乏有效解决非光滑非凸期望值目标博弈的方法。
AI.method: 采用Moreau平滑处理非光滑目标：1) 针对非光滑强凸博弈提出同步/异步方案；2) 针对弱凸目标结合替代方法，证明平滑拟纳什均衡是原始博弈的O(η)-拟纳什均衡。
AI.result: 1) 非光滑强凸博弈：提出同步和异步方案，获得线性和次线性收敛率及复杂度保证；2) 弱凸博弈：证明平滑拟纳什均衡是原始博弈的O(η)-近似均衡，同样提供同步/异步方案和收敛率分析。
AI.conclusion: Moreau平滑最佳响应方案能有效处理非光滑非凸博弈问题，初步数值实验显示良好效果，扩展了最佳响应方法的应用范围。

title: On the Stability Connection Between Discrete-Time Algorithms and Their Resolution ODEs: Applications to Min-Max Optimisation
summary: This work establishes a rigorous connection between stability properties of discrete-time algorithms (DTAs) and corresponding continuous-time dynamical systems derived through $ O(s^r) $-resolution ordinary differential equations (ODEs). We show that for discrete- and continuous-time dynamical systems satisfying a mild error assumption, exponential stability of a common equilibrium with respect to the continuous time dynamics implies exponential stability of the corresponding equilibrium for the discrete-time dynamics, provided that the step size is chosen sufficiently small. We extend this result to common compact invariant sets. We prove that if an equilibrium is exponentially stable for the $ O(s^r) $-resolution ODE, then it is also exponentially stable for the associated DTA. We apply this framework to analyse the limit point properties of several prominent optimisation algorithms, including Two-Timescale Gradient Descent--Ascent (TT-GDA), Generalised Extragradient (GEG), Two-Timescale Proximal Point (TT-PPM), Damped Newton (DN), Regularised Damped Newton (RDN), and the Jacobian method (JM), by studying their $ O(1) $- and $ O(s) $-resolution ODEs. We show that under a proper choice of hyperparameters, the set of saddle points of the objective function is a subset of the set of exponentially stable equilibria of GEG, TT-PPM, DN, and RDN. We relax the common Hessian invariance assumption through direct analysis of the resolution ODEs, broadening the applicability of our results. Numerical examples illustrate the theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了离散时间算法与连续时间动力系统之间的稳定性联系，证明了在步长足够小时，连续时间系统的指数稳定性可保证离散时间系统的指数稳定性，并将此框架应用于分析多种优化算法。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于建立离散时间算法（如优化算法）与连续时间动力系统之间的严格理论联系，以便通过分析连续时间系统的稳定性来推断离散时间算法的收敛性质，从而为优化算法的理论分析提供新工具。
AI.method: 通过O(s^r)-分辨率常微分方程将离散时间算法转化为连续时间动力系统，在满足温和误差假设的条件下，证明连续时间系统的指数稳定性可传递到离散时间系统。将此框架应用于分析TT-GDA、GEG、TT-PPM、DN、RDN和JM等优化算法。
AI.result: 证明了在适当超参数选择下，目标函数的鞍点集是GEG、TT-PPM、DN和RDN算法指数稳定平衡点的子集。通过直接分析分辨率ODE，放宽了常见的Hessian不变性假设，扩展了结果的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了离散时间算法与连续时间系统之间的稳定性等价关系，为分析优化算法的收敛性提供了新框架，并通过数值实验验证了理论发现，对理解优化算法的动力学行为具有重要意义。

title: 3BASiL: An Algorithmic Framework for Sparse plus Low-Rank Compression of LLMs
comment: The Thirty-ninth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems
summary: Sparse plus Low-Rank $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition of Large Language Models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising direction in model compression, aiming to decompose pre-trained model weights into a sum of sparse and low-rank matrices $(\mathbf{W} \approx \mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$. Despite recent progress, existing methods often suffer from substantial performance degradation compared to dense models. In this work, we introduce 3BASiL-TM, an efficient one-shot post-training method for $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition of LLMs that addresses this gap. Our approach first introduces a novel 3-Block Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM) method, termed 3BASiL, to minimize the layer-wise reconstruction error with convergence guarantees. We then design an efficient transformer-matching (TM) refinement step that jointly optimizes the sparse and low-rank components across transformer layers. This step minimizes a novel memory-efficient loss that aligns outputs at the transformer level. Notably, the TM procedure is universal as it can enhance any $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ decomposition, including pure sparsity. Our numerical experiments show that 3BASiL-TM reduces the WikiText2 perplexity gap relative to dense LLaMA-8B model by over 30% under a (2:4 Sparse + 64 LR) configuration, compared to prior methods. Moreover, our method achieves over 2.5x faster compression runtime on an A100 GPU compared to SOTA $(\mathbf{S} + \mathbf{LR})$ method. Our code is available at https://github.com/mazumder-lab/3BASiL.

AI.tldr: 3BASiL-TM是一种高效的一次性后训练方法，用于大型语言模型的稀疏+低秩分解，显著减少了性能下降并提高了压缩速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的稀疏+低秩分解方法在模型压缩中常导致显著的性能下降，需要一种更有效的方法来减少这种性能损失。
AI.method: 提出3BASiL-TM方法：1) 3BASiL：使用三块交替方向乘子法最小化层间重构误差；2) TM精炼步骤：通过新颖的内存高效损失函数在transformer层间联合优化稀疏和低秩组件。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-8B模型上，3BASiL-TM将WikiText2困惑度差距减少了30%以上，压缩运行时间比现有SOTA方法快2.5倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 3BASiL-TM是一种高效且通用的稀疏+低秩分解方法，显著提升了压缩模型的性能并减少了计算时间，适用于包括纯稀疏分解在内的多种分解方案。

title: Assessing Crime Disclosure Patterns in a Large-Scale Cybercrime Forum
summary: Cybercrime forums play a central role in the cybercrime ecosystem, serving as hubs for the exchange of illicit goods, services, and knowledge. Previous studies have explored the market and social structures of these forums, but less is known about the behavioral dynamics of users, particularly regarding participants' disclosure of criminal activity. This study provides the first large-scale assessment of crime disclosure patterns in a major cybercrime forum, analysing over 3.5 million posts from nearly 300k users. Using a three-level classification scheme (benign, grey, and crime) and a scalable labelling pipeline powered by large language models (LLMs), we measure the level of crime disclosure present in initial posts, analyse how participants switch between levels, and assess how crime disclosure behavior relates to private communications. Our results show that crime disclosure is relatively normative: one quarter of initial posts include explicit crime-related content, and more than one third of users disclose criminal activity at least once in their initial posts. At the same time, most participants show restraint, with over two-thirds posting only benign or grey content and typically escalating disclosure gradually. Grey initial posts are particularly prominent, indicating that many users avoid overt statements and instead anchor their activity in ambiguous content. The study highlights the value of LLM-based text classification and Markov chain modelling for capturing crime disclosure patterns, offering insights for law enforcement efforts aimed at distinguishing benign, grey, and criminal content in cybercrime forums.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次大规模评估了网络犯罪论坛中的犯罪披露模式，分析了近30万用户的350万条帖子，发现犯罪披露相对普遍但多数用户保持克制，灰色内容尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 网络犯罪论坛在犯罪生态系统中扮演核心角色，但以往研究主要关注市场和社会结构，对用户行为动态特别是犯罪活动披露模式了解不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，深入了解论坛参与者的犯罪披露行为。
AI.method: 采用三级分类方案（良性、灰色、犯罪），利用基于大语言模型的可扩展标注流程，分析初始帖子的犯罪披露水平，研究参与者在不同级别间的转换模式，并评估犯罪披露行为与私人通信的关系。
AI.result: 1/4的初始帖子包含明确的犯罪相关内容，超过1/3的用户至少在其初始帖子中披露过一次犯罪活动。同时，超过2/3的参与者仅发布良性或灰色内容，通常逐步升级披露。灰色初始帖子尤为突出，表明许多用户避免明确陈述，而是将活动锚定在模糊内容中。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了基于LLM的文本分类和马尔可夫链建模在捕捉犯罪披露模式方面的价值，为执法部门区分网络犯罪论坛中的良性、灰色和犯罪内容提供了重要见解。

title: Scalable Gaussian process modeling of parametrized spatio-temporal fields
summary: We introduce a scalable Gaussian process (GP) framework with deep product kernels for data-driven learning of parametrized spatio-temporal fields over fixed or parameter-dependent domains. The proposed framework learns a continuous representation, enabling predictions at arbitrary spatio-temporal coordinates, independent of the training data resolution. We leverage Kronecker matrix algebra to formulate a computationally efficient training procedure with complexity that scales nearly linearly with the total number of spatio-temporal grid points. A key feature of our approach is the efficient computation of the posterior variance at essentially the same computational cost as the posterior mean (exactly for Cartesian grids and via rigorous bounds for unstructured grids), thereby enabling scalable uncertainty quantification. Numerical studies on a range of benchmark problems demonstrate that the proposed method achieves accuracy competitive with operator learning methods such as Fourier neural operators and deep operator networks. On the one-dimensional unsteady Burgers' equation, our method surpasses the accuracy of projection-based reduced-order models. These results establish the proposed framework as an effective tool for data-driven surrogate modeling, particularly when uncertainty estimates are required for downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出可扩展的高斯过程框架，使用深度乘积核学习参数化时空场，支持任意坐标预测，计算复杂度接近线性，能高效计算后验方差进行不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够学习参数化时空场连续表示的方法，支持任意坐标预测，同时具备可扩展的计算效率和可靠的不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 使用深度乘积核的高斯过程框架，利用Kronecker矩阵代数实现计算高效的训练，复杂度接近时空网格点总数的线性增长，能高效计算后验均值和方差。
AI.result: 在多个基准问题上达到与傅里叶神经算子、深度算子网络等算子学习方法相当的精度，在一维非定常Burgers方程上超越基于投影的降阶模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是数据驱动代理建模的有效工具，特别适用于需要不确定性估计的下游任务。

title: DRIV-EX: Counterfactual Explanations for Driving LLMs
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as reasoning engines in autonomous driving, yet their decision-making remains opaque. We propose to study their decision process through counterfactual explanations, which identify the minimal semantic changes to a scene description required to alter a driving plan.
  We introduce DRIV-EX, a method that leverages gradient-based optimization on continuous embeddings to identify the input shifts required to flip the model's decision. Crucially, to avoid the incoherent text typical of unconstrained continuous optimization, DRIV-EX uses these optimized embeddings solely as a semantic guide: they are used to bias a controlled decoding process that re-generates the original scene description. This approach effectively steers the generation toward the counterfactual target while guaranteeing the linguistic fluency, domain validity, and proximity to the original input, essential for interpretability.
  Evaluated using the LC-LLM planner on a textual transcription of the highD dataset, DRIV-EX generates valid, fluent counterfactuals more reliably than existing baselines. It successfully exposes latent biases and provides concrete insights to improve the robustness of LLM-based driving agents.

AI.tldr: DRIV-EX：一种基于梯度优化的反事实解释方法，用于分析LLM在自动驾驶中的决策过程，通过语义引导生成流畅有效的反事实场景描述。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在自动驾驶中作为推理引擎使用，但其决策过程不透明，需要可解释的方法来理解其决策机制。
AI.method: 提出DRIV-EX方法，利用连续嵌入的梯度优化识别改变模型决策所需的最小输入变化，并通过受控解码过程生成流畅、有效的反事实场景描述。
AI.result: 在LC-LLM规划器和highD数据集文本转录上评估，DRIV-EX比现有基线更可靠地生成有效、流畅的反事实解释，成功暴露潜在偏见。
AI.conclusion: DRIV-EX为LLM在自动驾驶中的决策提供了可解释性工具，有助于提高基于LLM的驾驶代理的鲁棒性。

title: LiTS: A Modular Framework for LLM Tree Search
summary: LiTS is a modular Python framework for LLM reasoning via tree search. It decomposes tree search into three reusable components (Policy, Transition, and RewardModel) that plug into algorithms like MCTS and BFS. A decorator-based registry enables domain experts to extend to new domains by registering components, and algorithmic researchers to implement custom search algorithms. We demonstrate composability on MATH500 (language reasoning), Crosswords (environment planning), and MapEval (tool use), showing that components and algorithms are orthogonal: components are reusable across algorithms within each task type, and algorithms work across all components and domains. We also report a mode-collapse finding: in infinite action spaces, LLM policy diversity (not reward quality) is the bottleneck for effective tree search. A demonstration video is available at https://youtu.be/nRGX43YrR3I. The package is released under the Apache 2.0 license at https://github.com/xinzhel/lits-llm, including installation instructions and runnable examples that enable users to reproduce the demonstrated workflows.

AI.tldr: LiTS是一个模块化的Python框架，通过树搜索实现LLM推理，包含可重用的策略、转移和奖励模型组件，支持MCTS和BFS等算法，在不同领域展示可组合性。
AI.motivation: 为了解决LLM推理中树搜索算法的模块化和可重用性问题，让领域专家和算法研究人员能够更灵活地扩展和应用树搜索方法。
AI.method: 将树搜索分解为三个可重用组件（策略、转移、奖励模型），通过装饰器注册机制支持组件扩展，实现算法与组件的正交性设计。
AI.result: 在MATH500（语言推理）、Crosswords（环境规划）和MapEval（工具使用）三个任务上展示了组件的可重用性和算法的跨领域适用性，发现无限动作空间中LLM策略多样性是树搜索的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: LiTS框架成功实现了树搜索的模块化设计，组件和算法具有正交性，为LLM推理研究提供了灵活的工具，并揭示了策略多样性在无限动作空间中的重要性。

title: Invariant-Stratified Propagation for Expressive Graph Neural Networks
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) face fundamental limitations in expressivity and capturing structural heterogeneity. Standard message-passing architectures are constrained by the 1-dimensional Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) test, unable to distinguish graphs beyond degree sequences, and aggregate information uniformly from neighbors, failing to capture how nodes occupy different structural positions within higher-order patterns. While methods exist to achieve higher expressivity, they incur prohibitive computational costs and lack unified frameworks for flexibly encoding diverse structural properties. To address these limitations, we introduce Invariant-Stratified Propagation (ISP), a framework comprising both a novel WL variant (ISP-WL) and its efficient neural network implementation (ISPGNN). ISP stratifies nodes according to graph invariants, processing them in hierarchical strata that reveal structural distinctions invisible to 1-WL. Through hierarchical structural heterogeneity encoding, ISP quantifies differences in nodes' structural positions within higher-order patterns, distinguishing interactions where participants occupy different roles from those with uniform participation. We provide formal theoretical analysis establishing enhanced expressivity beyond 1-WL, convergence guarantees, and inherent resistance to oversmoothing. Extensive experiments across graph classification, node classification, and influence estimation demonstrate consistent improvements over standard architectures and state-of-the-art expressive baselines.

AI.tldr: ISP框架通过分层节点处理增强GNN表达能力，超越1-WL测试限制，同时编码结构异质性
AI.motivation: 标准GNN受限于1-WL测试的表达能力，无法区分超出度序列的图结构，且均匀聚合邻居信息，无法捕捉节点在更高阶模式中的不同结构位置
AI.method: 提出不变分层传播(ISP)框架，包含ISP-WL变体和ISPGNN实现，通过图不变量对节点分层，在层次化结构中处理节点，编码结构异质性
AI.result: 理论分析证明ISP超越1-WL的表达能力，提供收敛保证和抗过平滑性；在图分类、节点分类和影响力估计实验中优于标准架构和最先进基线
AI.conclusion: ISP框架有效解决了GNN的表达能力和结构异质性编码问题，为灵活编码多样结构属性提供了统一框架

title: Information and communications technologies for carbon sinks from economics and engineering perspectives
summary: Climate change has intensified the urgency of effective carbon sink solutions, yet the integration of Information and Communications Technologies (ICT) in these systems remains fragmented despite its transformative potential. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of ICT applications in carbon sink projects from both economic and engineering perspectives, a dual lens approach rarely explored in the existing literature. In carbon trading, blockchain has improved transaction speed by 40%, while AI-based optimizations have reduced operational costs by 15% in projects such as Petra Nova.Through systematic examination, we identify three key findings: (1) ICT transforms carbon economics through digital financing platforms and blockchain-based trading systems, with AI enhancing price prediction, though data interoperability remains challenging; (2) digital technologies advance both natural and artificial sequestration from forest monitoring to Carbon Capture, Use and Storage (CCUS) optimization, yet lack integrated real-time control solutions; (3) realizing ICT's full potential requires addressing its environmental costs, strengthening policy support, and fostering interdisciplinary collaboration. By bridging the economic engineering divide and mapping current applications alongside future opportunities, this paper demonstrates that deeper integration of digital technologies is essential to scale carbon sink solutions to meet climate targets.

AI.tldr: 本文从经济和工程双重视角分析了ICT在碳汇项目中的应用，发现区块链提升交易速度40%，AI降低运营成本15%，但面临数据互操作性、实时控制不足等挑战，需要加强政策支持和跨学科合作以实现数字技术潜力。
AI.motivation: 气候变化加剧了对有效碳汇解决方案的迫切需求，尽管信息通信技术（ICT）具有变革潜力，但在这些系统中的整合仍然分散。现有文献很少从经济和工程双重角度探讨ICT在碳汇项目中的应用，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用经济和工程双重视角，对ICT在碳汇项目中的应用进行全面分析。通过系统审查，识别关键发现，包括区块链、AI等技术在碳交易和碳封存中的具体应用案例（如Petra Nova项目）。
AI.result: 1. ICT通过数字融资平台和区块链交易系统改变碳经济，AI提升价格预测，但数据互操作性仍是挑战；2. 数字技术推进自然和人工封存，从森林监测到CCUS优化，但缺乏集成实时控制方案；3. 区块链提升交易速度40%，AI降低运营成本15%。
AI.conclusion: 实现ICT全部潜力需要解决其环境成本、加强政策支持并促进跨学科合作。通过弥合经济与工程鸿沟，本文表明数字技术的深度整合对于扩大碳汇解决方案规模以达成气候目标至关重要。

title: Polynomial Surrogate Training for Differentiable Ternary Logic Gate Networks
comment: 28 pages, 13 figures. Submitted to 3rd International Conference on Neuro-Symbolic Systems (NeuS) 2026
summary: Differentiable logic gate networks (DLGNs) learn compact, interpretable Boolean circuits via gradient-based training, but all existing variants are restricted to the 16 two-input binary gates. Extending DLGNs to Ternary Kleene $K_3$ logic and training DTLGNs where the UNKNOWN state enables principled abstention under uncertainty is desirable. However, the support set of potential gates per neuron explodes to $19{,}683$, making the established softmax-over-gates training approach intractable. We introduce Polynomial Surrogate Training (PST), which represents each ternary neuron as a degree-$(2,2)$ polynomial with 9 learnable coefficients (a $2{,}187\times$ parameter reduction) and prove that the gap between the trained network and its discretized logic circuit is bounded by a data-independent commitment loss that vanishes at convergence. Scaling experiments from 48K to 512K neurons on CIFAR-10 demonstrate that this hardening gap contracts with overparameterization. Ternary networks train $2$-$3\times$ faster than binary DLGNs and discover true ternary gates that are functionally diverse. On synthetic and tabular tasks we find that the UNKNOWN output acts as a Bayes-optimal uncertainty proxy, enabling selective prediction in which ternary circuits surpass binary accuracy once low-confidence predictions are filtered. More broadly, PST establishes a general polynomial-surrogate methodology whose parameterization cost grows only quadratically with logic valence, opening the door to many-valued differentiable logic.

AI.tldr: 提出多项式代理训练(PST)方法，将可微逻辑门网络扩展到三值Kleene逻辑，通过多项式表示大幅减少参数，实现高效训练和不确定性下的最优弃权。
AI.motivation: 现有可微逻辑门网络(DLGNs)仅限于16种二输入二元门，无法处理三值逻辑和不确定性下的弃权决策。扩展到三值Kleene逻辑时，可能的门数量爆炸式增长到19,683个，使传统softmax训练方法不可行。
AI.method: 提出多项式代理训练(PST)：将每个三值神经元表示为具有9个可学习系数的(2,2)次多项式，相比传统方法参数减少2,187倍。证明训练网络与其离散化逻辑电路之间的差距受数据无关的承诺损失约束，该损失在收敛时消失。
AI.result: 三值网络训练速度比二元DLGNs快2-3倍，能发现功能多样的真实三值门。在合成和表格任务中，UNKNOWN输出作为贝叶斯最优不确定性代理，使三值电路在过滤低置信度预测后超越二元准确率。硬化差距随过参数化而收缩。
AI.conclusion: PST建立了通用多项式代理方法，其参数化成本仅随逻辑价数二次增长，为多值可微逻辑打开了大门，实现了紧凑、可解释的电路学习与不确定性下的最优弃权。

title: SkillCraft: Can LLM Agents Learn to Use Tools Skillfully?
comment: 21 pages. Code: https://github.com/shiqichen17/SkillCraft ; Project page: https://skillcraft-website.github.io/page
summary: Real-world tool-using agents operate over long-horizon workflows with recurring structure and diverse demands, where effective behavior requires not only invoking atomic tools but also abstracting, and reusing higher-level tool compositions. However, existing benchmarks mainly measure instance-level success under static tool sets, offering limited insight into agents' ability to acquire such reusable skills. We address this gap by introducing SkillCraft, a benchmark explicitly stress-test agent ability to form and reuse higher-level tool compositions, where we call Skills. SkillCraft features realistic, highly compositional tool-use scenarios with difficulty scaled along both quantitative and structural dimensions, designed to elicit skill abstraction and cross-task reuse. We further propose a lightweight evaluation protocol that enables agents to auto-compose atomic tools into executable Skills, cache and reuse them inside and across tasks, thereby improving efficiency while accumulating a persistent library of reusable skills. Evaluating state-of-the-art agents on SkillCraft, we observe substantial efficiency gains, with token usage reduced by up to 80% by skill saving and reuse. Moreover, success rate strongly correlates with tool composition ability at test time, underscoring compositional skill acquisition as a core capability.

AI.tldr: SkillCraft是一个专门测试智能体形成和重用高级工具组合（技能）能力的基准，通过可扩展的难度设计和轻量级评估协议，显著提升效率并建立可重用技能库。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的工具使用智能体需要在具有重复结构和多样化需求的长时程工作流中运作，现有基准主要衡量静态工具集下的实例级成功，对智能体获取可重用技能能力的洞察有限。
AI.method: 提出SkillCraft基准，包含高度组合的现实工具使用场景，难度在数量和结构维度上可扩展；设计轻量级评估协议，使智能体能够自动组合原子工具为可执行技能，在任务内外缓存和重用这些技能。
AI.result: 在SkillCraft上评估最先进的智能体，观察到显著的效率提升：通过技能保存和重用，token使用量减少高达80%；成功率与测试时的工具组合能力强相关。
AI.conclusion: 组合技能获取是智能体的核心能力，SkillCraft基准填补了现有评估在测试智能体形成和重用高级工具组合能力方面的空白。

title: InfoPO: Information-Driven Policy Optimization for User-Centric Agents
summary: Real-world user requests to LLM agents are often underspecified. Agents must interact to acquire missing information and make correct downstream decisions. However, current multi-turn GRPO-based methods often rely on trajectory-level reward computation, which leads to credit assignment problems and insufficient advantage signals within rollout groups. A feasible approach is to identify valuable interaction turns at a fine granularity to drive more targeted learning. To address this, we introduce InfoPO (Information-Driven Policy Optimization), which frames multi-turn interaction as a process of active uncertainty reduction and computes an information-gain reward that credits turns whose feedback measurably changes the agent's subsequent action distribution compared to a masked-feedback counterfactual. It then combines this signal with task outcomes via an adaptive variance-gated fusion to identify information importance while maintaining task-oriented goal direction. Across diverse tasks, including intent clarification, collaborative coding, and tool-augmented decision making, InfoPO consistently outperforms prompting and multi-turn RL baselines. It also demonstrates robustness under user simulator shifts and generalizes effectively to environment-interactive tasks. Overall, InfoPO provides a principled and scalable mechanism for optimizing complex agent-user collaboration. Code is available at https://github.com/kfq20/InfoPO.

AI.tldr: InfoPO通过信息增益奖励优化多轮交互，解决GRPO中的信用分配问题，在多种任务中优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 现实世界中用户对LLM代理的请求往往不完整，代理需要通过交互获取缺失信息。当前基于GRPO的多轮方法依赖轨迹级奖励计算，导致信用分配问题和优势信号不足，需要更细粒度的交互轮次识别来驱动更有针对性的学习。
AI.method: 提出InfoPO（信息驱动策略优化），将多轮交互框架化为主动不确定性减少过程，计算信息增益奖励：对比代理在有反馈和无反馈（掩码反馈反事实）情况下的后续动作分布变化，通过自适应方差门控融合将此信号与任务结果结合，识别信息重要性同时保持任务导向。
AI.result: 在意图澄清、协作编码和工具增强决策等多种任务中，InfoPO持续优于提示和多轮RL基线方法。在用户模拟器变化下表现出鲁棒性，并能有效泛化到环境交互任务。
AI.conclusion: InfoPO为优化复杂代理-用户协作提供了原则性和可扩展的机制，通过细粒度信息增益奖励解决了多轮交互中的信用分配问题。

title: A Penalty Method for Non-Self-Adjoint Topology Optimization
summary: We propose a novel penalty method framework for the non-self-adjoint topology optimization problems, taking compliant mechanism problems as an example, by incorporating a convex nonlocal perimeter approximation scheme. We rigorously analyze the existence of solutions to the optimization problem derived from the penalty method. Furthermore, we establish that the discrete problem \(Γ\)-converges to the continuous problem, ensuring consistency across scales. To solve the discrete problem, we develop a projected gradient method that guarantees strict monotonic descent of the objective function. We also extend the framework to the heat dissipation problem and propose a generalized material interpolation function (GMIF), which allows for a targeted control of the topological connectivity in the resulting optimal design. Numerical experiments on the compliant mechanism and heat dissipation problems validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. This framework provides a robust approach to addressing complex optimization challenges in computational mathematics with potential applications in engineering design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于非自伴拓扑优化问题的新型惩罚方法框架，结合凸非局部周长近似方案，以柔顺机构问题为例，并扩展到热耗散问题
AI.motivation: 针对非自伴拓扑优化问题（如柔顺机构设计）缺乏鲁棒数值方法的问题，需要开发能保证解存在性、尺度一致性并能控制拓扑连通性的框架
AI.method: 提出惩罚方法框架，结合凸非局部周长近似方案；建立离散问题的Γ收敛性；开发保证目标函数严格单调下降的投影梯度法；提出广义材料插值函数(GMIF)控制拓扑连通性
AI.result: 严格证明了优化问题解的存在性，建立了离散问题到连续问题的Γ收敛性，开发了有效的数值求解算法，并通过柔顺机构和热耗散问题的数值实验验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该框架为计算数学中的复杂优化问题提供了鲁棒方法，在工程设计中具有潜在应用价值，特别是在需要控制拓扑连通性的非自伴拓扑优化问题中

title: Randomized Kiring Believer for Parallel Bayesian Optimization with Regret Bounds
summary: We consider an optimization problem of an expensive-to-evaluate black-box function, in which we can obtain noisy function values in parallel. For this problem, parallel Bayesian optimization (PBO) is a promising approach, which aims to optimize with fewer function evaluations by selecting a diverse input set for parallel evaluation. However, existing PBO methods suffer from poor practical performance or lack theoretical guarantees. In this study, we propose a PBO method, called randomized kriging believer (KB), based on a well-known KB heuristic and inheriting the advantages of the original KB: low computational complexity, a simple implementation, versatility across various BO methods, and applicability to asynchronous parallelization. Furthermore, we show that our randomized KB achieves Bayesian expected regret guarantees. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through experiments on synthetic and benchmark functions and emulators of real-world data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于随机化克里金置信（randomized kriging believer）的并行贝叶斯优化方法，该方法计算复杂度低、实现简单、适用于多种BO方法，并具有贝叶斯期望遗憾的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 并行贝叶斯优化（PBO）在处理昂贵黑箱函数优化问题时具有潜力，但现有方法存在实际性能不佳或缺乏理论保证的问题。需要一种既实用又有理论支持的PBO方法。
AI.method: 基于著名的KB启发式方法，提出随机化克里金置信（randomized kriging believer）方法。该方法继承原始KB的优点：低计算复杂度、简单实现、适用于各种BO方法，并能应用于异步并行化。
AI.result: 随机化KB方法在合成函数、基准函数和真实世界数据模拟器上的实验证明了其有效性。更重要的是，该方法实现了贝叶斯期望遗憾的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机化克里金置信方法是一种实用且具有理论保证的并行贝叶斯优化方法，解决了现有PBO方法的局限性，在保持计算效率的同时提供了理论保障。

title: Does Travel Stage Matter? How Leisure Travellers Perceive Their Privacy Attitudes Towards Personal Data Sharing Before, During, and After Travel
summary: People's attitudes towards personal data sharing have been extensively researched, however, limited research studied their evolving nature in across different stages of a leisure trip. This paper addresses this gap by exploring how leisure travellers' attitudes towards sharing personal data change before, during and after travel. Analysing data from an online survey with 318 participants, we found that participants' privacy attitudes towards sharing different personal data vary based on sharing purposes and travel stages. Interestingly, participants exhibited a more relaxed attitude towards sharing commonly sensitive personal data (e.g., name, gender) compared to other types of personal data. This is likely because sharing such data for travel bookings has become essential and widely accepted among travellers when using booking sites, which is in line with previous work stating that information easily obtainable is typically not seen as highly confidential. Moreover, despite participants' self-reported frequent use of social media platforms, content sharing is minimal on TikTok, YouTube, Snapchat, Pinterest, and Twitter. Conversely, Facebook and Instagram were more common for travel-related content sharing. This pattern remains consistent across the three stages of travel, suggesting that the stage of travel does not significantly influence how people share on social media platforms, which has been overlooked in past studies. Furthermore, we discovered that a participant's gender, previous travel frequency, and country of residence can influence their perceptions of personal data sharing at different travel stages, confirming the complex and context-dependent nature of privacy perception and attitudes. Based on the findings observed from this study, we further discuss implications and potential contributions of our work to the privacy and security community in general.

AI.tldr: 研究发现休闲旅行者在旅行前、中、后三个阶段对个人数据分享的态度会变化，分享态度受分享目的、数据类型、人口统计因素影响，但社交媒体分享模式在三个阶段保持稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对个人数据分享态度已有广泛探讨，但缺乏对休闲旅行者在旅行不同阶段（前、中、后）态度演变的研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索旅行者在完整旅行周期中隐私态度的动态变化。
AI.method: 采用在线问卷调查方法，收集了318名参与者的数据，分析他们在旅行前、中、后三个阶段对分享不同类型个人数据的态度，以及社交媒体使用模式。
AI.result: 1. 参与者对分享不同个人数据的隐私态度因分享目的和旅行阶段而异；2. 对通常敏感的个人数据（如姓名、性别）态度更放松，因为这些数据在预订时已成为必需；3. 社交媒体分享模式在三个阶段保持稳定，Facebook和Instagram是主要平台；4. 性别、旅行频率和居住国影响不同阶段的隐私感知。
AI.conclusion: 旅行者的隐私态度具有复杂性和情境依赖性，旅行阶段影响数据分享态度但不影响社交媒体分享模式。研究结果为隐私和安全社区提供了关于动态隐私感知的新见解。

title: When does Chain-of-Thought Help: A Markovian Perspective
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting is a widely used inference-time technique for improving reasoning, yet its gains are uneven across tasks. We analyze when and why CoT helps by modeling the step-wise reasoning trajectory as a Markov chain. Each intermediate step is a state and the dependence between steps is captured by a transition kernel. Our theory identifies transition alignment, whether instances share a common step-wise transition kernel, as the key determinant of CoT's effectiveness. When transitions are identical across steps, CoT reduces inference-time sample complexity: fewer context sample trajectories suffice to recover the final decision. In contrast, when transitions differ across steps, these gains can vanish. We further quantify how noise in intermediate steps modulates CoT's benefit. Beyond theory, we design synthetic benchmarks that isolate these factors to complement prior results on real-world tasks and to empirically validate our predictions.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过将思维链推理建模为马尔可夫链，提出"转移对齐"是决定CoT效果的关键因素，当各步骤转移核相同时CoT能降低推理复杂度，否则收益可能消失。
AI.motivation: 思维链提示技术在不同任务中效果差异很大，需要理解其何时以及为何有效，以便更好地应用和改进这种推理技术。
AI.method: 将思维链的逐步推理轨迹建模为马尔可夫链，每个中间步骤视为状态，步骤间依赖关系由转移核捕获。通过理论分析识别转移对齐的关键作用，并设计合成基准进行实证验证。
AI.result: 理论表明：当各步骤转移核相同时，CoT能显著降低推理时的样本复杂度；当转移核不同时，这些收益可能消失。中间步骤的噪声也会调节CoT的收益程度。
AI.conclusion: 转移对齐是决定思维链提示有效性的关键机制因素，这一理论框架为理解和预测CoT在不同任务中的表现提供了基础，有助于指导其实际应用。

title: RLAR: An Agentic Reward System for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning on Large Language Models
summary: Large language model alignment via reinforcement learning depends critically on reward function quality. However, static, domain-specific reward models are often costly to train and exhibit poor generalization in out-of-distribution scenarios encountered during RL iterations. We present RLAR (Reinforcement Learning from Agent Rewards), an agent-driven framework that dynamically assigns tailored reward functions to individual queries. Specifically, RLAR transforms reward acquisition into a dynamic tool synthesis and invocation task. It leverages LLM agents to autonomously retrieve optimal reward models from the Internet and synthesize programmatic verifiers through code generation. This allows the reward system to self-evolve with the shifting data distributions during training. Experimental results demonstrate that RLAR yields consistent performance gains ranging from 10 to 60 across mathematics, coding, translation, and dialogue tasks. On RewardBench-V2, RLAR significantly outperforms static baselines and approaches the performance upper bound, demonstrating superior generalization through dynamic reward orchestration. The data and code are available on this link: https://github.com/ZhuoerFeng/RLAR.

AI.tldr: RLAR是一个通过LLM智能体动态合成和调用奖励函数的强化学习框架，解决了静态奖励模型泛化性差的问题，在多种任务上获得10-60%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习对齐方法依赖静态、领域特定的奖励模型，这些模型训练成本高且在RL迭代中遇到分布外场景时泛化能力差。
AI.method: 将奖励获取转化为动态工具合成和调用任务：利用LLM智能体从互联网自主检索最优奖励模型，并通过代码生成合成程序化验证器，使奖励系统能随训练数据分布变化而自我进化。
AI.result: 在数学、编程、翻译和对话任务上获得10-60%的稳定性能提升；在RewardBench-V2上显著优于静态基线方法，接近性能上限，展示了通过动态奖励编排实现的优越泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RLAR框架通过动态奖励编排解决了静态奖励模型的泛化问题，为LLM对齐提供了更灵活、自适应的解决方案，代码和数据已开源。

title: K^2-Agent: Co-Evolving Know-What and Know-How for Hierarchical Mobile Device Control
summary: Existing mobile device control agents often perform poorly when solving complex tasks requiring long-horizon planning and precise operations, typically due to a lack of relevant task experience or unfamiliarity with skill execution. We propose K2-Agent, a hierarchical framework that models human-like cognition by separating and co-evolving declarative (knowing what) and procedural (knowing how) knowledge for planning and execution. K2-Agent's high level reasoner is bootstrapped from a single demonstration per task and runs a Summarize-Reflect-Locate-Revise (SRLR) loop to distill and iteratively refine task-level declarative knowledge through self-evolution. The low-level executor is trained with our curriculum-guided Group Relative Policy Optimization (C-GRPO), which (i) constructs a balanced sample pool using decoupled reward signals and (ii) employs dynamic demonstration injection to guide the model in autonomously generating successful trajectories for training. On the challenging AndroidWorld benchmark, K2-Agent achieves a 76.1% success rate using only raw screenshots and open-source backbones. Furthermore, K2-Agent shows powerful dual generalization: its high-level declarative knowledge transfers across diverse base models, while its low-level procedural skills achieve competitive performance on unseen tasks in ScreenSpot-v2 and Android-in-the-Wild (AitW).

AI.tldr: K2-Agent是一个分层移动设备控制框架，通过分离和协同进化陈述性知识（知道做什么）和程序性知识（知道怎么做）来模拟人类认知，在AndroidWorld基准测试中仅使用原始截图和开源模型就达到了76.1%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有移动设备控制代理在处理需要长时规划和精确操作的复杂任务时表现不佳，主要原因是缺乏相关任务经验或不熟悉技能执行。需要一种能够模拟人类认知、分离并协同进化不同知识类型的框架。
AI.method: 提出K2-Agent分层框架：高层推理器从每个任务的单次演示中启动，运行Summarize-Reflect-Locate-Revise（SRLR）循环来自我进化任务级陈述性知识；低层执行器使用课程引导的Group Relative Policy Optimization（C-GRPO）训练，通过解耦奖励信号构建平衡样本池，并采用动态演示注入来引导模型自主生成成功轨迹。
AI.result: 在AndroidWorld基准测试中达到76.1%的成功率（仅使用原始截图和开源模型）。展示强大的双重泛化能力：高层陈述性知识可跨不同基础模型迁移，低层程序性技能在ScreenSpot-v2和Android-in-the-Wild（AitW）的未见任务上达到竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: K2-Agent通过分离和协同进化陈述性知识与程序性知识，有效解决了移动设备控制中的复杂任务规划与执行问题，实现了高性能和强大的泛化能力，为智能代理设计提供了新思路。

title: Feasible Pairings for Decentralized Integral Controllability of Non-Square Systems
summary: This paper investigates the determination of feasible input-output pairings for the decentralized integral controllability of non-square systems. The relevance of this problem extends beyond traditional industrial processes into modern AI research, particularly Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL), where environments frequently act as strongly non-square mappings that evaluate high-dimensional joint action spaces via comparatively low-dimensional global rewards. To address the stability of these complex distributed architectures, we extend the concept of D-stability to non-square matrices, providing a crucial mathematical foundation. We formally define D-stability for non-square matrices as a direct generalization of the square case. By introducing the concept of ``Squared Matrices'', which are derived from specific column selections of the non-square formulation and directly correspond to candidate control pairings, we establish a fundamental link between the stability of these square sub-components and the original non-square system. Ultimately, we propose sufficient conditions under which the individual Volterra-Lyapunov stability of these squared components guarantees the extended D-stability of the non-square matrix, thereby providing a rigorous method to identify feasible pairings that ensure robust decentralized control across both classical and data-driven applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了非方系统分散积分控制的可行输入输出配对问题，将D-稳定性概念扩展到非方矩阵，提出了通过特定列选择构建"平方矩阵"的方法，并建立了平方子组件稳定性与非方系统稳定性之间的联系。
AI.motivation: 传统工业过程和非传统应用（如多智能体强化学习）中经常遇到非方系统，这些系统将高维联合动作空间映射到低维全局奖励。需要确保这些复杂分布式架构的稳定性，特别是在分散控制设置中。
AI.method: 将D-稳定性概念扩展到非方矩阵，定义非方矩阵的D-稳定性作为方矩阵情况的直接推广。引入"平方矩阵"概念，这些矩阵从非方公式的特定列选择派生，直接对应候选控制配对。建立这些平方子组件稳定性与原始非方系统稳定性之间的基本联系。
AI.result: 提出了充分条件，在这些条件下，平方组件的个体Volterra-Lyapunov稳定性保证非方矩阵的扩展D-稳定性。这为识别确保经典和数据驱动应用中鲁棒分散控制的可行配对提供了严格方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非方系统的分散积分控制提供了理论基础，通过将D-稳定性扩展到非方矩阵并建立平方子组件稳定性与整体系统稳定性之间的联系，为复杂分布式架构（包括传统工业过程和现代AI应用）的稳定性分析提供了新工具。

title: Training Dynamics of Softmax Self-Attention: Fast Global Convergence via Preconditioning
summary: We study the training dynamics of gradient descent in a softmax self-attention layer trained to perform linear regression and show that a simple first-order optimization algorithm can converge to the globally optimal self-attention parameters at a geometric rate. Our analysis proceeds in two steps. First, we show that in the infinite-data limit the regression problem solved by the self-attention layer is equivalent to a nonconvex matrix factorization problem. Second, we exploit this connection to design a novel "structure-aware" variant of gradient descent which efficiently optimizes the original finite-data regression objective. Our optimization algorithm features several innovations over standard gradient descent, including a preconditioner and regularizer which help avoid spurious stationary points, and a data-dependent spectral initialization of parameters which lie near the manifold of global minima with high probability.

AI.tldr: 论文分析softmax自注意力层在线性回归任务中的训练动态，证明简单一阶优化算法能以几何速率收敛到全局最优自注意力参数。
AI.motivation: 研究自注意力层在优化过程中的训练动态，理解梯度下降如何收敛到全局最优解，这对于理论理解Transformer架构的训练行为具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用两阶段分析：首先在无限数据极限下将回归问题等价于非凸矩阵分解问题；然后设计"结构感知"梯度下降变体，包含预处理器、正则器和数据依赖的谱初始化等创新。
AI.result: 证明优化算法能以几何速率收敛到全局最优自注意力参数，通过结构感知设计有效避免了虚假驻点，并高概率初始化到全局最小值流形附近。
AI.conclusion: 为自注意力层的优化提供了理论保证，表明简单一阶算法在适当设计下能有效解决非凸优化问题，收敛到全局最优解。

title: Explainability and justification of automatic-decision making: A conceptual framework and a practical application
summary: Explainability of algorithmic decision-making systems is both a regulatory objective and an area of intense research. The article argues that a crucial condition for the acceptability of algorithmic decision-making systems is that decisions must be justified in the eyes of their recipients. We make a clear distinction between explanation and justification. Explanations describe how a decision was made, while justifications give reasons that aim to make the decision acceptable. We propose a conceptual framework of explanations and justifications, based on Habermas's theory of communicative action and Perelman's New Rhetoric theory of law. This framework helps to analyze how different forms of explanation can support or fail to support justification. We illustrate our approach with a case study on university admissions in France.

AI.tldr: 论文区分解释与正当性：解释描述决策过程，正当性使决策可接受。基于哈贝马斯和佩雷尔曼理论提出概念框架，分析解释如何支持正当性，以法国大学招生为例。
AI.motivation: 算法决策系统的可解释性既是监管要求也是研究热点。论文认为算法决策可接受性的关键条件是决策必须在接收者眼中具有正当性。当前研究对解释和正当性的区分不够清晰。
AI.method: 基于哈贝马斯的交往行为理论和佩雷尔曼的新修辞法学理论，构建解释与正当性的概念框架。通过法国大学招生案例研究，分析不同解释形式如何支持或阻碍正当性。
AI.result: 提出了清晰区分解释与正当性的理论框架，展示了不同解释类型（如技术解释、过程解释）对正当性支持程度的差异。案例研究表明，单纯的技术解释往往不足以提供正当性。
AI.conclusion: 算法决策系统的可接受性不仅需要解释决策如何做出，更需要提供使决策可接受的正当性理由。理论框架有助于设计更好的算法决策系统，使其决策在接收者眼中具有正当性。

title: Vectorized Adaptive Histograms for Sparse Oblique Forests
summary: Classification using sparse oblique random forests provides guarantees on uncertainty and confidence while controlling for specific error types. However, they use more data and more compute than other tree ensembles because they create deep trees and need to sort or histogram linear combinations of data at runtime. We provide a method for dynamically switching between histograms and sorting to find the best split. We further optimize histogram construction using vector intrinsics. Evaluating this on large datasets, our optimizations speedup training by 1.7-2.5x compared to existing oblique forests and 1.5-2x compared to standard random forests. We also provide a GPU and hybrid CPU-GPU implementation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种优化稀疏斜随机森林的方法，通过动态切换直方图和排序来寻找最佳分割，并使用向量指令优化直方图构建，实现1.5-2.5倍的训练加速。
AI.motivation: 稀疏斜随机森林虽然能提供不确定性保证并控制特定错误类型，但相比其他树集成方法需要更多数据和计算资源，因为需要构建深度树并在运行时对数据的线性组合进行排序或直方图统计。
AI.method: 1) 动态切换直方图和排序方法来寻找最佳分割点；2) 使用向量指令优化直方图构建；3) 提供GPU和混合CPU-GPU实现。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集上的评估显示，相比现有斜随机森林加速1.7-2.5倍，相比标准随机森林加速1.5-2倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化方法显著提升了稀疏斜随机森林的训练效率，使其在保持理论优势的同时更具实用性。

title: LaSTR: Language-Driven Time-Series Segment Retrieval
summary: Effectively searching time-series data is essential for system analysis, but existing methods often require expert-designed similarity criteria or rely on global, series-level descriptions. We study language-driven segment retrieval: given a natural language query, the goal is to retrieve relevant local segments from large time-series repositories. We build large-scale segment--caption training data by applying TV2-based segmentation to LOTSA windows and generating segment descriptions with GPT-5.2, and then train a Conformer-based contrastive retriever in a shared text--time-series embedding space. On a held-out test split, we evaluate single-positive retrieval together with caption-side consistency (SBERT and VLM-as-a-judge) under multiple candidate pool sizes. Across all settings, LaSTR outperforms random and CLIP baselines, yielding improved ranking quality and stronger semantic agreement between retrieved segments and query intent.

AI.tldr: LaSTR：基于语言查询的时间序列片段检索系统，使用大规模片段-描述数据训练对比检索器，显著优于随机和CLIP基线
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列检索方法需要专家设计的相似性标准或依赖全局序列级描述，缺乏基于自然语言查询的局部片段检索能力
AI.method: 1) 使用TV2分割LOTSA窗口构建大规模片段-描述训练数据，用GPT-5.2生成片段描述；2) 在共享文本-时间序列嵌入空间中训练基于Conformer的对比检索器
AI.result: 在保留测试集上，LaSTR在单正例检索和描述侧一致性（SBERT和VLM-as-a-judge）评估中，在不同候选池大小下均优于随机和CLIP基线，提供更好的排序质量和语义匹配
AI.conclusion: LaSTR成功实现了语言驱动的时间序列片段检索，通过大规模数据生成和对比学习训练，显著提升了检索质量和查询意图的语义一致性

title: MemPO: Self-Memory Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon agents face the challenge of growing context size during interaction with environment, which degrades the performance and stability. Existing methods typically introduce the external memory module and look up the relevant information from the stored memory, which prevents the model itself from proactively managing its memory content and aligning with the agent's overarching task objectives. To address these limitations, we propose the self-memory policy optimization algorithm (MemPO), which enables the agent (policy model) to autonomously summarize and manage their memory during interaction with environment. By improving the credit assignment mechanism based on memory effectiveness, the policy model can selectively retain crucial information, significantly reducing token consumption while preserving task performance. Extensive experiments and analyses confirm that MemPO achieves absolute F1 score gains of 25.98% over the base model and 7.1% over the previous SOTA baseline, while reducing token usage by 67.58% and 73.12%.

AI.tldr: MemPO算法让智能体自主管理记忆，通过改进信用分配机制选择性保留关键信息，在减少73%token使用的同时提升任务性能
AI.motivation: 长时程智能体面临上下文大小增长导致性能下降的问题，现有外部记忆模块方法无法让模型主动管理记忆内容并与任务目标对齐
AI.method: 提出自记忆策略优化算法(MemPO)，让策略模型在与环境交互时自主总结和管理记忆，基于记忆有效性改进信用分配机制，选择性保留关键信息
AI.result: 相比基础模型绝对F1分数提升25.98%，相比之前SOTA基线提升7.1%，同时减少token使用67.58%和73.12%
AI.conclusion: MemPO算法有效解决了长时程智能体的记忆管理问题，实现了在显著减少计算资源消耗的同时提升任务性能

title: A First Step Towards Mesh-Free Probabilistic Shape Optimization
summary: We present an initial implementation of a probabilistic PDE-constrained shape optimization algorithm. Our method is based on a novel probabilistic representation of the shape derivative, which is evaluated using Monte Carlo sampling; and does not rely on a mesh. The underlying state is represented with a neural network-based PDE solver on point clouds. The methodology is applied throughout to a benchmark tracking problem.

AI.tldr: 提出基于概率表示的PDE约束形状优化算法，使用蒙特卡洛采样评估形状导数，无需网格，用神经网络求解器处理点云状态
AI.motivation: 传统PDE约束形状优化方法通常依赖网格和确定性计算，本文旨在开发无需网格的概率方法，提高计算灵活性和效率
AI.method: 1) 提出形状导数的概率表示；2) 使用蒙特卡洛采样评估形状导数；3) 基于神经网络的PDE求解器处理点云状态；4) 应用于基准跟踪问题
AI.result: 实现了概率PDE约束形状优化算法的初步版本，展示了在无网格环境下通过概率方法和神经网络求解器进行形状优化的可行性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为PDE约束形状优化提供了新的概率框架，结合蒙特卡洛采样和神经网络求解器，实现了无需网格的优化过程

title: Jump Like A Squirrel: Optimized Execution Step Order for Anytime Random Forest Inference
summary:
Due to their efficiency and small size, decision trees and random forests are popular machine learning models used for classification on resource-constrained systems. In such systems, the available execution time for inference in a random forest might not be sufficient for a complete model execution. Ideally, the already gained prediction confidence should be retained. An anytime algorithm is designed to be able to be aborted anytime, while giving a result with an increasing quality over time. Previous approaches have realized random forests as anytime algorithms on the granularity of trees, stopping after some but not all trees of a forest have been executed. However, due to the way decision trees subdivide the sample space in every step, an increase in prediction quality is achieved with every additional step in one tree. In this paper, we realize decision trees and random forest as anytime algorithms on the granularity of single steps in trees. This approach opens a design space to define the step order in a forest, which has the potential to optimize the mean accuracy. We propose the Optimal Order, which finds a step order with a maximal mean accuracy in exponential runtime and the polynomial runtime heuristics Forward Squirrel Order and Backward Squirrel Order, which greedily maximize the accuracy for each additional step taken down and up the trees, respectively.
  Our evaluation shows, that the Backward Squirrel Order performs $\sim94\%$ as well as the Optimal Order and $\sim99\%$ as well as all other step orders.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种将决策树和随机森林实现为随时算法的方法，在树的单步粒度上工作，通过优化步骤顺序来提高预测准确率。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限系统中，随机森林的推理时间可能不足以执行完整模型。传统方法在树粒度上实现随时算法，但决策树每一步都能提高预测质量，因此需要在更细粒度上实现随时算法以保留已获得的预测置信度。
AI.method: 1) 在树的单步粒度上实现决策树和随机森林的随时算法；2) 提出最优顺序（指数时间复杂度）找到最大平均准确率的步骤顺序；3) 提出多项式时间启发式算法：前向松鼠顺序（自上而下贪婪最大化准确率）和后向松鼠顺序（自下而上贪婪最大化准确率）。
AI.result: 评估显示，后向松鼠顺序的性能达到最优顺序的约94%，且达到所有其他步骤顺序的约99%。
AI.conclusion: 在单步粒度上实现随机森林的随时算法是有效的，后向松鼠顺序作为多项式时间启发式算法，在准确率和计算效率之间取得了良好平衡。

title: Knowledge without Wisdom: Measuring Misalignment between LLMs and Intended Impact
summary: LLMs increasingly excel on AI benchmarks, but doing so does not guarantee validity for downstream tasks. This study evaluates the performance of leading foundation models (FMs, i.e., generative pre-trained base LLMs) with out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks of the teaching and learning of schoolchildren. Across all FMs, inter-model behaviors on disparate tasks correlate higher than they do with expert human behaviors on target tasks. These biases shared across LLMs are poorly aligned with downstream measures of teaching quality and often \textit{negatively aligned with learning outcomes}. Further, we find multi-model ensembles, both unanimous model voting and expert-weighting by benchmark performance, further exacerbate misalignment with learning. We measure that 50\% of the variation in misalignment error is shared across foundation models, suggesting that common pretraining accounts for much of the misalignment in these tasks. We demonstrate methods for robustly measuring alignment of complex tasks and provide unique insights into both educational applications of foundation models and to understanding limitations of models.

AI.tldr: 研究发现领先的基础模型在教育教学任务中表现出系统性偏差，与人类专家行为和实际学习成果不匹配，且多模型集成会加剧这种不匹配
AI.motivation: 虽然LLMs在AI基准测试中表现出色，但这并不能保证它们在下游任务中的有效性。本研究旨在评估基础模型在教育教学这一分布外任务中的表现，探究模型行为与人类专家行为及实际学习成果的匹配程度。
AI.method: 评估多个领先的基础模型在教育教学任务中的表现，比较不同模型之间的行为相关性，以及模型行为与人类专家行为、教学质量和学习成果的匹配度。同时测试多模型集成方法（包括一致投票和基于基准性能的专家加权）的效果。
AI.result: 所有基础模型在不同任务上的行为相关性高于与人类专家行为的匹配度；模型共享的偏差与教学质量测量不匹配，且经常与学习成果负相关；多模型集成进一步加剧了这种不匹配；50%的不匹配误差变异可归因于模型共享的预训练过程。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型在教育教学任务中存在系统性偏差，这些偏差源于共同的预训练过程，导致与人类专家行为和实际学习成果不匹配。研究为教育应用提供了重要洞见，并揭示了模型在复杂任务中的局限性。

title: Detecting Transportation Mode Using Dense Smartphone GPS Trajectories and Transformer Models
comment: Accepted for publication in the International Journal of Geographical Information Science, February 2026. This is the accepted manuscript. The final version of record will appear in IJGIS (Taylor and Francis)
summary: Transportation mode detection is an important topic within GeoAI and transportation research. In this study, we introduce SpeedTransformer, a novel Transformer-based model that relies solely on speed inputs to infer transportation modes from dense smartphone GPS trajectories. In benchmark experiments, SpeedTransformer outperformed traditional deep learning models, such as the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network. Moreover, the model demonstrated strong flexibility in transfer learning, achieving high accuracy across geographical regions after fine-tuning with small datasets. Finally, we deployed the model in a real-world experiment, where it consistently outperformed baseline models under complex built environments and high data uncertainty. These findings suggest that Transformer architectures, when combined with dense GPS trajectories, hold substantial potential for advancing transportation mode detection and broader mobility-related research.

AI.tldr: SpeedTransformer：基于Transformer的模型，仅使用速度输入从密集GPS轨迹中检测交通方式，在基准测试中优于LSTM等传统深度学习模型，并展现出强大的迁移学习能力。
AI.motivation: 交通方式检测是GeoAI和交通研究中的重要课题。现有方法可能依赖于多种特征输入，而本研究探索仅使用速度信息是否能有效检测交通方式，并利用Transformer架构处理密集GPS轨迹数据。
AI.method: 提出SpeedTransformer模型，这是一种基于Transformer架构的模型，专门设计用于处理密集智能手机GPS轨迹。模型仅使用速度作为输入特征，通过自注意力机制捕捉轨迹中的时序依赖关系，并支持迁移学习到不同地理区域。
AI.result: 在基准实验中，SpeedTransformer优于传统的LSTM等深度学习模型。模型展现出强大的迁移学习能力，通过小数据集微调即可在不同地理区域获得高准确率。在实际部署实验中，模型在复杂建成环境和高数据不确定性的情况下持续优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构与密集GPS轨迹相结合，在交通方式检测和更广泛的移动性相关研究中具有巨大潜力。SpeedTransformer证明了仅使用速度信息就能有效检测交通方式，并为实际应用提供了灵活高效的解决方案。

title: Qwen3-Coder-Next Technical Report
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their last names
summary: We present Qwen3-Coder-Next, an open-weight language model specialized for coding agents. Qwen3-Coder-Next is an 80-billion-parameter model that activates only 3 billion parameters during inference, enabling strong coding capability with efficient inference. In this work, we explore how far strong training recipes can push the capability limits of models with small parameter footprints. To achieve this, we perform agentic training through large-scale synthesis of verifiable coding tasks paired with executable environments, allowing learning directly from environment feedback via mid-training and reinforcement learning. Across agent-centric benchmarks including SWE-Bench and Terminal-Bench, Qwen3-Coder-Next achieves competitive performance relative to its active parameter count. We release both base and instruction-tuned open-weight versions to support research and real-world coding agent development.

AI.tldr: Qwen3-Coder-Next是一个80B参数但推理时仅激活3B参数的代码代理专用模型，通过大规模可验证任务合成和强化学习训练，在SWE-Bench等基准上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 探索如何通过强大的训练方法在小型参数模型中实现卓越的代码能力，研究如何用少量激活参数获得强大的编码代理性能。
AI.method: 1) 构建大规模可验证编码任务与可执行环境的合成数据集；2) 通过环境反馈进行中期训练和强化学习；3) 采用80B参数但推理时仅激活3B参数的稀疏激活架构。
AI.result: 在SWE-Bench和Terminal-Bench等代理中心基准测试中，Qwen3-Coder-Next相对于其激活参数数量表现出有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模可验证任务合成和强化学习训练，可以在小型参数模型中实现强大的代码代理能力，为研究和实际编码代理开发提供支持。

title: AIoT-based Continuous, Contextualized, and Explainable Driving Assessment for Older Adults
summary: The world is undergoing a major demographic shift as older adults become a rapidly growing share of the population, creating new challenges for driving safety. In car-dependent regions such as the United States, driving remains essential for independence, access to services, and social participation. At the same time, aging can introduce gradual changes in vision, attention, reaction time, and driving control that quietly reduce safety. Today's assessment methods rely largely on infrequent clinic visits or simple screening tools, offering only a brief snapshot and failing to reflect how an older adult actually drives on the road. Our work starts from the observation that everyday driving provides a continuous record of functional ability and captures how a driver responds to traffic, navigates complex roads, and manages routine behavior. Leveraging this insight, we propose AURA, an Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT) framework for continuous, real-world assessment of driving safety among older adults. AURA integrates richer in-vehicle sensing, multi-scale behavioral modeling, and context-aware analysis to extract detailed indicators of driving performance from routine trips. It organizes fine-grained actions into longer behavioral trajectories and separates age-related performance changes from situational factors such as traffic, road design, or weather. By integrating sensing, modeling, and interpretation within a privacy-preserving edge architecture, AURA provides a foundation for proactive, individualized support that helps older adults drive safely. This paper outlines the design principles, challenges, and research opportunities needed to build reliable, real-world monitoring systems that promote safer aging behind the wheel.

AI.tldr: AURA是一个AIoT框架，用于通过日常驾驶数据连续评估老年人驾驶安全，整合车载传感、多尺度行为建模和情境感知分析，提供个性化支持。
AI.motivation: 人口老龄化带来驾驶安全挑战，老年人需要驾驶来保持独立，但年龄相关的生理变化会降低驾驶安全性。现有评估方法（如诊所访问）只能提供短暂快照，无法反映实际道路驾驶情况。
AI.method: 提出AURA框架：1）集成丰富的车载传感；2）多尺度行为建模，将细粒度动作组织为行为轨迹；3）情境感知分析，区分年龄相关变化与交通、道路、天气等情境因素；4）采用保护隐私的边缘计算架构。
AI.result: 论文概述了设计原则、挑战和研究机会，旨在建立可靠的真实世界监控系统，为老年人提供主动、个性化的驾驶安全支持。
AI.conclusion: 日常驾驶数据提供了连续的功能能力记录，AURA框架通过AIoT技术实现连续、实时的驾驶安全评估，为促进老年人安全驾驶奠定基础。

title: Maximum Principles for Partially Observed Controls of Forward SPDEs and Backward SDEs with Jumps
summary: This work establishes two versions of the Pontryagin-type maximum principles for partially observed optimal control of coupled forward stochastic partial differential equations (FSPDEs) and backward stochastic differential equations (BSDEs) with jumps in convex control domains. The FSPDE-BSDE system is driven by cylindrical Wiener processes, finite-dimensional Brownian motions, and compensated Poisson random measures. For systems with deterministic coefficients, a direct method is employed and particular attention is focused on establishing the well-posedness of a singular backward SPDE with jumps. For systems with random coefficients, a Malliavin calculus approach is developed. The main novelty here is the establishment of the well-posedness of an operator-valued SPDE with jumps, which provides a new stochastic flow representation for linear SPDEs with jumps.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了凸控制域下带跳跃的耦合前向随机偏微分方程和后向随机微分方程部分观测最优控制的两种Pontryagin型最大值原理。
AI.motivation: 研究带跳跃的耦合FSPDE-BSDE系统在凸控制域下的部分观测最优控制问题，建立相应的Pontryagin最大值原理。
AI.method: 针对确定性系数系统采用直接方法，重点建立带跳跃的奇异后向SPDE的适定性；针对随机系数系统发展Malliavin计算方法，建立带跳跃的算子值SPDE的适定性。
AI.result: 建立了两种版本的Pontryagin型最大值原理，其中主要创新是建立了带跳跃的算子值SPDE的适定性，为带跳跃的线性SPDE提供了新的随机流表示。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了凸控制域下带跳跃的耦合FSPDE-BSDE系统部分观测最优控制的Pontryagin最大值原理，为随机控制理论提供了新的工具和方法。

title: Learning Shortest Paths with Generative Flow Networks
summary: In this paper, we present a novel learning framework for finding shortest paths in graphs utilizing Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets). First, we examine theoretical properties of GFlowNets in non-acyclic environments in relation to shortest paths. We prove that, if the total flow is minimized, forward and backward policies traverse the environment graph exclusively along shortest paths between the initial and terminal states. Building on this result, we show that the pathfinding problem in an arbitrary graph can be solved by training a non-acyclic GFlowNet with flow regularization. We experimentally demonstrate the performance of our method in pathfinding in permutation environments and in solving Rubik's Cubes. For the latter problem, our approach shows competitive results with state-of-the-art machine learning approaches designed specifically for this task in terms of the solution length, while requiring smaller search budget at test-time.

AI.tldr: 提出基于生成流网络(GFlowNets)的图最短路径学习框架，证明在最小化总流条件下，GFlowNets能在非循环图中沿最短路径遍历，并应用于排列环境和魔方求解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划方法在复杂图结构中面临挑战，需要开发能有效找到最短路径的学习框架。GFlowNets在序列决策问题中表现出色，但其在非循环图环境中的理论性质尚未充分探索，特别是在最短路径问题中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 首先分析GFlowNets在非循环环境中的理论性质，证明最小化总流时前后向策略会沿最短路径遍历。基于此，提出通过带流正则化的非循环GFlowNet训练来解决任意图中的路径规划问题。
AI.result: 在排列环境路径规划和魔方求解任务中验证了方法的有效性。对于魔方问题，该方法在解长度上与专门设计的SOTA机器学习方法竞争，同时测试时所需搜索预算更小。
AI.conclusion: GFlowNets框架为图最短路径问题提供了有效的解决方案，通过理论证明和实验验证展示了其在复杂路径规划任务中的潜力，特别是在需要高效搜索的场景中具有优势。

title: The Aftermath of DrawEduMath: Vision Language Models Underperform with Struggling Students and Misdiagnose Errors
summary: Effective mathematics education requires identifying and responding to students' mistakes. For AI to support pedagogical applications, models must perform well across different levels of student proficiency. Our work provides an extensive, year-long snapshot of how 11 vision-language models (VLMs) perform on DrawEduMath, a QA benchmark involving real students' handwritten, hand-drawn responses to math problems. We find that models' weaknesses concentrate on a core component of math education: student error. All evaluated VLMs underperform when describing work from students who require more pedagogical help, and across all QA, they struggle the most on questions related to assessing student error. Thus, while VLMs may be optimized to be math problem solving experts, our results suggest that they require alternative development incentives to adequately support educational use cases.

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型在数学教育应用中表现不佳，特别是在识别和回应学生错误方面，需要不同的开发激励来支持教育用例
AI.motivation: 有效的数学教育需要识别和回应学生的错误。为了让AI支持教学应用，模型必须在不同学生能力水平上表现良好。本研究旨在评估视觉语言模型在真实学生手写数学问题回答上的表现，特别是针对学生错误识别的能力
AI.method: 使用DrawEduMath基准测试，包含真实学生手写手绘的数学问题回答。评估了11个视觉语言模型在一年时间内的表现，特别关注模型在描述需要更多教学帮助的学生作业时的表现，以及评估学生错误相关问题的能力
AI.result: 所有评估的视觉语言模型在描述需要更多教学帮助的学生作业时表现不佳，在所有问答任务中，评估学生错误相关问题的表现最差。模型在数学教育核心组成部分——学生错误识别方面存在集中性弱点
AI.conclusion: 虽然视觉语言模型可能被优化为数学问题解决专家，但研究结果表明它们需要替代的开发激励来充分支持教育用例。当前模型在识别和回应学生错误方面的不足限制了其在教育应用中的有效性

title: StethoLM: Audio Language Model for Cardiopulmonary Analysis Across Clinical Tasks
summary: Listening to heart and lung sounds - auscultation - is one of the first and most fundamental steps in a clinical examination. Despite being fast and non-invasive, it demands years of experience to interpret subtle audio cues. Recent deep learning methods have made progress in automating cardiopulmonary sound analysis, yet most are restricted to simple classification and offer little clinical interpretability or decision support. We present StethoLM, the first audio-language model specialized for cardiopulmonary auscultation, capable of performing instruction-driven clinical tasks across the full spectrum of auscultation analysis. StethoLM integrates audio encoding with a medical language model backbone and is trained on StethoBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 77,027 instruction-response pairs synthesized from 16,125 labeled cardiopulmonary recordings spanning seven clinical task categories: binary classification, detection, reporting, reasoning, differential diagnosis, comparison, and location-based analysis. Through multi-stage training that combines supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization, StethoLM achieves substantial gains in performance and robustness on out-of-distribution data. Our work establishes a foundation for instruction-following AI systems in clinical auscultation.

AI.tldr: StethoLM是首个专门用于心肺听诊的音频-语言模型，能够执行指令驱动的临床任务，在多种听诊分析任务上表现出色。
AI.motivation: 心肺听诊是临床检查的基础步骤，但需要多年经验才能解读细微音频线索。现有深度学习方法大多局限于简单分类，缺乏临床可解释性和决策支持。
AI.method: 开发StethoLM音频-语言模型，集成音频编码和医学语言模型骨干网络。使用StethoBench基准数据集（77,027个指令-响应对，来自16,125个标记的心肺录音），涵盖七类临床任务。采用多阶段训练，结合监督微调和直接偏好优化。
AI.result: StethoLM在性能和鲁棒性方面取得显著提升，特别是在分布外数据上表现优异，为临床听诊的指令跟随AI系统奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了临床听诊中指令跟随AI系统的基础，StethoLM能够执行全面的听诊分析任务，具有临床可解释性和决策支持能力。

title: A Comprehensive Evaluation of LLM Unlearning Robustness under Multi-Turn Interaction
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training data from pre-trained models without retraining from scratch, and is increasingly important for large language models (LLMs) due to safety, privacy, and legal concerns. Although prior work primarily evaluates unlearning in static, single-turn settings, forgetting robustness under realistic interactive use remains underexplored. In this paper, we study whether unlearning remains stable in interactive environments by examining two common interaction patterns: self-correction and dialogue-conditioned querying. We find that knowledge appearing forgotten in static evaluation can often be recovered through interaction. Although stronger unlearning improves apparent robustness, it often results in behavioral rigidity rather than genuine knowledge erasure. Our findings suggest that static evaluation may overestimate real-world effectiveness and highlight the need for ensuring stable forgetting under interactive settings.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在静态评估中看似被遗忘的知识，在交互式环境中（如自我纠正和对话条件查询）经常能被恢复，表明静态评估可能高估了机器遗忘的真实效果。
AI.motivation: 机器遗忘旨在从预训练模型中移除特定训练数据的影响，对于大型语言模型的安全、隐私和法律合规性至关重要。先前工作主要在静态、单轮设置中评估遗忘效果，而现实交互使用中的遗忘鲁棒性尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 通过研究两种常见的交互模式：自我纠正和对话条件查询，来检验机器遗忘在交互环境中的稳定性。分析知识在静态评估中看似被遗忘后，是否能在交互中被恢复。
AI.result: 研究发现，在静态评估中看似被遗忘的知识，经常能在交互式环境中被恢复。更强的遗忘方法虽然提高了表面鲁棒性，但往往导致行为僵化而非真正的知识擦除。
AI.conclusion: 静态评估可能高估机器遗忘在真实世界中的有效性，需要确保在交互设置下的稳定遗忘。未来的机器遗忘研究应考虑交互环境中的鲁棒性评估。

title: MO-MIX: Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Cooperative Decision-Making With Deep Reinforcement Learning
comment: 15 pages, 10 figures, published in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been applied extensively to solve complex decision-making problems. In many real-world scenarios, tasks often have several conflicting objectives and may require multiple agents to cooperate, which are the multi-objective multi-agent decision-making problems. However, only few works have been conducted on this intersection. Existing approaches are limited to separate fields and can only handle multi-agent decision-making with a single objective, or multi-objective decision-making with a single agent. In this paper, we propose MO-MIX to solve the multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning (MOMARL) problem. Our approach is based on the centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) framework. A weight vector representing preference over the objectives is fed into the decentralized agent network as a condition for local action-value function estimation, while a mixing network with parallel architecture is used to estimate the joint action-value function. In addition, an exploration guide approach is applied to improve the uniformity of the final non-dominated solutions. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively solve the multi-objective multi-agent cooperative decision-making problem and generate an approximation of the Pareto set. Our approach not only significantly outperforms the baseline method in all four kinds of evaluation metrics, but also requires less computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出MO-MIX方法解决多目标多智能体强化学习问题，基于CTDE框架，通过权重向量表示目标偏好，并行混合网络估计联合动作价值函数，探索引导提高非支配解均匀性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界决策问题常涉及多个冲突目标和多智能体协作，但现有方法要么只能处理多智能体单目标问题，要么只能处理单智能体多目标问题，缺乏对多目标多智能体强化学习问题的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 基于CTDE框架，将表示目标偏好的权重向量作为条件输入到去中心化智能体网络中估计局部动作价值函数，使用并行架构的混合网络估计联合动作价值函数，并采用探索引导方法提高最终非支配解的均匀性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效解决多目标多智能体协作决策问题，生成帕累托集的近似解，在所有四种评估指标上显著优于基线方法，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: MO-MIX方法成功解决了多目标多智能体强化学习问题，为复杂现实世界决策场景提供了有效的解决方案，在性能和计算效率方面均有优势。

title: Non-Local Extremum Seeking Based on the Divergence Theorem
summary: We propose a new design strategy for extremum seeking control for a multi-dimensional single-integrator system in the presence of local extrema. The proposed method employs suitably designed sinusoidal dither signals, which force the single-integrator to a spherical motion. Over time, this spherical motion gives approximate access to an integral of the objective function over a sphere. Using the divergence theorem, we identify the integral over the sphere as the gradient of an integral over the enclosed ball. This integral over the ball defines a locally averaged objective function. The proposed extremum seeking method drives the system state into the gradient direction of the averaged objective function. Such a local average of the objective function can eliminate undesired local extrema and is therefore beneficial for global optimization. Under the assumption that the averaged objective function has no undesired critical points, we prove practical asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system. Our theoretical analysis takes sufficiently small $L_\infty$-measurement errors of the objective function into account.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对多维单积分器系统的极值搜索控制新方法，通过正弦抖动信号产生球面运动，利用球面积分近似目标函数梯度，实现全局优化。
AI.motivation: 传统极值搜索方法在存在局部极值时可能陷入局部最优，需要设计能够避免局部极值、实现全局优化的控制策略。
AI.method: 使用设计好的正弦抖动信号驱动单积分器系统产生球面运动，通过球面积分近似目标函数梯度，利用散度定理将球面积分转化为梯度方向，驱动系统向局部平均目标函数的梯度方向移动。
AI.result: 证明了在假设局部平均目标函数没有不良临界点的条件下，闭环系统具有实际渐近稳定性，并考虑了目标函数的L∞测量误差。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够消除不良局部极值，有利于全局优化，为存在局部极值的多维单积分器系统提供了有效的极值搜索控制策略。

title: Phase-Type Variational Autoencoders for Heavy-Tailed Data
summary:
Heavy-tailed distributions are ubiquitous in real-world data, where rare but extreme events dominate risk and variability. However, standard Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) employ simple decoder distributions (e.g., Gaussian) that fail to capture heavy-tailed behavior, while existing heavy-tail-aware extensions remain restricted to predefined parametric families whose tail behavior is fixed a priori.
  We propose the Phase-Type Variational Autoencoder (PH-VAE), whose decoder distribution is a latent-conditioned Phase-Type (PH) distribution defined as the absorption time of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC). This formulation composes multiple exponential time scales, yielding a flexible and analytically tractable decoder that adapts its tail behavior directly from the observed data. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PH-VAE accurately recovers diverse heavy-tailed distributions, significantly outperforming Gaussian, Student-t, and extreme-value-based VAE decoders in modeling tail behavior and extreme quantiles. In multivariate settings, PH-VAE captures realistic cross-dimensional tail dependence through its shared latent representation. To our knowledge, this is the first work to integrate Phase-Type distributions into deep generative modeling, bridging applied probability and representation learning.

AI.tldr: PH-VAE使用相型分布作为解码器，能够从数据中自适应学习重尾行为，显著优于传统VAE解码器。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据普遍存在重尾分布，极端事件主导风险和变异性。传统VAE使用高斯等简单解码器分布无法捕捉重尾行为，现有重尾感知扩展仅限于预定义参数族，尾部行为固定。
AI.method: 提出相型变分自编码器(PH-VAE)，其解码器分布是潜变量条件的相型分布，定义为连续时间马尔可夫链的吸收时间。该公式组合多个指数时间尺度，产生灵活且解析可处理的解码器，直接从观测数据自适应尾部行为。
AI.result: 在合成和现实世界基准测试中，PH-VAE准确恢复多样重尾分布，在建模尾部行为和极端分位数方面显著优于高斯、学生t和极值基VAE解码器。在多变量设置中，PH-VAE通过共享潜表示捕捉现实跨维度尾部依赖。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次将相型分布集成到深度生成建模中的工作，桥接了应用概率和表示学习。PH-VAE提供灵活且解析可处理的解码器，能够从数据中自适应学习重尾行为。

title: A Unified Framework to Quantify Cultural Intelligence of AI
summary: As generative AI technologies are increasingly being launched across the globe, assessing their competence to operate in different cultural contexts is exigently becoming a priority. While recent years have seen numerous and much-needed efforts on cultural benchmarking, these efforts have largely focused on specific aspects of culture and evaluation. While these efforts contribute to our understanding of cultural competence, a unified and systematic evaluation approach is needed for us as a field to comprehensively assess diverse cultural dimensions at scale. Drawing on measurement theory, we present a principled framework to aggregate multifaceted indicators of cultural capabilities into a unified assessment of cultural intelligence. We start by developing a working definition of culture that includes identifying core domains of culture. We then introduce a broad-purpose, systematic, and extensible framework for assessing cultural intelligence of AI systems. Drawing on theoretical framing from psychometric measurement validity theory, we decouple the background concept (i.e., cultural intelligence) from its operationalization via measurement. We conceptualize cultural intelligence as a suite of core capabilities spanning diverse domains, which we then operationalize through a set of indicators designed for reliable measurement. Finally, we identify the considerations, challenges, and research pathways to meaningfully measure these indicators, specifically focusing on data collection, probing strategies, and evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于测量理论的系统框架，用于评估AI系统的文化智能，将多方面的文化能力指标聚合为统一的评估体系。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI技术在全球部署，评估其在不同文化背景下的能力变得日益重要。现有的文化基准测试大多关注特定文化方面，缺乏统一、系统的评估方法。
AI.method: 基于测量理论，提出一个原则性框架：1) 定义文化概念并识别核心文化领域；2) 将文化智能概念化为跨越不同领域的核心能力套件；3) 通过一组为可靠测量设计的指标来操作化这些能力；4) 关注数据收集、探测策略和评估指标等具体实施考虑。
AI.result: 提出了一个广泛用途、系统化且可扩展的框架，用于评估AI系统的文化智能，将心理测量学中的测量效度理论与文化能力评估相结合。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为全面、大规模评估AI系统的文化维度提供了统一方法，指出了有意义测量这些指标所需的考虑因素、挑战和研究路径。

title: Quantifying Catastrophic Forgetting in IoT Intrusion Detection Systems
summary: Distribution shifts in attack patterns within RPL-based IoT networks pose a critical threat to the reliability and security of large-scale connected systems. Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) trained on static datasets often fail to generalize to unseen threats and suffer from catastrophic forgetting when updated with new attacks. Ensuring continual adaptability of IDS is therefore essential for maintaining robust IoT network defence. In this focused study, we formulate intrusion detection as a domain continual learning problem and propose a method-agnostic IDS framework that can integrate diverse continual learning strategies. We systematically benchmark five representative approaches across multiple domain-ordering sequences using a comprehensive multi-attack dataset comprising 48 domains. Results show that continual learning mitigates catastrophic forgetting while maintaining a balance between plasticity, stability, and efficiency, a crucial aspect for resource-constrained IoT environments. Among the methods, Replay-based approaches achieve the best overall performance, while Synaptic Intelligence (SI) delivers near-zero forgetting with high training efficiency, demonstrating strong potential for stable and sustainable IDS deployment in dynamic IoT networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个方法无关的持续学习IDS框架，用于解决RPL物联网网络中攻击模式分布偏移问题，系统评估了五种持续学习方法在48个攻击域上的表现。
AI.motivation: RPL物联网网络中攻击模式的分布偏移对大规模连接系统的可靠性和安全性构成严重威胁。基于静态数据集训练的入侵检测系统（IDS）往往无法泛化到未见过的威胁，并且在更新新攻击时会出现灾难性遗忘。因此，确保IDS的持续适应性对于维护强大的物联网网络防御至关重要。
AI.method: 将入侵检测制定为领域持续学习问题，并提出一个方法无关的IDS框架，可以集成多种持续学习策略。系统性地在多个领域排序序列上对五种代表性方法进行基准测试，使用包含48个领域的综合多攻击数据集。
AI.result: 持续学习缓解了灾难性遗忘，同时在可塑性、稳定性和效率之间保持平衡，这对资源受限的物联网环境至关重要。在方法中，基于重放的方法实现了最佳整体性能，而突触智能（SI）方法实现了接近零的遗忘和高训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习方法在动态物联网网络中展示了稳定和可持续IDS部署的强大潜力，特别是基于重放的方法和突触智能方法表现出色，为资源受限的物联网环境提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Constitutional Black-Box Monitoring for Scheming in LLM Agents
summary: Safe deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents in autonomous settings requires reliable oversight mechanisms. A central challenge is detecting scheming, where agents covertly pursue misaligned goals. One approach to mitigating such risks is LLM-based monitoring: using language models to examine agent behaviors for suspicious actions. We study constitutional black-box monitors: prompted classifiers that detect scheming using only externally observable inputs and outputs, optimized on synthetic data generated from natural-language behavior specifications. We introduce two pipelines for generating synthetic agent trajectories, STRIDE (iterative refinement) and Gloom (agent-environment simulation), from which we generate 1,000 samples each. We optimize frontier LLM monitors on these datasets via prompt sweeps, human refinement, and automated prompt optimization, and evaluate performance on 7,500 held-out trajectories from ControlArena, a suite of grounded environments where agents operate in more realistic contexts. Our results demonstrate that monitors selected purely on synthetic data can generalize to more realistic environments, capturing a meaningful scheming signal. However, we find that performance saturates quickly in our setting, with simple prompt sweeps matching the results of more extensive optimization. Pushing beyond this limit yields no further improvements and instead leads to overfitting.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM监控器检测AI代理恶意行为的有效性，发现基于合成数据训练的监控器能在真实环境中泛化，但性能很快饱和，过度优化会导致过拟合
AI.motivation: 在自主环境中安全部署LLM代理需要可靠的监督机制，核心挑战是检测"阴谋行为"（代理暗中追求不匹配的目标），需要研究基于LLM的监控方法
AI.method: 提出两种合成代理轨迹生成方法（STRIDE迭代精炼和Gloom代理环境模拟），生成2000个样本，通过提示词搜索、人工精炼和自动优化训练前沿LLM监控器，在ControlArena的7500个真实环境轨迹上评估
AI.result: 基于合成数据选择的监控器能在更真实环境中泛化，捕捉到有意义的阴谋信号，但性能很快饱和，简单提示词搜索与更广泛优化结果相当，过度优化会导致过拟合而无进一步改进
AI.conclusion: LLM监控器能有效检测代理的阴谋行为，但性能提升有限，过度优化反而有害，需要平衡合成数据训练与真实环境泛化能力

title: The Synthetic Web: Adversarially-Curated Mini-Internets for Diagnosing Epistemic Weaknesses of Language Agents
comment: Submitted to ICML 2026, currently under review
summary: Language agents increasingly act as web-enabled systems that search, browse, and synthesize information from diverse sources. However, these sources can include unreliable or adversarial content, and the robustness of agents to adversarial ranking - where misleading information appears prominently in search results - remains poorly understood. Existing benchmarks evaluate functional navigation or static factuality but cannot causally isolate this vulnerability, and current mitigation strategies for retrieval-augmented generation remain largely untested under such conditions. We introduce Synthetic Web Benchmark, a procedurally generated environment comprising thousands of hyperlinked articles with ground-truth labels for credibility and factuality, process-level interaction traces, and contamination filtering to eliminate training-data leakage. By injecting a single high-plausibility misinformation article into a controllable search rank, we measure the causal effect of adversarial exposure in six frontier models. The results reveal catastrophic failures: accuracy collapses despite unlimited access to truthful sources, with minimal search escalation and severe miscalibration. These findings expose fundamental limitations in how current frontier models handle conflicting information, with immediate implications for deployment in high-stakes domains. Our benchmark enables systematic analysis of these failure modes and provides a controlled testbed for evaluating mitigation strategies under adversarial ranking - a gap in current research. This work establishes a reproducible baseline for developing search-robust and epistemically humble agents capable of resisting manipulation in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Synthetic Web Benchmark，一个用于评估语言智能体在对抗性排名下鲁棒性的程序化生成环境，发现前沿模型在面对排名靠前的误导信息时会出现灾难性失败。
AI.motivation: 当前语言智能体越来越多地作为网络系统运行，从不同来源搜索、浏览和合成信息。然而，这些来源可能包含不可靠或对抗性内容，智能体对对抗性排名（误导信息在搜索结果中显著出现）的鲁棒性仍然了解不足。现有基准测试评估功能导航或静态事实性，但无法因果隔离这种脆弱性。
AI.method: 引入Synthetic Web Benchmark，这是一个程序化生成的环境，包含数千篇带有可信度和事实性真实标签的超链接文章、过程级交互轨迹和用于消除训练数据泄漏的污染过滤。通过将单个高可信度的虚假信息文章注入可控的搜索排名中，测量六个前沿模型在对抗性暴露下的因果效应。
AI.result: 结果揭示了灾难性失败：尽管可以无限制访问真实来源，但准确性仍然崩溃，搜索升级最小且校准严重错误。这些发现暴露了当前前沿模型处理冲突信息的基本局限性。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为开发搜索鲁棒且具有认识论谦逊的智能体建立了可重复的基线，使其能够在高风险领域中抵抗操纵。该基准测试能够系统分析这些失败模式，并为评估对抗性排名下的缓解策略提供了受控测试平台。

title: GPU-friendly and Linearly Convergent First-order Methods for Certifying Optimal $k$-sparse GLMs
comment: Extended version of the ICML 2025 conference paper
summary: We investigate the problem of certifying optimality for sparse generalized linear models (GLMs), where sparsity is enforced through a cardinality constraint. While Branch-and-Bound (BnB) frameworks can certify optimality using perspective relaxations, existing methods for solving these relaxations are computationally intensive, limiting their scalability. To address this challenge, we reformulate the relaxations as composite optimization problems and develop a unified proximal framework that is both linearly convergent and computationally efficient. Under specific geometric regularity conditions, our analysis links primal quadratic growth to dual quadratic decay, yielding error bounds that make the Fenchel duality gap a sharp proxy for progress towards the solution set. This leads to a duality gap-based restart scheme that upgrades a broad class of sublinear proximal methods to provably linearly convergent methods, and applies beyond the sparse GLM setting. For the implicit perspective regularizer, we further derive specialized routines to evaluate the regularizer and its proximal operator exactly in log-linear time, avoiding costly generic conic solvers. The resulting iterations are dominated by matrix--vector multiplications, which enables GPU acceleration. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show orders-of-magnitude faster dual-bound computations and substantially improved BnB scalability on large instances.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于稀疏广义线性模型最优性认证的统一近端框架，通过Fenchel对偶间隙重启方案将次线性方法提升为线性收敛方法，大幅提升分支定界算法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有用于稀疏广义线性模型最优性认证的分支定界框架中，基于透视松弛的方法计算代价高昂，限制了算法在大规模问题上的可扩展性。
AI.method: 将松弛问题重构为复合优化问题，开发统一近端框架；在特定几何正则条件下，通过分析原始二次增长与对偶二次衰减的关系，提出基于对偶间隙的重启方案；针对隐式透视正则化器，推导出对数线性时间计算正则化器及其近端算子的专用算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，在合成和真实数据集上，对偶边界计算速度提升数个数量级，分支定界算法在大规模实例上的可扩展性显著改善，迭代主要由矩阵-向量乘法主导，支持GPU加速。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一近端框架不仅解决了稀疏广义线性模型最优性认证的计算瓶颈，其基于对偶间隙的重启方案具有更广泛的适用性，可将一大类次线性近端方法提升为可证明线性收敛的方法。

title: Uncertainty Quantification of Click and Conversion Estimates for the Autobidding
comment: 17 pages (10 main text + 7 appendix), 5 figures, 2 tables
summary: Modern e-commerce platforms employ various auction mechanisms to allocate paid slots for a given item. To scale this approach to the millions of auctions, the platforms suggest promotion tools based on the autobidding algorithms. These algorithms typically depend on the Click-Through-Rate (CTR) and Conversion-Rate (CVR) estimates provided by a pre-trained machine learning model. However, the predictions of such models are uncertain and can significantly affect the performance of the autobidding algorithm. To address this issue, we propose the DenoiseBid method, which corrects the generated CTRs and CVRs to make the resulting bids more efficient in auctions. The underlying idea of our method is to employ a Bayesian approach and replace noisy CTR or CVR estimates with those from recovered distributions. To demonstrate the performance of the proposed approach, we perform extensive experiments on the synthetic, iPinYou, and BAT datasets. To evaluate the robustness of our approach to the noise scale, we use synthetic noise and noise estimated from the predictions of the pre-trained machine learning model.

AI.tldr: 提出DenoiseBid方法，通过贝叶斯方法校正CTR和CVR估计值，提升自动竞价算法在电商拍卖中的效率
AI.motivation: 电商平台依赖预训练机器学习模型提供的CTR和CVR估计值进行自动竞价，但这些预测存在不确定性，会显著影响竞价算法性能
AI.method: 提出DenoiseBid方法，采用贝叶斯方法，用恢复分布中的估计值替换有噪声的CTR或CVR估计值
AI.result: 在合成数据集、iPinYou数据集和BAT数据集上进行了广泛实验，评估了方法对噪声尺度的鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: DenoiseBid方法能有效校正CTR和CVR估计值，使竞价在拍卖中更高效，提升了自动竞价算法的性能

title: Sovereign AI-based Public Services are Viable and Affordable
summary: The rapid expansion of AI-based remote services has intensified debates about the long-term implications of growing structural concentration in infrastructure and expertise. As AI capabilities become increasingly intertwined with geopolitical interests, the availability and reliability of foundational AI services can no longer be taken for granted. This issue is particularly pressing for AI-enabled public services for citizens, as governments and public agencies are progressively adopting 24/7 AI-driven support systems typically operated through commercial offerings from a small oligopoly of global technology providers.
