This paper challenges the prevailing assumption that general-purpose architectures, offered by these providers, are the optimal choice for all application contexts. Through practical experimentation, we demonstrate that viable and cost-effective alternatives exist. Alternatives that align with principles of digital and cultural sovereignty. Our findings provide an empirical illustration that sovereign AI-based public services are both technically feasible and economically sustainable, capable of operating effectively on premises with modest computational and financial resources while maintaining cultural and digital autonomy. The technical insights and deployment lessons reported here are intended to inform the adoption of similar sovereign AI public services by national agencies and governments worldwide.

AI.tldr: 论文挑战了通用AI架构适用于所有场景的假设，通过实验证明存在可行且经济的主权AI替代方案，能在有限资源下保持数字和文化自主。
AI.motivation: 随着AI服务日益集中化并被少数全球科技巨头垄断，特别是政府公共服务的AI化依赖这些商业产品，引发了数字主权和文化自主的担忧。论文旨在挑战通用架构最优的普遍假设。
AI.method: 通过实际实验和部署实践，探索主权AI公共服务的替代方案，评估其在有限计算和财务资源下的技术可行性和经济可持续性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，主权AI公共服务在技术上可行且经济上可持续，能够在本地基础设施上有效运行，同时保持文化和数字自主权。
AI.conclusion: 主权AI公共服务是可行的替代方案，论文的技术见解和部署经验可为各国政府和公共机构采用类似主权AI服务提供参考。

title: Deep Learning-Based Meat Freshness Detection with Segmentation and OOD-Aware Classification
summary: In this study, we present a meat freshness classification framework from Red-Green-Blue (RGB) images that supports both packaged and unpackaged meat datasets. The system classifies four in-distribution (ID) meat classes and uses an out-of-distribution (OOD)-aware abstention mechanism that flags low-confidence samples as No Result. The pipeline combines U-Net-based segmentation with deep feature classifiers. Segmentation is used as a preprocessing step to isolate the meat region and reduce background, producing more consistent inputs for classification. The segmentation module achieved an Intersection over Union (IoU) of 75% and a Dice coefficient of 82%, producing standardized inputs for the classification stage. For classification, we benchmark five backbones: Residual Network-50 (ResNet-50), Vision Transformer-Base/16 (ViT-B/16), Swin Transformer-Tiny (Swin-T), EfficientNet-B0, and MobileNetV3-Small. We use nested 5x3 cross-validation (CV) for model selection and hyperparameter tuning. On the held-out ID test set, EfficientNet-B0 achieves the highest accuracy (98.10%), followed by ResNet-50 and MobileNetV3-Small (both 97.63%) and Swin-T (97.51%), while ViT-B/16 is lower (94.42%). We additionally evaluate OOD scoring and thresholding using standard OOD metrics and sensitivity analysis over the abstention threshold. Finally, we report on-device latency using TensorFlow Lite (TFLite) on a smartphone, highlighting practical accuracy-latency trade-offs for future deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于RGB图像的肉类新鲜度分类框架，支持包装和未包装肉类数据集，结合分割预处理和深度特征分类器，采用OOD感知弃权机制处理低置信度样本。
AI.motivation: 开发一个实用的肉类新鲜度分类系统，能够同时处理包装和未包装的肉类，通过分割减少背景干扰，并引入OOD感知机制提高系统在实际应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 使用U-Net进行分割预处理以隔离肉类区域，然后采用五种不同骨干网络（ResNet-50、ViT-B/16、Swin-T、EfficientNet-B0、MobileNetV3-Small）进行特征提取和分类，通过嵌套5x3交叉验证进行模型选择和超参数调优。
AI.result: 分割模块IoU达到75%，Dice系数82%；分类任务中EfficientNet-B0表现最佳（98.10%准确率），ResNet-50和MobileNetV3-Small均为97.63%，Swin-T为97.51%，ViT-B/16最低（94.42%）；系统还评估了OOD评分和阈值设置，并测量了智能手机上的实时延迟。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了高精度的肉类新鲜度分类，分割预处理提高了分类一致性，OOD感知机制增强了系统可靠性，同时考虑了实际部署中的准确率-延迟权衡，为移动端应用提供了实用解决方案。

title: Learning Nested Named Entity Recognition from Flat Annotations
comment: Accepted at EACL 2026, 15 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables
summary: Nested named entity recognition identifies entities contained within other entities, but requires expensive multi-level annotation. While flat NER corpora exist abundantly, nested resources remain scarce. We investigate whether models can learn nested structure from flat annotations alone, evaluating four approaches: string inclusions (substring matching), entity corruption (pseudo-nested data), flat neutralization (reducing false negative signal), and a hybrid fine-tuned + LLM pipeline. On NEREL, a Russian benchmark with 29 entity types where 21% of entities are nested, our best combined method achieves 26.37% inner F1, closing 40% of the gap to full nested supervision. Code is available at https://github.com/fulstock/Learning-from-Flat-Annotations.

AI.tldr: 研究探索仅使用平面标注学习嵌套命名实体识别的方法，在俄语NEREL基准上，最佳方法达到26.37%的内部F1分数，填补了40%的全监督差距。
AI.motivation: 嵌套命名实体识别需要昂贵的多层标注，而平面NER语料库丰富但嵌套资源稀缺。研究旨在探索模型能否仅从平面标注中学习嵌套结构。
AI.method: 评估了四种方法：字符串包含（子串匹配）、实体破坏（伪嵌套数据）、平面中性化（减少假阴性信号）以及混合微调+LLM流水线。
AI.result: 在NEREL俄语基准（29个实体类型，21%实体嵌套）上，最佳组合方法达到26.37%的内部F1分数，填补了40%的全监督差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明仅使用平面标注学习嵌套结构是可行的，为资源稀缺的嵌套NER任务提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: MetaMind: General and Cognitive World Models in Multi-Agent Systems by Meta-Theory of Mind
summary: A major challenge for world models in multi-agent systems is to understand interdependent agent dynamics, predict interactive multi-agent trajectories, and plan over long horizons with collective awareness, without centralized supervision or explicit communication. In this paper, MetaMind, a general and cognitive world model for multi-agent systems that leverages a novel meta-theory of mind (Meta-ToM) framework, is proposed. Through MetaMind, each agent learns not only to predict and plan over its own beliefs, but also to inversely reason goals and beliefs from its own behavior trajectories. This self-reflective, bidirectional inference loop enables each agent to learn a metacognitive ability in a self-supervised manner. Then, MetaMind is shown to generalize the metacognitive ability from first-person to third-person through analogical reasoning. Thus, in multi-agent systems, each agent with MetaMind can actively reason about goals and beliefs of other agents from limited, observable behavior trajectories in a zero-shot manner, and then adapt to emergent collective intention without an explicit communication mechanism. Extended simulation results on diverse multi-agent tasks demonstrate that MetaMind can achieve superior task performance and outperform baselines in few-shot multi-agent generalization.

AI.tldr: MetaMind是一个多智能体系统的认知世界模型，通过元心理理论框架实现自我反思的双向推理，使智能体能够零样本推断其他智能体的目标和信念，无需显式通信。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中的主要挑战包括理解相互依赖的智能体动态、预测交互轨迹、在集体意识下进行长期规划，而无需集中监督或显式通信。现有方法难以实现这些目标。
AI.method: 提出MetaMind模型，采用元心理理论框架：1）每个智能体学习预测和规划自身信念；2）从自身行为轨迹反向推理目标和信念，形成自我反思的双向推理循环；3）通过类比推理将元认知能力从第一人称推广到第三人称。
AI.result: 在多样化多智能体任务上的扩展模拟结果表明，MetaMind能够实现优越的任务性能，在少样本多智能体泛化方面优于基线方法，智能体能够零样本推断其他智能体的目标和信念。
AI.conclusion: MetaMind通过元心理理论框架使智能体获得元认知能力，能够在多智能体系统中无需显式通信而适应涌现的集体意图，为多智能体系统提供了有效的认知世界模型。

title: Constrained Particle Seeking: Solving Diffusion Inverse Problems with Just Forward Passes
summary: Diffusion models have gained prominence as powerful generative tools for solving inverse problems due to their ability to model complex data distributions. However, existing methods typically rely on complete knowledge of the forward observation process to compute gradients for guided sampling, limiting their applicability in scenarios where such information is unavailable. In this work, we introduce \textbf{\emph{Constrained Particle Seeking (CPS)}}, a novel gradient-free approach that leverages all candidate particle information to actively search for the optimal particle while incorporating constraints aligned with high-density regions of the unconditional prior. Unlike previous methods that passively select promising candidates, CPS reformulates the inverse problem as a constrained optimization task, enabling more flexible and efficient particle seeking. We demonstrate that CPS can effectively solve both image and scientific inverse problems, achieving results comparable to gradient-based methods while significantly outperforming gradient-free alternatives. Code is available at https://github.com/deng-ai-lab/CPS.

AI.tldr: 提出CPS方法，一种无需梯度的扩散模型逆问题求解框架，通过约束优化主动搜索最优粒子
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的逆问题求解方法需要完整的正向观测过程知识来计算梯度，限制了在缺乏此类信息场景下的应用
AI.method: 提出约束粒子搜索(CPS)方法，将逆问题重构为约束优化任务，利用所有候选粒子信息主动搜索最优粒子，同时结合无条件先验的高密度区域约束
AI.result: CPS能有效解决图像和科学逆问题，达到与基于梯度方法相当的效果，并显著优于其他无需梯度的方法
AI.conclusion: CPS提供了一种灵活高效的无需梯度逆问题求解框架，扩展了扩散模型在缺乏正向过程信息场景下的应用能力

title: LLMs as Strategic Actors: Behavioral Alignment, Risk Calibration, and Argumentation Framing in Geopolitical Simulations
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed as agents in strategic decision environments, yet their behavior in structured geopolitical simulations remains under-researched. We evaluate six popular state-of-the-art LLMs alongside results from human results across four real-world crisis simulation scenarios, requiring models to select predefined actions and justify their decisions across multiple rounds. We compare models to humans in action alignment, risk calibration through chosen actions' severity, and argumentative framing grounded in international relations theory. Results show that models approximate human decision patterns in base simulation rounds but diverge over time, displaying distinct behavioural profiles and strategy updates. LLM explanations for chosen actions across all models exhibit a strong normative-cooperative framing centered on stability, coordination, and risk mitigation, with limited adversarial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 评估6个主流LLM在4个真实世界危机模拟场景中的战略决策表现，与人类参与者对比行动选择、风险校准和论证框架
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多地被提议作为战略决策环境中的智能体，但它们在结构化地缘政治模拟中的行为研究不足，需要了解LLM在复杂战略环境中的决策模式
AI.method: 使用6个最先进的LLM和人类参与者，在4个真实世界危机模拟场景中进行多轮测试，要求模型选择预定义行动并解释决策，比较行动一致性、风险校准和基于国际关系理论的论证框架
AI.result: LLM在基础模拟轮次中近似人类决策模式，但随时间推移出现分歧，表现出不同的行为特征和策略更新；所有LLM的行动解释都表现出强烈的规范-合作框架，强调稳定性、协调和风险缓解，对抗性推理有限
AI.conclusion: LLM在地缘政治模拟中表现出与人类不同的行为模式，其决策解释偏向规范合作框架，这为LLM作为战略决策代理的应用提供了重要参考

title: Improving Full Waveform Inversion in Large Model Era
summary: Full Waveform Inversion (FWI) is a highly nonlinear and ill-posed problem that aims to recover subsurface velocity maps from surface-recorded seismic waveforms data. Existing data-driven FWI typically uses small models, as available datasets have limited volume, geological diversity, and spatial extent, leading to substantial concerns about overfitting. Although they perform well on synthetic datasets, current methods fail to generalize to more realistic geological structures. In this work, we show that a model trained entirely on simulated and relatively simple data can generalize remarkably well to challenging and unseen geological benchmarks. We provide a working recipe that tames a billion-parameter model for FWI through coordinated scaling across three axes: model capacity, data diversity, and training strategy. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on OpenFWI and significantly narrows the generalization gap in data-driven FWI. Across six challenging geophysical benchmarks, including Marmousi, 2D SEG/EAGE Salt and Overthrust, 2004 BP, Sigsbee, and SEAM Phase I, it infers complex structures absent from the training set and delivers significant performance improvements (SSIM from 0.5844 to 0.7669). Overall, our results demonstrate that with an appropriate scaling strategy, large models trained on simple synthetic data can achieve substantial generalization to more complex and realistic geological structures.

AI.tldr: 通过协调扩展模型容量、数据多样性和训练策略，训练在简单合成数据上的十亿参数模型能显著泛化到复杂地质结构，缩小数据驱动全波形反演的泛化差距。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的全波形反演方法通常使用小模型，由于可用数据集有限、地质多样性不足和空间范围小，存在严重的过拟合问题。虽然这些方法在合成数据集上表现良好，但无法泛化到更现实的地质结构。
AI.method: 提出一个工作配方，通过协调扩展三个轴来驯服用于FWI的十亿参数模型：模型容量、数据多样性和训练策略。模型完全在模拟和相对简单的数据上训练。
AI.result: 模型在OpenFWI上达到最先进性能，显著缩小了数据驱动FWI的泛化差距。在六个具有挑战性的地球物理基准测试中，包括Marmousi、2D SEG/EAGE Salt和Overthrust、2004 BP、Sigsbee和SEAM Phase I，它推断出训练集中不存在的复杂结构，并带来显著的性能改进（SSIM从0.5844提升到0.7669）。
AI.conclusion: 通过适当的扩展策略，在简单合成数据上训练的大型模型可以实现对更复杂和现实地质结构的显著泛化，为解决全波形反演的泛化问题提供了有效途径。

title: MedGPT-oss: Training a General-Purpose Vision-Language Model for Biomedicine
summary: Biomedical multimodal assistants have the potential to unify radiology, pathology, and clinical-text reasoning, yet a critical deployment gap remains: top-performing systems are either closed-source or computationally prohibitive, precluding the on-premises deployment required for patient privacy and PHI compliance. We introduce MEDGPT-OSS, an open-weight, 20B-parameter generalist vision-language model designed to facilitate open research in clinical AI. Rather than relying on architectural complexity, MEDGPT-OSS pairs the GPT-oss language backbone with a visual front-end via a optimized, three-stage training curriculum. By progressively domain-adapting these modules through rigorous data curation and long-context multimodal alignment, we demonstrate that a 20B model can bridge the capacity gap. It successfully outperforms larger open medical models on out-of-distribution (OOD) multimodal reasoning and complex text-only clinical tasks. By unifying diverse modalities under a single instruction-following interface, MEDGPT-OSS maintains a parameter-efficient footprint fully compatible with commodity GPUs. We release the complete training recipe, open-weight checkpoints, and a rigorous evaluation harness to serve as a verifiable foundation for privacy-preserving, institution-specific clinical AI research.

AI.tldr: MEDGPT-OSS是一个开源的20B参数通用视觉语言模型，专为临床AI研究设计，在保持参数效率的同时，在跨模态推理和复杂临床文本任务上超越了更大的开源医疗模型。
AI.motivation: 当前顶级生物医学多模态助手要么闭源，要么计算成本过高，无法满足患者隐私和PHI合规所需的本地部署要求，这阻碍了临床AI的开放研究。
AI.method: 采用GPT-oss语言骨干与视觉前端配对，通过优化的三阶段训练课程进行渐进式领域适应，包括严格的数据筛选和长上下文多模态对齐。
AI.result: 20B参数的MEDGPT-OSS在分布外多模态推理和复杂纯文本临床任务上超越了更大的开源医疗模型，同时保持参数效率，完全兼容商用GPU。
AI.conclusion: MEDGPT-OSS为隐私保护、机构特定的临床AI研究提供了可验证的基础，通过统一多模态接口和开源完整训练方案，填补了临床AI部署的空白。

title: MC-Search: Evaluating and Enhancing Multimodal Agentic Search with Structured Long Reasoning Chains
summary: With the increasing demand for step-wise, cross-modal, and knowledge-grounded reasoning, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are evolving beyond the traditional fixed retrieve-then-generate paradigm toward more sophisticated agentic multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (MM-RAG). Existing benchmarks, however, mainly focus on simplified QA with short retrieval chains, leaving adaptive planning and multimodal reasoning underexplored. We present MC-Search, the first benchmark for agentic MM-RAG with long, step-wise annotated reasoning chains spanning five representative reasoning structures. Each example specifies sub-questions, retrieval modalities, supporting facts, and intermediate answers, with fidelity ensured by HAVE (Hop-wise Attribution and Verification of Evidence), resulting in 3,333 high-quality examples averaging 3.7 hops. Beyond answer accuracy, MC-Search introduces new process-level metrics for reasoning quality, stepwise retrieval and planning accuracy. By developing a unified agentic MM-RAG pipeline, we benchmark six leading MLLMs and reveal systematic issues such as over- and under-retrieval and modality-misaligned planning. Finally, we introduce Search-Align, a process-supervised fine-tuning framework leveraging verified reasoning chains, showing that our data not only enables faithful evaluation but also improves planning and retrieval fidelity in open-source MLLMs.

AI.tldr: MC-Search是首个用于代理式多模态检索增强生成（MM-RAG）的基准测试，包含3,333个高质量多跳推理链示例，平均3.7跳，并引入了过程级评估指标。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）正从传统的固定检索-生成范式向更复杂的代理式MM-RAG演进，但现有基准主要关注简化的QA和短检索链，缺乏对自适应规划和多模态推理的深入评估。
AI.method: 1) 构建MC-Search基准，包含5种代表性推理结构的步进式标注推理链，每个示例指定子问题、检索模态、支持事实和中间答案；2) 使用HAVE（逐跳归因和证据验证）确保数据保真度；3) 开发统一的代理式MM-RAG流水线；4) 引入Search-Align，一个利用已验证推理链进行过程监督微调的框架。
AI.result: 1) 创建了包含3,333个高质量示例的基准，平均3.7跳；2) 评估了6个领先的MLLMs，揭示了系统性问题（如过度/不足检索和模态错位规划）；3) Search-Align框架显示，使用验证过的推理链数据不仅能实现忠实评估，还能提升开源MLLMs的规划和检索保真度。
AI.conclusion: MC-Search填补了代理式MM-RAG评估的空白，提供了首个具有长步进推理链的基准。通过过程级指标和Search-Align框架，该工作不仅能够更全面地评估MLLMs的推理能力，还能有效提升模型的规划和检索性能。

title: LOTUS: A Warm-Start Framework for Powering Dual Decomposition in Large-Scale Two-Stage Stochastic Programs
summary: Solving large two-stage stochastic mixed-integer programs is computationally challenging. We propose LOTUS, a subset-based warm-start framework that enhances Dual Decomposition under fixed time budgets. By initializing the dual search with informed multipliers, LOTUS accelerates primal convergence and partially alleviates the impact of weak LP relaxations. Through an extensive computational study on production planning instances, we show that, within two hours, LOTUS yields significantly better primal solutions in 45.83% of cases, while being outperformed by Dual Decomposition in only 4.17%.

AI.tldr: LOTUS是一个基于子集的预热启动框架，用于加速两阶段随机混合整数规划的求解，通过初始化对偶搜索来提升原始收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模两阶段随机混合整数规划在计算上具有挑战性，传统对偶分解方法在固定时间预算下收敛缓慢，且受弱线性规划松弛影响较大。
AI.method: 提出LOTUS框架，采用基于子集的预热启动策略，通过初始化有信息的乘子来增强对偶分解，加速原始收敛并部分缓解弱线性规划松弛的影响。
AI.result: 在生产规划实例上的计算研究表明，在2小时时间预算内，LOTUS在45.83%的情况下获得显著更好的原始解，而仅在对偶分解表现更好的情况下占4.17%。
AI.conclusion: LOTUS框架能有效提升两阶段随机混合整数规划在固定时间预算下的求解性能，为实际应用提供了一种高效的解决方案。

title: Accelerating Single-Pass SGD for Generalized Linear Prediction
summary: We study generalized linear prediction under a streaming setting, where each iteration uses only one fresh data point for a gradient-level update. While momentum is well-established in deterministic optimization, a fundamental open question is whether it can accelerate such single-pass non-quadratic stochastic optimization. We propose the first algorithm that successfully incorporates momentum via a novel data-dependent proximal method, achieving dual-momentum acceleration. Our derived excess risk bound decomposes into three components: an improved optimization error, a minimax optimal statistical error, and a higher-order model-misspecification error. The proof handles mis-specification via a fine-grained stationary analysis of inner updates, while localizing statistical error through a two-phase outer-loop analysis. As a result, we resolve the open problem posed by Jain et al. [2018a] and demonstrate that momentum acceleration is more effective than variance reduction for generalized linear prediction in the streaming setting.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个在流式广义线性预测中成功融入动量的算法，通过数据依赖的近端方法实现双动量加速，解决了Jain等人2018年提出的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 在流式设置下，每次迭代只使用一个新数据点进行梯度级更新。虽然动量在确定性优化中已很成熟，但在单次遍历的非二次随机优化中是否能加速仍是一个基本开放问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种新颖的数据依赖近端方法，成功融入动量，实现双动量加速。通过精细的内更新平稳性分析处理模型误设，通过两阶段外循环分析定位统计误差。
AI.result: 推导出的超额风险界分解为三个部分：改进的优化误差、极小极大最优统计误差和高阶模型误设误差。证明动量加速在流式广义线性预测中比方差缩减更有效。
AI.conclusion: 解决了Jain等人2018年提出的开放问题，证明了动量加速在流式广义线性预测中的有效性，且比方差缩减方法更优越。

title: CHIMERA: Compact Synthetic Data for Generalizable LLM Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently exhibited remarkable reasoning capabilities, largely enabled by supervised fine-tuning (SFT)- and reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training on high-quality reasoning data. However, reproducing and extending these capabilities in open and scalable settings is hindered by three fundamental data-centric challenges: (1) the cold-start problem, arising from the lack of seed datasets with detailed, long Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories needed to initialize reasoning policies; (2) limited domain coverage, as most existing open-source reasoning datasets are concentrated in mathematics, with limited coverage of broader scientific disciplines; and (3) the annotation bottleneck, where the difficulty of frontier-level reasoning tasks makes reliable human annotation prohibitively expensive or infeasible. To address these challenges, we introduce CHIMERA, a compact synthetic reasoning dataset comprising 9K samples for generalizable cross-domain reasoning. CHIMERA is constructed with three key properties: (1) it provides rich, long CoT reasoning trajectories synthesized by state-of-the-art reasoning models; (2) it has broad and structured coverage, spanning 8 major scientific disciplines and over 1K fine-grained topics organized via a model-generated hierarchical taxonomy; and (3) it employs a fully automated, scalable evaluation pipeline that uses strong reasoning models to cross-validate both problem validity and answer correctness. We use CHIMERA to post-train a 4B Qwen3 model. Despite the dataset's modest size, the resulting model achieves strong performance on a suite of challenging reasoning benchmarks, including GPQA-Diamond, AIME 24/25/26, HMMT 25, and Humanity's Last Exam, approaching or matching the reasoning performance of substantially larger models such as DeepSeek-R1 and Qwen3-235B.

AI.tldr: CHIMERA是一个紧凑的合成推理数据集，解决了LLM推理能力开发中的三个数据挑战：冷启动问题、领域覆盖有限和标注瓶颈，通过9K样本实现了跨领域泛化推理。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理能力开发面临三个核心数据挑战：1) 缺乏详细的CoT轨迹种子数据集（冷启动问题）；2) 现有开源推理数据集主要集中在数学领域，其他科学领域覆盖有限；3) 前沿推理任务的人工标注成本过高或不可行（标注瓶颈）。
AI.method: 构建CHIMERA数据集，具有三个关键特性：1) 使用最先进推理模型合成丰富的长CoT推理轨迹；2) 覆盖8个主要科学领域和1000+细粒度主题，通过模型生成的层次分类法组织；3) 采用全自动可扩展评估流程，使用强推理模型交叉验证问题有效性和答案正确性。
AI.result: 使用CHIMERA对4B参数的Qwen3模型进行后训练，尽管数据集规模不大，但模型在多个挑战性推理基准测试（GPQA-Diamond、AIME 24/25/26、HMMT 25、Humanity's Last Exam）上表现优异，接近或匹配DeepSeek-R1和Qwen3-235B等更大模型的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: CHIMERA证明了通过精心设计的合成数据集可以有效解决LLM推理能力开发中的数据挑战，即使使用相对较小的数据集也能显著提升模型的跨领域推理能力，为开放和可扩展的推理模型开发提供了新途径。

title: BioProAgent: Neuro-Symbolic Grounding for Constrained Scientific Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant reasoning capabilities in scientific discovery but struggle to bridge the gap to physical execution in wet-labs. In these irreversible environments, probabilistic hallucinations are not merely incorrect, but also cause equipment damage or experimental failure. To address this, we propose \textbf{BioProAgent}, a neuro-symbolic framework that anchors probabilistic planning in a deterministic Finite State Machine (FSM). We introduce a State-Augmented Planning mechanism that enforces a rigorous \textit{Design-Verify-Rectify} workflow, ensuring hardware compliance before execution. Furthermore, we address the context bottleneck inherent in complex device schemas by \textit{Semantic Symbol Grounding}, reducing token consumption by $\sim$6$\times$ through symbolic abstraction. In the extended BioProBench benchmark, BioProAgent achieves 95.6\% physical compliance (compared to 21.0\% for ReAct), demonstrating that neuro-symbolic constraints are essential for reliable autonomy in irreversible physical environments. \footnote{Code at https://github.com/YuyangSunshine/bioproagent and project at https://yuyangsunshine.github.io/BioPro-Project/}

AI.tldr: BioProAgent是一个神经符号框架，通过有限状态机锚定概率规划，确保湿实验室环境中的物理合规性，减少幻觉风险
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在科学发现中展现推理能力，但在湿实验室等不可逆物理环境中，概率性幻觉可能导致设备损坏或实验失败，需要确保物理合规性
AI.method: 提出神经符号框架BioProAgent，采用状态增强规划机制强制执行设计-验证-修正工作流，并通过语义符号接地减少复杂设备模式的上下文瓶颈
AI.result: 在扩展的BioProBench基准测试中，BioProAgent达到95.6%的物理合规率（相比ReAct的21.0%），令牌消耗减少约6倍
AI.conclusion: 神经符号约束对于不可逆物理环境中的可靠自主性至关重要，BioProAgent通过确定性有限状态机锚定概率规划，确保硬件合规性

title: Block-coordinate Plug-And-Play Methods with Armijo-like line-search for Image Restoration
summary: In this paper, we develop a class of block-coordinate Plug-and-Play (PnP) methods to address imaging inverse problems. The block-coordinate strategy is designed to reduce the high memory consumption arising in PnP methods that rely on Gradient Step denoisers, whose implementation typically requires storing large computational graphs. The proposed methods are based on a block-coordinate forward-backward framework for solving non-convex and non-separable composite optimization problems. Furthermore, such methods allow for the joint use of inertial acceleration, variable metric strategies, inexact proximal computations, and adaptive steplength selection via an appropriate line-search procedure. Under mild assumptions on the objective function, we establish a sublinear convergence rate and the stationarity of the limit points. Moreover, convergence of the entire sequence of the iterates is guaranteed under a Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz assumption. Numerical experiments on ill-posed imaging problems, including deblurring and super-resolution, demonstrate that the proposed PnP approach achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction quality while substantially reducing GPU memory requirements, making it particularly suitable for large-scale and resource-constrained imaging applications.

AI.tldr: 提出基于块坐标的Plug-and-Play方法，通过分块处理降低内存消耗，结合惯性加速、变度量策略等技术，在图像反问题中实现高质量重建并显著减少GPU内存需求。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP方法使用梯度步去噪器时会产生大量计算图，导致高内存消耗，限制了在大规模图像处理中的应用。需要开发内存效率更高的PnP方法。
AI.method: 提出块坐标PnP方法，基于块坐标前向后向框架解决非凸非可分离复合优化问题。结合惯性加速、变度量策略、近似近端计算和自适应步长选择（线搜索）。
AI.result: 在温和假设下证明次线性收敛率和极限点的平稳性，在Kurdyka-Łojasiewicz假设下保证整个迭代序列收敛。数值实验显示在去模糊和超分辨率等病态成像问题中达到最先进的重建质量，同时显著降低GPU内存需求。
AI.conclusion: 块坐标PnP方法有效解决了传统PnP方法的内存瓶颈问题，在保持高质量重建的同时大幅降低计算资源需求，特别适合大规模和资源受限的成像应用。

title: Noise-Calibrated Inference from Differentially Private Sufficient Statistics in Exponential Families
summary: Many differentially private (DP) data release systems either output DP synthetic data and leave analysts to perform inference as usual, which can lead to severe miscalibration, or output a DP point estimate without a principled way to do uncertainty quantification. This paper develops a clean and tractable middle ground for exponential families: release only DP sufficient statistics, then perform noise-calibrated likelihood-based inference and optional parametric synthetic data generation as post-processing. Our contributions are: (1) a general recipe for approximate-DP release of clipped sufficient statistics under the Gaussian mechanism; (2) asymptotic normality, explicit variance inflation, and valid Wald-style confidence intervals for the plug-in DP MLE; (3) a noise-aware likelihood correction that is first-order equivalent to the plug-in but supports bootstrap-based intervals; and (4) a matching minimax lower bound showing the privacy distortion rate is unavoidable. The resulting theory yields concrete design rules and a practical pipeline for releasing DP synthetic data with principled uncertainty quantification, validated on three exponential families and real census data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种差分隐私数据发布新方法：仅发布DP充分统计量，然后进行噪声校准的似然推断和可选参数化合成数据生成
AI.motivation: 现有DP数据发布系统要么输出DP合成数据（导致推断严重失准），要么输出DP点估计（缺乏不确定性量化方法），需要中间解决方案
AI.method: 1) 高斯机制下剪裁充分统计量的近似DP发布通用方法；2) 基于DP MLE的渐近正态性和Wald置信区间；3) 噪声感知似然校正支持bootstrap区间；4) 匹配极小极大下界证明隐私失真率不可避免
AI.result: 为指数族提供了具体设计规则和实用流程，在三个指数族和真实人口普查数据上验证有效，支持DP合成数据发布和不确定性量化
AI.conclusion: 该方法在DP数据发布中提供了干净可处理的中间路径，仅发布DP充分统计量，支持噪声校准推断和参数化合成数据生成，具有理论保证和实用价值

title: TENG-BC: Unified Time-Evolving Natural Gradient for Neural PDE Solvers with General Boundary Conditions
summary: Accurately solving time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs) with neural networks remains challenging due to long-time error accumulation and the difficulty of enforcing general boundary conditions. We introduce TENG-BC, a high-precision neural PDE solver based on the Time-Evolving Natural Gradient, designed to perform under general boundary constraints. At each time step, TENG-BC performs a boundary-aware optimization that jointly enforces interior dynamics and boundary conditions, accommodating Dirichlet, Neumann, Robin, and mixed types within a unified framework. This formulation admits a natural-gradient interpretation, enabling stable time evolution without delicate penalty tuning. Across benchmarks over diffusion, transport, and nonlinear PDEs with various boundary conditions, TENG-BC achieves solver-level accuracy under comparable sampling budgets, outperforming conventional solvers and physics-informed neural network (PINN) baselines.

AI.tldr: TENG-BC：基于时间演化自然梯度的高精度神经PDE求解器，能有效处理多种边界条件，在扩散、输运和非线性PDE基准测试中达到求解器级精度。
AI.motivation: 解决传统神经网络求解时间相关偏微分方程时面临的两个主要挑战：长时间误差累积和一般边界条件难以强制执行的问题。
AI.method: 提出TENG-BC方法，基于时间演化自然梯度，在每个时间步执行边界感知优化，联合强制执行内部动力学和边界条件，统一处理Dirichlet、Neumann、Robin和混合边界条件。
AI.result: 在扩散、输运和非线性PDE的多种边界条件基准测试中，TENG-BC在可比采样预算下达到求解器级精度，优于传统求解器和PINN基线方法。
AI.conclusion: TENG-BC为神经网络求解PDE提供了一种高精度、边界条件鲁棒的框架，无需精细的惩罚参数调整，在多种边界条件下都能稳定演化。

title: KVSlimmer: Theoretical Insights and Practical Optimizations for Asymmetric KV Merging
summary: The growing computational and memory demands of the Key-Value (KV) cache significantly limit the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs). While KV merging has emerged as a promising solution, existing methods that rely on empirical observations of KV asymmetry and gradient-based Hessian approximations lack a theoretical foundation and incur suboptimal compression and inference overhead. To bridge these gaps, we establish a theoretical framework that characterizes this asymmetry through the spectral energy distribution of projection weights, demonstrating that concentrated spectra in Query/Key weights induce feature homogeneity, whereas dispersed spectra in Value weights preserve heterogeneity. Then, we introduce KVSlimmer, an efficient algorithm that captures exact Hessian information through a mathematically exact formulation, and derives a closed-form solution utilizing only forward-pass variables, resulting in a gradient-free approach that is both memory- and time-efficient. Extensive experiments across various models and benchmarks demonstrate that KVSlimmer consistently outperforms SOTA methods. For instance, on Llama3.1-8B-Instruct, it improves the LongBench average score by 0.92 while reducing memory costs and latency by 29% and 28%, respectively.

AI.tldr: KVSlimmer：一种基于理论框架的KV缓存压缩方法，通过分析投影权重的谱能量分布来理解KV不对称性，并使用精确Hessian信息实现高效压缩，显著降低内存和延迟成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的KV缓存计算和内存需求限制了其应用。现有的KV合并方法缺乏理论基础，依赖经验观察和梯度近似，导致压缩效果和推理开销不理想。
AI.method: 建立理论框架分析KV不对称性：Query/Key权重集中谱导致特征同质性，Value权重分散谱保持异质性。提出KVSlimmer算法，通过数学精确公式捕获精确Hessian信息，仅使用前向传播变量推导闭式解，实现无梯度、内存和时间高效的方法。
AI.result: 在各种模型和基准测试中，KVSlimmer始终优于最先进方法。例如，在Llama3.1-8B-Instruct上，LongBench平均得分提高0.92，同时内存成本降低29%，延迟降低28%。
AI.conclusion: KVSlimmer通过理论驱动的KV缓存压缩方法，有效解决了LLM中KV缓存的内存和计算瓶颈问题，在保持性能的同时显著提升了效率。

title: HiMAC: Hierarchical Macro-Micro Learning for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in interactive decision-making, yet they remain fundamentally limited in long-horizon tasks that require structured planning and reliable execution. Existing approaches predominantly rely on flat autoregressive policies, where high-level reasoning and low-level actions are generated within a single token sequence, leading to inefficient exploration and severe error propagation over extended trajectories. In this work, we propose HiMAC, a hierarchical agentic RL framework that explicitly decomposes long-horizon decision-making into macro-level planning and micro-level execution. HiMAC models reasoning as a structured blueprint generation process followed by goal-conditioned action execution, enabling robust long-horizon planning within LLM-based agents. To train this hierarchy efficiently, we introduce a critic-free hierarchical policy optimization paradigm that extends group-based reinforcement learning to bi-level structures through hierarchical relative advantage estimation. Furthermore, we propose an iterative co-evolution training strategy that alternates between planner exploration and executor adaptation, mitigating the non-stationarity inherent in hierarchical learning. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Sokoban demonstrate that HiMAC consistently outperforms strong prompting and reinforcement learning baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance and substantially improved sample efficiency across both text-based and visually grounded environments. Our results show that introducing structured hierarchy, rather than increasing model scale alone, is a key factor for enabling robust long-horizon agentic intelligence.

AI.tldr: HiMAC：分层强化学习框架，将长时程决策分解为宏观规划与微观执行，通过分层策略优化提升LLM智能体在复杂任务中的表现
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在长时程任务中存在局限性，主要依赖扁平的自回归策略，将高层推理和底层动作混合在单一token序列中，导致探索效率低和错误传播严重
AI.method: 提出分层智能体强化学习框架HiMAC，将决策分解为蓝图生成和条件动作执行；引入无评论家分层策略优化范式，通过分层相对优势估计扩展基于组的强化学习；采用迭代协同进化训练策略，交替进行规划器探索和执行器适应
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Sokoban上的实验表明，HiMAC持续优于强提示和强化学习基线，实现最先进性能，并在文本和视觉环境中显著提升样本效率
AI.conclusion: 引入结构化分层而非单纯增加模型规模，是实现稳健长时程智能体智能的关键因素，HiMAC框架为LLM智能体的长时程决策提供了有效解决方案

title: Time discretization of BSDEs with singular terminal condition using asymptotic expansion
summary: We consider a class of backward stochastic differential equations (BSDEs) with singular terminal condition and develop a numerical scheme to approximate their solution. To this end, we extend an asymptotic development of the BSDE solution known from the power case, which arises from optimal liquidation problems, to more general generators. This expansion allows to obtain a suitable approximation of the BSDE solution close to the terminal time. Using this as a terminal condition, we analyze the error of a backward Euler implicit scheme and detail its dependence on the terminal condition.

AI.tldr: 提出针对具有奇异终端条件的BSDE的数值解法，通过渐近展开处理终端奇异性，结合后向欧拉隐式格式进行数值逼近
AI.motivation: 奇异终端条件的BSDE（如最优清算问题中的幂函数情形）在数值求解时面临终端奇异性挑战，需要开发有效的数值方法
AI.method: 1. 将幂函数情形的BSDE解渐近展开推广到更一般的生成元；2. 利用展开式获得终端时间附近的BSDE解近似；3. 以此近似作为终端条件，分析后向欧拉隐式格式的误差及其对终端条件的依赖
AI.result: 建立了适用于一般生成元的奇异终端条件BSDE数值解法，获得了终端时间附近的渐近展开，并分析了后向欧拉格式的误差特性
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理了奇异终端条件BSDE的数值求解问题，为最优清算等应用提供了可靠的数值工具

title: Rich Insights from Cheap Signals: Efficient Evaluations via Tensor Factorization
summary: Moving beyond evaluations that collapse performance across heterogeneous prompts toward fine-grained evaluation at the prompt level, or within relatively homogeneous subsets, is necessary to diagnose generative models' strengths and weaknesses. Such fine-grained evaluations, however, suffer from a data bottleneck: human gold-standard labels are too costly at this scale, while automated ratings are often misaligned with human judgment. To resolve this challenge, we propose a novel statistical model based on tensor factorization that merges cheap autorater data with a limited set of human gold-standard labels. Specifically, our approach uses autorater scores to pretrain latent representations of prompts and generative models, and then aligns those pretrained representations to human preferences using a small calibration set. This sample-efficient methodology is robust to autorater quality, more accurately predicts human preferences on a per-prompt basis than standard baselines, and provides tight confidence intervals for key statistical parameters of interest. We also showcase the practical utility of our method by constructing granular leaderboards based on prompt qualities and by estimating model performance solely from autorater scores, eliminating the need for additional human annotations.

AI.tldr: 提出基于张量分解的统计模型，结合自动评分和少量人工标注，实现细粒度评估生成模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型评估方法存在数据瓶颈：细粒度评估需要大量人工标注成本过高，而自动评分与人类判断不一致
AI.method: 基于张量分解的统计模型，用自动评分预训练提示和生成模型的潜在表示，再用少量校准集将这些表示对齐到人类偏好
AI.result: 方法对自动评分质量鲁棒，比标准基线更准确预测每提示的人类偏好，提供关键统计参数的紧密置信区间
AI.conclusion: 该方法能构建基于提示质量的细粒度排行榜，仅从自动评分估计模型性能，无需额外人工标注，具有实际应用价值

title: USE: Uncertainty Structure Estimation for Robust Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: In this study, a novel idea, Uncertainty Structure Estimation (USE), a lightweight, algorithm-agnostic procedure that emphasizes the often-overlooked role of unlabeled data quality is introduced for Semi-supervised learning (SSL). SSL has achieved impressive progress, but its reliability in deployment is limited by the quality of the unlabeled pool. In practice, unlabeled data are almost always contaminated by out-of-distribution (OOD) samples, where both near-OOD and far-OOD can negatively affect performance in different ways. We argue that the bottleneck does not lie in algorithmic design, but rather in the absence of principled mechanisms to assess and curate the quality of unlabeled data. The proposed USE trains a proxy model on the labeled set to compute entropy scores for unlabeled samples, and then derives a threshold, via statistical comparison against a reference distribution, that separates informative (structured) from uninformative (structureless) samples. This enables assessment as a preprocessing step, removing uninformative or harmful unlabeled data before SSL training begins. Through extensive experiments on imaging (CIFAR-100) and NLP (Yelp Review) data, it is evident that USE consistently improves accuracy and robustness under varying levels of OOD contamination. Thus, it can be concluded that the proposed approach reframes unlabeled data quality control as a structural assessment problem, and considers it as a necessary component for reliable and efficient SSL in realistic mixed-distribution environments.

AI.tldr: 提出USE方法，通过代理模型计算未标记数据的熵值，区分信息性样本与非信息性样本，提升半监督学习在OOD污染下的性能
AI.motivation: 半监督学习在实际部署中可靠性受限，未标记数据常被分布外样本污染，现有方法缺乏评估未标记数据质量的机制
AI.method: 训练代理模型计算未标记样本熵值，通过统计比较参考分布设定阈值，区分结构化与非结构化样本，作为预处理步骤
AI.result: 在图像和NLP数据集上实验表明，USE能持续提升准确性和鲁棒性，特别是在不同OOD污染水平下
AI.conclusion: 将未标记数据质量控制重新定义为结构评估问题，是现实混合分布环境中可靠高效半监督学习的必要组件

title: Prompt Sensitivity and Answer Consistency of Small Open-Source Large Language Models on Clinical Question Answering: Implications for Low-Resource Healthcare Deployment
summary:
Small open-source language models are gaining attention for low-resource healthcare settings, but their reliability under different prompt phrasings remains poorly understood. We evaluated five open-source models (Gemma 2 2B, Phi-3 Mini 3.8B, Llama 3.2 3B, Mistral 7B, and Meditron-7B domain-pretrained without instruction tuning) across three clinical QA datasets (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA) using five prompt styles (original, formal, simplified, roleplay, direct). We measured consistency scores, accuracy, and instruction-following failure rates. All inference ran locally on consumer CPU hardware without fine-tuning.
  Consistency and accuracy were largely independent. Gemma 2 achieved the highest consistency (0.845-0.888) but lowest accuracy (33.0-43.5%), while Llama 3.2 showed moderate consistency (0.774-0.807) with the highest accuracy (49.0-65.0%). Roleplay prompts consistently reduced accuracy across all models, with Phi-3 Mini dropping 21.5 percentage points on MedQA. Meditron-7B exhibited near-complete instruction-following failure on PubMedQA (99.0% UNKNOWN rate), showing domain pretraining alone is insufficient for structured clinical QA.
  High consistency does not imply correctness. Models can be reliably wrong, a dangerous failure mode in clinical AI. Roleplay prompts should be avoided in healthcare applications. Llama 3.2 showed the strongest balance of accuracy and reliability for low-resource deployment. Safe clinical AI requires joint evaluation of consistency, accuracy, and instruction adherence.

AI.tldr: 评估5个开源小语言模型在不同提示词风格下的临床问答表现，发现一致性不等于准确性，角色扮演提示会降低性能，Llama 3.2在准确性和可靠性方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 开源小语言模型在低资源医疗环境中受到关注，但其在不同提示词表述下的可靠性尚不清楚。需要评估这些模型在临床问答任务中的表现，特别是提示词风格对性能的影响。
AI.method: 评估5个开源模型（Gemma 2 2B、Phi-3 Mini 3.8B、Llama 3.2 3B、Mistral 7B、Meditron-7B）在3个临床QA数据集（MedQA、MedMCQA、PubMedQA）上使用5种提示风格（原始、正式、简化、角色扮演、直接）。测量一致性分数、准确性和指令遵循失败率。所有推理均在消费级CPU硬件上本地运行，无需微调。
AI.result: 一致性和准确性基本独立。Gemma 2一致性最高（0.845-0.888）但准确性最低（33.0-43.5%），Llama 3.2一致性中等（0.774-0.807）但准确性最高（49.0-65.0%）。角色扮演提示在所有模型中都会降低准确性，Phi-3 Mini在MedQA上下降21.5个百分点。Meditron-7B在PubMedQA上几乎完全无法遵循指令（99.0% UNKNOWN率）。
AI.conclusion: 高一致性不等于正确性，模型可能可靠地给出错误答案，这在临床AI中很危险。应避免在医疗应用中使用角色扮演提示。Llama 3.2在准确性和可靠性方面表现最佳。安全的临床AI需要同时评估一致性、准确性和指令遵循能力。

title: Tracking Capabilities for Safer Agents
summary: AI agents that interact with the real world through tool calls pose fundamental safety challenges: agents might leak private information, cause unintended side effects, or be manipulated through prompt injection. To address these challenges, we propose to put the agent in a programming-language-based "safety harness": instead of calling tools directly, agents express their intentions as code in a capability-safe language: Scala 3 with capture checking. Capabilities are program variables that regulate access to effects and resources of interest. Scala's type system tracks capabilities statically, providing fine-grained control over what an agent can do. In particular, it enables local purity, the ability to enforce that sub-computations are side-effect-free, preventing information leakage when agents process classified data. We demonstrate that extensible agent safety harnesses can be built by leveraging a strong type system with tracked capabilities. Our experiments show that agents can generate capability-safe code with no significant loss in task performance, while the type system reliably prevents unsafe behaviors such as information leakage and malicious side effects.

AI.tldr: 提出基于编程语言的"安全约束"方法，让AI代理通过Scala 3的捕获检查表达意图，利用类型系统追踪能力，防止信息泄露和恶意副作用
AI.motivation: AI代理通过工具调用与现实世界交互时存在基本安全挑战：可能泄露私人信息、造成意外副作用或被提示注入攻击操纵
AI.method: 将AI代理置于基于编程语言的"安全约束"中，代理通过Scala 3的捕获检查表达意图，利用类型系统静态追踪能力，实现细粒度控制，特别是局部纯度
AI.result: 实验表明代理能够生成能力安全的代码，任务性能没有显著损失，同时类型系统可靠地防止了不安全行为，如信息泄露和恶意副作用
AI.conclusion: 通过利用具有追踪能力的强类型系统，可以构建可扩展的代理安全约束，有效解决AI代理与现实世界交互的安全挑战

title: A note on the convergence of RED algorithms under minimal hypotheses and open questions
summary: In this note, we give a convergence result for a modified ''regularization-by-denoising''(RED) algorithm under a restricted isometry condition on measurements and a restricted Lipschitz condition on the considered deep projective prior. This study leads to open questions about the convergence of RED algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了改进的"去噪正则化"(RED)算法在受限等距条件和受限Lipschitz条件下的收敛性，并提出了关于RED算法收敛性的开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究RED算法的收敛性，特别是在深度投影先验下的理论保证，以解决现有算法收敛性理论不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出改进的RED算法，在测量满足受限等距条件和深度投影先验满足受限Lipschitz条件下分析其收敛性。
AI.result: 在给定的受限条件下，证明了改进RED算法的收敛性结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为RED算法提供了收敛性理论保证，但同时也提出了关于RED算法收敛性的开放性问题，需要进一步研究。

title: Leave-One-Out Prediction for General Hypothesis Classes
summary:
Leave-one-out (LOO) prediction provides a principled, data-dependent measure of generalization, yet guarantees in fully transductive settings remain poorly understood beyond specialized models. We introduce Median of Level-Set Aggregation (MLSA), a general aggregation procedure based on empirical-risk level sets around the ERM. For arbitrary fixed datasets and losses satisfying a mild monotonicity condition, we establish a multiplicative oracle inequality for the LOO error of the form \[ LOO_S(\hat{h}) \;\le\; C \cdot \frac{1}{n} \min_{h\in H} L_S(h) \;+\; \frac{Comp(S,H,\ell)}{n}, \qquad C>1. \]
  The analysis is based on a local level-set growth condition controlling how the set of near-optimal empirical-risk minimizers expands as the tolerance increases. We verify this condition in several canonical settings. For classification with VC classes under the 0-1 loss, the resulting complexity scales as $O(d \log n)$, where $d$ is the VC dimension. For finite hypothesis and density classes under bounded or log loss, it scales as $O(\log |H|)$ and $O(\log |P|)$, respectively. For logistic regression with bounded covariates and parameters, a volumetric argument based on the empirical covariance matrix yields complexity scaling as $O(d \log n)$ up to problem-dependent factors.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为MLSA的聚合方法，用于分析留一法预测的泛化性能，建立了乘法oracle不等式，并在多种学习场景中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 留一法预测虽然提供了数据依赖的泛化度量，但在完全转导式设置下的理论保证仍然不足，特别是对于一般模型。本文旨在为任意固定数据集和满足单调性条件的损失函数提供留一法误差的理论保证。
AI.method: 提出了中位数水平集聚合（MLSA）方法，该方法基于经验风险最小化器周围的水平集进行聚合。通过局部水平集增长条件控制近最优经验风险最小化器集合随容差增加的扩展，并验证该条件在多种典型设置中成立。
AI.result: 建立了留一法误差的乘法oracle不等式：LOO_S(ĥ) ≤ C·(1/n)min_{h∈H} L_S(h) + Comp(S,H,ℓ)/n，其中C>1。在多种场景中验证了复杂度界限：VC类分类为O(d log n)，有限假设类为O(log|H|)，密度类为O(log|P|)，逻辑回归为O(d log n)。
AI.conclusion: MLSA方法为留一法预测提供了通用的理论框架，在多种学习场景中建立了乘法oracle不等式，扩展了留一法泛化保证的理论基础，为数据依赖的泛化分析提供了新工具。

title: Exact and Asymptotically Complete Robust Verifications of Neural Networks via Quantum Optimization
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) enable high performance across domains but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, limiting their use in safety-critical settings. Here, we introduce two quantum-optimization-based models for robust verification that reduce the combinatorial burden of certification under bounded input perturbations. For piecewise-linear activations (e.g., ReLU and hardtanh), our first model yields an exact formulation that is sound and complete, enabling precise identification of adversarial examples. For general activations (including sigmoid and tanh), our second model constructs scalable over-approximations via piecewise-constant bounds and is asymptotically complete, with approximation error vanishing as the segmentation is refined. We further integrate Quantum Benders Decomposition with interval arithmetic to accelerate solving, and propose certificate-transfer bounds that relate robustness guarantees of pruned networks to those of the original model. Finally, a layerwise partitioning strategy supports a quantum--classical hybrid workflow by coupling subproblems across depth. Experiments on robustness benchmarks show high certification accuracy, indicating that quantum optimization can serve as a principled primitive for robustness guarantees in neural networks with complex activations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出两种基于量子优化的鲁棒性验证模型，用于神经网络对抗扰动的精确认证，通过量子Benders分解和区间算术加速求解，实验显示高认证精度。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键场景中易受对抗性扰动攻击，现有验证方法面临组合爆炸问题，需要更高效的鲁棒性认证方法。
AI.method: 提出两种量子优化模型：1）针对分段线性激活函数的精确公式化方法；2）针对通用激活函数的可扩展过近似方法。集成量子Benders分解与区间算术加速求解，提出证书转移边界和分层分区策略。
AI.result: 在鲁棒性基准测试中显示出高认证精度，表明量子优化可作为神经网络复杂激活函数鲁棒性保证的原则性原语。
AI.conclusion: 量子优化方法能有效减少认证的组合负担，为具有复杂激活函数的神经网络提供可扩展的鲁棒性保证，在安全关键应用中具有潜力。

title: Hybrid Neural-LLM Pipeline for Morphological Glossing in Endangered Language Documentation: A Case Study of Jungar Tuvan
summary: Interlinear glossed text (IGT) creation remains a major bottleneck in linguistic documentation and fieldwork, particularly for low-resource morphologically rich languages. We present a hybrid automatic glossing pipeline that combines neural sequence labeling with large language model (LLM) post-correction, evaluated on Jungar Tuvan, a low-resource Turkic language. Through systematic ablation studies, we show that retrieval-augmented prompting provides substantial gains over random example selection. We further find that morpheme dictionaries paradoxically hurt performance compared to providing no dictionary at all in most cases, and that performance scales approximately logarithmically with the number of few-shot examples. Most significantly, our two-stage pipeline combining a BiLSTM-CRF model with LLM post-correction yields substantial gains for most models, achieving meaningful reductions in annotation workload. Drawing on these findings, we establish concrete design principles for integrating structured prediction models with LLM reasoning in morphologically complex fieldwork contexts. These principles demonstrate that hybrid architectures offer a promising direction for computationally light solutions to automatic linguistic annotation in endangered language documentation.

AI.tldr: 提出结合神经序列标注与大语言模型后校正的混合自动标注流程，用于低资源形态丰富语言的语料标注，在Jungar Tuvan语言上验证效果，发现检索增强提示优于随机示例选择，词素词典反而降低性能，性能随示例数量对数增长，两阶段流程显著减少标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 解决低资源形态丰富语言（特别是濒危语言）中语料标注的瓶颈问题，传统人工标注工作量大且效率低，需要开发计算轻量的自动标注解决方案。
AI.method: 采用混合自动标注流程：第一阶段使用BiLSTM-CRF模型进行神经序列标注，第二阶段使用大语言模型进行后校正。通过检索增强提示选择示例，进行系统消融研究，评估不同配置（包括词素词典、示例数量等）对性能的影响。
AI.result: 检索增强提示相比随机示例选择带来显著提升；词素词典在多数情况下反而降低性能；性能随few-shot示例数量近似对数增长；两阶段混合流程（BiLSTM-CRF + LLM后校正）对多数模型带来实质性增益，显著减少标注工作量。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构为形态复杂的濒危语言文档化提供了有前景的计算轻量解决方案，建立了将结构化预测模型与LLM推理结合的具体设计原则，展示了在低资源语言自动标注中的实际应用价值。

title: CollabEval: Enhancing LLM-as-a-Judge via Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized AI-generated content evaluation, with the LLM-as-a-Judge paradigm becoming increasingly popular. However, current single-LLM evaluation approaches face significant challenges, including inconsistent judgments and inherent biases from pre-training data. To address these limitations, we propose CollabEval, a novel multi-agent evaluation framework that implements a three-phase Collaborative Evaluation process: initial evaluation, multi-round discussion, and final judgment. Unlike existing approaches that rely on competitive debate or single-model evaluation, CollabEval emphasizes collaboration among multiple agents with strategic consensus checking for efficiency. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CollabEval consistently outperforms single-LLM approaches across multiple dimensions while maintaining robust performance even when individual models struggle. The framework provides comprehensive support for various evaluation criteria while ensuring efficiency through its collaborative design.

AI.tldr: CollabEval是一个多智能体协作评估框架，通过三阶段协作过程解决单LLM评估的不一致性和偏见问题，显著优于单模型方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于单LLM的内容评估方法存在判断不一致和预训练数据固有偏见的显著挑战，需要更可靠、一致的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出CollabEval多智能体评估框架，采用三阶段协作评估过程：初始评估、多轮讨论和最终判断，强调多智能体协作和策略性共识检查。
AI.result: 实验表明CollabEval在多个维度上持续优于单LLM方法，即使在单个模型表现不佳时也能保持稳健性能，支持多种评估标准。
AI.conclusion: CollabEval通过多智能体协作设计有效解决了单LLM评估的局限性，提供了更可靠、一致且高效的AI生成内容评估框架。

title: Polynomial Turnpike Property for a Class of Infinite-Dimensional Oscillating Systems
summary: We establish a polynomial turnpike estimate for an optimal control problem consisting of a system of infinitely many controlled oscillators, considered as an abstract differential equation in a Hilbert space, with a quadratic cost. Our proof relies on spectral considerations and on the construction of a Riesz basis. A concrete example is given, which involves a rotating bodybeam system. To our knowledge, this is the first example of a pointwise turnpike estimate around a steady-state that is polynomial but not exponential.

AI.tldr: 该论文为无限多受控振荡器系统建立了多项式转向点估计，这是首个已知的非指数多项式点态转向点估计
AI.motivation: 研究无限多受控振荡器系统的最优控制问题，探索不同于传统指数收敛的转向点行为
AI.method: 基于谱分析和Riesz基构造，在希尔伯特空间中处理抽象微分方程，使用二次成本函数
AI.result: 建立了多项式转向点估计，并通过旋转体梁系统的具体实例验证了结果
AI.conclusion: 这是首个已知的点态转向点估计，其收敛速度是多项式而非指数的，扩展了转向点理论的应用范围

title: Scaling Laws of SignSGD in Linear Regression: When Does It Outperform SGD?
summary: We study scaling laws of signSGD under a power-law random features (PLRF) model that accounts for both feature and target decay. We analyze the population risk of a linear model trained with one-pass signSGD on Gaussian-sketched features. We express the risk as a function of model size, training steps, learning rate, and the feature and target decay parameters. Comparing against the SGD risk analyzed by Paquette et al. (2024), we identify a drift-normalization effect and a noise-reshaping effect unique to signSGD. We then obtain compute-optimal scaling laws under the optimal choice of learning rate. Our analysis shows that the noise-reshaping effect can make the compute-optimal slope of signSGD steeper than that of SGD in regimes where noise is dominant. Finally, we observe that the widely used warmup-stable-decay (WSD) schedule further reduces the noise term and sharpens the compute-optimal slope, when feature decay is fast but target decay is slow.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了signSGD在幂律随机特征模型下的缩放规律，发现signSGD具有独特的漂移归一化和噪声重塑效应，在噪声主导区域比SGD有更陡峭的计算最优斜率。
AI.motivation: 研究signSGD在考虑特征和目标衰减的幂律随机特征模型中的缩放规律，理解signSGD与SGD在计算最优性方面的差异，特别是在噪声主导区域的表现。
AI.method: 在PLRF模型下分析线性模型使用单次signSGD训练的风险，将风险表达为模型大小、训练步数、学习率以及特征和目标衰减参数的函数，并与SGD风险进行对比。
AI.result: 发现signSGD具有独特的漂移归一化和噪声重塑效应，在最优学习率选择下，噪声重塑效应使signSGD在噪声主导区域的计算最优斜率比SGD更陡峭，WSD调度在特定条件下能进一步降低噪声项。
AI.conclusion: signSGD在幂律随机特征模型中表现出与SGD不同的缩放特性，其噪声重塑效应在噪声主导区域提供了更优的计算效率，WSD调度在特定衰减条件下能进一步提升性能。

title: Physics-Aware Learnability: From Set-Theoretic Independence to Operational Constraints
comment: 31 pages, 4 figures (Main Text + Supplementary Information) / Comment welcome
summary: Beyond binary classification, learnability can become a logically fragile notion: in EMX, even the class of all finite subsets of $[0,1]$ is learnable in some models of ZFC and not in others. We argue the paradox is operational. The standard definitions quantify over arbitrary set-theoretic learners that implicitly assume non-operational resources (infinite precision, unphysical data access, and non-representable outputs). We introduce physics-aware learnability (PL), which defines the learnability relative to an explicit access model -- a family of admissible physical protocols. Finite-precision coarse-graining reduces continuum EMX to a countable problem, via an exact pushforward/pullback reduction that preserves the EMX objective, making the independence example provably learnable with explicit $(ε,δ)$ sample complexity. For quantum data, admissible learners are exactly POVMs on $d$ copies, turning sample size into copy complexity and yielding Helstrom(-type) lower bounds. For finite no-signaling and quantum models, PL feasibility becomes linear or semidefinite and is therefore decidable.

AI.tldr: 论文提出物理感知可学习性(PL)框架，解决传统学习理论中的逻辑脆弱性问题，通过显式访问模型和有限精度粗粒化，将连续EMX问题转化为可数问题，并在量子数据中建立可学习性与POVM测量的联系。
AI.motivation: 传统学习理论中的可学习性定义存在逻辑脆弱性：在EMX问题中，即使是[0,1]的所有有限子集类，在某些ZFC模型中可学习，在其他模型中不可学习。这种悖论源于传统定义量化了任意集合论学习者，隐含假设了非操作资源（无限精度、非物理数据访问、不可表示输出）。
AI.method: 引入物理感知可学习性(PL)框架，定义相对于显式访问模型的可学习性——允许的物理协议族。使用有限精度粗粒化将连续EMX问题通过精确的推前/拉回约简转化为可数问题，保持EMX目标不变。对于量子数据，允许的学习者恰好是d个副本上的POVM测量，将样本量转化为副本复杂度。
AI.result: 有限精度粗粒化使独立性示例可证明可学习，并提供显式的(ε,δ)样本复杂度。对于量子数据，PL可行性变为线性或半定规划问题，因此是可判定的。对于有限无信号和量子模型，PL可行性分别成为线性规划或半定规划问题。
AI.conclusion: 物理感知可学习性框架通过显式建模物理访问约束，解决了传统学习理论中的逻辑脆弱性，为连续和量子学习问题提供了操作上稳健的可学习性定义，并将可行性问题转化为可判定的优化问题。

title: Conformal Prediction for Risk-Controlled Medical Entity Extraction Across Clinical Domains
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for medical entity extraction, yet their confidence scores are often miscalibrated, limiting safe deployment in clinical settings. We present a conformal prediction framework that provides finite-sample coverage guarantees for LLM-based extraction across two clinical domains. First, we extract structured entities from 1,000 FDA drug labels across eight sections using GPT-4.1, verified via FactScore-based atomic statement evaluation (97.7\% accuracy over 128,906 entities). Second, we extract radiological entities from MIMIC-CXR reports using the RadGraph schema with GPT-4.1 and Llama-4-Maverick, evaluated against physician annotations (entity F1: 0.81 to 0.84). Our central finding is that miscalibration direction reverses across domains: on well-structured FDA labels, models are underconfident, requiring modest conformal thresholds ($τ\approx 0.06$), while on free-text radiology reports, models are overconfident, demanding strict thresholds ($τ$ up to 0.99). Despite this heterogeneity, conformal prediction achieves target coverage ($\geq 90\%$) in both settings with manageable rejection rates (9--13\%). These results demonstrate that calibration is not a global model property but depends on document structure, extraction category, and model architecture, motivating domain-specific conformal calibration for safe clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个共形预测框架，为LLM在临床实体提取中提供有限样本覆盖保证，发现校准方向在不同领域（结构化FDA标签vs自由文本放射报告）相反，但共形预测能在两个领域达到目标覆盖率。
AI.motivation: LLM在医疗实体提取中应用日益增多，但其置信度分数常常校准不当，限制了在临床环境中的安全部署。需要一种能提供有限样本覆盖保证的方法来确保临床应用的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用共形预测框架，在两个临床领域进行实验：1) 使用GPT-4.1从1000个FDA药物标签的八个部分提取结构化实体，通过FactScore原子陈述评估验证；2) 使用GPT-4.1和Llama-4-Maverick从MIMIC-CXR报告中提取放射学实体，按照RadGraph模式，与医生标注进行对比评估。
AI.result: FDA标签提取准确率达97.7%（128,906个实体），放射学实体F1分数为0.81-0.84。关键发现是校准方向在不同领域相反：结构化FDA标签中模型置信不足（τ≈0.06），而自由文本放射报告中模型过度自信（τ高达0.99）。共形预测在两个设置中都能达到目标覆盖率（≥90%），拒绝率可控（9-13%）。
AI.conclusion: 校准不是模型的全局属性，而是取决于文档结构、提取类别和模型架构。研究结果支持领域特定的共形校准方法，以实现LLM在临床环境中的安全部署。

title: MMCOMET: A Large-Scale Multimodal Commonsense Knowledge Graph for Contextual Reasoning
summary: We present MMCOMET, the first multimodal commonsense knowledge graph (MMKG) that integrates physical, social, and eventive knowledge. MMCOMET extends the ATOMIC2020 knowledge graph to include a visual dimension, through an efficient image retrieval process, resulting in over 900K multimodal triples. This new resource addresses a major limitation of existing MMKGs in supporting complex reasoning tasks like image captioning and storytelling. Through a standard visual storytelling experiment, we show that our holistic approach enables the generation of richer, coherent, and contextually grounded stories than those produced using text-only knowledge. This resource establishes a new foundation for multimodal commonsense reasoning and narrative generation.

AI.tldr: MMCOMET是首个整合物理、社交和事件知识的多模态常识知识图谱，通过图像检索扩展ATOMIC2020，包含90万+多模态三元组，提升图像描述和故事生成等复杂推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有MMKGs在支持图像描述和故事生成等复杂推理任务方面存在局限，需要整合视觉维度来增强常识推理能力。
AI.method: 扩展ATOMIC2020知识图谱，通过高效的图像检索过程添加视觉维度，构建包含90万+多模态三元组的MMCOMET知识图谱。
AI.result: 通过视觉故事生成实验证明，该方法能生成比纯文本知识更丰富、连贯且上下文基础扎实的故事。
AI.conclusion: MMCOMET为多模态常识推理和叙事生成建立了新基础，解决了现有MMKGs在复杂推理任务上的局限性。

title: Solving Convex Quadratic Optimization with Indicators Over Structured Graphs
summary: This paper studies convex quadratic minimization problems in which each continuous variable is coupled with a binary indicator variable. We focus on the structured setting where the Hessian matrix of the quadratic term is positive definite and exhibits sparsity. We develop an exact parametric dynamic programming algorithm whose computational complexity depends explicitly on the treewidth of the Hessian's support graph, its volume growth, and an appropriate margin parameter. Under suitable structural conditions, the overall complexity scales linearly with the problem dimension. To demonstrate the practical impact of our approach, we introduce a novel framework for joint forecasting and outlier detection by extending exponential smoothing to time series with outliers. Computational experiments on both synthetic and real data sets show that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art solvers.

AI.tldr: 提出基于树宽、体积增长和边界参数的精确参数动态规划算法，解决连续变量与二元指示变量耦合的凸二次最小化问题，在结构条件下实现线性复杂度
AI.motivation: 研究连续变量与二元指示变量耦合的凸二次最小化问题，这类问题在联合预测和异常值检测等应用中常见，但现有求解器效率有限
AI.method: 开发精确参数动态规划算法，计算复杂度明确依赖于Hessian矩阵支撑图的树宽、体积增长和适当的边界参数。在合适结构条件下，整体复杂度随问题维度线性增长
AI.result: 算法在合成和真实数据集上显著优于现有最先进求解器。通过将指数平滑扩展到含异常值的时间序列，展示了联合预测和异常值检测的新框架
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能高效解决结构化的凸二次最小化问题，特别适用于联合预测和异常值检测等应用，在合适结构条件下实现线性计算复杂度

title: Near-Optimal Regret for KL-Regularized Multi-Armed Bandits
summary: Recent studies have shown that reinforcement learning with KL-regularized objectives can enjoy faster rates of convergence or logarithmic regret, in contrast to the classical $\sqrt{T}$-type regret in the unregularized setting. However, the statistical efficiency of online learning with respect to KL-regularized objectives remains far from completely characterized, even when specialized to multi-armed bandits (MABs). We address this problem for MABs via a sharp analysis of KL-UCB using a novel peeling argument, which yields a $\tilde{O}(ηK\log^2T)$ upper bound: the first high-probability regret bound with linear dependence on $K$. Here, $T$ is the time horizon, $K$ is the number of arms, $η^{-1}$ is the regularization intensity, and $\tilde{O}$ hides all logarithmic factors except those involving $\log T$. The near-tightness of our analysis is certified by the first non-constant lower bound $Ω(ηK \log T)$, which follows from subtle hard-instance constructions and a tailored decomposition of the Bayes prior. Moreover, in the low-regularization regime (i.e., large $η$), we show that the KL-regularized regret for MABs is $η$-independent and scales as $\tildeΘ(\sqrt{KT})$. Overall, our results provide a thorough understanding of KL-regularized MABs across all regimes of $η$ and yield nearly optimal bounds in terms of $K$, $η$, and $T$.

AI.tldr: 本文对KL正则化多臂老虎机进行了尖锐分析，得到了首个线性依赖于臂数K的高概率遗憾上界，并建立了匹配的下界，全面刻画了KL正则化MAB在所有正则化强度下的统计效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管KL正则化目标在强化学习中显示出比经典无正则化方法更快的收敛速度，但其在线学习的统计效率尚未完全刻画，即使在多臂老虎机这一简单场景中也是如此。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 采用新颖的"剥离论证"对KL-UCB算法进行尖锐分析，通过精心构造困难实例和定制的贝叶斯先验分解来建立下界，全面分析不同正则化强度下的性能。
AI.result: 获得了首个线性依赖于臂数K的高概率遗憾上界$\tilde{O}(ηK\log^2T)$，并建立了匹配的下界$Ω(ηK \log T)$。在低正则化强度下，遗憾与η无关且为$\tildeΘ(\sqrt{KT})$，实现了对KL正则化MAB在所有η范围内的全面理解。
AI.conclusion: 本文彻底刻画了KL正则化多臂老虎机的统计效率，在K、η和T三个维度上提供了近乎最优的遗憾界限，填补了该领域的理论空白。

title: Weight Updates as Activation Shifts: A Principled Framework for Steering
summary: Activation steering promises to be an extremely parameter-efficient form of adaptation, but its effectiveness depends on critical design choices -- such as intervention location and parameterization -- that currently rely on empirical heuristics rather than a principled foundation. We establish a first-order equivalence between activation-space interventions and weight-space updates, deriving the conditions under which activation steering can replicate fine-tuning behavior. This equivalence yields a principled framework for steering design and identifies the post-block output as a theoretically-backed and highly expressive intervention site. We further explain why certain intervention locations outperform others and show that weight updates and activation updates play distinct, complementary functional roles. This analysis motivates a new approach -- joint adaptation -- that trains in both spaces simultaneously. Our post-block steering achieves accuracy within 0.2%-0.9%$ of full-parameter tuning, on average across tasks and models, while training only 0.04% of model parameters. It consistently outperforms prior activation steering methods such as ReFT and PEFT approaches including LoRA, while using significantly fewer parameters. Finally, we show that joint adaptation often surpasses the performance ceilings of weight and activation updates in isolation, introducing a new paradigm for efficient model adaptation.

AI.tldr: 激活引导（activation steering）是一种高效的模型适配方法，本文建立了激活空间干预与权重空间更新的等价关系，提出了基于理论的后块输出干预位置，并开发了联合适配方法，在仅训练0.04%参数的情况下达到接近全参数调优的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前激活引导的有效性依赖于经验性启发式设计（如干预位置和参数化），缺乏理论基础。需要建立激活空间干预与权重空间更新的理论联系，为激活引导提供原则性设计框架。
AI.method: 1. 建立激活空间干预与权重空间更新的一阶等价关系；2. 推导激活引导能够复现微调行为的条件；3. 识别后块输出作为理论支持的干预位置；4. 提出联合适配方法，同时在权重空间和激活空间进行训练。
AI.result: 1. 后块引导在仅训练0.04%模型参数的情况下，平均跨任务和模型达到全参数调优准确率的0.2%-0.9%以内；2. 优于先前的激活引导方法（如ReFT）和参数高效调优方法（如LoRA）；3. 联合适配通常超越单独权重更新或激活更新的性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 激活引导可以基于理论原则进行设计，后块输出是有效的干预位置。权重更新和激活更新具有互补功能角色，联合适配为高效模型适配提供了新范式，在极低参数成本下实现接近全参数调优的性能。

title: Alien Science: Sampling Coherent but Cognitively Unavailable Research Directions from Idea Atoms
comment: Published at the ICLR 2026 Post-AGI Science and Society Workshop
summary: Large language models are adept at synthesizing and recombining familiar material, yet they often fail at a specific kind of creativity that matters most in research: producing ideas that are both coherent and non-obvious to the current community. We formalize this gap through cognitive availability, the likelihood that a research direction would be naturally proposed by a typical researcher given what they have worked on. We introduce a pipeline that (i) decomposes papers into granular conceptual units, (ii) clusters recurring units into a shared vocabulary of idea atoms, and (iii) learns two complementary models: a coherence model that scores whether a set of atoms constitutes a viable direction, and an availability model that scores how likely that direction is to be generated by researchers drawn from the community. We then sample "alien" directions that score high on coherence but low on availability. On a corpus of $\sim$7,500 recent LLM papers from NeurIPS, ICLR and ICML, we validate that (a) conceptual units preserve paper content under reconstruction, (b) idea atoms generalize across papers rather than memorizing paper-specific phrasing, and (c) the Alien sampler produces research directions that are more diverse than LLM baselines while maintaining coherence.

AI.tldr: 提出"认知可得性"概念衡量研究方向的创新性，开发管道从论文中提取概念单元，聚类为"思想原子"，学习相干性和可得性模型，生成既相干又非显而易见的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型擅长合成和重组熟悉材料，但在产生既相干又对当前研究社区非显而易见的研究想法方面存在不足。这种特定类型的创造力对研究至关重要。
AI.method: 提出三阶段管道：1) 将论文分解为细粒度概念单元；2) 将重复单元聚类为共享的"思想原子"词汇表；3) 学习两个互补模型：相干性模型评估原子集合是否构成可行方向，可得性模型评估该方向被社区研究者自然提出的可能性。然后采样"异质"方向（高相干性、低可得性）。
AI.result: 在约7,500篇NeurIPS、ICLR和ICML的近期LLM论文上验证：1) 概念单元在重构中能保留论文内容；2) 思想原子能跨论文泛化而非记忆特定措辞；3) 异质采样器产生的研究方向比LLM基线更多样化，同时保持相干性。
AI.conclusion: 通过形式化"认知可得性"概念并开发相应管道，能够生成既相干又对当前研究社区非显而易见的创新研究方向，弥补了LLM在特定类型创造力方面的不足。

title: Reservoir Subspace Injection for Online ICA under Top-n Whitening
summary: Reservoir expansion can improve online independent component analysis (ICA) under nonlinear mixing, yet top-$n$ whitening may discard injected features. We formalize this bottleneck as \emph{reservoir subspace injection} (RSI): injected features help only if they enter the retained eigenspace without displacing passthrough directions. RSI diagnostics (IER, SSO, $ρ_x$) identify a failure mode in our top-$n$ setting: stronger injection increases IER but crowds out passthrough energy ($ρ_x: 1.00\!\rightarrow\!0.77$), degrading SI-SDR by up to $2.2$\,dB. A guarded RSI controller preserves passthrough retention and recovers mean performance to within $0.1$\,dB of baseline $1/N$ scaling. With passthrough preserved, RE-OICA improves over vanilla online ICA by $+1.7$\,dB under nonlinear mixing and achieves positive SI-SDR$_{\mathrm{sc}}$ on the tested super-Gaussian benchmark ($+0.6$\,dB).

AI.tldr: 论文提出"储层子空间注入"(RSI)框架分析非线性混合下的在线ICA，发现强特征注入会排挤通过特征，导致性能下降。通过RSI控制器保护通过特征，RE-OICA在非线性混合下比普通在线ICA提升1.7dB。
AI.motivation: 储层扩展能改善非线性混合下的在线ICA，但top-n白化可能丢弃注入的特征。需要理解特征注入如何影响ICA性能，并解决特征注入与通过特征保留之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出RSI框架分析特征注入瓶颈，定义IER、SSO、ρ_x等诊断指标。开发带保护的RSI控制器，在保留通过特征的同时进行特征注入，实现RE-OICA方法。
AI.result: 强特征注入会增加IER但降低通过特征保留(ρ_x从1.00降至0.77)，导致SI-SDR下降2.2dB。RSI控制器将平均性能恢复到基线1/N缩放的0.1dB内。RE-OICA比普通在线ICA提升1.7dB，在超高斯基准上实现+0.6dB的SI-SDRsc。
AI.conclusion: 特征注入对非线性混合下的在线ICA有益，但必须保护通过特征不被排挤。RSI框架提供了诊断和控制方法，RE-OICA在保留通过特征的前提下显著提升了非线性混合下的分离性能。

title: Efficient Decoder Scaling Strategy for Neural Routing Solvers
summary: Construction-based neural routing solvers, typically composed of an encoder and a decoder, have emerged as a promising approach for solving vehicle routing problems. While recent studies suggest that shifting parameters from the encoder to the decoder enhances performance, most works restrict the decoder size to 1-3M parameters, leaving the effects of scaling largely unexplored. To address this gap, we conduct a systematic study comparing two distinct strategies: scaling depth versus scaling width. We synthesize these strategies to construct a suite of 12 model configurations, spanning a parameter range from 1M to ~150M, and extensively evaluate their scaling behaviors across three critical dimensions: parameter efficiency, data efficiency, and compute efficiency. Our empirical results reveal that parameter count is insufficient to accurately predict the model performance, highlighting the critical and distinct roles of model depth (layer count) and width (embedding dimension). Crucially, we demonstrate that scaling depth yields superior performance gains to scaling width. Based on these findings, we provide and experimentally validate a set of design principles for the efficient allocation of parameters and compute resources to enhance the model performance.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统比较了深度缩放与宽度缩放两种策略对基于构造的神经路由求解器性能的影响，发现深度缩放比宽度缩放带来更优的性能提升，并提出了参数和计算资源高效分配的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于构造的神经路由求解器（编码器-解码器架构）在车辆路径问题中表现出潜力，但现有研究大多限制解码器参数在1-3M范围内，对缩放效应缺乏系统探索。需要研究不同缩放策略（深度vs宽度）对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用系统研究方法，构建了12种模型配置（参数范围1M到~150M），比较深度缩放（增加层数）和宽度缩放（增加嵌入维度）两种策略。从参数效率、数据效率和计算效率三个维度评估缩放行为。
AI.result: 参数数量不能准确预测模型性能；模型深度（层数）和宽度（嵌入维度）发挥关键且不同的作用；深度缩放比宽度缩放带来更优的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究发现，提出了并实验验证了一套设计原则，用于高效分配参数和计算资源以提升模型性能，强调深度缩放的重要性。

title: Towards Orthographically-Informed Evaluation of Speech Recognition Systems for Indian Languages
summary: Evaluating ASR systems for Indian languages is challenging due to spelling variations, suffix splitting flexibility, and non-standard spellings in code-mixed words. Traditional Word Error Rate (WER) often presents a bleaker picture of system performance than what human users perceive. Better aligning evaluation with real-world performance requires capturing permissible orthographic variations, which is extremely challenging for under-resourced Indian languages. Leveraging recent advances in LLMs, we propose a framework for creating benchmarks that capture permissible variations. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that OIWER, by accounting for orthographic variations, reduces pessimistic error rates (an average improvement of 6.3 points), narrows inflated model gaps (e.g., Gemini-Canary performance difference drops from 18.1 to 11.5 points), and aligns more closely with human perception than prior methods like WER-SN by 4.9 points.

AI.tldr: 提出OIWER框架，利用LLM为印度语言ASR系统创建考虑拼写变体的评估基准，相比传统WER能更准确反映真实性能
AI.motivation: 印度语言ASR评估面临拼写变体、后缀分割灵活性和代码混合词非标准拼写等挑战，传统WER过于悲观，无法准确反映人类感知的系统性能
AI.method: 利用LLM创建捕捉允许拼写变体的基准框架，提出OIWER（Orthographic-Informed Word Error Rate）评估方法
AI.result: OIWER平均降低6.3个点的悲观错误率，缩小模型性能差距（如Gemini-Canary差异从18.1降至11.5点），比WER-SN更接近人类感知4.9点
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能更好地对齐印度语言ASR系统的评估与真实世界性能，为资源匮乏语言提供了更准确的评估方法

title: DIVA-GRPO: Enhancing Multimodal Reasoning through Difficulty-Adaptive Variant Advantage
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Siaaaaaa1/DIVA-GRPO
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) with group relative policy optimization (GRPO) has become a widely adopted approach for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). While GRPO enables long-chain reasoning without a critic, it often suffers from sparse rewards on difficult problems and advantage vanishing when group-level rewards are too consistent for overly easy or hard problems. Existing solutions (sample expansion, selective utilization, and indirect reward design) often fail to maintain enough variance in within-group reward distributions to yield clear optimization signals. To address this, we propose DIVA-GRPO, a difficulty-adaptive variant advantage method that adjusts variant difficulty distributions from a global perspective. DIVA-GRPO dynamically assesses problem difficulty, samples variants with appropriate difficulty levels, and calculates advantages across local and global groups using difficulty-weighted and normalized scaling. This alleviates reward sparsity and advantage vanishing while improving training stability. Extensive experiments on six reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DIVA-GRPO outperforms existing approaches in training efficiency and reasoning performance. Code: https://github.com/Siaaaaaa1/DIVA-GRPO

AI.tldr: DIVA-GRPO提出了一种难度自适应变体优势方法，通过动态评估问题难度、采样适当难度级别的变体，并使用难度加权和归一化缩放计算局部和全局组优势，解决了GRPO中奖励稀疏和优势消失的问题。
AI.motivation: GRPO方法虽然无需critic即可实现长链推理，但在困难问题上存在奖励稀疏问题，在过于简单或困难的问题上存在优势消失问题。现有解决方案（样本扩展、选择性利用和间接奖励设计）往往无法维持组内奖励分布的足够方差以提供清晰的优化信号。
AI.method: 提出DIVA-GRPO方法：1）动态评估问题难度；2）采样适当难度级别的变体；3）使用难度加权和归一化缩放计算局部和全局组的优势。该方法从全局角度调整变体难度分布，缓解奖励稀疏和优势消失问题，提高训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在六个推理基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DIVA-GRPO在训练效率和推理性能方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DIVA-GRPO通过难度自适应的变体优势方法有效解决了GRPO中的奖励稀疏和优势消失问题，提高了多模态大语言模型的推理能力训练效果。

title: Symbol-Equivariant Recurrent Reasoning Models
summary: Reasoning problems such as Sudoku and ARC-AGI remain challenging for neural networks. The structured problem solving architecture family of Recurrent Reasoning Models (RRMs), including Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM) and Tiny Recursive Model (TRM), offer a compact alternative to large language models, but currently handle symbol symmetries only implicitly via costly data augmentation. We introduce Symbol-Equivariant Recurrent Reasoning Models (SE-RRMs), which enforce permutation equivariance at the architectural level through symbol-equivariant layers, guaranteeing identical solutions under symbol or color permutations. SE-RRMs outperform prior RRMs on 9x9 Sudoku and generalize from just training on 9x9 to smaller 4x4 and larger 16x16 and 25x25 instances, to which existing RRMs cannot extrapolate. On ARC-AGI-1 and ARC-AGI-2, SE-RRMs achieve competitive performance with substantially less data augmentation and only 2 million parameters, demonstrating that explicitly encoding symmetry improves the robustness and scalability of neural reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/ml-jku/SE-RRM.

AI.tldr: SE-RRMs通过符号等变层在架构层面强制置换等变性，解决了推理模型中的符号对称性问题，在数独和ARC-AGI任务上表现出色，仅需少量参数和数据增强即可实现良好泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的循环推理模型（RRMs）如HRM和TRM虽然提供了紧凑的替代方案，但只能通过昂贵的数据增强隐式处理符号对称性。这限制了模型的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 引入符号等变循环推理模型（SE-RRMs），通过在架构层面使用符号等变层来强制置换等变性，确保在符号或颜色置换下产生相同的解决方案。
AI.result: SE-RRMs在9x9数独上优于先前的RRMs，并能从9x9训练泛化到4x4、16x16和25x25数独，而现有RRMs无法实现这种外推。在ARC-AGI-1和ARC-AGI-2上，仅用200万参数和少量数据增强就取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式编码对称性显著提高了神经推理的鲁棒性和可扩展性，SE-RRMs为紧凑而强大的推理模型提供了有效的架构解决方案。

title: ROKA: Robust Knowledge Unlearning against Adversaries
summary: The need for machine unlearning is critical for data privacy, yet existing methods often cause Knowledge Contamination by unintentionally damaging related knowledge. Such a degraded model performance after unlearning has been recently leveraged for new inference and backdoor attacks. Most studies design adversarial unlearning requests that require poisoning or duplicating training data. In this study, we introduce a new unlearning-induced attack model, namely indirect unlearning attack, which does not require data manipulation but exploits the consequence of knowledge contamination to perturb the model accuracy on security-critical predictions. To mitigate this attack, we introduce a theoretical framework that models neural networks as Neural Knowledge Systems. Based on this, we propose ROKA, a robust unlearning strategy centered on Neural Healing. Unlike conventional unlearning methods that only destroy information, ROKA constructively rebalances the model by nullifying the influence of forgotten data while strengthening its conceptual neighbors. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first to provide a theoretical guarantee for knowledge preservation during unlearning. Evaluations on various large models, including vision transformers, multi-modal models, and large language models, show that ROKA effectively unlearns targets while preserving, or even enhancing, the accuracy of retained data, thereby mitigating the indirect unlearning attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的间接遗忘攻击模型，该攻击利用机器学习遗忘过程中的知识污染来破坏模型在安全关键预测上的准确性，而无需数据操纵。同时提出了ROKA鲁棒遗忘策略，通过神经修复来平衡模型，在遗忘目标数据的同时保护甚至增强相关知识的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习遗忘方法存在知识污染问题，即在遗忘特定数据时会无意中损害相关知识的性能。这种性能下降已被用于新的推理和后门攻击。大多数研究需要数据投毒或复制训练数据来设计对抗性遗忘请求，但本文关注无需数据操纵的攻击方式。
AI.method: 提出了间接遗忘攻击模型，利用知识污染的后果来扰动模型在安全关键预测上的准确性。为缓解此攻击，提出了将神经网络建模为神经知识系统的理论框架，并基于此开发了ROKA鲁棒遗忘策略，采用神经修复方法，通过消除遗忘数据的影响同时加强其概念邻居来建设性地重新平衡模型。
AI.result: 在各种大型模型（包括视觉Transformer、多模态模型和大语言模型）上的评估表明，ROKA能有效遗忘目标数据，同时保护甚至增强保留数据的准确性，从而缓解间接遗忘攻击。这是首个为遗忘过程中的知识保护提供理论保证的工作。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了间接遗忘攻击这一新的攻击模型，并开发了ROKA鲁棒遗忘策略来应对该攻击。ROKA通过神经修复方法在遗忘目标数据的同时保护相关知识，为机器学习遗忘提供了理论保证，并在多种大型模型上验证了其有效性。

title: S-VoCAL: A Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Inferring Speaking Voice Character Attributes in Literature
summary: With recent advances in Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems, synthetic audiobook narration has seen increased interest, reaching unprecedented levels of naturalness. However, larger gaps remain in synthetic narration systems' ability to impersonate fictional characters, and convey complex emotions or prosody. A promising direction to enhance character identification is the assignment of plausible voices to each fictional characters in a book. This step typically requires complex inference of attributes in book-length contexts, such as a character's age, gender, origin or physical health, which in turns requires dedicated benchmark datasets to evaluate extraction systems' performances. We present S-VoCAL (Speaking Voice Character Attributes in Literature), the first dataset and evaluation framework dedicated to evaluate the inference of voice-related fictional character attributes. S-VoCAL entails 8 attributes grounded in sociophonetic studies, and 952 character-book pairs derived from Project Gutenberg. Its evaluation framework addresses the particularities of each attribute, and includes a novel similarity metric based on recent Large Language Models embeddings. We demonstrate the applicability of S-VoCAL by applying a simple Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline to the task of inferring character attributes. Our results suggest that the RAG pipeline reliably infers attributes such as Age or Gender, but struggles on others such as Origin or Physical Health. The dataset and evaluation code are available at https://github.com/AbigailBerthe/S-VoCAL .

AI.tldr: S-VoCAL是首个用于评估虚构角色语音相关属性推断的数据集和评估框架，包含8个社会语音学属性、952个角色-书籍对，并提供了基于LLM嵌入的新型相似度度量。
AI.motivation: 当前TTS系统在合成有声书叙述方面取得了进展，但在模仿虚构角色、传达复杂情感或韵律方面仍有较大差距。为增强角色识别，需要为书中每个虚构角色分配合理的声音，这需要从书籍长度上下文中推断角色的年龄、性别、起源或身体健康等属性，而现有缺乏专门的基准数据集来评估此类提取系统的性能。
AI.method: 创建S-VoCAL数据集，包含8个基于社会语音学研究的属性，从古登堡计划中提取952个角色-书籍对。开发评估框架，针对每个属性的特殊性，并引入基于大型语言模型嵌入的新型相似度度量。应用简单的检索增强生成(RAG)管道来推断角色属性，以展示数据集的适用性。
AI.result: RAG管道在推断年龄或性别等属性时表现可靠，但在起源或身体健康等属性上存在困难。S-VoCAL数据集和评估代码已公开可用。
AI.conclusion: S-VoCAL为评估虚构角色语音相关属性推断提供了首个专门的数据集和评估框架，填补了该领域的空白，有助于改进合成有声书叙述中的角色声音分配系统。

title: HVR-Met: A Hypothesis-Verification-Replaning Agentic System for Extreme Weather Diagnosis
summary: While deep learning-based weather forecasting paradigms have made significant strides, addressing extreme weather diagnostics remains a formidable challenge. This gap exists primarily because the diagnostic process demands sophisticated multi-step logical reasoning, dynamic tool invocation, and expert-level prior judgment. Although agents possess inherent advantages in task decomposition and autonomous execution, current architectures are still hampered by critical bottlenecks: inadequate expert knowledge integration, a lack of professional-grade iterative reasoning loops, and the absence of fine-grained validation and evaluation systems for complex workflows under extreme conditions. To this end, we propose HVR-Met, a multi-agent meteorological diagnostic system characterized by the deep integration of expert knowledge. Its central innovation is the ``Hypothesis-Verification-Replanning'' closed-loop mechanism, which facilitates sophisticated iterative reasoning for anomalous meteorological signals during extreme weather events. To bridge gaps within existing evaluation frameworks, we further introduce a novel benchmark focused on atomic-level subtasks. Experimental evidence demonstrates that the system excels in complex diagnostic scenarios.

AI.tldr: HVR-Met是一个基于多智能体的气象诊断系统，采用"假设-验证-重规划"闭环机制，专门针对极端天气诊断任务，通过深度集成专家知识解决现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的天气预报方法在极端天气诊断方面存在显著不足，诊断过程需要复杂的多步逻辑推理、动态工具调用和专家级先验判断。现有智能体架构存在专家知识整合不足、缺乏专业级迭代推理循环、以及复杂工作流验证评估系统缺失等瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出HVR-Met多智能体气象诊断系统，核心创新是"假设-验证-重规划"闭环机制，支持极端天气事件中异常气象信号的复杂迭代推理。系统深度集成专家知识，并引入原子级子任务的新基准来弥补现有评估框架的不足。
AI.result: 实验证据表明，该系统在复杂诊断场景中表现出色，能够有效处理极端天气诊断任务。
AI.conclusion: HVR-Met通过创新的闭环机制和专家知识深度集成，成功解决了极端天气诊断中的关键挑战，为气象诊断系统的发展提供了新方向。

title: Conformal Policy Control
summary: An agent must try new behaviors to explore and improve. In high-stakes environments, an agent that violates safety constraints may cause harm and must be taken offline, curtailing any future interaction. Imitating old behavior is safe, but excessive conservatism discourages exploration. How much behavior change is too much? We show how to use any safe reference policy as a probabilistic regulator for any optimized but untested policy. Conformal calibration on data from the safe policy determines how aggressively the new policy can act, while provably enforcing the user's declared risk tolerance. Unlike conservative optimization methods, we do not assume the user has identified the correct model class nor tuned any hyperparameters. Unlike previous conformal methods, our theory provides finite-sample guarantees even for non-monotonic bounded constraint functions. Our experiments on applications ranging from natural language question answering to biomolecular engineering show that safe exploration is not only possible from the first moment of deployment, but can also improve performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用安全参考策略作为概率调节器的方法，通过保形校准确定新策略的激进程度，在保证用户风险容忍度的同时实现安全探索。
AI.motivation: 在高风险环境中，智能体探索新行为可能违反安全约束造成伤害，导致被强制下线。模仿旧行为虽然安全但过于保守，阻碍探索。需要平衡探索与安全。
AI.method: 使用任何安全参考策略作为概率调节器，通过保形校准从安全策略数据中确定新策略的行动激进程度，确保满足用户声明的风险容忍度。
AI.result: 方法提供有限样本保证，适用于非单调有界约束函数。实验涵盖自然语言问答到生物分子工程等多个应用，显示安全探索不仅可能，还能提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了从部署开始的安全探索，无需假设正确的模型类别或调整超参数，为高风险环境中的智能体探索提供了理论保证的实用解决方案。

title: Rooted Absorbed Prefix Trajectory Balance with Submodular Replay for GFlowNet Training
