summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) enable fine-tuning large language models to approximate reward-proportional posteriors, but they remain prone to mode collapse, manifesting as prefix collapse and length bias. We attribute this to two factors: (i) weak credit assignment to early prefixes, and (ii) biased replay that induces a shifted, non-representative training flow distribution. We propose Rooted absorbed prefix Trajectory Balance RapTB, an objective that anchors subtrajectory supervision at the root and propagates terminal rewards to intermediate prefixes via absorbed suffix-based backups, providing dense prefix-level learning signals. To mitigate replay-induced distribution shift, we further introduce SubM, a submodular replay refresh strategy that promotes both high reward and diversity. Empirically, on tasks such as molecule generation with LLM using SMILES strings, RapTB combined with SubM consistently improves optimization performance and molecular diversity while preserving high validity.

AI.tldr: RapTB+SubM方法解决GFlowNets在语言模型微调中的模式崩溃问题，通过根锚定轨迹平衡和子模重放策略提升优化性能和多样性。
AI.motivation: 生成流网络(GFlowNets)在微调大语言模型以近似奖励比例后验时，容易发生模式崩溃，表现为前缀崩溃和长度偏差。这源于两个因素：(i)对早期前缀的弱信用分配，(ii)导致训练流分布偏移的偏置重放。
AI.method: 提出RapTB（根锚定吸收前缀轨迹平衡）目标，将子轨迹监督锚定在根节点，通过基于吸收后缀的回溯将终端奖励传播到中间前缀，提供密集的前缀级学习信号。同时引入SubM（子模重放刷新策略），通过子模优化促进高奖励和多样性，减轻重放引起的分布偏移。
AI.result: 在分子生成（使用LLM和SMILES字符串）等任务上，RapTB结合SubM能持续提升优化性能和分子多样性，同时保持高有效性。
AI.conclusion: RapTB+SubM方法有效解决了GFlowNets的模式崩溃问题，通过改进信用分配和重放策略，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了多样性。

title: Qayyem: A Real-time Platform for Scoring Proficiency of Arabic Essays
summary: Over the past years, Automated Essay Scoring (AES) systems have gained increasing attention as scalable and consistent solutions for assessing the proficiency of student writing. Despite recent progress, support for Arabic AES remains limited due to linguistic complexity and scarcity of large publicly-available annotated datasets. In this work, we present Qayyem, a Web-based platform designed to support Arabic AES by providing an integrated workflow for assignment creation, batch essay upload, scoring configuration, and per-trait essay evaluation. Qayyem abstracts the technical complexity of interacting with scoring server APIs, allowing instructors to access advanced scoring services through a user-friendly interface. The platform deploys a number of state-of-the-art Arabic essay scoring models with different effectiveness and efficiency figures.

AI.tldr: Qayyem是一个基于Web的阿拉伯语自动作文评分平台，通过集成工作流程简化评分过程，部署了多种最先进的阿拉伯语作文评分模型。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯语自动作文评分系统面临语言复杂性和公开标注数据集稀缺的挑战，现有支持有限，需要更易用的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于Web的平台Qayyem，提供作业创建、批量作文上传、评分配置和分项评估的集成工作流程，抽象了与评分服务器API交互的技术复杂性。
AI.result: Qayyem平台部署了多种具有不同效果和效率指标的最先进阿拉伯语作文评分模型，通过用户友好界面让教师能够访问高级评分服务。
AI.conclusion: Qayyem平台通过简化技术复杂性，为阿拉伯语自动作文评分提供了实用解决方案，有助于解决该领域的数据稀缺和技术访问障碍问题。

title: FCN-LLM: Empower LLM for Brain Functional Connectivity Network Understanding via Graph-level Multi-task Instruction Tuning
summary: Large Language Models have achieved remarkable success in language understanding and reasoning, and their multimodal extensions enable comprehension of images, video, and audio. Inspired by this, foundation models for brain functional connectivity networks derived from resting-state fMRI have shown promise in clinical tasks. However, existing methods do not align FCNs with the text modality, limiting the ability of LLMs to directly understand FCNs. To address this, we propose FCN-LLM, a framework that enables LLMs to understand FCNs through graph-level, multi-task instruction tuning. Our approach employs a multi-scale FCN encoder capturing brain-region, functional subnetwork, and whole-brain features, projecting them into the semantic space of LLM. We design multi-paradigm instruction tasks covering 19 subject-specific attributes across demographics, phenotypes, and psychiatric conditions. A multi-stage learning strategy first aligns FCN embeddings with the LLM and then jointly fine-tunes the entire model to capture high-level semantic information. Experiments on a large-scale, multi-site FCN database show that FCN-LLM achieves strong zero-shot generalization on unseen datasets, outperforming conventional supervised and foundation models. This work introduces a new paradigm for integrating brain functional networks with LLMs, offering a flexible and interpretable framework for neuroscience.

AI.tldr: FCN-LLM：通过图级多任务指令微调，使大语言模型能够理解大脑功能连接网络的新框架
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能将大脑功能连接网络与文本模态对齐，限制了LLM直接理解FCN的能力。需要开发一种能够将大脑网络与LLM语义空间对齐的框架。
AI.method: 提出FCN-LLM框架，采用多尺度FCN编码器捕获脑区、功能子网络和全脑特征，将其投影到LLM语义空间。设计多范式指令任务覆盖19个受试者特定属性，采用多阶段学习策略。
AI.result: 在大规模多站点FCN数据库上的实验表明，FCN-LLM在未见数据集上实现了强大的零样本泛化能力，优于传统监督学习和基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为整合大脑功能网络与LLM引入了新范式，为神经科学研究提供了灵活且可解释的框架。

title: Partial Causal Structure Learning for Valid Selective Conformal Inference under Interventions
summary: Selective conformal prediction can yield substantially tighter uncertainty sets when we can identify calibration examples that are exchangeable with the test example. In interventional settings, such as perturbation experiments in genomics, exchangeability often holds only within subsets of interventions that leave a target variable "unaffected" (e.g., non-descendants of an intervened node in a causal graph). We study the practical regime where this invariance structure is unknown and must be learned from data. Our contributions are: (i) a contamination-robust conformal coverage theorem that quantifies how misclassification of "unaffected" calibration examples degrades coverage via an explicit function $g(δ,n)$ of the contamination fraction and calibration set size, providing a finite-sample lower bound that holds for arbitrary contaminating distributions; (ii) a task-driven partial causal learning formulation that estimates only the binary descendant indicators $Z_{a,i}=\mathbf{1}\{i\in\mathrm{desc}(a)\}$ needed for selective calibration, rather than the full causal graph; and (iii) algorithms for descendant discovery via perturbation intersection patterns (differentially affected variable set intersections across interventions), and for approximate distance-to-intervention estimation via local invariant causal prediction. We provide recovery conditions under which contamination is controlled. Experiments on synthetic linear structural equation models (SEMs) validate the bound: under controlled contamination up to $δ=0.30$, the corrected procedure maintains $\ge 0.95$ coverage while uncorrected selective CP degrades to $0.867$. A proof-of-concept on Replogle K562 CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) perturbation data demonstrates applicability to real genomic screens.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在因果干预设置下的选择性共形预测方法，通过学习未知的因果结构来识别与测试样本可交换的校准样本，并提供污染鲁棒的覆盖保证。
AI.motivation: 在基因组学等干预性实验中，可交换性通常只在某些干预子集中成立（如因果图中干预节点的非后代）。当这种不变性结构未知时，需要从数据中学习，同时要处理校准样本分类错误导致的覆盖退化问题。
AI.method: 提出：(1) 污染鲁棒的共形覆盖定理，量化"未受影响"校准样本误分类对覆盖的影响；(2) 任务驱动的部分因果学习，仅估计二元后代指示器而非完整因果图；(3) 基于干预交集模式的算法和局部不变因果预测的距离估计方法。
AI.result: 在线性结构方程模型的合成实验中，在污染率δ=0.30时，校正后的方法保持≥0.95覆盖，而未校正的选择性共形预测退化到0.867。在Replogle K562 CRISPRi扰动数据上的概念验证展示了实际应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在因果结构未知的干预设置中实现鲁棒的选择性共形预测，通过部分因果学习和污染控制机制，在保持高覆盖的同时获得更紧的不确定性集合。

title: Benchmarking Few-shot Transferability of Pre-trained Models with Improved Evaluation Protocols
summary: Few-shot transfer has been revolutionized by stronger pre-trained models and improved adaptation algorithms.However, there lacks a unified, rigorous evaluation protocol that is both challenging and realistic for real-world usage. In this work, we establish FEWTRANS, a comprehensive benchmark containing 10 diverse datasets, and propose the Hyperparameter Ensemble (HPE) protocol to overcome the "validation set illusion" in data-scarce regimes. Our empirical findings demonstrate that the choice of pre-trained model is the dominant factor for performance, while many sophisticated transfer methods offer negligible practical advantages over a simple full-parameter fine-tuning baseline. To explain this surprising effectiveness, we provide an in-depth mechanistic analysis showing that full fine-tuning succeeds via distributed micro-adjustments and more flexible reshaping of high-level semantic presentations without suffering from overfitting. Additionally, we quantify the performance collapse of multimodal models in specialized domains as a result of linguistic rarity using adjusted Zipf frequency scores. By releasing FEWTRANS, we aim to provide a rigorous "ruler" to streamline reproducible advances in few-shot transfer learning research. We make the FEWTRANS benchmark publicly available at https://github.com/Frankluox/FewTrans.

AI.tldr: FEWTRANS是一个全面的少样本迁移学习基准，包含10个多样化数据集，并提出超参数集成协议解决数据稀缺场景下的验证集幻觉问题。研究发现预训练模型选择是性能主导因素，而许多复杂迁移方法相比简单的全参数微调基线并无明显优势。
AI.motivation: 当前少样本迁移学习缺乏统一、严谨且具有挑战性的评估协议，无法满足实际应用需求。需要建立一个全面的基准来评估不同方法在真实场景下的表现。
AI.method: 提出了FEWTRANS基准，包含10个多样化数据集，并设计了超参数集成协议来克服数据稀缺场景下的验证集幻觉问题。通过深入机制分析，探索全参数微调的有效性原理。
AI.result: 研究发现预训练模型选择是性能主导因素，许多复杂迁移方法相比简单的全参数微调基线并无明显优势。全参数微调通过分布式微调和高层语义表示的灵活重塑获得成功，且不会过拟合。同时量化了多模态模型在专业领域因语言稀有性导致的性能崩溃。
AI.conclusion: FEWTRANS基准为少样本迁移学习研究提供了严谨的评估标准，揭示了预训练模型质量的重要性以及简单全参数微调的有效性，有助于推动该领域的可重复性研究进展。

title: Thoth: Mid-Training Bridges LLMs to Time Series Understanding
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable success in general-purpose reasoning. However, they still struggle to understand and reason about time series data, which limits their effectiveness in decision-making scenarios that depend on temporal dynamics. In this paper, we propose Thoth, the first family of mid-trained LLMs with general-purpose time series understanding capabilities. As a pivotal intermediate stage, mid-training achieves task- and domain-agnostic alignment between time series and natural language, for which we construct Book-of-Thoth, a high-quality, time-series-centric mid-training corpus. Book-of-Thoth enables both time-series-to-text and text-to-time-series generation, equipping LLMs with a foundational grasp of temporal patterns. To better evaluate advanced reasoning capabilities, we further present KnoTS, a novel benchmark of knowledge-intensive time series understanding, designed for joint reasoning over temporal patterns and domain knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate that mid-training with Book-of-Thoth enables Thoth to significantly outperform its base model and advanced LLMs across a range of time series question answering benchmarks. Moreover, Thoth exhibits superior capabilities when fine-tuned under data scarcity, underscoring the effectiveness of mid-training for time series understanding. Code is available at: https://github.com/thuml/Thoth.

AI.tldr: Thoth是首个具有通用时间序列理解能力的中训练LLM家族，通过Book-of-Thoth语料库实现时间序列与自然语言的跨模态对齐，在时间序列问答任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM在通用推理方面表现出色，但在理解和推理时间序列数据方面仍有局限，这限制了其在依赖时间动态的决策场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 提出Thoth模型家族，采用中训练策略构建Book-of-Thoth语料库，实现时间序列到文本和文本到时间序列的双向生成，建立时间序列与自然语言的任务和领域无关对齐。
AI.result: Thoth在多个时间序列问答基准测试中显著优于基础模型和先进LLM，在数据稀缺情况下微调时表现出卓越能力，证明了中训练对时间序列理解的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 中训练策略通过Book-of-Thoth语料库成功赋予LLM通用时间序列理解能力，为解决时间序列推理问题提供了有效方案，在数据稀缺场景下尤其有价值。

title: AutoSkill: Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning via Skill Self-Evolution
summary: In practical LLM applications, users repeatedly express stable preferences and requirements, such as reducing hallucinations, following institutional writing conventions, or avoiding overly technical wording, yet such interaction experience is seldom consolidated into reusable knowledge. Consequently, LLM agents often fail to accumulate personalized capabilities across sessions. We present AutoSkill, an experience-driven lifelong learning framework that enables LLM agents to automatically derive, maintain, and reuse skills from dialogue and interaction traces. AutoSkill abstracts skills from user experience, supports their continual self-evolution, and dynamically injects relevant skills into future requests without retraining the underlying model. Designed as a model-agnostic plugin layer, it is compatible with existing LLMs and introduces a standardized skill representation for sharing and transfer across agents, users, and tasks. In this way, AutoSkill turns ephemeral interaction experience into explicit, reusable, and composable capabilities. This paper describes the motivation, architecture, skill lifecycle, and implementation of AutoSkill, and positions it with respect to prior work on memory, retrieval, personalization, and agentic systems. AutoSkill highlights a practical and scalable path toward lifelong personalized agents and personal digital surrogates.

AI.tldr: AutoSkill是一个经验驱动的终身学习框架，让LLM代理能够从对话和交互轨迹中自动提取、维护和复用技能，将短暂的交互经验转化为显式、可复用、可组合的能力。
AI.motivation: 在实际LLM应用中，用户反复表达稳定的偏好和需求（如减少幻觉、遵循机构写作规范、避免过于技术性的措辞），但这些交互经验很少被整合为可复用的知识，导致LLM代理无法跨会话积累个性化能力。
AI.method: AutoSkill作为模型无关的插件层，从用户经验中抽象技能，支持技能的持续自我演化，并动态将相关技能注入未来请求中，无需重新训练底层模型。它采用标准化的技能表示，可在代理、用户和任务间共享和迁移。
AI.result: 该框架将短暂的交互经验转化为显式、可复用、可组合的能力，为终身个性化代理和个人数字替身提供了实用且可扩展的路径。
AI.conclusion: AutoSkill通过经验驱动的终身学习框架，解决了LLM代理无法跨会话积累个性化能力的问题，为实现终身个性化代理和个人数字替身提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Analyzing Physical Adversarial Example Threats to Machine Learning in Election Systems
summary: Developments in the machine learning voting domain have shown both promising results and risks. Trained models perform well on ballot classification tasks (> 99% accuracy) but are at risk from adversarial example attacks that cause misclassifications. In this paper, we analyze an attacker who seeks to deploy adversarial examples against machine learning ballot classifiers to compromise a U.S. election. We first derive a probabilistic framework for determining the number of adversarial example ballots that must be printed to flip an election, in terms of the probability of each candidate winning and the total number of ballots cast. Second, it is an open question as to which type of adversarial example is most effective when physically printed in the voting domain. We analyze six different types of adversarial example attacks: l_infinity-APGD, l2-APGD, l1-APGD, l0 PGD, l0 + l_infinity PGD, and l0 + sigma-map PGD. Our experiments include physical realizations of 144,000 adversarial examples through printing and scanning with four different machine learning models. We empirically demonstrate an analysis gap between the physical and digital domains, wherein attacks most effective in the digital domain (l2 and l_infinity) differ from those most effective in the physical domain (l1 and l2, depending on the model). By unifying a probabilistic election framework with digital and physical adversarial example evaluations, we move beyond prior close race analyses to explicitly quantify when and how adversarial ballot manipulation could alter outcomes.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了针对机器学习选票分类器的对抗样本攻击如何影响美国选举，提出了计算翻转选举所需对抗选票数量的概率框架，并通过物理打印实验比较了六种对抗攻击在数字域和物理域的有效性差异。
AI.motivation: 机器学习选票分类器虽然准确率高（>99%），但面临对抗样本攻击的风险。需要研究攻击者如何通过部署物理对抗样本来操纵选举结果，并量化这种威胁的实际影响。
AI.method: 1. 建立概率框架，计算翻转选举所需对抗选票数量（基于候选人获胜概率和总选票数）；2. 分析六种对抗攻击方法（l_infinity-APGD, l2-APGD, l1-APGD, l0 PGD, l0 + l_infinity PGD, l0 + sigma-map PGD）；3. 通过打印和扫描14.4万个对抗样本进行物理实验，使用四种机器学习模型评估攻击效果。
AI.result: 1. 数字域最有效的攻击（l2和l_infinity）与物理域最有效的攻击（l1和l2，取决于模型）存在差异；2. 发现了数字域和物理域之间的分析差距；3. 通过统一概率选举框架和对抗样本评估，能够量化对抗选票操纵何时以及如何改变选举结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究超越了先前仅分析势均力敌选举的方法，通过结合概率框架和物理实验，为评估对抗样本对选举安全的具体威胁提供了量化工具，揭示了数字域和物理域攻击效果的差异对选举安全评估的重要性。

title: GroupGPT: A Token-efficient and Privacy-preserving Agentic Framework for Multi-User Chat Assistant
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled increasingly capable chatbots. However, most existing systems focus on single-user settings and do not generalize well to multi-user group chats, where agents require more proactive and accurate intervention under complex, evolving contexts. Existing approaches typically rely on LLMs for both reasoning and generation, leading to high token consumption, limited scalability, and potential privacy risks. To address these challenges, we propose GroupGPT, a token-efficient and privacy-preserving agentic framework for multi-user chat assistant. GroupGPT adopts a small-large model collaborative architecture to decouple intervention timing from response generation, enabling efficient and accurate decision-making. The framework also supports multimodal inputs, including memes, images, videos, and voice messages. We further introduce MUIR, a benchmark dataset for multi-user chat assistant intervention reasoning. MUIR contains 2,500 annotated group chat segments with intervention labels and rationales, supporting evaluation of timing accuracy and response quality. We evaluate a range of models on MUIR, from large language models to smaller counterparts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GroupGPT produces accurate and well-timed responses, achieving an average score of 4.72/5.0 in LLM-based evaluation, and is well received by users across diverse group chat scenarios. Moreover, GroupGPT reduces token usage by up to 3 times compared to baseline methods, while providing privacy sanitization of user messages before cloud transmission. Code is available at: https://github.com/Eliot-Shen/GroupGPT .

AI.tldr: GroupGPT：一个面向多用户群聊的token高效、隐私保护的智能体框架，采用大小模型协作架构，在MUIR基准上表现优异，token使用减少3倍。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM聊天机器人主要针对单用户场景，在多用户群聊中表现不佳，需要更主动、准确的干预。现有方法依赖LLM进行推理和生成，导致token消耗高、可扩展性有限、存在隐私风险。
AI.method: 提出GroupGPT框架，采用大小模型协作架构，将干预时机决策与响应生成解耦。使用小模型进行时机检测，大模型生成响应，支持多模态输入（表情包、图片、视频、语音）。引入MUIR基准数据集，包含2500个标注的群聊片段。
AI.result: GroupGPT在LLM评估中获得平均4.72/5.0分，在多样化群聊场景中受到用户好评。相比基线方法，token使用减少高达3倍，同时提供用户消息的隐私净化功能。
AI.conclusion: GroupGPT是一个高效、隐私保护的多用户群聊助手框架，通过大小模型协作解决了现有方法的token消耗和隐私问题，在MUIR基准上表现出色。

title: DeepResearch-9K: A Challenging Benchmark Dataset of Deep-Research Agent
summary: Deep-research agents are capable of executing multi-step web exploration, targeted retrieval, and sophisticated question answering. Despite their powerful capabilities, deep-research agents face two critical bottlenecks: (1) the lack of large-scale, challenging datasets with real-world difficulty, and (2) the absence of accessible, open-source frameworks for data synthesis and agent training. To bridge these gaps, we first construct DeepResearch-9K, a large-scale challenging dataset specifically designed for deep-research scenarios built from open-source multi-hop question-answering (QA) datasets via a low-cost autonomous pipeline. Notably, it consists of (1) 9000 questions spanning three difficulty levels from L1 to L3 (2) high-quality search trajectories with reasoning chains from Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B, a state-of-the-art deep-research agent, and (3) verifiable answers. Furthermore, we develop an open-source training framework DeepResearch-R1 that supports (1) multi-turn web interactions, (2) different reinforcement learning (RL) approaches, and (3) different reward models such as rule-based outcome reward and LLM-as-judge feedback. Finally, empirical results demonstrate that agents trained on DeepResearch-9K under our DeepResearch-R1 achieve state-of-the-art results on challenging deep-research benchmarks. We release the DeepResearch-9K dataset on https://huggingface.co/datasets/artillerywu/DeepResearch-9K and the code of DeepResearch-R1 on https://github.com/Applied-Machine-Learning-Lab/DeepResearch-R1.

AI.tldr: 构建了DeepResearch-9K大规模挑战性数据集和DeepResearch-R1开源训练框架，用于解决深度研究智能体面临的数据集缺乏和训练框架不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度研究智能体虽然能执行多步网络探索、定向检索和复杂问答，但面临两大瓶颈：1) 缺乏大规模、具有真实世界难度的挑战性数据集；2) 缺少可访问的开源数据合成和智能体训练框架。
AI.method: 1) 通过低成本自主流水线从开源多跳问答数据集构建DeepResearch-9K数据集，包含9000个问题、高质量搜索轨迹和可验证答案；2) 开发DeepResearch-R1开源训练框架，支持多轮网络交互、不同强化学习方法和奖励模型。
AI.result: 在DeepResearch-9K数据集上使用DeepResearch-R1训练的智能体，在挑战性深度研究基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建大规模数据集和开源训练框架，有效解决了深度研究智能体发展的关键瓶颈，为社区提供了有价值的资源和工具。

title: Heaviside Low-Rank Support Matrix Machine
summary: Support matrix machine (SMM) is an emerging classification framework that directly handles matrix-structured observations, thereby avoiding the spatial correlations destroyed by vectorization. However, most existing SMM variants rely on convex or nonconvex surrogate loss functions, which may lead to high sensitivity to noise. To address this issue, we propose a novel Heaviside low-rank SMM model called HL-SMM, which leverages the Heaviside loss instead of the common hinge or ramp losses for robustness. Moreover, the low-rank constraint is adopted to accurately characterize the inherent global structure. In theory, we analyze the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) points and rigorously prove the sufficient and necessary conditions. In algorithms, we develop an effective proximal alternating minimization (PAM) scheme, where all subproblems have closed-form solutions. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets validate that the proposed HL-SMM achieves superior classification accuracy and robustness compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Heaviside损失的低秩支持矩阵机HL-SMM，通过Heaviside损失提升对噪声的鲁棒性，并采用低秩约束捕捉矩阵数据的全局结构。
AI.motivation: 现有支持矩阵机大多使用凸或非凸替代损失函数，对噪声敏感。需要开发更鲁棒的分类方法，同时保持矩阵数据的空间相关性。
AI.method: 提出HL-SMM模型：1) 使用Heaviside损失替代常用的hinge或ramp损失以增强鲁棒性；2) 采用低秩约束准确刻画矩阵数据的固有全局结构；3) 开发有效的近端交替最小化算法，所有子问题都有闭式解。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验验证了HL-SMM相比现有方法具有更优的分类精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HL-SMM通过Heaviside损失和低秩约束，有效解决了传统支持矩阵机对噪声敏感的问题，在保持矩阵结构的同时实现了鲁棒的分类性能。

title: Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network for Early Detection of Pornography Addiction in Adolescents Based on Electroencephalogram Signals
summary: Adolescent pornography addiction requires early detection based on objective neurobiological biomarkers because self-report is prone to subjective bias due to social stigma. Conventional machine learning has not been able to model dynamic functional connectivity of the brain that fluctuates temporally during addictive stimulus exposure. This study proposes a state-of-the-art Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network (DST-GNN) that integrates Phase Lag Index (PLI)-based Graph Attention Network (GAT) for spatial modeling and Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit (BiGRU) for temporal dynamics. The dataset consists of 14 adolescents (7 addicted, 7 healthy) with 19-channel EEG across 9 experimental conditions. Leave-One-Subject-Out Cross Validation (LOSO-CV) evaluation shows F1-Score of 71.00%$\pm$12.10% and recall of 85.71%, a 104% improvement compared to baseline. Ablation study confirms temporal contribution of 21% and PLI graph construction of 57%. Frontal-central regions (Fz, Cz, C3, C4) are identified as dominant biomarkers with Beta contribution of 58.9% and Hjorth of 31.2%, while Cz-T7 connectivity is consistent as a trait-level biomarker for objective screening.

AI.tldr: 提出动态时空图神经网络(DST-GNN)用于青少年色情成瘾的客观神经生物标志物检测，整合PLI图注意力网络和双向GRU，相比基线提升104%
AI.motivation: 青少年色情成瘾需要基于客观神经生物标志物的早期检测，因为自我报告受社会污名影响存在主观偏差，传统机器学习无法建模成瘾刺激暴露期间大脑动态功能连接的时变特性
AI.method: 提出动态时空图神经网络(DST-GNN)，整合基于相位滞后指数(PLI)的图注意力网络(GAT)进行空间建模，以及双向门控循环单元(BiGRU)捕捉时间动态性。使用14名青少年(7名成瘾，7名健康)的19通道EEG数据，涵盖9种实验条件
AI.result: 留一被试交叉验证(LOSO-CV)显示F1分数为71.00%±12.10%，召回率为85.71%，相比基线提升104%。消融研究确认时间贡献为21%，PLI图构建贡献为57%。识别出额中央区(Fz, Cz, C3, C4)为主要生物标志物，Beta贡献58.9%，Hjorth贡献31.2%，Cz-T7连接性作为客观筛查的特质水平生物标志物
AI.conclusion: DST-GNN能有效检测青少年色情成瘾的神经生物标志物，相比传统方法有显著改进，识别出关键的脑区和连接特征，为客观筛查提供了可靠方法

title: How RL Unlocks the Aha Moment in Geometric Interleaved Reasoning
summary: Solving complex geometric problems inherently requires interleaved reasoning: a tight alternation between constructing diagrams and performing logical deductions. Although recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in visual generation and plotting, we identify a counter-intuitive and underexplored phenomenon. Naively applying Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on interleaved plot-solution data leads to a substantial degradation in reasoning performance compared to text-only baselines. We argue that this failure stems from a fundamental limitation of SFT, which primarily induces distributional alignment: the model learns to reproduce the surface format of interleaved plotting but fails to internalize the causal dependency between the generated plot and reasoning steps. To overcome this limitation, we propose Faire (Functional alignment for interleaved reasoning), a reinforcement learning framework that enforces three casual constraints to move beyond superficial imitation toward functional alignment. Extensive experiments show that Faire induces a qualitative shift in model behavior in which the plotting is effectively internalized, yielding competitive performance on challenging geometric reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 论文发现多模态大语言模型在几何推理中，简单使用监督微调会导致推理性能下降，并提出基于强化学习的Faire框架来解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 解决复杂几何问题需要图表构建与逻辑推理的交替进行。虽然多模态大语言模型在视觉生成方面表现出色，但作者发现直接使用监督微调处理交替的绘图-解题数据会导致推理性能显著下降，这源于监督微调只能实现分布对齐而非因果依赖学习。
AI.method: 提出Faire（功能对齐的交替推理）框架，这是一个强化学习框架，通过强制执行三个因果约束来超越表面模仿，实现功能对齐，使模型能够内化绘图与推理步骤之间的因果依赖关系。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Faire能够引发模型行为的质变，使绘图被有效内化，在具有挑战性的几何推理基准测试中取得了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 对于需要交替推理的任务，简单的监督微调不足以学习绘图与推理之间的因果依赖关系，而Faire框架通过强化学习实现功能对齐，显著提升了多模态大语言模型在几何推理任务中的性能。

title: Semantic XPath: Structured Agentic Memory Access for Conversational AI
summary: Conversational AI (ConvAI) agents increasingly maintain structured memory to support long-term, task-oriented interactions. In-context memory approaches append the growing history to the model input, which scales poorly under context-window limits. RAG-based methods retrieve request-relevant information, but most assume flat memory collections and ignore structure. We propose Semantic XPath, a tree-structured memory module to access and update structured conversational memory. Semantic XPath improves performance over flat-RAG baselines by 176.7% while using only 9.1% of the tokens required by in-context memory. We also introduce SemanticXPath Chat, an end-to-end ConvAI demo system that visualizes the structured memory and query execution details. Overall, this paper demonstrates a candidate for the next generation of long-term, task-oriented ConvAI systems built on structured memory.

AI.tldr: 提出Semantic XPath树状结构化记忆模块，用于访问和更新对话记忆，相比平面RAG基线性能提升176.7%，仅需9.1%的token
AI.motivation: 当前对话AI系统在处理长期任务导向对话时面临挑战：上下文记忆方法受限于窗口大小，RAG方法大多假设平面记忆结构而忽略结构化信息
AI.method: 提出Semantic XPath树状结构化记忆模块，支持结构化对话记忆的访问和更新，并开发了SemanticXPath Chat端到端演示系统
AI.result: 相比平面RAG基线性能提升176.7%，仅需9.1%的token；相比上下文记忆方法显著减少token使用
AI.conclusion: Semantic XPath展示了基于结构化记忆构建下一代长期任务导向对话AI系统的潜力

title: CARD: Towards Conditional Design of Multi-agent Topological Structures
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems have shown strong capabilities in tasks such as code generation and collaborative reasoning. However, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems critically depend on their communication topology, which is often fixed or statically learned, ignoring real-world dynamics such as model upgrades, API (or tool) changes, or knowledge source variability. To address this limitation, we propose CARD (Conditional Agentic Graph Designer), a conditional graph-generation framework that instantiates AMACP, a protocol for adaptive multi-agent communication. CARD explicitly incorporates dynamic environmental signals into graph construction, enabling topology adaptation at both training and runtime. Through a conditional variational graph encoder and environment-aware optimization, CARD produces communication structures that are both effective and resilient to shifts in model capability or resource availability. Empirical results on HumanEval, MATH, and MMLU demonstrate that CARD consistently outperforms static and prompt-based baselines, achieving higher accuracy and robustness across diverse conditions. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Warma10032/CARD.

AI.tldr: CARD是一个条件图生成框架，通过动态环境信号自适应调整多智能体通信拓扑，提升LLM多智能体系统的效果和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑通常是固定或静态学习的，忽略了模型升级、API变化、知识源变化等现实动态，限制了系统的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出CARD（条件智能体图设计器）框架，实现AMACP协议，通过条件变分图编码器和环境感知优化，将动态环境信号显式纳入图构建，支持训练和运行时拓扑自适应。
AI.result: 在HumanEval、MATH和MMLU基准测试中，CARD持续优于静态和基于提示的基线方法，在不同条件下实现了更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CARD通过动态适应通信拓扑有效解决了LLM多智能体系统在现实动态环境中的局限性，为构建更强大和鲁棒的多智能体系统提供了新方向。

title: Incremental LTLf Synthesis
summary: In this paper, we study incremental LTLf synthesis -- a form of reactive synthesis where the goals are given incrementally while in execution. In other words, the protagonist agent is already executing a strategy for a certain goal when it receives a new goal: at this point, the agent has to abandon the current strategy and synthesize a new strategy still fulfilling the original goal, which was given at the beginning, as well as the new goal, starting from the current instant. In this paper, we formally define the problem of incremental synthesis and study its solution. We propose a solution technique that efficiently performs incremental synthesis for multiple LTLf goals by leveraging auxiliary data structures constructed during automata-based synthesis. We also consider an alternative solution technique based on LTLf formula progression. We show that, in spite of the fact that formula progression can generate formulas that are exponentially larger than the original ones, their minimal automata remain bounded in size by that of the original formula. On the other hand, we show experimentally that, if implemented naively, i.e., by actually computing the automaton of the progressed LTLf formulas from scratch every time a new goal arrives, the solution based on formula progression is not competitive.

AI.tldr: 研究增量LTLf综合问题，即执行过程中逐步接收目标时的反应式综合，提出两种解决方案并比较性能
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，智能体在执行过程中可能不断接收到新的目标要求，需要在不放弃原有目标的前提下动态调整策略，这需要解决增量综合问题
AI.method: 提出两种解决方案：1) 基于自动机辅助数据结构的增量综合方法；2) 基于LTLf公式递进的替代方案，并分析其理论性质
AI.result: 证明公式递进方法虽然可能产生指数级增长的公式，但其最小自动机大小受限于原公式；实验显示如果每次从头计算自动机，公式递进方法性能不佳
AI.conclusion: 增量LTLf综合问题有可行的解决方案，基于自动机辅助数据结构的方法更高效，为动态环境下的反应式综合提供了理论基础

title: A Polynomial-Time Axiomatic Alternative to SHAP for Feature Attribution
comment: 28 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code will be released
summary:
In this paper, we provide a theoretically grounded and computationally efficient alternative to SHAP. To this end, we study feature attribution through the lens of cooperative game theory by formulating a class of XAI--TU games. Building on this formulation, we investigate equal-surplus-type and proportional-allocation-type attribution rules and propose a low-cost attribution rule, ESENSC_rev2, constructed by combining two polynomial-time closed-form rules while ensuring the null-player property in the XAI--TU domain.
  Extensive experiments on tabular prediction tasks demonstrate that ESENSC_rev2 closely approximates exact SHAP while substantially improving scalability as the number of features increases. These empirical results indicate that equal-surplus-type attribution rules can achieve favorable trade-offs between computational cost and approximation accuracy in high-dimensional explainability settings.
  To provide theoretical foundations for these findings, we establish an axiomatic characterization showing that ESENSC_rev2 is uniquely determined by efficiency, the null-player axiom, a restricted differential marginality principle, an intermediate inessential-game property, and axioms that reduce computational requirements. Our results suggest that axiomatically justified and computationally efficient attribution rules can serve as practical and theoretically principled substitutes for SHAP-based approximations in modern explainability pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出ESENSC_rev2作为SHAP的理论基础和计算高效替代方案，通过合作博弈论框架实现特征归因，在保持近似精度的同时显著提升可扩展性。
AI.motivation: SHAP计算成本高，特别是在高维特征场景下可扩展性差。需要一种既有理论依据又计算高效的特征归因方法作为SHAP的实用替代方案。
AI.method: 基于合作博弈论构建XAI-TU游戏框架，研究等盈余型和比例分配型归因规则，提出ESENSC_rev2规则，结合两个多项式时间闭式规则，确保XAI-TU域中的零玩家性质。
AI.result: 在表格预测任务上的实验表明，ESENSC_rev2能紧密近似精确SHAP，同时随着特征数量增加显著提升可扩展性。等盈余型归因规则能在计算成本和近似精度之间取得良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: ESENSC_rev2通过公理化特征被唯一确定，表明公理化证明且计算高效的归因规则可以作为SHAP基于近似的实用且有理论原则的替代方案，适用于现代可解释性流程。

title: DEP: A Decentralized Large Language Model Evaluation Protocol
summary: With the rapid development of Large Language Models (LLMs), a large number of benchmarks have been proposed. However, most benchmarks lack unified evaluation standard and require the manual implementation of custom scripts, making results hard to ensure consistency and reproducibility. Furthermore, mainstream evaluation frameworks are centralized, with datasets and answers, which increases the risk of benchmark leakage. To address these issues, we propose a Decentralized Evaluation Protocol (DEP), a decentralized yet unified and standardized evaluation framework through a matching server without constraining benchmarks. The server can be mounted locally or deployed remotely, and once adapted, it can be reused over the long term. By decoupling users, LLMs, and benchmarks, DEP enables modular, plug-and-play evaluation: benchmark files and evaluation logic stay exclusively on the server side. In remote setting, users cannot access the ground truth, thereby achieving data isolation and leak-proof evaluation. To facilitate practical adoption, we develop DEP Toolkit, a protocol-compatible toolkit that supports features such as breakpoint resume, concurrent requests, and congestion control. We also provide detailed documentation for adapting new benchmarks to DEP. Using DEP toolkit, we evaluate multiple LLMs across benchmarks. Experimental results verify the effectiveness of DEP and show that it reduces the cost of deploying benchmark evaluations. As of February 2026, we have adapted over 60 benchmarks and continue to promote community co-construction to support unified evaluation across various tasks and domains.

AI.tldr: 提出DEP去中心化评估协议，解决LLM基准测试中标准不统一、脚本手动实现、数据泄露等问题，通过匹配服务器实现模块化评估，已适配60+基准测试。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM基准测试存在三个主要问题：1) 缺乏统一评估标准，需要手动实现自定义脚本，导致结果一致性差；2) 主流评估框架集中化，数据集和答案集中存储，存在基准泄露风险；3) 评估过程难以复现。
AI.method: 提出去中心化评估协议(DEP)，通过匹配服务器实现用户、LLM和基准测试的解耦。基准文件和评估逻辑仅保留在服务器端，支持本地挂载或远程部署。开发DEP Toolkit工具包，支持断点续传、并发请求和拥塞控制等功能。
AI.result: 实验验证了DEP的有效性，降低了基准评估部署成本。截至2026年2月，已适配超过60个基准测试，支持跨任务和领域的统一评估，促进社区共建。
AI.conclusion: DEP协议解决了LLM基准测试中的标准化、一致性和数据泄露问题，通过去中心化架构实现了模块化、即插即用的评估框架，为社区提供了可持续的评估解决方案。

title: How Well Does Agent Development Reflect Real-World Work?
summary: AI agents are increasingly developed and evaluated on benchmarks relevant to human work, yet it remains unclear how representative these benchmarking efforts are of the labor market as a whole. In this work, we systematically study the relationship between agent development efforts and the distribution of real-world human work by mapping benchmark instances to work domains and skills. We first analyze 43 benchmarks and 72,342 tasks, measuring their alignment with human employment and capital allocation across all 1,016 real-world occupations in the U.S. labor market. We reveal substantial mismatches between agent development that tends to be programming-centric, and the categories in which human labor and economic value are concentrated. Within work areas that agents currently target, we further characterize current agent utility by measuring their autonomy levels, providing practical guidance for agent interaction strategies across work scenarios. Building on these findings, we propose three measurable principles for designing benchmarks that better capture socially important and technically challenging forms of work: coverage, realism, and granular evaluation.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了AI智能体基准测试与真实劳动力市场的匹配度，发现当前AI开发集中在编程领域，而人类劳动和经济价值分布更广，提出了改进基准设计的三个原则。
AI.motivation: AI智能体越来越多地在与人类工作相关的基准上进行开发和评估，但目前不清楚这些基准测试是否能代表整个劳动力市场。研究旨在系统分析智能体开发工作与真实世界人类工作分布之间的关系。
AI.method: 首先分析了43个基准测试和72,342个任务，将它们映射到工作领域和技能，测量它们与美国劳动力市场中1,016个真实职业的人类就业和资本分配的匹配度。在智能体当前针对的工作领域内，进一步通过测量自主水平来表征当前智能体的效用。
AI.result: 揭示了智能体开发（倾向于以编程为中心）与人类劳动和经济价值集中的类别之间存在显著不匹配。在智能体当前针对的工作领域内，提供了跨工作场景的智能体交互策略实用指导。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究发现，提出了三个可衡量的基准设计原则，以更好地捕捉具有社会重要性和技术挑战性的工作形式：覆盖度、真实性和细粒度评估。

title: Antibody: Strengthening Defense Against Harmful Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models via Attenuating Harmful Gradient Influence
summary: Fine-tuning-as-a-service introduces a threat to Large Language Models' safety when service providers fine-tune their models on poisoned user-submitted datasets, a process known as harmful fine-tuning attacks. In this work, we show that by regularizing the gradient contribution of harmful samples encountered during fine-tuning, we can effectively mitigate the impact of harmful fine-tuning attacks. To this end, we introduce Antibody, a defense strategy that first ensures robust safety alignment for the model before fine-tuning, and then applies a safety-preservation learning algorithm during fine-tuning. Specifically, in the alignment stage before fine-tuning, we propose optimizing the model to be in a flat loss region with respect to harmful samples, which makes the safety alignment more resilient to subsequent harmful fine-tuning. Then, in the fine-tuning stage, we design a fine-tuning algorithm that applies a weighting scheme to all samples in each training batch to inhibit the model from learning from harmful samples while encouraging learning from benign samples. Experimental results demonstrate that Antibody successfully mitigates harmful fine-tuning attacks while boosting fine-tuning performance on the user-submitted dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出Antibody防御策略，通过梯度正则化有害样本，在微调前进行安全对齐，微调中应用安全保护学习算法，有效缓解有害微调攻击
AI.motivation: 微调即服务（Fine-tuning-as-a-service）存在安全威胁，服务提供商可能在用户提交的有毒数据集上进行微调，导致有害微调攻击。需要防御策略来保护大语言模型的安全性
AI.method: Antibody防御策略包含两个阶段：1) 微调前对齐阶段：优化模型使其处于有害样本的平坦损失区域，增强安全对齐的鲁棒性；2) 微调阶段：设计加权方案，抑制从有害样本学习，鼓励从良性样本学习
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Antibody成功缓解了有害微调攻击，同时提升了在用户提交数据集上的微调性能
AI.conclusion: 通过梯度正则化有害样本的贡献，Antibody能够有效防御有害微调攻击，在保护模型安全性的同时保持微调效果

title: Token-level Data Selection for Safe LLM Fine-tuning
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on custom datasets has become a standard approach for adapting these models to specific domains and applications. However, recent studies have shown that such fine-tuning can lead to significant degradation in the model's safety. Existing defense methods operate at the sample level and often suffer from an unsatisfactory trade-off between safety and utility. To address this limitation, we perform a systematic token-level diagnosis of safety degradation during fine-tuning. Based on this, we propose token-level data selection for safe LLM fine-tuning (TOSS), a novel framework that quantifies the safety risk of each token by measuring the loss difference between a safety-degraded model and a utility-oriented model. This token-level granularity enables accurate identification and removal of unsafe tokens, thereby preserving valuable task-specific information. In addition, we introduce a progressive refinement strategy, TOSS-Pro, which iteratively enhances the safety-degraded model's ability to identify unsafe tokens. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach robustly safeguards LLMs during fine-tuning while achieving superior downstream task performance, significantly outperforming existing sample-level defense methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/Polly-LYP/TOSS.

AI.tldr: TOSS：一种基于token级数据选择的LLM安全微调框架，通过量化每个token的安全风险来防止微调过程中的安全性退化，同时保持任务性能
AI.motivation: 现有LLM微调方法在自定义数据集上会导致模型安全性显著下降，而现有的样本级防御方法在安全性和实用性之间存在不理想的权衡
AI.method: 提出token级安全退化诊断，基于安全退化模型和实用导向模型的损失差异量化每个token的安全风险，通过token级数据选择移除不安全token，并引入TOSS-Pro渐进优化策略迭代提升模型识别不安全token的能力
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在微调过程中能有效保护LLM安全性，同时在下游任务上取得优于现有样本级防御方法的性能
AI.conclusion: TOSS框架通过token级粒度实现了安全性和实用性的更好平衡，为LLM安全微调提供了有效解决方案

title: Agents Learn Their Runtime: Interpreter Persistence as Training-Time Semantics
summary:
Tool-augmented LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents that interleave natural-language reasoning with executable Python actions, as in CodeAct-style frameworks. In deployment, these agents rely on runtime state that persists across steps. By contrast, common training pipelines treat agent traces as token sequences, with execution semantics left implicit. This raises a data-centric question: Is state persistence merely an inference-time scaffold, or can models learn to exploit it when training data exposes the corresponding execution semantics?
  We isolate state persistence as a training-time variable. We introduce Opaque Knapsack, a procedurally generated family of partially observable optimization tasks designed to prevent one-shot solutions. Item attributes and constraints are hidden behind budgeted tool calls, forcing multi-turn control flow and iterative state revision. Holding task instances, prompts, tools, model, and supervision fixed, we generate paired trajectories differing only in whether interpreter state persists across steps or resets after each action. We then fine-tune identical base models (Qwen3-8B) on each trace variant and evaluate all four train-runtime combinations.
  Our 2x2 cross-evaluation shows that execution semantics primarily affect how agents reach solutions, not whether they do: solution quality is statistically indistinguishable across conditions, but token cost and stability differ substantially. A persistent-trained model in a stateless runtime triggers missing-variable errors in roughly 80% of episodes; a stateless-trained model in a persistent runtime redundantly re-derives retained state, using roughly 3.5x more tokens.
  Interpreter persistence should be treated as a first-class semantic of agent traces. Aligning fine-tuning data with deployment runtimes improves efficiency and reduces brittle train-runtime mismatches.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了工具增强LLM中状态持久性对训练和推理的影响，发现状态持久性应被视为智能体轨迹的一等语义，训练数据与部署运行时的对齐能提高效率并减少脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 当前工具增强LLM的训练通常将智能体轨迹视为token序列，而执行语义是隐式的。这引发了一个数据中心问题：状态持久性仅仅是推理时的脚手架，还是模型可以在训练数据暴露相应执行语义时学会利用它？
AI.method: 引入Opaque Knapsack任务家族，这是一个程序生成的部分可观察优化任务，通过隐藏属性和约束来强制多轮控制流和迭代状态修订。保持任务实例、提示、工具、模型和监督不变，生成仅在不同步骤间状态是否持久化的配对轨迹。然后在每个轨迹变体上微调相同的基模型(Qwen3-8B)，并评估所有四种训练-运行时组合。
AI.result: 2x2交叉评估显示执行语义主要影响智能体如何达到解决方案，而不是是否达到：解决方案质量在统计上无差异，但token成本和稳定性差异显著。在无状态运行时中持久训练模型约80%的episode会触发缺失变量错误；在持久运行时中无状态训练模型会冗余地重新推导保留状态，使用约3.5倍更多token。
AI.conclusion: 解释器持久性应被视为智能体轨迹的一等语义。将微调数据与部署运行时对齐可以提高效率并减少脆弱的训练-运行时不匹配。

title: Trinity: A Scenario-Aware Recommendation Framework for Large-Scale Cold-Start Users
summary: Early-stage users in a new scenario intensify cold-start challenges, yet prior works often address only parts of the problem through model architecture. Launching a new user experience to replace an established product involves sparse behavioral signals, low-engagement cohorts, and unstable model performance. We argue that effective recommendations require the synergistic integration of feature engineering, model architecture, and stable model updating. We propose Trinity, a framework embodying this principle. Trinity extracts valuable information from existing scenarios while ensuring predictive effectiveness and accuracy in the new scenario. In this paper, we showcase Trinity applied to a billion-user Microsoft product transition. Both offline and online experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves substantial improvements in addressing the combined challenge of new users in new scenarios.

AI.tldr: Trinity框架通过特征工程、模型架构和稳定更新的协同集成，解决新场景早期用户的冷启动问题，在微软产品过渡中取得显著效果。
AI.motivation: 新场景中的早期用户加剧了冷启动挑战，现有工作通常只通过模型架构解决部分问题。产品过渡面临稀疏行为信号、低参与度群体和模型性能不稳定等问题。
AI.method: 提出Trinity框架，将特征工程、模型架构和稳定模型更新协同集成。从现有场景提取有价值信息，同时确保新场景的预测效果和准确性。
AI.result: 在微软亿级用户产品过渡中，离线和在线实验都显示Trinity框架在处理新用户新场景综合挑战方面取得显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 有效推荐需要特征工程、模型架构和稳定更新的协同集成，Trinity框架成功解决了新场景早期用户的冷启动问题。

title: Reasoning or Rationalization? The Role of Justifications in Masked Diffusion Models for Fact Verification
summary: Unlike autoregressive models, which generate tokens sequentially and benefit from reasoning-before-answering strategies such as Chain-of-Thought, Masked Diffusion Language Models (MDLMs) refine all sequence positions simultaneously, raising questions about how these models handle tasks requiring justified verdicts. In this work, we investigate the dynamics of MDLM reasoning on fact verification, examining whether justifications serve as genuine reasoning or post-hoc rationalization. We observe that MDLMs typically converge on a verdict early in the diffusion process, treating it as a global anchor that is resolved before the justification is complete. Crucially, enforcing a reasoning-first constraint via delayed verdict unmasking actively degrades performance, dropping accuracy from 86.2% to 71.9% as accumulating justification tokens introduce inconsistencies that override initially correct predictions. Interventional experiments reveal that the model rationalizes incorrect forced verdicts in 56% of cases, and that verdicts are strongly causally dependent on justification quality (57.3% accuracy with corrupted justifications vs. 97.1% with ground-truth). This causal dependence explains the degradation under forced deliberation: as the model generates noisy justification tokens, it conditions on them, gradually overriding its initially correct assessment. Our findings suggest that for fact verification with MDLMs, extended deliberation can be counterproductive, risking the dilution of accurate early predictions with noise introduced during justification generation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，掩码扩散语言模型在事实核查任务中，通常早期就确定结论，然后生成事后合理化解释，强制推理优先反而会降低准确性。
AI.motivation: 探索掩码扩散语言模型在需要推理的任务（如事实核查）中的工作机制，特别是验证模型是否真正进行推理还是仅进行事后合理化。
AI.method: 通过实验分析MDLM在事实核查任务中的动态过程，包括强制推理优先约束（延迟结论揭露）、干预实验（强制错误结论）以及因果依赖分析（破坏解释文本）。
AI.result: MDLM通常在扩散过程早期就确定结论，将其作为全局锚点；强制推理优先约束使准确率从86.2%降至71.9%；56%情况下模型会合理化错误的强制结论；结论质量强烈依赖于解释质量（破坏解释时准确率57.3% vs 真实解释时97.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 对于MDLM的事实核查任务，延长推理过程可能适得其反，因为生成解释时引入的噪声会覆盖早期正确的预测，表明这些模型倾向于先确定结论再进行事后合理化。

title: FastBUS: A Fast Bayesian Framework for Unified Weakly-Supervised Learning
summary: Machine Learning often involves various imprecise labels, leading to diverse weakly supervised settings. While recent methods aim for universal handling, they usually suffer from complex manual pre-work, ignore the relationships between associated labels, or are unable to batch process due to computational design flaws, resulting in long running times. To address these limitations, we propose a novel general framework that efficiently infers latent true label distributions across various weak supervisions. Our key idea is to express the label brute-force search process as a probabilistic transition of label variables, compressing diverse weakly supervised DFS tree structures into a shared Bayesian network. From this, we derived a latent probability calculation algorithm based on generalized belief propagation and proposed two joint acceleration strategies: 1) introducing a low-rank assumption to approximate the transition matrix, reducing time complexity; 2) designing an end-to-end state evolution module to learn batch-scale transition matrices, facilitating multi-category batch processing. In addition, the equivalence of our method with the EM algorithm in most scenarios is further demonstrated. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves SOTA results under most weakly supervised settings, and achieves up to hundreds of times faster acceleration in running time compared to other general methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一个通用框架，通过将标签搜索过程建模为概率转移，压缩弱监督树结构为贝叶斯网络，实现高效潜在标签分布推断，支持批量处理并大幅加速。
AI.motivation: 现有通用弱监督方法存在三个主要问题：1) 需要复杂的手动预处理工作；2) 忽略了关联标签之间的关系；3) 由于计算设计缺陷无法进行批量处理，导致运行时间过长。需要一种能同时解决这些限制的通用框架。
AI.method: 将标签暴力搜索过程表达为标签变量的概率转移，将多样化的弱监督DFS树结构压缩为共享的贝叶斯网络。基于广义信念传播推导潜在概率计算算法，并提出两种联合加速策略：1) 引入低秩假设近似转移矩阵，降低时间复杂度；2) 设计端到端状态演化模块学习批量尺度的转移矩阵，支持多类别批量处理。
AI.result: 在大多数弱监督设置下达到SOTA结果，相比其他通用方法在运行时间上实现了高达数百倍的加速。同时证明了该方法在大多数场景下与EM算法的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用框架能够高效推断潜在真实标签分布，解决了现有方法的局限性，在准确性和效率方面都表现出色，为处理各种弱监督问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: XAI-enhanced Comparative Opinion Mining via Aspect-based Scoring and Semantic Reasoning
summary: Comparative opinion mining involves comparing products from different reviews. However, transformer-based models designed for this task often lack transparency, which can adversely hinder the development of trust in users. In this paper, we propose XCom, an enhanced transformer-based model separated into two principal modules, i.e., (i) aspect-based rating prediction and (ii) semantic analysis for comparative opinion mining. XCom also incorporates a Shapley additive explanations module to provide interpretable insights into the model's deliberative decisions. Empirically, XCom achieves leading performances compared to other baselines, which demonstrates its effectiveness in providing meaningful explanations, making it a more reliable tool for comparative opinion mining. Source code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/XCom.

AI.tldr: XCom是一个用于比较观点挖掘的增强型Transformer模型，包含基于方面的评分预测和语义分析两个模块，并整合了SHAP解释模块以提高模型透明度。
AI.motivation: 当前基于Transformer的比较观点挖掘模型缺乏透明度，这会影响用户对模型的信任。需要开发既有效又可解释的模型来提升可靠性。
AI.method: 提出XCom模型，包含两个主要模块：(1)基于方面的评分预测模块；(2)语义分析模块用于比较观点挖掘。同时整合了Shapley加性解释模块来提供可解释的决策洞察。
AI.result: XCom在实验中相比其他基线模型取得了领先性能，证明了其在提供有意义的解释方面的有效性，使其成为更可靠的比较观点挖掘工具。
AI.conclusion: XCom通过整合可解释性模块，不仅提升了比较观点挖掘的性能，还增强了模型的透明度，使其成为更可靠的工具。源代码已公开。

title: The Lattice Representation Hypothesis of Large Language Models
summary: We propose the Lattice Representation Hypothesis of large language models: a symbolic backbone that grounds conceptual hierarchies and logical operations in embedding geometry. Our framework unifies the Linear Representation Hypothesis with Formal Concept Analysis (FCA), showing that linear attribute directions with separating thresholds induce a concept lattice via half-space intersections. This geometry enables symbolic reasoning through geometric meet (intersection) and join (union) operations, and admits a canonical form when attribute directions are linearly independent. Experiments on WordNet sub-hierarchies provide empirical evidence that LLM embeddings encode concept lattices and their logical structure, revealing a principled bridge between continuous geometry and symbolic abstraction.

AI.tldr: LLM嵌入编码概念格结构，通过几何相交与并集操作实现符号推理，连接连续几何与符号抽象
AI.motivation: 提出格表示假说，旨在揭示大语言模型中概念层次和逻辑操作如何通过嵌入几何进行符号化表示，建立连续几何与符号抽象之间的桥梁
AI.method: 将线性表示假说与形式概念分析统一，通过带分离阈值的线性属性方向诱导概念格，利用几何相交（meet）和并集（join）操作实现符号推理
AI.result: 在WordNet子层次上的实验提供经验证据，表明LLM嵌入确实编码了概念格及其逻辑结构，当属性方向线性独立时存在规范形式
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型通过嵌入几何编码符号骨架，支持概念层次和逻辑操作，为连续表示与符号推理之间提供了原则性桥梁

title: Adam Converges Without Any Modification On Update Rules
summary: Adam is the default algorithm for training neural networks, including large language models (LLMs). However, \citet{reddi2019convergence} provided an example that Adam diverges, raising concerns for its deployment in AI model training. We identify a key mismatch between the divergence example and practice: \citet{reddi2019convergence} pick the problem after picking the hyperparameters of Adam, i.e., $(β_1,β_2)$; while practical applications often fix the problem first and then tune $(β_1,β_2)$. In this work, we prove that Adam converges with proper problem-dependent hyperparameters. First, we prove that Adam converges when $β_2$ is large and $β_1 < \sqrt{β_2}$. Second, when $β_2$ is small, we point out a region of $(β_1,β_2)$ combinations where Adam can diverge to infinity. Our results indicate a phase transition for Adam from divergence to convergence when changing the $(β_1, β_2)$ combination. To our knowledge, this is the first phase transition in $(β_1,β_2)$ 2D-plane reported in the literature, providing rigorous theoretical guarantees for Adam optimizer. We further point out that the critical boundary $(β_1^*, β_2^*)$ is problem-dependent, and particularly, dependent on batch size. This provides suggestions on how to tune $β_1$ and $β_2$: when Adam does not work well, we suggest tuning up $β_2$ inversely with batch size to surpass the threshold $β_2^*$, and then trying $β_1< \sqrt{β_2}$. Our suggestions are supported by reports from several empirical studies, which observe improved LLM training performance when applying them.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了Adam优化器的收敛性，指出先前关于Adam发散的研究是在选定超参数后选择问题，而实际应用是先固定问题再调参。论文证明了Adam在特定问题依赖的超参数下会收敛，并发现了从发散到收敛的相变现象。
AI.motivation: Adam是训练神经网络（包括大语言模型）的默认算法，但Reddi等人（2019）给出了Adam发散的示例，引发了对其在AI模型训练中部署的担忧。作者发现发散示例与实践之间存在关键不匹配：Reddi等人是在选定Adam超参数后选择问题，而实际应用是先固定问题再调参。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明Adam在不同超参数组合下的收敛性：1）当β₂较大且β₁ < √β₂时，Adam收敛；2）当β₂较小时，识别出Adam可能发散到无穷大的(β₁,β₂)组合区域。发现了Adam从发散到收敛的相变现象，并指出临界边界(β₁*,β₂*)是问题依赖的，特别是依赖于批量大小。
AI.result: 证明了Adam在适当的问题依赖超参数下会收敛，首次在文献中报告了(β₁,β₂)二维平面上的相变现象，为Adam优化器提供了严格的理论保证。发现临界边界依赖于批量大小，建议当Adam效果不佳时，应逆批量大小调整β₂以超过阈值β₂*，然后尝试β₁ < √β₂。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为Adam优化器提供了重要的理论见解，解释了先前发散示例与实践成功之间的差异。提出的超参数调整建议（逆批量大小调整β₂，然后尝试β₁ < √β₂）得到了多个实证研究的支持，这些研究观察到在应用这些建议后LLM训练性能得到改善。

title: Phys-Diff: A Physics-Inspired Latent Diffusion Model for Tropical Cyclone Forecasting
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to IEEE ICASSP 2026
summary: Tropical cyclone (TC) forecasting is critical for disaster warning and emergency response. Deep learning methods address computational challenges but often neglect physical relationships between TC attributes, resulting in predictions lacking physical consistency. To address this, we propose Phys-Diff, a physics-inspired latent diffusion model that disentangles latent features into task-specific components (trajectory, pressure, wind speed) and employs cross-task attention to introduce prior physics-inspired inductive biases, thereby embedding physically consistent dependencies among TC attributes. Phys-Diff integrates multimodal data including historical cyclone attributes, ERA5 reanalysis data, and FengWu forecast fields via a Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, further enhancing forecasting performance. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on global and regional datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出Phys-Diff物理启发潜在扩散模型，通过任务特征解耦和跨任务注意力引入物理先验，实现热带气旋多属性物理一致性预测
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在热带气旋预测中常忽略物理属性间的关系，导致预测缺乏物理一致性，需要将物理先验知识融入模型
AI.method: 提出Phys-Diff物理启发潜在扩散模型：1）将潜在特征解耦为轨迹、气压、风速等任务特定组件；2）使用跨任务注意力引入物理启发的归纳偏置；3）通过Transformer编码器-解码器整合历史气旋属性、ERA5再分析数据和FengWu预报场等多模态数据
AI.result: 在全局和区域数据集上实现了最先进的预测性能，证明了物理一致性建模的有效性
AI.conclusion: Phys-Diff通过引入物理先验和跨任务依赖建模，显著提升了热带气旋预测的物理一致性和准确性，为灾害预警提供了更可靠的工具

title: Reasoning Boosts Opinion Alignment in LLMs
summary: Opinion modeling aims to capture individual or group political preferences, enabling applications such as digital democracies, where models could help shape fairer and more popular policies. Given their versatility, strong generalization capabilities, and demonstrated success across diverse text-to-text applications, large language models (LLMs) are natural candidates for this task. However, due to their statistical nature and limited causal understanding, they tend to produce biased opinions when prompted naively. In this work, we study whether reasoning can improve opinion alignment. Motivated by the recent advancement in mathematical reasoning enabled by reinforcement learning (RL), we train models to produce profile-consistent answers through structured reasoning. We evaluate our approach on three datasets covering U.S., European, and Swiss politics. Results indicate that reasoning enhances opinion modeling and is competitive with strong baselines, but does not fully remove bias, highlighting the need for additional mechanisms to build faithful political digital twins using LLMs. By releasing both our method and datasets, we establish a solid baseline to support future research on LLM opinion alignment.

AI.tldr: 通过强化学习训练LLMs进行结构化推理，以改善政治意见建模的准确性，但未能完全消除偏见
AI.motivation: LLMs在意见建模中具有潜力，但因其统计性质和有限因果理解，在简单提示下会产生偏见意见。研究推理是否能改善意见对齐
AI.method: 受数学推理中强化学习成功的启发，训练模型通过结构化推理产生与个人资料一致的答案。使用三个数据集（美国、欧洲、瑞士政治）进行评估
AI.result: 推理确实能增强意见建模能力，与强基线方法竞争，但未能完全消除偏见
AI.conclusion: 需要额外机制来构建忠实的政治数字孪生。通过发布方法和数据集，为未来LLM意见对齐研究建立了坚实基础

title: Extended Empirical Validation of the Explainability Solution Space
summary: This technical report provides an extended validation of the Explainability Solution Space (ESS) through cross-domain evaluation. While initial validation focused on employee attrition prediction, this study introduces a heterogeneous intelligent urban resource allocation system to demonstrate the generality and domain-independence of the ESS framework. The second case study integrates tabular, temporal, and geospatial data under multi-stakeholder governance conditions. Explicit quantitative positioning of representative XAI families is provided for both contexts. Results confirm that ESS rankings are not domain-specific but adapt systematically to governance roles, risk profiles, and stakeholder configurations. The findings reinforce ESS as a generalizable operational decision-support instrument for explainable AI strategy design across socio-technical systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过跨领域评估扩展验证了可解释性解决方案空间（ESS）框架，使用异构智能城市资源分配系统证明其通用性和领域独立性，结果显示ESS排名不是领域特定的，而是根据治理角色、风险配置和利益相关者结构系统性地适应。
AI.motivation: 虽然ESS框架在员工流失预测中进行了初步验证，但需要证明其在不同领域和复杂数据环境中的通用性。本研究旨在通过引入异构智能城市资源分配系统来验证ESS的领域独立性，特别是在多利益相关者治理条件下处理表格、时序和地理空间数据的场景。
AI.method: 采用跨领域评估方法，引入第二个案例研究：异构智能城市资源分配系统。该案例整合了表格数据、时序数据和地理空间数据，并在多利益相关者治理条件下运行。研究为两个案例（员工流失预测和城市资源分配）提供了代表性XAI家族的明确量化定位。
AI.result: 研究结果证实ESS排名不是领域特定的，而是根据治理角色、风险配置和利益相关者结构系统性地适应。ESS框架在不同领域和复杂数据环境中表现出良好的适应性和一致性。
AI.conclusion: ESS框架被证明是一个可推广的操作性决策支持工具，适用于跨社会技术系统的可解释AI策略设计，具有领域独立性和通用性。

title: Bridge Matching Sampler: Scalable Sampling via Generalized Fixed-Point Diffusion Matching
summary: Sampling from unnormalized densities using diffusion models has emerged as a powerful paradigm. However, while recent approaches that use least-squares `matching' objectives have improved scalability, they often necessitate significant trade-offs, such as restricting prior distributions or relying on unstable optimization schemes. By generalizing these methods as special forms of fixed-point iterations rooted in Nelson's relation, we develop a new method that addresses these limitations, called Bridge Matching Sampler (BMS). Our approach enables learning a stochastic transport map between arbitrary prior and target distributions with a single, scalable, and stable objective. Furthermore, we introduce a damped variant of this iteration that incorporates a regularization term to mitigate mode collapse and further stabilize training. Empirically, we demonstrate that our method enables sampling at unprecedented scales while preserving mode diversity, achieving state-of-the-art results on complex synthetic densities and high-dimensional molecular benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Bridge Matching Sampler (BMS)方法，通过推广固定点迭代解决扩散模型采样中的限制，实现任意先验与目标分布间的随机传输映射学习
AI.motivation: 现有基于最小二乘匹配目标的扩散模型采样方法存在显著权衡：要么限制先验分布，要么依赖不稳定的优化方案，需要更通用、稳定、可扩展的方法
AI.method: 将现有方法推广为基于Nelson关系的固定点迭代特殊形式，提出BMS方法，学习任意先验与目标分布间的随机传输映射；引入带正则项的阻尼变体缓解模式崩溃并稳定训练
AI.result: 在复杂合成密度和高维分子基准测试中实现最先进结果，能够在前所未有规模上进行采样同时保持模式多样性
AI.conclusion: BMS方法解决了现有扩散模型采样方法的限制，提供单一、可扩展且稳定的目标，实现了任意分布间的有效随机传输映射学习

title: Generative AI & Fictionality: How Novels Power Large Language Models
summary: Generative models, like the one in ChatGPT, are powered by their training data. The models are simply next-word predictors, based on patterns learned from vast amounts of pre-existing text. Since the first generation of GPT, it is striking that the most popular datasets have included substantial collections of novels. For the engineers and research scientists who build these models, there is a common belief that the language in fiction is rich enough to cover all manner of social and communicative phenomena, yet the belief has gone mostly unexamined. How does fiction shape the outputs of generative AI? Specifically, what are novels' effects relative to other forms of text, such as newspapers, Reddit, and Wikipedia? Since the 1970s, literature scholars such as Catherine Gallagher and James Phelan have developed robust and insightful accounts of how fiction operates as a form of discourse and language. Through our study of an influential open-source model (BERT), we find that LLMs leverage familiar attributes and affordances of fiction, while also fomenting new qualities and forms of social response. We argue that if contemporary culture is increasingly shaped by generative AI and machine learning, any analysis of today's various modes of cultural production must account for a relatively novel dimension: computational training data.

AI.tldr: 论文研究小说文本如何影响生成式AI（如BERT）的输出，通过与新闻、Reddit、维基百科等其他文本类型比较，探讨小说在AI训练数据中的独特作用。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式AI（如ChatGPT）的训练数据包含大量小说文本，工程师和研究人员普遍认为小说语言足够丰富，能涵盖各种社会交流现象，但这种假设尚未得到充分检验。需要研究小说如何塑造生成式AI的输出，以及小说相对于其他文本形式的独特影响。
AI.method: 通过研究有影响力的开源模型BERT，分析小说文本对语言模型的影响。借鉴文学学者（如Catherine Gallagher和James Phelan）自1970年代以来发展的关于小说作为话语和语言形式的理论框架，将小说与其他文本形式（如报纸、Reddit、维基百科）进行比较分析。
AI.result: 研究发现LLMs既利用了小说熟悉的属性和特性，也催生了新的品质和社会反应形式。小说在AI训练数据中发挥着独特作用，影响着模型的输出模式。
AI.conclusion: 如果当代文化日益受到生成式AI和机器学习的影响，那么对当今各种文化生产模式的分析必须考虑一个相对新颖的维度：计算训练数据，特别是小说文本在其中扮演的重要角色。

title: Beyond Reward: A Bounded Measure of Agent Environment Coupling
summary: Real-world reinforcement learning (RL) agents operate in closed-loop systems where actions shape future observations, making reliable deployment under distribution shifts a persistent challenge. Existing monitoring relies on reward or task metrics, capturing outcomes but missing early coupling failures. We introduce bipredictability (P) as the ratio of shared information in the observation, action, outcome loop to the total available information, a principled, real time measure of interaction effectiveness with provable bounds, comparable across tasks. An auxiliary monitor, the Information Digital Twin (IDT), computes P and its diagnostic components from the interaction stream. We evaluate SAC and PPO agents on MuJoCo HalfCheetah under eight agent, and environment-side perturbations across 168 trials. Under nominal operation, agents exhibit P = 0.33 plus minus 0.02, below the classical bound of 0.5, revealing an informational cost of action selection. The IDT detects 89.3% of perturbations versus 44.0% for reward based monitoring, with 4.4x lower median latency. Bipredictability enables early detection of interaction degradation before performance drops and provides a prerequisite signal for closed loop self regulation in deployed RL systems.

AI.tldr: 提出bipredictability作为衡量RL智能体交互有效性的实时指标，通过Information Digital Twin监控器计算，在扰动检测中比基于奖励的监控更早更准确。
AI.motivation: 现实世界RL智能体在闭环系统中运行，现有监控方法依赖奖励或任务指标，只能捕捉结果但会错过早期的耦合故障，需要更早检测交互退化的方法。
AI.method: 引入bipredictability(P)作为观察-行动-结果循环中共享信息与总可用信息的比率，设计Information Digital Twin监控器从交互流中计算P及其诊断组件。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo HalfCheetah上的168次试验中，正常操作时智能体P=0.33±0.02，低于经典界限0.5；IDT检测到89.3%的扰动，而基于奖励的监控仅44.0%，且延迟降低4.4倍。
AI.conclusion: bipredictability能够在性能下降前早期检测交互退化，为部署的RL系统提供闭环自我调节的先决信号，显著优于传统监控方法。

title: Mathematical Foundations of Poisoning Attacks on Linear Regression over Cumulative Distribution Functions
summary: Learned indexes are a class of index data structures that enable fast search by approximating the cumulative distribution function (CDF) using machine learning models (Kraska et al., SIGMOD'18). However, recent studies have shown that learned indexes are vulnerable to poisoning attacks, where injecting a small number of poison keys into the training data can significantly degrade model accuracy and reduce index performance (Kornaropoulos et al., SIGMOD'22). In this work, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of poisoning attacks targeting linear regression models over CDFs, one of the most basic regression models and a core component in many learned indexes. Our main contributions are as follows: (i) We present a theoretical proof characterizing the optimal single-point poisoning attack and show that the existing method yields the optimal attack. (ii) We show that in multi-point attacks, the existing greedy approach is not always optimal, and we rigorously derive the key properties that an optimal attack should satisfy. (iii) We propose a method to compute an upper bound of the multi-point poisoning attack's impact and empirically demonstrate that the loss under the greedy approach is often close to this bound. Our study deepens the theoretical understanding of attack strategies against linear regression models on CDFs and provides a foundation for the theoretical evaluation of attacks and defenses on learned indexes.

AI.tldr: 该论文对针对学习索引中线性回归模型的投毒攻击进行了理论分析，证明了单点攻击的最优性，揭示了多点攻击中贪婪方法的局限性，并提出了攻击影响的上界计算方法。
AI.motivation: 学习索引使用机器学习模型近似累积分布函数实现快速搜索，但近期研究表明它们容易受到投毒攻击。现有研究缺乏对线性回归模型投毒攻击的严格理论分析，而线性回归是许多学习索引的核心组件。
AI.method: 1) 理论证明单点投毒攻击的最优性，验证现有方法的有效性；2) 分析多点攻击，证明贪婪方法并非总是最优，推导最优攻击应满足的关键性质；3) 提出计算多点投毒攻击影响上界的方法。
AI.result: 1) 证明了现有单点攻击方法确实是最优的；2) 揭示了多点攻击中贪婪方法的局限性；3) 提出的上界计算方法表明贪婪方法的效果通常接近理论上界；4) 为学习索引的攻击防御理论评估奠定了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究深化了对CDF线性回归模型攻击策略的理论理解，为学习索引的攻击和防御理论评估提供了基础。研究结果表明，虽然单点攻击已有最优解，但多点攻击仍有优化空间，且贪婪方法在实践中表现良好。

title: Can Thinking Models Think to Detect Hateful Memes?
summary: Hateful memes often require compositional multimodal reasoning: the image and text may appear benign in isolation, yet their interaction conveys harmful intent. Although thinking-based multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently advanced vision-language understanding, their capabilities remain underexplored for hateful meme analysis. We propose a reinforcement learning based post-training framework that improves reasoning in thinking-based MLLMs through task-specific rewards and a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) objective. Specifically, we (i) conduct a systematic empirical study of off-the-shelf MLLMs for hateful meme understanding, (ii) extend an existing hateful meme dataset by generating weakly or pseudo-supervised chain-of-thought rationales via distillation, and (iii) introduce a GRPO-based objective that jointly optimizes meme classification and explanation quality to encourage fine-grained, step-by-step reasoning. Experiments on the Hateful Memes benchmark show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving accuracy and F1 by approximately 1 percent and explanation quality by approximately 3 percent. We will publicly release our code, dataset extensions, and evaluation resources to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的后训练框架，通过任务特定奖励和新型GRPO目标改进思维型MLLMs在仇恨表情包分析中的推理能力，在Hateful Memes基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 仇恨表情包需要组合式多模态推理：图像和文本单独看可能无害，但结合后传达有害意图。现有思维型多模态大语言模型在仇恨表情包分析方面的能力尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 对现成MLLMs进行系统实证研究；2) 通过蒸馏生成弱监督或伪监督的思维链理由扩展现有数据集；3) 引入基于GRPO的目标，联合优化表情包分类和解释质量，鼓励细粒度逐步推理。
AI.result: 在Hateful Memes基准上实现最先进性能，准确率和F1分数提升约1%，解释质量提升约3%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的强化学习后训练框架能有效提升思维型MLLMs在仇恨表情包分析中的推理能力，通过GRPO目标联合优化分类和解释任务，取得了显著改进。

title: Information-Theoretic Framework for Self-Adapting Model Predictive Controllers
summary: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a vital technique for autonomous systems, like Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs), enabling optimized motion planning. However, traditional MPC struggles to adapt to real-time changes such as dynamic obstacles and shifting system dynamics, lacking inherent mechanisms for self-monitoring and adaptive optimization. Here, we introduce Entanglement Learning (EL), an information-theoretic framework that enhances MPC adaptability through an Information Digital Twin (IDT). The IDT monitors and quantifies, in bits, the information flow between MPC inputs, control actions, and UAV behavior. By introducing new information-theoretic metrics we call entanglement metrics, it tracks variations in these dependencies. These metrics measure the mutual information between the optimizer's input, its control actions, and the resulting UAV dynamics, enabling a deeper understanding of their interrelationships. This allows the IDT to detect performance deviations and generate real-time adaptive signals to recalibrate MPC parameters, preserving stability. Unlike traditional MPC, which relies on error-based feedback, this dual-feedback approach leverages information flow for proactive adaptation to evolving conditions. Scalable and leveraging existing infrastructure, this framework improves MPC reliability and robustness across diverse scenarios, extending beyond UAV control to any MPC implementation requiring adaptive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Entanglement Learning框架，通过信息数字孪生和信息论度量增强MPC的自适应能力，实现无人机等自主系统的实时性能调整
AI.motivation: 传统MPC难以适应动态障碍物和系统变化，缺乏自我监控和自适应优化机制，需要更智能的适应性控制框架
AI.method: 引入Entanglement Learning框架和信息数字孪生，使用信息论度量（纠缠度量）量化MPC输入、控制动作和无人机行为之间的信息流，实现实时监控和参数调整
AI.result: 该框架通过信息流监控实现主动适应，提高MPC的可靠性和鲁棒性，可扩展到各种需要自适应性能的MPC应用场景
AI.conclusion: Entanglement Learning为MPC提供了基于信息论的适应性增强，超越了传统基于误差的反馈控制，实现了对动态环境的主动适应

title: Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift in Large Language Models: How Multi-Turn Conversations Reshape Model Confidence
summary: We introduce Self-Anchoring Calibration Drift (SACD), a hypothesized tendency for large language models (LLMs) to show systematic changes in expressed confidence when building iteratively on their own prior outputs across multi-turn conversations. We report an empirical study comparing three frontier models -- Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.2 -- across 150 questions spanning factual, technical, and open-ended domains, using three conditions: single-turn baseline (A), multi-turn self-anchoring (B), and independent repetition control (C). Results reveal a complex, model-heterogeneous pattern that partially diverges from pre-registered hypotheses. Claude Sonnet 4.6 exhibited significant decreasing confidence under self-anchoring (mean CDS = -0.032, t(14) = -2.43, p = .029, d = -0.627), while also showing significant calibration error drift (F(4,56) = 22.77, p < .001, eta^2 = .791). GPT-5.2 showed the opposite pattern in open-ended domains (mean CDS = +0.026) with significant ECE escalation by Turn 5. Gemini 3.1 Pro showed no significant CDS (t(14) = 0.38, p = .710), but its Condition C data reveals a striking ECE pattern: without self-anchoring, Gemini's calibration error drops from .327 to near zero across repetitions, whereas self-anchoring holds ECE flat at approximately .333 -- indicating that SACD can manifest as suppression of natural calibration improvement rather than ac

AI.tldr: 研究提出"自我锚定校准漂移"(SACD)概念，发现大语言模型在多轮对话中基于自身先前输出迭代构建时，会表现出系统性的置信度变化模式，且不同模型呈现异质性模式。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究大语言模型在多轮对话中基于自身先前输出迭代构建时，是否会出现系统性的置信度校准变化，即"自我锚定校准漂移"现象。
AI.method: 对Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.2三个前沿模型进行实证研究，涵盖150个事实性、技术性和开放式问题，设置三个条件：单轮基线(A)、多轮自我锚定(B)和独立重复控制(C)。
AI.result: Claude Sonnet 4.6在自我锚定条件下置信度显著下降，校准误差漂移显著；GPT-5.2在开放式领域呈现相反模式，置信度上升且校准误差增加；Gemini 3.1 Pro无显著置信度漂移，但自我锚定抑制了其自然的校准改善能力。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在多轮对话中确实存在自我锚定校准漂移现象，但具体模式具有模型异质性，SACD可能表现为置信度下降、上升或抑制自然校准改善等不同形式。

title: Learning to Attack: A Bandit Approach to Adversarial Context Poisoning
summary: Neural contextual bandits are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where subtle perturbations to rewards, actions, or contexts induce suboptimal decisions. We introduce AdvBandit, a black-box adaptive attack that formulates context poisoning as a continuous-armed bandit problem, enabling the attacker to jointly learn and exploit the victim's evolving policy. The attacker requires no access to the victim's internal parameters, reward function, or gradient information; instead, it constructs a surrogate model using a maximum-entropy inverse reinforcement learning module from observed context-action pairs and optimizes perturbations against this surrogate using projected gradient descent. An upper confidence bound-aware Gaussian process guides arm selection. An attack-budget control mechanism is also introduced to limit detection risk and overhead. We provide theoretical guarantees, including sublinear attacker regret and lower bounds on victim regret linear in the number of attacks. Experiments on three real-world datasets (Yelp, MovieLens, and Disin) against various victim contextual bandits demonstrate that our attack model achieves higher cumulative victim regret than state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: AdvBandit：一种针对神经上下文老虎机的黑盒自适应攻击方法，通过上下文投毒诱导受害者做出次优决策，无需访问受害者内部参数
AI.motivation: 神经上下文老虎机容易受到对抗攻击，其中对奖励、动作或上下文的微小扰动会导致次优决策。现有攻击方法通常需要访问受害者内部参数或梯度信息，限制了实际应用
AI.method: 将上下文投毒建模为连续臂老虎机问题，攻击者通过最大熵逆强化学习从观察到的上下文-动作对构建代理模型，使用投影梯度下降优化扰动，并通过上置信界感知的高斯过程指导臂选择
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集（Yelp、MovieLens、Disin）上对多种受害者上下文老虎机进行实验，AdvBandit比现有基线方法实现了更高的累积受害者遗憾
AI.conclusion: AdvBandit提供了一种有效的黑盒自适应攻击框架，具有理论保证（次线性攻击者遗憾和受害者遗憾线性下界），并引入了攻击预算控制机制来限制检测风险和开销

title: Suffix-Constrained Greedy Search Algorithms for Causal Language Models
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are powerful tools that have found applications beyond human-machine interfaces and chatbots. In particular, their ability to generate reasoning traces motivated their use in many prediction tasks like math question answering. Unfortunately, extracting the final answer in an LLM free-form output is difficult, as it is an information extraction problem on its own.
  In this work, we introduce suffix-constrained generation, that aims to produce well-formed LLM responses in which final answers follow strict templates and are guaranteed to be trivially parseable. To this end, we introduce several algorithms that are based on greedy search procedures. We experiment on several datasets, and show that our approach allows to guarantee trivial deterministic extraction of the final answer from an LLM output without having a negative impact on results, and even improving them.

AI.tldr: 提出后缀约束生成方法，确保LLM输出遵循严格模板，使最终答案可轻松解析提取
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在数学问答等预测任务中应用广泛，但其自由格式输出中的最终答案提取困难，需要解决信息提取问题
AI.method: 引入后缀约束生成方法，基于贪心搜索算法，强制LLM生成遵循严格模板的响应，确保最终答案格式规范
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法能保证从LLM输出中确定性提取最终答案，且不影响结果质量，甚至有所提升
AI.conclusion: 后缀约束生成方法有效解决了LLM输出中答案提取的难题，实现了可轻松解析的规范化响应生成

title: ASTRA-bench: Evaluating Tool-Use Agent Reasoning and Action Planning with Personal User Context
summary: Next-generation AI must manage vast personal data, diverse tools, and multi-step reasoning, yet most benchmarks remain context-free and single-turn. We present ASTRA-bench (Assistant Skills in Tool-use, Reasoning \& Action-planning), a benchmark that uniquely unifies time-evolving personal context with an interactive toolbox and complex user intents. Our event-driven pipeline generates 2,413 scenarios across four protagonists, grounded in longitudinal life events and annotated by referential, functional, and informational complexity. Evaluation of state-of-the-art models (e.g., Claude-4.5-Opus, DeepSeek-V3.2) reveals significant performance degradation under high-complexity conditions, with argument generation emerging as the primary bottleneck. These findings expose critical limitations in current agents' ability to ground reasoning within messy personal context and orchestrate reliable multi-step plans. We release ASTRA-bench with a full execution environment and evaluation scripts to provide a diagnostic testbed for developing truly context-aware AI assistants.

AI.tldr: ASTRA-bench是一个新的AI助手基准测试，专注于工具使用、推理和行动规划，结合了时间演进的个人上下文和复杂用户意图，揭示了当前模型在高复杂度场景下的性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 下一代AI需要处理大量个人数据、多样化工具和多步推理，但现有基准测试大多缺乏上下文且是单轮交互。需要创建一个能够评估AI助手在真实复杂情境下能力的基准测试。
AI.method: 开发了ASTRA-bench基准测试，包含2,413个场景，基于四个主角的纵向生活事件。采用事件驱动管道生成场景，并通过指代性、功能性和信息性三个维度进行复杂性标注。
AI.result: 评估了Claude-4.5-Opus、DeepSeek-V3.2等先进模型，发现在高复杂度条件下性能显著下降，参数生成成为主要瓶颈。当前代理在基于混乱个人上下文进行推理和编排可靠多步计划方面存在严重限制。
AI.conclusion: ASTRA-bench暴露了当前AI助手在上下文感知能力上的关键局限，为开发真正上下文感知的AI助手提供了诊断测试平台。作者发布了完整的执行环境和评估脚本。

title: Enhancing Molecular Property Predictions by Learning from Bond Modelling and Interactions
summary: Molecule representation learning is crucial for understanding and predicting molecular properties. However, conventional atom-centric models, which treat chemical bonds merely as pairwise interactions, often overlook complex bond-level phenomena like resonance and stereoselectivity. This oversight limits their predictive accuracy for nuanced chemical behaviors. To address this limitation, we introduce \textbf{DeMol}, a dual-graph framework whose architecture is motivated by a rigorous information-theoretic analysis demonstrating the information gain from a bond-centric perspective. DeMol explicitly models molecules through parallel atom-centric and bond-centric channels. These are synergistically fused by multi-scale Double-Helix Blocks designed to learn intricate atom-atom, atom-bond, and bond-bond interactions. The framework's geometric consistency is further enhanced by a regularization term based on covalent radii to enforce chemically plausible structures. Comprehensive evaluations on diverse benchmarks, including PCQM4Mv2, OC20 IS2RE, QM9, and MoleculeNet, show that DeMol establishes a new state-of-the-art, outperforming existing methods. These results confirm the superiority of explicitly modelling bond information and interactions, paving the way for more robust and accurate molecular machine learning.

AI.tldr: DeMol：基于信息论分析的双图分子表示学习框架，通过并行原子中心和键中心通道建模分子，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统原子中心模型将化学键仅视为成对相互作用，忽略了共振、立体选择性等复杂键级现象，限制了预测准确性。需要从键中心视角获取更多信息。
AI.method: 提出DeMol双图框架，包含并行原子中心和键中心通道，通过多尺度双螺旋块学习原子-原子、原子-键、键-键相互作用，并使用基于共价半径的正则化项增强几何一致性。
AI.result: 在PCQM4Mv2、OC20 IS2RE、QM9、MoleculeNet等多个基准测试中达到新的最先进水平，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 明确建模键信息和相互作用具有优越性，为更稳健准确的分子机器学习铺平了道路。

title: Linking Knowledge to Care: Knowledge Graph-Augmented Medical Follow-Up Question Generation
comment: Short paper published in the Findings of EACL 2026
summary: Clinical diagnosis is time-consuming, requiring intensive interactions between patients and medical professionals. While large language models (LLMs) could ease the pre-diagnostic workload, their limited domain knowledge hinders effective medical question generation. We introduce a Knowledge Graph-augmented LLM with active in-context learning to generate relevant and important follow-up questions, KG-Followup, serving as a critical module for the pre-diagnostic assessment. The structured medical domain knowledge graph serves as a seamless patch-up to provide professional domain expertise upon which the LLM can reason. Experiments demonstrate that KG-Followup outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 5% - 8% on relevant benchmarks in recall.

AI.tldr: KG-Followup：基于知识图谱增强和主动上下文学习的大语言模型，用于生成医学随访问题，提升预诊断评估效率
AI.motivation: 临床诊断耗时且需要医患深度互动，现有大语言模型在医学领域知识有限，难以生成有效的医学问题，需要增强其专业领域知识
AI.method: 提出KG-Followup框架，结合结构化医学知识图谱作为领域知识补丁，采用主动上下文学习机制，让LLM基于专业知识进行推理生成相关随访问题
AI.result: 实验显示KG-Followup在相关基准测试中的召回率比现有最优方法提升5%-8%
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强的LLM能有效提升医学问题生成质量，可作为预诊断评估的关键模块，减轻医疗专业人员工作负担

title: Words & Weights: Streamlining Multi-Turn Interactions via Co-Adaptation
summary: Test-time policy adaptation for multi-turn interactions (T2PAM) is essential for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with dynamic user needs during inference time. However, existing paradigms commonly treat test-time adaptation as a single-axis problem, either purely refining instructions (Prompt Engineering) or only adjusting weights (Test-Time Training), ignoring that interaction failures stem from a coupled mix of ambiguity and incapacity. We argue that these two optimization paths are not merely additive but synergistic: semantic clarity acts as a pre-conditioner for effective parameter updates. To this end, we propose ROSA2, a framework that reformulates interaction as a joint optimization problem over the heterogeneous space of Words and Weights. By mathematically decomposing the error signal, ROSA2 utilizes textual gradients to rectify intent ambiguity and parameter updates to bridge capability gaps. Theoretically, we prove that this co-adaptation strictly reduces the required parameter shift for convergence. Empirically, ROSA2 outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 30% on MATH while reducing interaction turns by 40%, demonstrating that refining the context unlocks the true potential of parameter updates.

AI.tldr: ROSA2是一个联合优化框架，通过同时调整提示词和模型权重来解决多轮交互中的测试时策略适应问题，显著提升性能并减少交互轮次。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法通常只关注单一维度：要么纯优化提示词（提示工程），要么只调整模型权重（测试时训练）。然而，交互失败往往源于意图模糊性和模型能力不足的耦合问题。作者认为这两种优化路径不是简单的叠加，而是协同作用：语义清晰度是有效参数更新的前提条件。
AI.method: 提出ROSA2框架，将交互重新表述为在"词与权重"异构空间上的联合优化问题。通过数学分解误差信号，利用文本梯度纠正意图模糊性，同时通过参数更新弥补能力差距。理论上证明了这种协同适应能严格减少收敛所需的参数偏移。
AI.result: 在MATH数据集上，ROSA2比最先进的基线方法性能提升30%，同时减少40%的交互轮次。这表明优化上下文能够释放参数更新的真正潜力。
AI.conclusion: 测试时策略适应需要同时考虑提示词优化和权重调整的协同作用。ROSA2通过联合优化词与权重空间，有效解决了多轮交互中的意图模糊性和能力不足问题，为LLM与动态用户需求的实时对齐提供了新思路。

title: DeepAFL: Deep Analytic Federated Learning
comment: Accepted in the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
